translations.english: Sigh. Very well. You're lucky Maramal has placed me in a very forgiving mood.
translations.chinese: 哎。好吧。你得感谢玛拉莫让我变得宽容了，算你走运。

translations.english: Wujeeta, you can't keep showing up here late. Bolli's just going to get someone to replace you.
translations.chinese: 巫杰塔，你不能一直这么晚来。波利会找人取代你的。

agentText:

translations.english: Bolli, I was looking at the finances and I noticed you've been donating gold to the Temple of Mara. Are you out of your mind?
translations.chinese: 波利，我在看财务状况，我发现你一直在向玛拉神庙捐金币。你是疯了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00046D7D]

translations.english: Maramal's been helping me through a rough patch. I just wanted to pay him back. It's not like he's keeping it!
translations.chinese: 玛拉莫曾经帮我度过难关。我只是想报答他。而且他又不是把钱留给自己！

translations.chinese: 嗯，我相信你也知道我们的城市卫兵没能为货物安全通过提供必要的保护。

translations.chinese: 确实。在那次袭击中我们损失了三个士兵。这是裂谷城悲哀的一天。

translations.chinese: 因甘？她很聪明，是个天然的姑娘！

translations.chinese: 别紧张，威克尔。咱们认识多久了？没错。检查过了。所有东西都在保险箱里了。

translations.chinese: 嗯，你说得对。这些所谓的“阴沟君子”就生活在下水道下面。

translations.chinese: 嗯嗯。我相信他会带着金币跑到外面把它抛到空中，让玛拉自己接住。别这样，波利。

translations.chinese: 让他们去干吧，你付钱雇他们就是为了这个！

translations.english: For goodness sake, Bolli! You barely lift a finger yourself when you're here except to point at things for your workers to do.
translations.chinese: 神啊，波利！当你在这里的时候，你一根手指都不用动，指使工人去干吧。

translations.chinese: 哎。好像贸易还不够冷清一样。现在街上又发生暴力事件了。

translations.english: Can you believe that fetcher had more than tripled the guard? There must be eight of them in there.
translations.chinese: 你敢信那个费彻把守卫力量翻了三倍么？里面少说有八个人。

translations.english: Hmph, yeah I did. That wood elf s'wit... he's a lot smarter than I expected.

translations.chinese: 布林乔夫会告诉你细节。

translations.chinese: 然而那里的老板突然决定单干，把我们拒之门外。得给他个教训。

translations.english: To get the answers you seek, you must travel to the top of the mountain and speak to our master, Paarthurnax.
translations.chinese: 想得到你想要的答案，就得到山顶去找我们的宗师，帕图纳克斯。

translations.chinese: 只有吼声强大之人才能开辟道路。来。我们教你一种龙吼，用来打通去见帕图纳克斯的道路。

translations.english: Sigh... fine, take whatever you want, so long as you help me get rid of Vals.
translations.chinese: 哎……好吧，随你拿吧，只要你能帮我除掉瓦尔斯就行。

translations.chinese: 小心点，这附近有个压板，我以前触发过，还被射了几镖。

translations.english: Okay, I think this door should lead to the main burial chamber where Vals is holed up. Let's get in there and put and end to this.
translations.chinese: 好了，我想这扇门应该通向瓦尔斯所在的主墓室了。我们进去吧，结束这一切。

translations.english: As I promised, my men stand ready. The great chains are oiled. We wait on your word.
translations.chinese: 我保证过，我的部下随时待命。大锁链也已经润滑过了。就等你的命令了。

translations.english: My men know what to do. Make sure you do your part. I'm putting my city in your hands.
translations.chinese: 我的人已经安排好了。做好你的分内之事。我可是把城市交到你的手里了。

translations.english: Now that it's upon us, I'm rather looking forward to the challenge. I'll be famouser than Olaf One-Eye!
translations.chinese: 现在轮到我们了。我很期待这个挑战。我将比“独眼”奥拉夫更加出名了！

translations.english: The thieves are up in Bleak Falls Barrow, northeast of town. I'd take you there, but with Lucan gone, I'm busy with the store.
translations.chinese: 贼跑到镇子东北的荒瀑古坟了。我本想帮你指个路，但卢坎去世了，我得忙着照看店里。

translations.english: Oh really? Well, I'm not going to hold my breath.
translations.chinese: 哦，真的吗？好，我不会屏息以待的。

translations.english: In any event, our anonymous chef shares a passion for food with all of Tamriel. And that anonymity will prove the Emperor's undoing.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，我们的匿名大厨点燃了全泰姆瑞尔的烹饪激情。但这种匿名性会害死皇帝。

translations.english: I do know the Gourmet was classically trained in traditional Breton cuisine in High Rock. So that's where he must have met Anton Virane.
translations.chinese: 我听说美食家在高岩接受过传统的布莱顿烹饪训练。他一定是在那儿认识的安东·维拉尼。

translations.english: Nobody knows his true identity. Well, nobody except Gaius Maro, and you've already taken care of him.
translations.chinese: 无人知道他的真实身份。除了加留斯·马洛之外没人知道，而他已经被你解决了。

agentText:

translations.english: Shouldn't you be out ruining someone's special day?
translations.chinese: 你不是该去毁了某人的好日子吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048B31]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Shouldn't you be out ruining someone's special day? | ZH: 你不是该去毁了某人的好日子吗？ | SID: 001C35

translations.english: Yes, well. Perhaps the proprietor of this establishment can assist you. Please, you're starting to... frighten me.
translations.chinese: 呃，嗯。也许店老板能帮你。拜托，你有点……吓到我了。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: The recipes were hailed as both practical and decadent.
translations.chinese: 被誉为实用而堕落的食谱。

translations.english: But his chocolate pate gives me the runs.
translations.chinese: 但巧克力馅饼不太合我口味。

translations.english: I've made a few of the Gourmet's dishes myself, actually. His roast mutton with Redguard berry sauce is to die for.
translations.chinese: 我也照着做了几个菜。他的红卫浆果酱汁配烤羊肉好极了。

translations.english: "Uncommon Taste." It was published a few years ago, and became a sensation throughout the Empire almost overnight.
translations.chinese: 《奇珍异味》。几年前出版的时候，一夜便轰动了整个帝国。

translations.english: Tell me about this cookbook.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说这本食谱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Tell me about this cookbook. | ZH: 跟我说说这本食谱。 | SID: 0006F1

translations.english: Oh dear. You're going to kill me now, aren't you?
translations.chinese: 哦，天啊。你是来杀我的吗？

translations.english: Gourmet? Why I... Um...
translations.chinese: 美食家？我……呃……

translations.english: You've served your last meal... Gourmet.
translations.chinese: 你已经完成最后一餐了……美食家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048C8E]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You've served your last meal... Gourmet. | ZH: 你已经完成最后一餐了……美食家。 | SID: 0068C1

translations.english: What? The Emperor? But I...
translations.chinese: 什么？皇帝？但我……

translations.english: Oh. Oh, by the gods, no. No, you can't do this. You can't!
translations.chinese: 哦。哦，神啊，不。不，你不能这么做。你不能！

translations.english: Soon, the Emperor will die. Murdered, by the Gourmet.
translations.chinese: 皇帝很快就要被美食家谋杀了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Soon, the Emperor will die. Murdered, by the Gourmet. | ZH: 皇帝很快就要被美食家谋杀了。 | SID: 008A47

translations.english: Whatever it is, I'm sure I can't be of help. I'm just here on... holiday.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，我肯定是帮不上什么忙。我只是在这里……度假。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048C90]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Whatever it is, I'm sure I can't be of help. I'm just here on... holiday. | ZH: 不管怎样，我肯定是帮不上什么忙。我只是在这里……度假。 | SID: 00CF86

translations.english: Yes. Gaius Maro, on orders from his father, arranged for the Gourmet to come to Skyrim months ago. To serve as the Emperor's personal chef.
translations.chinese: 没错，加留斯·马洛几个月前奉父命安排美食家来到天际。作为皇帝的御厨。

translations.english: But the Emperor canceled his journey at the last minute. Maro was smart, kept the Gourmet around, in case things changed.
translations.chinese: 但皇帝在出发前突然取消了行程。马洛很聪明，把美食家留了下来，以防情况变化。

translations.english: And so, the Gourmet has remained in seclusion, somewhere in Skyrim... on indefinite hold. Probably feels like a prisoner. But you'll fix that.
translations.chinese: 所以，美食家还隐居在天际某地。像个囚犯一样漫长的等待。但你会帮他解决的。

translations.english: So the Gourmet is in Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 这么说美食家在天际？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048C91]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes. Gaius Maro, on orders from his father, arranged for the Gourmet to come to Skyrim months ago. To serve as the Emperor's personal chef. | ZH: 没错，加留斯·马洛几个月前奉父命安排美食家来到天际。作为皇帝的御厨。 | SID: 00419F

translations.english: The Ebonmere is a conduit through which Nocturnal influences our world. Not through magic or blessings, but purely through luck.
translations.chinese: 黑檀池是诺克图娜尔影响咱们世界的通道。不是依靠魔法或赐福，而是纯粹的运气。

agentText:

translations.english: Even right this moment, I feel strange... when I don't think I should be feeling anything at all.
translations.chinese: 即使此时此刻，我也觉得很奇怪……即使我觉得我本不该有任何感觉的时候。

translations.english: As I get closer to the Ebonmere I begin to feel myself slipping away.
translations.chinese: 我离黑檀池越近，就越能感觉到自己在消逝。

translations.english: Whatever is affecting the Nightingale Sentinels is starting to affect me too.
translations.chinese: 影响夜莺哨卫们的东西也开始影响我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: As I get closer to the Ebonmere I begin to feel myself slipping away. | ZH: 我离黑檀池越近，就越能感觉到自己在消逝。 | SID: 00CF80
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Whatever is affecting the Nightingale Sentinels is starting to affect me too. | ZH: 影响夜莺哨卫们的东西也开始影响我了。 | SID: 00CF82

translations.english: And now Titus Mede II is as good as dead.
translations.chinese: 现在提图斯·迈德二世离死不远了。

translations.english: So it's done. You've killed the Gourmet.
translations.chinese: 所以你成功地杀掉了美食家。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: So it's done. You've killed the Gourmet. | ZH: 所以你成功地杀掉了美食家。 | SID: 010EAF

translations.english: Ah, indeed. I'm no master of the Voice like these worthy gentlemen, but it is written here in this scroll.
translations.chinese: 啊，确实。我不是那群老先生一样的吼声大师，但龙名就在这卷轴上。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048F01]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, indeed. I'm no master of the Voice like these worthy gentlemen, but it is written here in this scroll. | ZH: 啊，确实。我不是那群老先生一样的吼声大师，但龙名就在这卷轴上。 | SID: 00513A

translations.english: Hind siiv Alduin, hmm? No doubt you want to know where to find Alduin?
translations.chinese: 辛德 斯弗 奥杜因，嗯？你肯定想知道去哪里找到奥杜因吧？

translations.english: Zu'u bonaar. You went to a great deal of trouble to put me in this... humiliating position.
translations.chinese: 祖'乌 伯纳尔。你费尽心机把我置于……屈辱之中。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Zu'u bonaar. You went to a great deal of trouble to put me in this... humiliating position. | ZH: 祖'乌 伯纳尔。你费尽心机把我置于……屈辱之中。 | SID: 00CF6A

translations.english: Aam? Serve you? ...no. Ni tiid. If and when you defeat Alduin, I will reconsider.
translations.chinese: 阿姆？效忠你？……不。尼 提德。如果到时候你打败了奥杜因，我会考虑的。

translations.english: Hmm... krosis. There is one... detail about Skuldafn I neglected to mention.
translations.chinese: 嗯……科洛西斯。有一个……关于斯库达芬的细节我还没提。

translations.english: Horvutah med kodaav. Caught like a bear in a trap...
translations.chinese: 霍夫塔 米德 寇达夫。像只熊一样被困在陷阱里……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00048F04]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Horvutah med kodaav. Caught like a bear in a trap... | ZH: 霍夫塔 米德 寇达夫。像只熊一样被困在陷阱里…… | SID: 00CF69

translations.english: Zu'u lost ofan hin laan... now that I have answered your question, you will allow me to go free?
translations.chinese: 祖'乌 洛斯特 欧凡 兰……我回答了你的问题，可以放我走了吗？

translations.english: Mindoraan, pah ok middovahhe lahvraan til. I surely do not need to warn you that all his remaining strength is marshalled there.
translations.chinese: 米多兰，帕 欧克 米多瓦赫 拉维兰 提尔。我应该不需要再提醒你，他的剩余力量全都汇集到那里了。

translations.english: His door to Sovngarde is at Skuldafn, one of his ancient fanes high in the eastern mountains.
translations.chinese: 他前往松加德的传送门设在斯库达芬。那里是他藏在东部群山高处的古老神庙。

translations.english: He has travelled to Sovngarde to regain his strength, devouring the sillesejoor... the souls of the mortal dead. A privilege he jealously guards...
translations.chinese: 他会前往松加德恢复力量，吞食斯乐瑟约尔……凡人死者的灵魂。这是他紧紧守护的权能。

translations.english: Unslaad krosis. Innumerable pardons. I digress.
translations.chinese: 安斯拉德 科洛西斯。万分抱歉。我跑题了。

translations.chinese: 啊，你不知道？龙族的名字往往是由三个力量之语组成，也就是龙吼。

translations.english: By calling the dragon with the Voice, he will hear you wherever he might be.
translations.chinese: 通过吼声呼唤，无论他身处何方，都会听到。

translations.english: Zok frini grind ko grah drun viiki, Dovahkiin.
translations.chinese: 佐克 福瑞尼 格瑞德 寇 格拉 如恩 威科，都瓦克因。

translations.english: Ah. I forget. You do not have the dovah speech.
translations.chinese: 哈。我忘了。你根本听不懂都瓦之语。

translations.english: My... eagerness to meet you in battle was my... undoing, Dovahkiin. I salute your, hmm, low cunning in devising such a grahmindol - strategem.
translations.chinese: 我……渴望在战斗中与你一决胜负……这是我的败因，都瓦克因。我真佩服你，唔，设计了这么一个狡猾的格拉明都……战略。

translations.english: Rinik vazah. An apt phrase. Alduin bovul. One reason I came to your call was to test your Thu'um for myself.
translations.chinese: 瑞尼克 瓦扎。形容很恰当。奥杜因 伯维尔。我来此的原因之一就是亲自测验你的吐'目。

translations.english: Many of us have begun to question Alduin's lordship, whether his Thu'um was truly the strongest.
translations.chinese: 我们很多都已开始质疑奥杜因的统治地位，怀疑他的吐'目是否还是最强。

translations.english: Among ourselves, of course. Mu ni meyye. None were yet ready to openly defy him.
translations.chinese: 在我们之中他无疑是最强的。姆 尼 米诶耶。还没谁准备公然反对他。

translations.english: He's not compelled to, but dragons are prideful by nature and loath to refuse a challenge.
translations.chinese: 他不是被迫的。但龙族生性高傲，不会拒绝挑战。

translations.english: I think it very likely that he will be unable to resist investigating your call.
translations.chinese: 我想他应该会忍不住去调查你的呼唤。

translations.english: Your Voice in particular is likely to intrigue this dragon, after your victory over Alduin.
translations.chinese: 在你战胜了奥杜因之后，你的吼声很可能引起他的兴趣。

translations.chinese: 大部分军团都被拖在与先祖神洲的边界上。皇帝不能冒险削弱希罗帝尔的防御。

translations.chinese: 他开出了价码，按他意志行事。谋杀、谣传、瘟疫，为了秘密，这都能忍了。

EDID: [0004BA57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Stormcloaks will withdraw from Hjaalmarch, and Idgrod Ravencrone will resume the Jarlship. | ZH: 风暴斗篷从希雅陲撤军，“老乌鸦”艾德格洛德复位领主。 | SID: 00CE15

translations.english: Falkreath will be returned to Imperial control, under the authority of Jarl Siddgeir.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯归还帝国，由西德盖尔领主治理。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Falkreath will be returned to Imperial control, under the authority of Jarl Siddgeir. | ZH: 佛克瑞斯归还帝国，由西德盖尔领主治理。 | SID: 00413D

translations.english: The Pale will be turned over to the Empire. Brina Merilis will assume the Jarlship in Dawnstar.
translations.chinese: 苍原归还帝国。由布里那·莫里利斯接任晨星领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Pale will be turned over to the Empire. Brina Merilis will assume the Jarlship in Dawnstar. | ZH: 苍原归还帝国。由布里那·莫里利斯接任晨星领主。 | SID: 00CE13

translations.english: Winterhold will be turned over to the Empire, although the College itself will retain its traditional neutrality.
translations.chinese: 冬堡移交帝国，但学院本身还会保持中立传统。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Winterhold will be turned over to the Empire, although the College itself will retain its traditional neutrality. | ZH: 冬堡移交帝国，但学院本身还会保持中立传统。 | SID: 00A25E

translations.english: But I at least will negotiate in good faith.
translations.chinese: 但至少我会真诚地谈判。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But I at least will negotiate in good faith. | ZH: 但至少我会真诚地谈判。 | SID: 00A9EE

translations.english: If we're not going to get Markarth, we need you to give us something.
translations.chinese: 如果我们得不到马卡斯，你们就得给我们些东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If we're not going to get Markarth, we need you to give us something. | ZH: 如果我们得不到马卡斯，你们就得给我们些东西。 | SID: 00CDE9

translations.english: You know as well as I do that that we can't hand over Riften on these terms.
translations.chinese: 你我都清楚。我们不能就这样交出裂谷城。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You know as well as I do that that we can't hand over Riften on these terms. | ZH: 你我都清楚。我们不能就这样交出裂谷城。 | SID: 00ACF1

translations.english: These terms are not acceptable. You know that.
translations.chinese: 我不能接受这样的条件。你明白。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BA60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These terms are not acceptable. You know that. | ZH: 我不能接受这样的条件。你明白。 | SID: 00580A

translations.english: Well then, I think a pinch of frost salts should do the trick, right?
translations.chinese: 那，我想来一小撮霜盐就可以了，对吧？

translations.english: Now what?
translations.chinese: 现在呢？

translations.english: Oh, I get it. This is a test, right? You want to see how well I know the Potage le Magnifique.
translations.chinese: 哦，我明白了。这是个测试，对吗？你想看看我有多了解美味浓汤是吧。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BC9B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well then, I think a pinch of frost salts should do the trick, right? | ZH: 那，我想来一小撮霜盐就可以了，对吧？ | SID: 003597
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now what? | ZH: 现在呢？ | SID: 0042C6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, I get it. This is a test, right? You want to see how well I know the Potage le Magnifique. | ZH: 哦，我明白了。这是个测试，对吗？你想看看我有多了解美味浓汤是吧。 | SID: 0044DC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 006230

translations.english: Sorry, I didn't mean to get carried away. There we go, one cup of diced horker meat.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我不是故意失神的。好了，一杯海象肉丁。

translations.english: I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it?
translations.chinese: 我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？

translations.english: Hmmm... horker. So delicious. I swear, is there a soul alive who doesn't enjoy the taste of...
translations.chinese: 嗯……海象肉。很美味。我发誓世界上还没有谁不喜欢……

translations.english: Diced horker meat.
translations.chinese: 海象肉块。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BC9C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Sorry, I didn't mean to get carried away. There we go, one cup of diced horker meat. | ZH: 抱歉，我不是故意失神的。好了，一杯海象肉丁。 | SID: 000B7D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it? | ZH: 我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？ | SID: 0057AE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Hmmm... horker. So delicious. I swear, is there a soul alive who doesn't enjoy the taste of... | ZH: 嗯……海象肉。很美味。我发誓世界上还没有谁不喜欢…… | SID: 008877
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Diced horker meat. | ZH: 海象肉块。 | SID: 00762B

translations.english: You're a High Elf! I... I never would have guessed it. So many of your recipes are clearly aimed at the commonfolk. It just seems...
translations.chinese: 你是个高精灵！我……永远猜不到。你那么多食谱都是针对一般种族的。似乎……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BC9D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're a High Elf! I... I never would have guessed it. So many of your recipes are clearly aimed at the commonfolk. It just seems... | ZH: 你是个高精灵！我……永远猜不到。你那么多食谱都是针对一般种族的。似乎…… | SID: 00CD90
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 007C48

translations.english: My choice, then? Very well. I think we should add some Chaurus eggs. For additional flavor.
translations.chinese: 我来选吗？好吧。我觉得应该加些查鲁斯卵。能添加些风味。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BC9E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My choice, then? Very well. I think we should add some Chaurus eggs. For additional flavor. | ZH: 我来选吗？好吧。我觉得应该加些查鲁斯卵。能添加些风味。 | SID: 00B901
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 00F623

translations.english: I'll carry the stew pot, and lead the way up to the dining room. I'm sure the Emperor and his guests are dying to meet you.
translations.chinese: 我来端汤锅吧，请跟我一起来餐厅。皇帝和宾客一定很想见你。

translations.english: And if I may say so... it has been an honor, getting a chance to prepare a meal with, well... the best chef in the entire Empire.
translations.chinese: 我得说……很荣幸能有机会……和帝国最优秀的厨师共事。

translations.english: Excellent. They should be ready for us now.
translations.chinese: 太好了。应该做好了。

translations.english: We're done. Let us serve... the Potage le Magnifique!
translations.chinese: 完成了。来看看……美味浓汤！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BC9F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'll carry the stew pot, and lead the way up to the dining room. I'm sure the Emperor and his guests are dying to meet you. | ZH: 我来端汤锅吧，请跟我一起来餐厅。皇帝和宾客一定很想见你。 | SID: 003CBB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And if I may say so... it has been an honor, getting a chance to prepare a meal with, well... the best chef in the entire Empire. | ZH: 我得说……很荣幸能有机会……和帝国最优秀的厨师共事。 | SID: 006033

translations.english: So, what is the first special ingredient?
translations.chinese: 那，第一种配料是什么？

translations.english: Maybe we should start over, hmm? We want the Gourmet's famous Potage le Magnifique to be perfect, after all.
translations.chinese: 也许我们应该重新开始了？毕竟我们都希望美食家驰名的美味浓汤是完美的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So, what is the first special ingredient? | ZH: 那，第一种配料是什么？ | SID: 00770B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Maybe we should start over, hmm? We want the Gourmet's famous Potage le Magnifique to be perfect, after all. | ZH: 也许我们应该重新开始了？毕竟我们都希望美食家驰名的美味浓汤是完美的。 | SID: 00CDA0

translations.english: Well, I'm just surprised the Gourmet is a Redguard. I had you pegged for a Wood Elf, honestly. You know, because of your use of...
translations.chinese: 嗯，我只是有点惊讶美食家居然是个红卫人。说实话，我还以为你是木精灵呢。因为你用了……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, I'm just surprised the Gourmet is a Redguard. I had you pegged for a Wood Elf, honestly. You know, because of your use of... | ZH: 嗯，我只是有点惊讶美食家居然是个红卫人。说实话，我还以为你是木精灵呢。因为你用了…… | SID: 002078
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 0048EC

translations.english: Just go right into the tower, then straight ahead to the kitchen. Gianna's expecting you.
translations.chinese: 进塔吧，直接去厨房。吉安娜正等着你呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just go right into the tower, then straight ahead to the kitchen. Gianna's expecting you. | ZH: 进塔吧，直接去厨房。吉安娜正等着你呢。 | SID: 00CD7F

translations.english: Ooookay.... Um.... Let me see. Thistle? Yes, let's try that. Just a sprig or two...
translations.chinese: 好吧……嗯……我看看。蓟花？嗯，试试这个。只需要加一两枝……

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ooookay.... Um.... Let me see. Thistle? Yes, let's try that. Just a sprig or two... | ZH: 好吧……嗯……我看看。蓟花？嗯，试试这个。只需要加一两枝…… | SID: 00CAD5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 009117

translations.english: My choice, hmm? All right, then - tomatoes. Simple, yet infinitely flavorful. Don't you agree?
translations.chinese: 我的选择吗？好吧，那就，番茄。简单但美味。你觉得呢？

translations.english: Well, I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it?
translations.chinese: 嗯，我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My choice, hmm? All right, then - tomatoes. Simple, yet infinitely flavorful. Don't you agree? | ZH: 我的选择吗？好吧，那就，番茄。简单但美味。你觉得呢？ | SID: 009C8F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it? | ZH: 嗯，我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？ | SID: 00CDB9
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 001D17

translations.english: Ooohh.... how decadent. I never would have guessed it.
translations.chinese: 哦……真微妙。我永远也猜不到。

translations.english: What next?
translations.chinese: 接下来是什么？

translations.english: A sweetroll.
translations.chinese: 一个甜卷。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ooohh.... how decadent. I never would have guessed it. | ZH: 哦……真微妙。我永远也猜不到。 | SID: 003209
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What next? | ZH: 接下来是什么？ | SID: 005419
- INFO:RNAM | EN: A sweetroll. | ZH: 一个甜卷。 | SID: 009251

translations.english: Really? Oh, I use Nirnroot as a special seasoning all the time as well. What a wonderful idea.
translations.chinese: 真的？哦，我也一直拿它当特殊调味料。好主意。

translations.english: Okay. Now what?
translations.chinese: 好了。现在呢？

translations.english: One nirnroot.
translations.chinese: 一颗奈恩根。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Really? Oh, I use Nirnroot as a special seasoning all the time as well. What a wonderful idea. | ZH: 真的？哦，我也一直拿它当特殊调味料。好主意。 | SID: 007E43
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Okay. Now what? | ZH: 好了。现在呢？ | SID: 00CDB3
- INFO:RNAM | EN: One nirnroot. | ZH: 一颗奈恩根。 | SID: 00CDB2

translations.english: I guessed right! I... I always imagined the great Gourmet was a Wood Elf. You see, only someone with a knowledge of woodland herbs could combine...
translations.chinese: 我猜对了！我……一直觉得大美食家是木精灵。你看，只有懂得林地草药知识的人才能把……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I guessed right! I... I always imagined the great Gourmet was a Wood Elf. You see, only someone with a knowledge of woodland herbs could combine... | ZH: 我猜对了！我……一直觉得大美食家是木精灵。你看，只有懂得林地草药知识的人才能把…… | SID: 00930B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 00CD91

translations.english: Oh! Yes, but of course. Ahem.
translations.chinese: 哦！对，当然了。嗯哼。

translations.english: The Emperor has requested your signature dish - the Potage le Magnifique. I've taken the liberty of getting it started.
translations.chinese: 皇帝点了您的招牌名菜，美味浓汤。我擅自开始制作了。

translations.english: The base broth is already boiled. We can get started right now. So... which ingredient should I add next?
translations.chinese: 底汤已经煮好了。现在可以开始了。所以……我接下来该加什么配料？

translations.english: But the cookbook only says so much, and everyone makes the Potage differently. I would be honored if we could make it... the Gourmet's special way.
translations.chinese: 但菜谱上说的就这么多，而且每个人做汤的方法不一样。如果我们能一起制作的话，那我很荣幸见识到……美食家的特别技艺。

translations.english: Enough! The Gourmet is here to cook, not talk! Let us begin.
translations.chinese: 够了！美食家是来烹饪的！不是来聊天！我们开始吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Oh! Yes, but of course. Ahem. | ZH: 哦！对，当然了。嗯哼。 | SID: 000B87
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Emperor has requested your signature dish - the Potage le Magnifique. I've taken the liberty of getting it started. | ZH: 皇帝点了您的招牌名菜，美味浓汤。我擅自开始制作了。 | SID: 008EED
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The base broth is already boiled. We can get started right now. So... which ingredient should I add next? | ZH: 底汤已经煮好了。现在可以开始了。所以……我接下来该加什么配料？ | SID: 00CE09
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But the cookbook only says so much, and everyone makes the Potage differently. I would be honored if we could make it... the Gourmet's special way. | ZH: 但菜谱上说的就这么多，而且每个人做汤的方法不一样。如果我们能一起制作的话，那我很荣幸见识到……美食家的特别技艺。 | SID: 00E732
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Enough! The Gourmet is here to cook, not talk! Let us begin. | ZH: 够了！美食家是来烹饪的！不是来聊天！我们开始吧。 | SID: 00D0DF

translations.english: What next?
translations.chinese: 接下来是什么？

translations.english: Carrots? Really? Okay...
translations.chinese: 胡萝卜？真的吗？好吧……

translations.english: Carrots.
translations.chinese: 胡萝卜。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What next? | ZH: 接下来是什么？ | SID: 00DD23
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Carrots? Really? Okay... | ZH: 胡萝卜？真的吗？好吧…… | SID: 00F7BA
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Carrots. | ZH: 胡萝卜。 | SID: 0070D1

translations.english: You'll gain unrestricted access to the kitchens, and then the Emperor. You're posing as a chef, so you'll be able to poison his meal rather easily.
translations.chinese: 你可以自由进出厨房，然后觐见皇帝。因为你假扮成了厨师，所以很容易在食物里下毒。

translations.english: Go now to Castle Dour in Solitude. Present the Gourmet's Writ of Passage to the officer in charge, Commander Maro. I'm sure you remember him.
translations.chinese: 现在去独孤城的阴郁堡，把美食家的通行证交给负责的马洛指挥官。相信你还对他有印象。

translations.english: Yes. For Sithis... and the Night Mother. You are the Listener after all, hmm? So let's not waste any more time.
translations.chinese: 是。为了西帝斯……还有夜母。你毕竟是聆听者么，所以不要浪费时间了。

translations.english: The Emperor will die! For Sithis and the Night Mother!
translations.chinese: 皇帝死定了！！为了西帝斯，为了夜母！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You'll gain unrestricted access to the kitchens, and then the Emperor. You're posing as a chef, so you'll be able to poison his meal rather easily. | ZH: 你可以自由进出厨房，然后觐见皇帝。因为你假扮成了厨师，所以很容易在食物里下毒。 | SID: 0070B7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Go now to Castle Dour in Solitude. Present the Gourmet's Writ of Passage to the officer in charge, Commander Maro. I'm sure you remember him. | ZH: 现在去独孤城的阴郁堡，把美食家的通行证交给负责的马洛指挥官。相信你还对他有印象。 | SID: 00CD56
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes. For Sithis... and the Night Mother. You are the Listener after all, hmm? So let's not waste any more time. | ZH: 是。为了西帝斯……还有夜母。你毕竟是聆听者么，所以不要浪费时间了。 | SID: 00CD57
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Emperor will die! For Sithis and the Night Mother! | ZH: 皇帝死定了！！为了西帝斯，为了夜母！ | SID: 00255C

translations.english: Well, I don't mean to seem disappointed, but... I just never figured the Gourmet was an Imperial. I had dreamed of something more exotic, maybe...
translations.chinese: 哎，我不想显得很失望，但……我只是没想到美食家居然是个帝国人。我还幻想过一些更奇特的种族，也许……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, I don't mean to seem disappointed, but... I just never figured the Gourmet was an Imperial. I had dreamed of something more exotic, maybe... | ZH: 哎，我不想显得很失望，但……我只是没想到美食家居然是个帝国人。我还幻想过一些更奇特的种族，也许…… | SID: 00E5B5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 000863

translations.english: Not another delivery. I told you people, our stocks are fine. Now put whatever you have over there, then get out!
translations.chinese: 不是那个。我告诉过你们了，我们的库存很好。现在把东西放那边然后赶紧出去！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCAC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not another delivery. I told you people, our stocks are fine. Now put whatever you have over there, then get out! | ZH: 不是那个。我告诉过你们了，我们的库存很好。现在把东西放那边然后赶紧出去！ | SID: 00F43D

translations.english: Ah, of course. I suspected as much.
translations.chinese: 啊，当然。我也这么想。

translations.english: You must now add a splash of mead.
translations.chinese: 你现在得加些蜜酒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCAD]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You must now add a splash of mead. | ZH: 你现在得加些蜜酒。 | SID: 001ED4

translations.english: You... you're an Argonian! Where did you learn to cook like that? Surely not in Black Marsh. Why even the...
translations.chinese: 你……是个阿尔贡！你从哪儿学的这一手好厨艺？肯定不是在黑沼泽吧。为什么连……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCAE]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 001679

translations.english: Heh, I'm sorry. Of course. It's your most famous recipe, after all.
translations.chinese: 哦，抱歉。当然。毕竟这是您最著名的食谱。

translations.english: I'll carry the stew pot, and lead the way up to the dining room. I'm sure the Emperor and his guests are dying to meet you.
translations.chinese: 我来端汤锅吧，请跟我一起来餐厅。皇帝和宾客一定很想见你。

translations.english: All right then, your secret ingredient's been added.
translations.chinese: 好了，您的秘密佐料已经放进去了。

translations.english: And if I may say so... it has been an honor, getting a chance to prepare a meal with, well... the best chef in the entire Empire.
translations.chinese: 我得说……很荣幸能有机会……和帝国最优秀的厨师共事。

translations.english: Now, now, Gianna. Who's the Gourmet here?
translations.chinese: 喂，喂，吉安娜。现在谁是美食家啊？

translations.english: Once Mede has been killed, escape through the upper door, and across the bridge. I've "arranged" for it to be unguarded once the alarm is sounded.
translations.chinese: 一旦迈德被杀，从上面的门逃出去，穿过桥。我已经“安排”了，即使警报响起也没人看管。

translations.english: Here, take this - it's called Jarrin Root.
translations.chinese: 来，拿着，这是加林根。

translations.english: All it takes is one taste, and the effects are quite immediate. The Emperor will be serving Sithis before he even knows he's dead.
translations.chinese: 只要尝上一口，立竿见影。在皇帝回过味儿前，他就去见西帝斯了。

translations.english: Now go, my friend. Go, and fulfill your destiny as Listener.
translations.chinese: 去吧，朋友。完成你作为聆听者的使命。

translations.english: Which poison I should use?
translations.chinese: 我该用什么毒？

translations.english: It's just...
translations.chinese: 实在太……

translations.english: The... Gourmet?
translations.chinese: 美……美食家？

translations.english: Oh! Finally! When I heard the Gourmet was being brought in to cook for the Emperor, I could hardly believe it.
translations.chinese: 哦！终于来了！听说那位美食家要来为皇帝烹饪的时候，我简直不敢相信。

translations.english: You misunderstand. For I am... the Gourmet!
translations.chinese: 你误会了。我是……美食家！

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You misunderstand. For I am... the Gourmet! | ZH: 你误会了。我是……美食家！ | SID: 00E716

translations.english: Stop right there. The tower is off limits until further notice.
translations.chinese: 立刻停下。在进一步通知下达前，塔楼禁止进入。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCB2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Stop right there. The tower is off limits until further notice. | ZH: 立刻停下。在进一步通知下达前，塔楼禁止进入。 | SID: 00CD65

translations.english: You'll gain unrestricted access to the kitchens, and then the Emperor. You're posing as a chef, so you'll be able to poison his meal rather easily.
translations.chinese: 你可以自由进出厨房，然后觐见皇帝。因为你假扮成了厨师，所以很容易在食物里下毒。

translations.english: Go now to Castle Dour in Solitude. Present the Gourmet's Writ of Passage to the officer in charge, Commander Maro. I'm sure you remember him.
translations.chinese: 现在去独孤城的阴郁堡，把美食家的通行证交给负责的马洛指挥官。相信你还对他有印象。

translations.english: Hmph. Look at you. So calm. So confident. I do believe you were born for this task. So let's begin.
translations.chinese: 嗯。看看你。如此平静又如此自信。我相信你天生适合这项任务。我们开始吧。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:

translations.english: A... giant's toe? You're... sure about that?
translations.chinese: 巨……巨人脚趾？你……确定吗？

translations.english: We shall now add... a giant's toe!
translations.chinese: 我们现在应该加……巨人脚趾！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCB6]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: We shall now add... a giant's toe! | ZH: 我们现在应该加……巨人脚趾！ | SID: 00757E

translations.english: Oh yes. And I've decided you will have the honor.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错。而且我决定把这项殊荣让给你。

translations.english: So it's time? We're ready to assassinate the Emperor?
translations.chinese: 是时候了吗？我们要去刺杀皇帝吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCB7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh yes. And I've decided you will have the honor. | ZH: 哦，没错。而且我决定把这项殊荣让给你。 | SID: 00ED72
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So it's time? We're ready to assassinate the Emperor? | ZH: 是时候了吗？我们要去刺杀皇帝吗？ | SID: 006DE2

translations.english: You're a Nord! I never would have guessed it! But where in the world did you learn to cook like that? Here in Skyrim? Or maybe somewhere less...
translations.chinese: 你是诺德人！我真没想到！但你是从哪里学到的手艺？在天际？还是别的地方……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCB8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're a Nord! I never would have guessed it! But where in the world did you learn to cook like that? Here in Skyrim? Or maybe somewhere less... | ZH: 你是诺德人！我真没想到！但你是从哪里学到的手艺？在天际？还是别的地方…… | SID: 002CB2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 00CAC8

translations.english: What, um... What next?
translations.chinese: 接……接下来呢？

translations.english: Of course! I.... I'm sorry. One giant's toe. There.
translations.chinese: 当然！我……很抱歉。巨人脚趾。在这儿。

translations.english: I said a giant's toe! Do not question the Gourmet!
translations.chinese: 我说了，加巨人脚趾！不要质疑“美食家”！

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I said a giant's toe! Do not question the Gourmet! | ZH: 我说了，加巨人脚趾！不要质疑“美食家”！ | SID: 00E75B

translations.english: One taste will lead to nearly instant death, so don't even think about it.
translations.chinese: 别想着偷偷尝了，一口就能要了你的命。

translations.english: It's a rare plant, found only on the island of Stros M'Kai. It can be served like any vegetable - cut up, put in a salad, perhaps boiled in a stew.
translations.chinese: 一种稀罕的植物，只在斯卓·米'凯岛上出产。可以像任何蔬菜一样切碎了拌到菜里，或者煮进汤里。

translations.english: What else can you tell me about jarrin root?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说加林根吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004BCBA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: One taste will lead to nearly instant death, so don't even think about it. | ZH: 别想着偷偷尝了，一口就能要了你的命。 | SID: 0081BB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's a rare plant, found only on the island of Stros M'Kai. It can be served like any vegetable - cut up, put in a salad, perhaps boiled in a stew. | ZH: 一种稀罕的植物，只在斯卓·米'凯岛上出产。可以像任何蔬菜一样切碎了拌到菜里，或者煮进汤里。 | SID: 00826A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What else can you tell me about jarrin root? | ZH: 能跟我说说加林根吗？ | SID: 00CD60

translations.english: A Septim? As in... a gold coin? Really?
translations.chinese: 塞普汀？金币吗？真的？

translations.english: Ah, I see now. That would give the Potage le Magnifique a slightly metallic - but delicious - aftertaste. Simply brilliant.
translations.chinese: 啊，我明白了。这样可以让美味浓汤多一点金属感却又美味的回味。简单又奢华。

translations.english: I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it?
translations.chinese: 我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？

translations.english: You must add... a septim.
translations.chinese: 你得再加……一枚塞普汀。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ah, I see now. That would give the Potage le Magnifique a slightly metallic - but delicious - aftertaste. Simply brilliant. | ZH: 啊，我明白了。这样可以让美味浓汤多一点金属感却又美味的回味。简单又奢华。 | SID: 00B7C0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I have to say, the stew seems done. Add anything else, and we may dilute the distinct flavors. So... is that it? | ZH: 我觉得菜已经做好了。如果再加其他东西，可能就会冲淡这股独特的味道。所以……是这样吗？ | SID: 00C7E7
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You must add... a septim. | ZH: 你得再加……一枚塞普汀。 | SID: 00819C

translations.english: Please, excuse my ignorance. Gianna, the castle chef, has been eagerly awaiting your arrival. You should proceed to the kitchens straight away.
translations.chinese: 请原谅我的无知。城堡的厨师吉安娜一直热切地等你到来。你应该马上到厨房去。

translations.english: ...order of his eminence... ...possessor of these papers... the "Gourmet"...
translations.chinese: ……凭他高贵的命令……此文件持有者……“美食家”……

translations.english: By Azura. The Gourmet!
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉在上。是美食家！

translations.english: I... I'm sorry! Your clothes... of course... I should have realized!
translations.chinese: 很抱歉！你的衣着。……当然……我早该想到的！

translations.english: What's this now?
translations.chinese: 这是什么？

translations.english: (Show Maro the Gourmet's Writ of Passage)
translations.chinese: （向马洛出示美食家的通行文书）

translations.english: Well, I just never expected the Gourmet to be a Breton. It almost seems too obvious. Some of the greatest cooks have been Bretons, and...
translations.chinese: 嗯，我只是没想到美食家会是布莱顿人。似乎太明显了。很多大厨都是布莱顿人出身。

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, I just never expected the Gourmet to be a Breton. It almost seems too obvious. Some of the greatest cooks have been Bretons, and... | ZH: 嗯，我只是没想到美食家会是布莱顿人。似乎太明显了。很多大厨都是布莱顿人出身。 | SID: 005BD6
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 006BAC

translations.english: I... Well, I just can't believe the Gourmet is a Dark Elf. How difficult it must have been for you in Morrowind. The food there is...
translations.chinese: 我……嗯，我只是不敢相信美食家居然是个暗精灵。你在晨风的日子一定不好过吧。那里的食物……

translations.english: Yes?
translations.chinese: 嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes? | ZH: 嗯？ | SID: 00DEFF

translations.english: Oh, I have the utmost faith in your success, believe me. So let's begin.
translations.chinese: 我对你充满信心，你一定能马到成功。咱们快点开始吧。

translations.english: Go now to Castle Dour in Solitude. Present the Gourmet's Writ of Passage to the officer in charge, Commander Maro. I'm sure you remember him.
translations.chinese: 现在去独孤城的阴郁堡，把美食家的通行证交给负责的马洛指挥官。相信你还对他有印象。

translations.english: You'll gain unrestricted access to the kitchens, and then the Emperor. You're posing as a chef, so you'll be able to poison his meal rather easily.
translations.chinese: 你可以自由进出厨房，然后觐见皇帝。因为你假扮成了厨师，所以很容易在食物里下毒。

translations.english: I won't disappoint you, Astrid. Or the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德，我不会让你和黑暗兄弟会失望的。

translations.english: Oh? What is this, some kind of herb? Are you sure? The Potage tastes perfect as it is. Any other ingredient might...
translations.chinese: 哦？这是什么，药草吗？你确定？这锅汤已经很美味了。任何多余的佐料都可能……

translations.english: There is one final ingredient. Here, add this. (Give jarrin root)
translations.chinese: 最后还有一味配料。来，把这个加进去。（拿出加林根）

translations.english: Don't sound so eager, it's not a social visit. It's business.
translations.chinese: 别那么着急，这不是社交往来，是生意。

translations.english: In fact, Vex barely made it out of there alive. You should talk to her about it before you go.
translations.chinese: 事实上，小烦都差点没活着出来。你去之前应该找她谈谈。

translations.english: Aye. Aringoth sent the city guard packing and fortified the entire island.
translations.chinese: 对。阿林格斯派出卫兵占领并加固整个岛屿。

translations.english: In return, Maven allowed us to extort Aringoth and bring in a huge payout.
translations.chinese: 作为回报，玛雯允许我们好好地敲诈阿林格斯。

translations.english: If the workers had a dispute, we'd rough them up. If competitors tried to buy honey from Aringoth, we'd steal the shipments.
translations.chinese: 如果工人们闹事，我们就用些暴力手段对付他们。假如有竞争对手想从阿林格斯那买蜂蜜，我们就去偷货。

translations.english: We had an arrangement with Maven. We kept an eye on Goldenglow Estate to make sure the honey kept flowing.
translations.chinese: 我们和玛雯之间有协议。我们密切关注金色光辉庄园，确保蜂蜜供应源源不断。

translations.english: Just keep your ears open and your mouth shut and you'll do fine.
translations.chinese: 记住了多听少说，你就没事儿。

translations.english: That's between you and Maven and I prefer to keep it that way.
translations.chinese: 那是你和玛雯之间的事，我是敬而远之的。

translations.english: We can't take another villager from the surface so soon. I told you to prepare everything properly!
translations.chinese: 我们不能这么频繁地绑架村民。我告诉你要准备万全的！

translations.english: More souls are needed for the Star. The last one died before he could be harvested.
translations.chinese: 那颗星需要更多灵魂。最后一个还没来得及收割就死掉了。

translations.english: You look like you've just seen a ghost. Please tell me you haven't. Cicero said he spoke to the Night Mother... but she spoke to you?
translations.chinese: 你看起来就像刚见了鬼一样。千万别说你真撞见了。西塞罗说他在和夜母说话……但她却跟你说话了？

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: Okay, let's all take a deep breath. Cicero said he spoke to the Night Mother, but she spoke to you? Please tell me this is some kind of sick joke.
translations.chinese: 好，我们都深呼吸一下。西塞罗说自己在和夜母说话，但夜母和你说了话？你最好告诉我这是个变态玩笑。

translations.english: I... I don't know. It happened so fast.
translations.chinese: 我……我不知道。事情太突然了。

translations.chinese: 我要去莫瓦斯的巢穴杀了那怪物。你跟我来吗？

translations.english: Morthal is full of cowards! Let's go kill that monster.
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔全是胆小鬼！我们进去杀那怪物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We're not done talking. You fell for that hussy Esmerelda, with the dark feathers - didn't you? I won't let her have you!
translations.chinese: 我没还没说完。你不是爱上了那个满身黑毛的贱人艾丝美拉达吗？我不会让她得到你的！

translations.english: At the same time, this tether will bolster the agent's own life force, making him stronger.
translations.chinese: 同时，这根锁链能增强特使的生命力，让他变得更强。

translations.english: This Agent of Strife can send forth a tendril of pure darkness into the heart of another, causing great injury to them.
translations.chinese: 冲突特使可以把纯粹的黑暗送入他人内心，对他们造成巨大伤害。

translations.english: The Agent of Subterfuge utilizes shadow to cloud the judgement of those around him.
translations.chinese: 诡计特使可以利用阴影蒙蔽周围人的判断力。

translations.chinese: 隐秘特使是隐身大师。他们能够操纵并利用黑暗。

translations.english: On moonlit nights or in darkened rooms, this agent literally becomes invisible.
translations.chinese: 在月夜或昏暗的房间，隐秘特使几乎可以完全隐身。

translations.english: You are the Listener! You are the Listener! I have served mother well, I have!
translations.chinese: 你就是聆听者！你就是聆听者！我一直在好好服务母亲！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004C3D5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are the Listener! You are the Listener! I have served mother well, I have! | ZH: 你就是聆听者！你就是聆听者！我一直在好好服务母亲！ | SID: 00E21E

translations.english: I don't even know what to think anymore...
translations.chinese: 我都不知道该怎么想了……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004C3D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't even know what to think anymore... | ZH: 我都不知道该怎么想了…… | SID: 00453D

translations.english: Are you excited? Oh, you should be. Things are finally looking up!
translations.chinese: 你兴奋吗？哦，你肯定兴奋。事情终于好转了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004C3D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you excited? Oh, you should be. Things are finally looking up! | ZH: 你兴奋吗？哦，你肯定兴奋。事情终于好转了！ | SID: 005FF0

translations.english: Well of course the Night Mother will speak to you again! She might speak now, or later, or... I don't know! But speak she will!
translations.chinese: 夜母当然会再和你交谈！她可能现在说，或者以后说，或者……我不知道！但总之会说的！

translations.english: Wait... the Listener is serious? Oh.
translations.chinese: 等等……聆听者是认真的？哦。

translations.english: The Night Mother is part of you now! You get to hear voices inside your head! The rest of us should be so lucky.
translations.chinese: 夜母如今已经是你的一部分了！你能够在脑海里直接听到她的声音！我们其他人真幸运。

translations.english: Ha! Surely you're pulling Cicero's leg!
translations.chinese: 哈！你在逗西塞罗吗！

translations.english: Will the Night Mother speak to me again?
translations.chinese: 夜母还会跟我说话吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004C3D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Well of course the Night Mother will speak to you again! She might speak now, or later, or... I don't know! But speak she will! | ZH: 夜母当然会再和你交谈！她可能现在说，或者以后说，或者……我不知道！但总之会说的！ | SID: 000C11
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Wait... the Listener is serious? Oh. | ZH: 等等……聆听者是认真的？哦。 | SID: 002936
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The Night Mother is part of you now! You get to hear voices inside your head! The rest of us should be so lucky. | ZH: 夜母如今已经是你的一部分了！你能够在脑海里直接听到她的声音！我们其他人真幸运。 | SID: 00A04C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Ha! Surely you're pulling Cicero's leg! | ZH: 哈！你在逗西塞罗吗！ | SID: 00EB04
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Will the Night Mother speak to me again? | ZH: 夜母还会跟我说话吗？ | SID: 001E59

translations.english: Oh, but that was then! This is now! You're the Listener, and the Night Mother chose you for a reason, I'm sure! Cicero will remain the happy Keeper.
translations.chinese: 哦，但是都过去了！现在！你是聆听者，我相信夜母的选择！西塞罗依旧是个快乐的守护者。

translations.english: Oh... Well... yes. I did. I did indeed. I tried to listen. Tried so hard. But the Night Mother never spoke to poor Cicero.
translations.chinese: 哦……嗯……没错。我想啊。我确实想。我试着去倾听。很努力地去听。但夜母从来没和可怜的西塞罗说过话。

translations.english: The silence became almost... maddening.
translations.chinese: 那沉寂几乎……令人抓狂。

translations.english: Cicero, did you want to be the Listener?
translations.chinese: 西塞罗，你想成为聆听者吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004C3D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Oh, but that was then! This is now! You're the Listener, and the Night Mother chose you for a reason, I'm sure! Cicero will remain the happy Keeper. | ZH: 哦，但是都过去了！现在！你是聆听者，我相信夜母的选择！西塞罗依旧是个快乐的守护者。 | SID: 00C67C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh... Well... yes. I did. I did indeed. I tried to listen. Tried so hard. But the Night Mother never spoke to poor Cicero. | ZH: 哦……嗯……没错。我想啊。我确实想。我试着去倾听。很努力地去听。但夜母从来没和可怜的西塞罗说过话。 | SID: 00CCAA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The silence became almost... maddening. | ZH: 那沉寂几乎……令人抓狂。 | SID: 00ED9D

translations.english: But when the Night Mother speaks, the Listener must obey. You must! For her word is the will of Sithis. And Sithis is the Dark Brotherhood incarnate.
translations.chinese: 但夜母说的话聆听者必须服从。必须！因为她的话就是西帝斯的意志。西帝斯就是黑暗兄弟会的化身。

translations.english: Oh, the Listener, well... listens! The Night Mother speaks to you. Guides you on your path.
translations.chinese: 哦，聆听者嘛，当然是……听了！夜母会与你说话。指引你前行。

translations.chinese: 在我皈依阿祖拉之前，是一个技艺娴熟的术士。后来，她的魔法支撑着我。

translations.english: I could easily provide my spells to your cause. Protect you from harm. Defeat your enemies.
translations.chinese: 我可以轻易地使用魔法。帮你提供保护、击败敌人。

translations.chinese: 星之守护者，如果你需要帮助，我很荣幸能作为你的同伴。这样我也有目标了。

translations.english: While you were in the Star, Azura gave me a vision. Her last, she said.

translations.chinese: 你不需要我帮忙的时候，我会继续照看阿祖拉的祭坛。虽然职责还在，但我还是第一次感觉到……孤独。

translations.chinese: 我会尽快把这个送往他的墓里。谢谢你带过来，孩子。

translations.english: She finally decided to return it to her father. Bless her heart.
translations.chinese: 她终于决定把它还给她父亲了。祝福她的好意。

translations.chinese: 当我最终成为一名祭司的时候，他们给了我一把新的高级祭司匕首，但我已经有我父亲的了。

translations.english: I had to for honor's sake, but I had waited too long. My father died before he could see my training to completion.
translations.chinese: 为了荣誉，不得不如此。但我等太久了。我父亲没能看到我完成训练就去世了。

translations.english: So you see, I have to return it. It breaks tradition, and I need to tell him that I finally did what he wanted.
translations.chinese: 所以你看，我得把它还回去。这打破了传统，我得告诉他我终于如他所愿了。

translations.chinese: 问题是，我来没想步他后尘……因为某些原因，我现在仍然不想。

translations.english: A Priest of Arkay is entrusted with a ceremonial dagger once they've completed their training.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯祭司在完成训练之后就会被授予仪式用的匕首。

translations.english: Thank you! Here... I stole a lot from the Thalmor over the years. You may as well have some of it.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你！来……我这些年从梭默那偷了不少东西。你拿走些吧。

translations.english: The Thalmor assassin is dead. It's safe to leave Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 梭默刺客死了。你现在可以安全离开风舵城了。

translations.english: I'm sure he's Thalmor. Just waiting for me to leave so he can follow me and kill me in a lonely place.
translations.chinese: 我敢肯定他是个梭默。只要我一离开，他就可以跟踪我，然后找个僻静地方杀了。

translations.english: I was trying to get to Morrowind. The Dunmer don't care much for the Thalmor and I figured I'd be safe there. As safe as anywhere, that is.
translations.chinese: 我会去晨风的。丹莫不太喜欢梭默。那里比其他地方安全些。

translations.english: Don't you see? I prayed to the Night Mother! I am the Black Sacrament.
translations.chinese: 没看见吗？我向夜母祈祷了！我就是黑色圣礼的祭品。

translations.english: I just wanted things... to stay the way they were. Before Cicero, before the Night Mother. Before... you. I thought I could save us. I was wrong.
translations.chinese: 我只是想让一切……都保持原来的样子。在西塞罗来之前，夜母来之前。在你来……之前。我以为自己能拯救大家。但我错了。

translations.english: But you're alive! So there's still a chance. A chance to start over, rebuild. That's why I did... this.
translations.chinese: 但你还活着！还有重启、再造的机会。所以我才……做了这个。

translations.english: No! Don't pity me. I deserve whatever fate the Dread Lord has in store. I betrayed you... and now Maro has betrayed me. Fitting...
translations.chinese: 不！不要同情我。接受恐惧之主的命运是我罪有应得。我背叛了你……现在马洛背叛了我。报应不爽……

translations.english: You will be judged by Sithis in the Void. I pity you.
translations.chinese: 你会在虚空中受到西帝斯的审判。我很同情你。

translations.english: Don't you see? It was me. I set you up, wanted you dead. I betrayed you, the Night Mother... everything I hold dear. And now Maro has betrayed me.
translations.chinese: 你不明白吗？是我，是我出卖了你，想要你死。我背叛了你，背叛了夜母……还有我珍视的一切。现在马洛背叛了我。

translations.english: I just wanted things... to stay the way they were. Before Cicero, before the Night Mother. Before... you. I thought I could save us. I was wrong.
translations.chinese: 我只是想让一切……都保持原来的样子。在西塞罗来之前，夜母来之前。在你来……之前。我以为自己能拯救大家。但我错了。

translations.english: Don't you see? I prayed to the Night Mother! I am the Black Sacrament.
translations.chinese: 没看见吗？我向夜母祈祷了！我就是黑色圣礼的祭品。

translations.english: But you're alive! So there's still a chance. A chance to start over, rebuild. That's why I did... this.

translations.english: And to prove my... sincerity, I have prayed for a contract. You lead this Family now. I give you the Blade of Woe, so that you can see it through.
translations.chinese: 为了表示我的……诚意。我祈祷了这个契约。现在就由你来领导这个家。我把痛苦之刃交给你，你明白了吧……

translations.english: Me.
translations.chinese: 我。

translations.english: I'm saying you were right. The Night Mother was right. The old ways... they guided the Dark Brotherhood for centuries. I was a fool to oppose them.
translations.chinese: 我说，你是对的。夜母是对的。传统的方式……引导了黑暗兄弟会多年。反对这些，我真是一个傻瓜。

translations.english: You must kill...
translations.chinese: 你必须杀了……

translations.english: What are you saying?
translations.chinese: 你说什么？

translations.english: Alive.... You're alive... Thank Sithis...
translations.chinese: 活着……你还活着……感谢西帝斯……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D6C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Alive.... You're alive... Thank Sithis... | ZH: 活着……你还活着……感谢西帝斯…… | SID: 00CBFC

translations.english: Don't you see? I prayed to the Night Mother! I am the Black Sacrament.
translations.chinese: 没看见吗？我向夜母祈祷了！我就是黑色圣礼的祭品。

translations.english: But you're alive! So there's still a chance. A chance to start over, rebuild. That's why I did... this.
translations.chinese: 但你还活着！还有重启、再造的机会。所以我才……做了这个。

translations.english: Yes. I set you up. I wanted you dead. I betrayed you, the Night Mother, and everything I hold dear. And now Maro has betrayed me.
translations.chinese: 对。是我陷害你。我想害死你。我背叛了你，背叛了夜母，还有我珍视的一切。现在马洛背叛了我。

translations.english: I just wanted things... to stay the way they were. Before Cicero, before the Night Mother. Before... you. I thought I could save us. I was wrong.
translations.chinese: 我只是想让一切……都保持原来的样子。在西塞罗来之前，夜母来之前。在你来……之前。我以为自己能拯救大家。但我错了。

translations.english: You... sent me to die? Traitor!
translations.chinese: 你……打算害死我？叛徒！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But you're alive! So there's still a chance. A chance to start over, rebuild. That's why I did... this. | ZH: 但你还活着！还有重启、再造的机会。所以我才……做了这个。 | SID: 0028CC

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You... sent me to die? Traitor! | ZH: 你……打算害死我？叛徒！ | SID: 00C7AB

translations.english: I'm sorry. So very sorry. The Penitus Oculatus... Maro... He said that by giving you to them, he would leave the Dark Brotherhood alone. Forever.
translations.chinese: 对不起。非常对不起。洞察眼……马洛……他说把你交出去，就放过黑暗兄弟会。永远。

translations.english: Ssshhh.... Please. There is much... I have to say. And... not much time...
translations.chinese: 嘘……安静。我有很多话……要说。没……时间了……

translations.english: By Sithis, I was such a fool. All of this... it's all my fault. You are the best of us, and I nearly killed you... as I've killed everyone else...
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，我太傻了。这一切……都是我的错。你是我们中最优秀的，可我差点杀了你……我害死了所有人……

translations.english: Astrid...
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德……

translations.english: The number of graves in this cemetery never decreases.
translations.chinese: 这个墓地的坟墓永远不会减少。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The number of graves in this cemetery never decreases. | ZH: 这个墓地的坟墓永远不会减少。 | SID: 00C470

translations.english: War is not new to Falkreath. You have only to stand in our cemetery to see that.
translations.chinese: 战争对佛克瑞斯来说并不陌生。看看这片墓地就知道了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D786]

translations.english: Dengeir deserves more respect than his nephew, Jarl Siddgeir, affords him.
translations.chinese: 丹格尔应该比他那个领主侄子西德盖尔得到更多尊重。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D78A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Dengeir deserves more respect than his nephew, Jarl Siddgeir, affords him. | ZH: 丹格尔应该比他那个领主侄子西德盖尔得到更多尊重。 | SID: 00F460

translations.english: Without birth there is no life, without death there is only stasis. Such is the truth of Arkay.
translations.chinese: 没有出生就没有生命，没有死亡就陷入停滞。此乃阿尔凯之真理。

translations.english: I need you on your feet. We're in trouble here.
translations.chinese: 快点站起来，我们有麻烦了。

translations.english: Are you all right? Can you walk?
translations.chinese: 你没事吧？能动吗？

translations.english: Ancano! Stop this at once! I command you!
translations.chinese: 安卡诺！马上住手！我命令你！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D872]
Translations:

translations.english: I don't care what it is, I want it down now! I want to know what he's doing in there!
translations.chinese: 我不管这是在干嘛，现在赶紧拿下！我要知道他在里面搞什么名堂！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D875]

translations.english: Excellent. I'd suggest that we go retrieve it immediately, but right now we have more pressing matters.
translations.chinese: 太好了。我们得马上把它取回来，但现在有更紧急的事。

translations.english: Ancano has somehow locked himself in the hall. He's up to something, and I intend to put a stop to it.
translations.chinese: 安卡诺不知怎么把自己锁在大厅里了。他正在谋划什么，我要阻止他。

translations.english: Help us get through this, will you? We're throwing everything we have at it.
translations.chinese: 来帮我们一把成吗？我们已经尽全力了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D877]

translations.chinese: 安卡诺正在对……那个眼做什么。我们阻止不了他。

translations.english: I haven't seen Savos since the explosion. He must've been blown clear, and he may be injured.
translations.chinese: 爆炸之后我就没见到萨沃斯。他肯定被炸飞了，有可能受了伤。

translations.english: I need you to find the Arch-Mage, and I need you to do it quickly. Get moving!
translations.chinese: 你去找大法师，要快。快行动起来！

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D887]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 到底怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D889]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What's going on?! | ZH: 到底怎么了？ | SID: 009855

translations.english: Help take this down, will you? We're throwing everything we can at it.
translations.chinese: 来帮忙把门打开成吗？我们现在已经竭尽所能了。

translations.english: I will have his head for this, I assure you.
translations.chinese: 我会杀了他，我保证。

translations.english: Ancano. He's in there, doing... something. We don't know what. We're trying to get in now.
translations.chinese: 是安卡诺。他在里面干……一些事情。我们不知道他在干什么，正在想办法进去。

translations.english: Then you are weak and inconsequential.
translations.chinese: 那你可真是软弱渺小。

translations.english: She is here, among us.
translations.chinese: 她就在我们身边。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She is here, among us. | ZH: 她就在我们身边。 | SID: 003E0C

translations.english: You have caught my attention, mortal. That is most unwise.
translations.chinese: 你引起了我的注意，凡人。太不智了。

translations.english: Ahhhhgh. Wearing flesh is so... distasteful.
translations.chinese: 哈。穿上肉身实在……恶心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8B7]

translations.chinese: 嘘！肃静。不要触怒她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Shhh! Be still. Beware her anger! | ZH: 嘘！肃静。不要触怒她。 | SID: 00C260

translations.english: Our Lord! She has come!
translations.chinese: 我们的主降临了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Our Lord! She has come! | ZH: 我们的主降临了！ | SID: 00CB60

translations.english: I should slay you for such insolence!
translations.chinese: 如此无礼，真该杀了你！

translations.english: My good pleasure is not some trophy for mortal sport!
translations.chinese: 我岂会因凡人的战利感到愉悦！

translations.english: My favor?
translations.chinese: 我的青睐？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8BA]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: My favor? | ZH: 我的青睐？ | SID: 00CB67

translations.english: Were you certain in your purpose, you would have no need to apologize.
translations.chinese: 如果目标明确，就不需道歉。

translations.english: You have much to learn... But you have proven your will is strong and your heart is devoid of pity.
translations.chinese: 你还有很多可学……但你已经证明了自己意志坚定，心无慈悲。

translations.english: So, perhaps you are not entirely useless... We shall soon find out.
translations.chinese: 所以，你也许不算一无是处……很快就能见分晓了。

translations.english: The Lord of Plots, Deceiver of Nations, Devourer of Trinimac. The Queen of Shadows, Goddess of Destruction, He-Who-Destroys and She-Who-Erases...
translations.chinese: 密谋之主，欺诈众国者，崔尼玛克的吞噬者。阴影女王，破坏女神，毁灭之父与抹杀之母……

translations.english: Names mean nothing to our Lord. She only cares for those who care for themselves, whose hearts are full of purpose, whose lives are full of deeds.
translations.chinese: 名字对我主毫无意义。她只眷顾那些珍惜自我的人，那些心存目标并付诸行动的人。

translations.english: Many are our lord's lofty names, but they befit only us mortals. Intone her mighty names from now until the end of time - it is for naught.
translations.chinese: 我们的主拥有许多高贵的名字，但只适用于凡人。无限吟诵她强大的真名只是徒劳。

translations.english: You? You are nothing. An empty vapor, dispersed by the slightest breeze.
translations.chinese: 而你？一无是处。不过是被微风吹散的空洞水汽。

translations.english: We are forged by Boethiah's example. We carve our will upon the world through our tongues and our blades.
translations.chinese: 我们以波耶西亚为榜样。致力于用自己的言辞和武力将意志铭刻于世。

agentText:

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We are forged by Boethiah's example. We carve our will upon the world through our tongues and our blades. | ZH: 我们以波耶西亚为榜样。致力于用自己的言辞和武力将意志铭刻于世。 | SID: 00FDA7

translations.english: A well placed word, or a well placed dagger. Both can achieve equal purposes.
translations.chinese: 恰到好处的话语，或是运用得当的匕首，都能达到目的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Though we live in shadow, we carve indelible signs of our passing into the world.
translations.chinese: 我们虽然生活在阴影中，但在世界上留下了不可磨灭的痕迹。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8C4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Though we live in shadow, we carve indelible signs of our passing into the world. | ZH: 我们虽然生活在阴影中，但在世界上留下了不可磨灭的痕迹。 | SID: 00E0C4

translations.english: We are Lord Boethiah's faithful. Have you come to test your mettle?
translations.chinese: 我们是波耶西亚大人忠实的信徒。你是来考验勇气的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8C6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We are Lord Boethiah's faithful. Have you come to test your mettle? | ZH: 我们是波耶西亚大人忠实的信徒。你是来考验勇气的？ | SID: 0002F0

translations.english: Good. Perhaps I've misjudged.
translations.chinese: 好，看来是我看走眼了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8C7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Perhaps I've misjudged. | ZH: 好，看来是我看走眼了。 | SID: 00AE72

translations.english: Hear me!
translations.chinese: 听我说！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8C8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hear me! | ZH: 听我说！ | SID: 004F4B

translations.english: First, prove your tongue can wield a lie. Find someone. Gain his trust. Lead him to the shrine above.
translations.chinese: 首先，证明你自己善于说谎。骗取一个人的信任，把他带到上面的祭坛去。

translations.english: Next, instruct your thrall to touch the Pillar of Sacrifice. Its magic will ensnare him, rendering him helpless.
translations.chinese: 然后指示你的奴隶触摸献祭之柱。上面的魔法会诱捕他，使他失去抵抗。

translations.english: If your will is strong enough, it will stir Boethiah in her Dark Mansion, and she will appear before us.
translations.chinese: 如果你的意志足够坚定，波耶西亚就会在她的黑暗之宅中感受到，并降临到我们面前。

translations.english: Then, girded with certitude, plant the ceremonial blade deeply, so that the waters of his heart wash over you.
translations.chinese: 接着，毫不犹豫地把仪式之刃狠狠插进去，用他的心灵之水洗涤你。

translations.english: If you desire a glimpse of our Dark Mistress, then this is what you must do.
translations.chinese: 如果想一睹我们的黑暗女士，你就必须这么做。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004D8C9]
Translations:

translations.english: That remains to be seen. But if it is so, and if Boethiah appears, then we will welcome you as one of us.
translations.chinese: 我们拭目以待。如果波耶西亚果真降临，我们会接纳你。

agentText:

translations.english: Don't leave me here!
translations.chinese: 别把我丢下！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA13]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't leave me here! | ZH: 别把我丢下！ | SID: 002243

translations.english: I, uhh... wait, what?
translations.chinese: 我，唔……等等，什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA14]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I, uhh... wait, what? | ZH: 我，唔……等等，什么？ | SID: 00508B

translations.english: He gets the books, I get you. It's very simple.
translations.chinese: 他拿到书，我拿到你。就这么简单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA15]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He gets the books, I get you. It's very simple. | ZH: 他拿到书，我拿到你。就这么简单。 | SID: 007734

translations.english: Do we have a deal?
translations.chinese: 成交吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA16]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do we have a deal? | ZH: 成交吗？ | SID: 00FBB4

translations.english: You wouldn't do that, would you? You wouldn't leave me here with her!
translations.chinese: 你不会这么做的对吧？你不会把我留在这儿的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA17]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You wouldn't do that, would you? You wouldn't leave me here with her! | ZH: 你不会这么做的对吧？你不会把我留在这儿的！ | SID: 005E80

translations.english: Fine. Take your books and leave at once.
translations.chinese: 很好。带上你的书然后赶紧离开。

translations.english: If you ever come back, I won't be so gracious.
translations.chinese: 胆敢再回来，休怪我不客气。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA18]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Fine. Take your books and leave at once. | ZH: 很好。带上你的书然后赶紧离开。 | SID: 004D6D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you ever come back, I won't be so gracious. | ZH: 胆敢再回来，休怪我不客气。 | SID: 006897

translations.english: I'm waiting.
translations.chinese: 我等着呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DA19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm waiting. | ZH: 我等着呢。 | SID: 00265E

translations.english: I can promise you if it comes to that, and my back's to the wall, I won't hesitate.
translations.chinese: 我可以向你保证，如果真的到了那一步，我退无可退时，我是不会犹豫的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBB7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can promise you if it comes to that, and my back's to the wall, I won't hesitate. | ZH: 我可以向你保证，如果真的到了那一步，我退无可退时，我是不会犹豫的。 | SID: 00CB1C

translations.english: She's the mistress of night and darkness and the patron of every thief in Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 她是夜晚与黑暗之主，也是全泰姆瑞尔小偷的守护神。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBB9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's the mistress of night and darkness and the patron of every thief in Tamriel. | ZH: 她是夜晚与黑暗之主，也是全泰姆瑞尔小偷的守护神。 | SID: 000948

translations.english: Like a novice picking an impossible lock or a blind man suddenly turning to face you as you reach for his pocket?
translations.chinese: 比如新手遇到了超难搞的锁头，或者掏瞎子包时对方突然转过身来？

translations.english: It's through these subtle means that Nocturnal influences us.
translations.chinese: 诺克图娜尔就是通过这种微妙的手段来影响我们。

translations.english: Again, you have to think differently. Haven't you ever noticed how our luck behaves?
translations.chinese: 我再说一遍，你得从不同角度思考问题。你没注意到我们的运气吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Like a novice picking an impossible lock or a blind man suddenly turning to face you as you reach for his pocket? | ZH: 比如新手遇到了超难搞的锁头，或者掏瞎子包时对方突然转过身来？ | SID: 000137
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It's through these subtle means that Nocturnal influences us. | ZH: 诺克图娜尔就是通过这种微妙的手段来影响我们。 | SID: 0025A3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Again, you have to think differently. Haven't you ever noticed how our luck behaves? | ZH: 我再说一遍，你得从不同角度思考问题。你没注意到我们的运气吗？ | SID: 00C57E

translations.english: She influences our luck and in return demands payment.
translations.chinese: 她影响我们的运气，反过来要求我们支付报酬。

translations.english: Nocturnal isn't one for worship and reverence. There are no priests and no sermons, no services and no alms.
translations.chinese: 诺克图娜尔不是用来礼敬或崇拜的。没有祭司、没有传教、没有礼拜，也没有施舍。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBBC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: She influences our luck and in return demands payment. | ZH: 她影响我们的运气，反过来要求我们支付报酬。 | SID: 00CB2B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Nocturnal isn't one for worship and reverence. There are no priests and no sermons, no services and no alms. | ZH: 诺克图娜尔不是用来礼敬或崇拜的。没有祭司、没有传教、没有礼拜，也没有施舍。 | SID: 00FBA0

translations.english: Whether you know it or not, Nocturnal dictates how well we perform as rogues.
translations.chinese: 不管你知道与否，诺克图娜尔都决定了我们作为盗贼的表现。

translations.english: The only difference is she doesn't demand payment in the traditional sense and sometimes the cost can be quite high.
translations.chinese: 唯一的区别就是，她不要求传统意义上的报酬，有时代价非常高昂。

translations.english: You're closer to understanding than you realize.
translations.chinese: 你比自己意识到的还要接近理解了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBBD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Whether you know it or not, Nocturnal dictates how well we perform as rogues. | ZH: 不管你知道与否，诺克图娜尔都决定了我们作为盗贼的表现。 | SID: 0036B0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The only difference is she doesn't demand payment in the traditional sense and sometimes the cost can be quite high. | ZH: 唯一的区别就是，她不要求传统意义上的报酬，有时代价非常高昂。 | SID: 00CB2E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You're closer to understanding than you realize. | ZH: 你比自己意识到的还要接近理解了。 | SID: 00CB30

translations.english: Does she exact payment when we die? When we suffer does she revel in our misery? No one knows.
translations.chinese: 我们死后她会索取报偿吗？我们受苦时她会感到陶醉吗？没人知道。

translations.english: Nocturnal's whim is the greatest mystery to everyone. There have been volumes written on the subject.
translations.chinese: 诺克图娜尔的奇思妙想对每个人来说都是最大的谜题。关于这个问题的著述很多。

translations.english: The return certainly seems worth the risk though.
translations.chinese: 不过，回报还是值得冒险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Nocturnal's whim is the greatest mystery to everyone. There have been volumes written on the subject. | ZH: 诺克图娜尔的奇思妙想对每个人来说都是最大的谜题。关于这个问题的著述很多。 | SID: 003571
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The return certainly seems worth the risk though. | ZH: 不过，回报还是值得冒险。 | SID: 0077AD

translations.english: It was Gallus who inducted me into the Nightingales and honed my skills to a razor sharp point. I owe everything to him.
translations.chinese: 是加卢斯把我介绍进了夜莺，磨砺我的技巧。我的一切都拜他所赐。

translations.english: We were... very close.
translations.chinese: 我们曾经……亲密无间。

translations.english: He was a scholar, a master thief and a natural leader. Everyone respected him and followed him without question.
translations.chinese: 他是个学者，也是个大盗贼，天生的领袖。大家都很敬重他，毫不犹豫地追随他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBBF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It was Gallus who inducted me into the Nightingales and honed my skills to a razor sharp point. I owe everything to him. | ZH: 是加卢斯把我介绍进了夜莺，磨砺我的技巧。我的一切都拜他所赐。 | SID: 007FD7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We were... very close. | ZH: 我们曾经……亲密无间。 | SID: 009FDE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He was a scholar, a master thief and a natural leader. Everyone respected him and followed him without question. | ZH: 他是个学者，也是个大盗贼，天生的领袖。大家都很敬重他，毫不犹豫地追随他。 | SID: 00CB1F

translations.english: Gallus once said he felt comfortable around me; able to let his guard down. I can't help but think that I'm responsible for what happened to him.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯曾说他和我在一起时感觉很舒服，能够放松警惕。我总觉得他的死是我的错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DBC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Gallus once said he felt comfortable around me; able to let his guard down. I can't help but think that I'm responsible for what happened to him. | ZH: 加卢斯曾说他和我在一起时感觉很舒服，能够放松警惕。我总觉得他的死是我的错。 | SID: 0032F0

translations.english: Mercer lied to the Guild, branded me a murderer and slandered my name across his network of contacts.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟欺骗了公会，给我贴上了杀人犯的标签，还动用关系网对我进行诽谤。

translations.english: For twenty-five years I ran, never sleeping in the same place twice and carefully covering my tracks.
translations.chinese: 我逃了二十五年，不敢在同一个地方睡两次觉，小心翼翼地掩盖自己的踪迹。

translations.english: Mercer doesn't need to die... he needs to feel the cold sting of fate as his life crumbles in front of him and he's hunted by the Guild.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟不用死……他需要感受命运冰冷的刺痛，让他被公会追杀，生命在自己面前崩溃。

translations.english: Strangers like you bring war. I've seen enough war.
translations.chinese: 你这样的陌生人会带来战争。我已经看够战争了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCB2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Strangers like you bring war. I've seen enough war. | ZH: 你这样的陌生人会带来战争。我已经看够战争了。 | SID: 0075A4

translations.english: These graves hold the sons and daughters of Falkreath.
translations.chinese: 这些坟墓里安葬着佛克瑞斯的儿女。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCB3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These graves hold the sons and daughters of Falkreath. | ZH: 这些坟墓里安葬着佛克瑞斯的儿女。 | SID: 00E592

translations.english: Show respect while you're here and you and I will be fine.
translations.chinese: 在这里时请尊重点，我们就相安无事了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCB6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Show respect while you're here and you and I will be fine. | ZH: 在这里时请尊重点，我们就相安无事了。 | SID: 00C950

translations.english: You have the look of a killer.
translations.chinese: 你长得像个杀手。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCB7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have the look of a killer. | ZH: 你长得像个杀手。 | SID: 00CBF1

translations.english: Arkay helps us find peace with death.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯帮助我们平静地面对死亡。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCB8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Arkay helps us find peace with death. | ZH: 阿尔凯帮助我们平静地面对死亡。 | SID: 005598

translations.english: Indara and I like to keep to ourselves and run our farm.
translations.chinese: 因达拉和我喜欢过自己的日子，经营自己的农场。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Indara and I like to keep to ourselves and run our farm. | ZH: 因达拉和我喜欢过自己的日子，经营自己的农场。 | SID: 00CBEE

translations.english: My wife, Indara, has a gift with animals. It makes her a better farmer than anyone I've ever seen.
translations.chinese: 我妻子因达拉很有照顾动物的天赋。她是我见过的最好的农民。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCBC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My wife, Indara, has a gift with animals. It makes her a better farmer than anyone I've ever seen. | ZH: 我妻子因达拉很有照顾动物的天赋。她是我见过的最好的农民。 | SID: 00CBED

translations.english: This war isn't needed. Imperials like my wife can be hard to handle but we Nords could work with them. I should know.
translations.chinese: 这场战争毫无必要。像我妻子这样的帝国人很难对付，但我们诺德人可以和他们合作。我是知道这一点的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCBD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This war isn't needed. Imperials like my wife can be hard to handle but we Nords could work with them. I should know. | ZH: 这场战争毫无必要。像我妻子这样的帝国人很难对付，但我们诺德人可以和他们合作。我是知道这一点的。 | SID: 00CBEC

translations.english: Runil has been a true friend to my wife and I in our time of need.
translations.chinese: 鲁尼尔是我们夫妻在需要时伸出援手的真朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004DCBE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Runil has been a true friend to my wife and I in our time of need. | ZH: 鲁尼尔是我们夫妻在需要时伸出援手的真朋友。 | SID: 00FEE4

translations.english: I don't know if the war is Arkay's will or man's, but it's none of my doings.
translations.chinese: 我不知道这场战争是阿尔凯的意志还是人类的想法，但我什么都做不了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 马西斯聪明善良。诺德人和帝国人都需要更多他这样的人。

translations.chinese: 人们看过佛克瑞斯的坟墓之后怎么还会想要打仗？

translations.english: Are you attempting to threaten me? After I've been so hospitable?
translations.chinese: 你是想威胁我？在我这么好客的情况下？

translations.english: Well, then you won't be leaving here at all.
translations.chinese: 好啊，那你就别想离开了。

translations.english: I'm not going anywhere without those books.
translations.chinese: 不拿回这些书，我哪儿都不去。

translations.chinese: 祖'乌 尼 塔洛迪斯。是你把我引到这儿囚禁起来的……沃巴兰 格拉明都。我没做过什么让你怀疑的事啊。

translations.chinese: 没错。奥瑞 布瑞特 若。在你打败奥杜因之前我不能离开，但没我帮忙你也做不到。

translations.chinese: 阿兰。你已经伤到我了，都瓦克因。就算我不全招，也不会撒谎的。

translations.english: Go and see for yourself. Zu'u ni bo nol het. I will be here... unless Alduin returns before you do.
translations.chinese: 你自己去看吧。祖'乌 尼 伯 诺尔 赫特。我会在这儿等着……除非奥杜因先你一步回来。

translations.chinese: 萨兰 乌斯——如承诺所说，我在等待你的命令。准备好用都瓦的视角俯瞰世界了吗？

translations.english: Of course... I could fly you there. But not while imprisoned like this.
translations.chinese: 当然……我可以带你飞过去。可这么关着我做不到啊。

translations.chinese: 科瑞 兹尼！天空的自由在召唤！但我会留在这里，纳乌 戈尔，我答应过你。

translations.english: Steel's good, but loyalty's better. I'm loyal to Dengeir first and the Empire second.
translations.chinese: 钢铁诚可贵，忠诚价更高。我首先忠于丹格尔，其次才是帝国。

translations.english: If either these Nords or Imperials had some red in their blood this war would be over.
translations.chinese: 如果这些诺德人和帝国人流的还是人血的话，就该结束这场战争。

translations.chinese: 欢迎来到佛克瑞斯！这里欢迎所有真正的天际之子！

translations.chinese: 不敢相信我们会让你这种外地人在天际闲逛。

translations.chinese: 你会发现我和索拉夫哥俩儿是佛克瑞斯唯二真正的诺德人了。

translations.english: Well met. Unlike my brother, I've no dislike of strangers. Met lots of 'em while I was a Stormcloak.
translations.chinese: 你好啊。我不像我兄弟，我不讨厌陌生人。我当风暴斗篷时见过很多这样的人。

translations.english: Don't mind Bolund. He's young and gets riled easily.
translations.chinese: 别介意波伦德。他还年轻，比较易怒。

Addon: Skyrim

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Which brings me to my present concern.
translations.chinese: 我现在就在为此忧心。

translations.english: My servants serve their own purposes. But, if their will is insufficient, nor suitably aligned with mine, I simply destroy them.
translations.chinese: 我的仆人各有目标。但是，如果意志不够充分，或者忤逆我愿，我会干脆地摧毁他们。

translations.english: I have little need for mindless thralls.
translations.chinese: 我不需要无脑的奴隶。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I have little need for mindless thralls. | ZH: 我不需要无脑的奴隶。 | SID: 00CAD0

translations.english: You will need stealth and lies to get past her guards. You will assassinate her swiftly and quietly. And if combat finds you, survive the escape.
translations.chinese: 你需要隐秘行动、运用谎言才能骗过她的护卫。迅速低调的暗杀也可，正面一战溜之大吉也可。

translations.english: Go to Solitude. Stalk the Jarl and slay her.
translations.chinese: 到独孤城，追踪并杀掉领主。

translations.english: I have spread rumors of an assassin. It will make your job harder, but will allow me to place blame where I desire it.
translations.chinese: 我已经散布了谋杀谣言。这样工作的难度提高，我可以随心责备你了。

translations.english: Succeed, and you may keep your title and my armor, and I shall write your name upon the Tablet of Absolute Blackness.
translations.chinese: 成功了，就能保住头衔和盔甲，我会把你的名字写在“绝暗石板”上。

translations.english: Failure is not an option.
translations.chinese: 只需成功，不许失败。

translations.english: You have earned the right to call yourself my Champion.
translations.chinese: 你有成为我之勇士的资格。

translations.english: And now you must perform the task for which I created you. You have already proven to possess the needed skills.
translations.chinese: 现在，执行我创造你的任务。你有足够的技能。

translations.english: Well done. You have proven the strength of your will and your tongue's gift for lies. You have shown ferocity and prowess in combat.
translations.chinese: 干得好。你已经充分证明了自己坚定的意志、高超的谎言，还有凶猛强悍的战法。

translations.english: Now the time has come for a final proving. Are you able to cast aside your honor and strike with the hidden blade?
translations.chinese: 现在，是最后一个考验了。你能否抛下自己的荣誉，暗剑伤人？

translations.chinese: 去吧。我还有需要专心处理的事。去追寻自己的道路吧。

translations.english: Remember always this: You need answer to no authority, neither mortal, nor divine... As you will it, so it shall be.
translations.chinese: 记住：无需服从凡人和圣灵的权威……心有所愿，即能实现。

translations.chinese: 有消息说可怜的撒布乔恩被关进了白漫城大牢。真不幸啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E3A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Word on the street is that poor Sabjorn has found himself in Whiterun's prison. How unfortunate for him. | ZH: 有消息说可怜的撒布乔恩被关进了白漫城大牢。真不幸啊。 | SID: 00BEA5

translations.english: Not a day goes by that I don't regret letting Sabjorn get as far as he did.
translations.chinese: 我无时无刻不在后悔放任了撒布乔恩。

translations.english: In only a few short years, he's taken that bile he calls mead to market and a chunk of my profits with it!
translations.chinese: 短短几年，他就把他那个称之为蜜酒的破胆汁推向市场，并割走了我一大块利润！

translations.english: I can't imagine where he found the gold to take it to market so quickly.
translations.chinese: 我想不出他从哪获取的资金，还这么快把资金运作到市场上。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E3A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not a day goes by that I don't regret letting Sabjorn get as far as he did. | ZH: 我无时无刻不在后悔放任了撒布乔恩。 | SID: 006112
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: In only a few short years, he's taken that bile he calls mead to market and a chunk of my profits with it! | ZH: 短短几年，他就把他那个称之为蜜酒的破胆汁推向市场，并割走了我一大块利润！ | SID: 00CABC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I can't imagine where he found the gold to take it to market so quickly. | ZH: 我想不出他从哪获取的资金，还这么快把资金运作到市场上。 | SID: 00D29D

translations.english: So, you're the one. Hmm. You don't look so impressive.
translations.chinese: 所以就是你啊。嗯，看起来也不怎么样嘛。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E3AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, you're the one. Hmm. You don't look so impressive. | ZH: 所以就是你啊。嗯，看起来也不怎么样嘛。 | SID: 00F731

translations.english: He claims you possess some sort of uncanny aptitude for your line of work. Quite frankly I find that hard to believe.
translations.chinese: 他说你在业务上有某种不可思议的天赋。老实说，我不信。

translations.english: The only reason we're having this conversation is due to Brynjolf's assurance you won't botch another assignment.
translations.chinese: 我们之所以谈这个，是因为布林乔夫保证你不会再搞砸了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E3AC]

translations.english: I also want to know how they managed to get the place up and running so quickly.
translations.chinese: 我还想知道他们如何这么快建立并运营起来的。

translations.english: I hope not. This is an important job.
translations.chinese: 但愿如此。这是份很重要的工作。

translations.english: I have a competitor called Honningbrew Meadery that I want to put out of business.
translations.chinese: 我有个竞争对手，蜜之酿酒庄。我想让它关门大吉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E3AD]
Translations:
