- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I have a competitor called Honningbrew Meadery that I want to put out of business. | ZH: 我有个竞争对手，蜜之酿酒庄。我想让它关门大吉。 | SID: 00B8E5

translations.english: You have to understand, it's been a long time since Brynjolf's sent me anyone I can rely on.
translations.chinese: 你要知道，布林乔夫已经很久没派什么靠谱的人来了。

translations.english: Is that confidence I hear... or is it arrogance? Strange how often they're confused.
translations.chinese: 我听到的这是信心……还是狂妄？奇怪的是这二者时常被混淆。

agentText:

translations.english: But a single candle can banish the darkness of the entire Void. If not you, then someone else.
translations.chinese: 一道烛光就能驱散整个虚空的黑暗。如果不是你，那还会有别人。

translations.english: My beacon is sure to attract a worthy soul.
translations.chinese: 我的信标一定会吸引有价值的灵魂。

translations.english: But if you are wise, you will heed my bidding.
translations.chinese: 如果你够聪明，就乖乖听我的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But if you are wise, you will heed my bidding. | ZH: 如果你够聪明，就乖乖听我的。 | SID: 00CA97

translations.english: But the token of my truth lies buried in the ruins of my once great temple, now tainted by a profane darkness skittering within.
translations.chinese: 但我真正的象征还被埋在曾经的神庙废墟中，被亵渎的黑暗所玷污。

translations.english: It is time for my splendor to return to Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 是时候让我之光彩重现天际了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4C7]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It is time for my splendor to return to Skyrim. | ZH: 是时候让我之光彩重现天际了。 | SID: 00D208

translations.english: Go now, with haste. Take my beacon to Mount Kilkreath.
translations.chinese: 现在快走吧。带着我的信标去基尔克瑞斯山。

translations.english: The defiler waxes!
translations.chinese: 亵渎者正在变强！

translations.english: Can you not hear me? Are your ears full of hate?
translations.chinese: 你听不见我说的话吗？难道你耳朵被仇恨堵住了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4C8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Go now, with haste. Take my beacon to Mount Kilkreath. | ZH: 现在快走吧。带着我的信标去基尔克瑞斯山。 | SID: 000131

translations.english: A new hand touches the beacon.
translations.chinese: 一只新手触摸了信标。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4C9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A new hand touches the beacon. | ZH: 一只新手触摸了信标。 | SID: 004D75

translations.english: It matters not. The plant cares nothing for the rays that bring it the warmth of the sun. As you carry Dawnbreaker, so will my light touch the world.
translations.chinese: 这不重要。植物不会关心给它带来温暖的阳光。只要你带着破晓者，我的光芒就会照耀这个世界。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It matters not. The plant cares nothing for the rays that bring it the warmth of the sun. As you carry Dawnbreaker, so will my light touch the world. | ZH: 这不重要。植物不会关心给它带来温暖的阳光。只要你带着破晓者，我的光芒就会照耀这个世界。 | SID: 0056FC

translations.english: Of course you will. I have commanded it!
translations.chinese: 当然要交给你。这是我的命令！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course you will. I have commanded it! | ZH: 当然要交给你。这是我的命令！ | SID: 00CA98

translations.english: The Necromancer Malkoran defiles my shrine with vile corruptions, trapping lost souls left in the wake of this war to do his bidding.
translations.chinese: 死灵法师莫克然用邪恶的堕落行径玷污我的祭坛，诱捕战争中迷失的亡魂充为奴仆。

translations.english: I have brought you here, mortal, to be my champion. You will enter my temple, retrieve my artifact, and destroy the defiler.
translations.chinese: 凡人，我把你带到这里，任命为我的勇士。你需要进入我的神庙，取回神器，并消灭亵渎者。

translations.english: Worse still, he uses the power stored within my own token to fuel his foul deeds.
translations.chinese: 更糟的是，他用我储存在神器中的力量给自己的邪恶行为提供能量。

translations.english: Guide my light through the temple to open the inner sanctum and destroy the defiler.
translations.chinese: 引导我的光穿过神庙，打开内部圣所，将亵渎者彻底消灭。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Guide my light through the temple to open the inner sanctum and destroy the defiler. | ZH: 引导我的光穿过神庙，打开内部圣所，将亵渎者彻底消灭。 | SID: 00D83D

translations.english: Malkoran is vanquished. Skyrim's dead shall remain at rest. This is as it should be. This is because of you.
translations.chinese: 莫克然被征服了。天际的死者得到了安息。这一切回归本貌。这是你的功劳。

translations.english: A new day is dawning. And you shall be its herald.
translations.chinese: 新的一天已经开始。而你将是黎明的预兆。

translations.english: Take the mighty Dawnbreaker and with it purge corruption from the dark corners of the world. Wield it in my name, that my influence may grow.
translations.chinese: 带上这把强大的破晓者，用它扫清世界黑暗角落中的腐败堕落。以我的名义挥舞它，而我的影响也将壮大。

translations.english: May the light of certitude guide your efforts.
translations.chinese: 愿肯定之光指引你努力的方向。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: May the light of certitude guide your efforts. | ZH: 愿肯定之光指引你努力的方向。 | SID: 00123B

translations.english: I will send down a ray of light. Guide this light through my temple and its doors will open.
translations.chinese: 我会射出一道光，引导它穿过我的神庙，门就会打开。

translations.english: Malkoran has forced the doors shut. But this is my temple, and it responds to my decree.
translations.chinese: 莫克然强行把门堵上。但这是我的神庙，它会回应我的命令。

translations.english: Go now, the artifact must be reclaimed and Malkoran destroyed.
translations.chinese: 去吧，神器必须被回收，莫克然也必须被毁灭。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E4D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go now, the artifact must be reclaimed and Malkoran destroyed. | ZH: 去吧，神器必须被回收，莫克然也必须被毁灭。 | SID: 00C329

translations.english: What is it? I said I didn't wish to... be disturbed.
translations.chinese: 怎么回事？我说过我不想被……打扰。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E64D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What is it? I said I didn't wish to... be disturbed. | ZH: 怎么回事？我说过我不想被……打扰。 | SID: 00CA83

translations.english: I think perhaps it might be best if you lead the way. My eyes aren't what they used to be.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你最好在前面。我的眼睛有点不够用了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E80A]

translations.english: Don't worry, I'll stay right with you.
translations.chinese: 别担心，我会陪着你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E811]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't worry, I'll stay right with you. | ZH: 别担心，我会陪着你的。 | SID: 007740

translations.english: This is all very strange. I've never seen anything like this.
translations.chinese: 这一切太古怪。我从没见过这样的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E841]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is all very strange. I've never seen anything like this. | ZH: 这一切太古怪。我从没见过这样的事。 | SID: 00CA81

translations.english: You mess with the Silver-Blood family, you end up here.
translations.chinese: 敢惹银血家族的话，就得到这儿来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E84C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You mess with the Silver-Blood family, you end up here. | ZH: 敢惹银血家族的话，就得到这儿来了。 | SID: 00C8D1

translations.english: I catch you stealing anything, I'll break your neck.
translations.chinese: 如果我发现你偷东西，脖子都给你拧断了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E84D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I catch you stealing anything, I'll break your neck. | ZH: 如果我发现你偷东西，脖子都给你拧断了。 | SID: 00B574

translations.english: Now this is real guard duty. Just throw them in the mine and be done with it.
translations.chinese: 这才是卫兵真正的职责，把他们都扔进矿场，万事大吉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E84E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now this is real guard duty. Just throw them in the mine and be done with it. | ZH: 这才是卫兵真正的职责，把他们都扔进矿场，万事大吉。 | SID: 0035AD

translations.english: The World-Eater waits within the mist! Bring word to Shor's hall of our hard fate!
translations.chinese: 世界吞噬者正在迷雾中出没！快把我们的险境报告舒尔大厅！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E9B5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The World-Eater waits within the mist! Bring word to Shor's hall of our hard fate! | ZH: 世界吞噬者正在迷雾中出没！快把我们的险境报告舒尔大厅！ | SID: 00BC08

translations.english: Turn back, traveler! Terror waits within this mist.
translations.chinese: 回去吧，旅人！迷雾中有恐怖等待。

translations.english: Many have braved the shadowed vale but vain is all courage against the peril that guards the way.
translations.chinese: 有许多人勇敢地面对黑暗的山谷，但面对道路上的危险，一切勇气都是徒劳。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E9B6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Turn back, traveler! Terror waits within this mist. | ZH: 回去吧，旅人！迷雾中有恐怖等待。 | SID: 003E04
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Many have braved the shadowed vale but vain is all courage against the peril that guards the way. | ZH: 有许多人勇敢地面对黑暗的山谷，但面对道路上的危险，一切勇气都是徒劳。 | SID: 004B61

translations.english: I'll try to hold to your hopeful purpose. Quickly, before this encompassing fog once more snares me in the World-Eater's net.
translations.chinese: 我不会辜负你给的希望。快走，趁着迷雾没把我卷进世界吞噬者之网里。

translations.english: Near Giants' Gap, in the gloom before dawn, we marched, unsuspecting into the Imperials' trap.
translations.chinese: 我们在拂晓时分在巨人隘口附近行军，毫无防备地中了帝国的圈套。

translations.english: Then we stood and fought, our shield-wall defending until by dawn's light the Legion's ranks wavered.
translations.chinese: 我们起来战斗，盾墙一直坚守到黎明，军团的队列都开始动摇了。

translations.english: But I never knew if nights-end brought victory - a swift-flying arrow to Sovngarde carried me.
translations.chinese: 但我不知道黑夜是否伴随胜利的到来结束了，一只流矢把我带到了松加德。

translations.english: I do not know - but none have passed through.
translations.chinese: 不知道，但没人能穿过去。

translations.english: Alduin, his hunger insatiable, hunts the lost souls snared within this shadowed valley.
translations.chinese: 奥杜因是饿极了，在这片阴暗的山谷里猎食迷失的灵魂。

translations.english: Can you lead the way to where Shor's hall waits, beckoning us on to welcome long sought?
translations.chinese: 你能带我们去等候已久的舒尔大厅吗？它已经召唤我们多时了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004E9B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I do not know - but none have passed through. | ZH: 不知道，但没人能穿过去。 | SID: 003FE5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Alduin, his hunger insatiable, hunts the lost souls snared within this shadowed valley. | ZH: 奥杜因是饿极了，在这片阴暗的山谷里猎食迷失的灵魂。 | SID: 00CA78
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Can you lead the way to where Shor's hall waits, beckoning us on to welcome long sought? | ZH: 你能带我们去等候已久的舒尔大厅吗？它已经召唤我们多时了。 | SID: 00D4C5

translations.english: Hurry! Before Alduin your life devours bring word to Shor's hall of our hard fate!
translations.chinese: 快走吧！在奥杜因吞噬你生命之前，把我们的险境带到舒尔大厅！

translations.english: I saw it fair when first I trod this long-sought path. The pain and fear vanished, dreamlike, and a vision beckoned -
translations.chinese: 我首次踏上这追寻已久的道路，目睹了它的美丽。感觉痛苦和恐惧都消失了，就像做梦一样，一个幻象在召唤着——

translations.english: I've lost the way and wander blindly.
translations.chinese: 我迷失了方向，茫然地徘徊。

translations.english: Shor's hall, shimmering across the clouded vale. But quenched was hope by the shrouding mist - my mind is darkened.
translations.chinese: 舒尔大厅，在云烟缭绕的山谷里闪闪发光。但是希望被笼罩的迷雾浇灭了——我的心也随之黯淡。

translations.english: He says that he needs me to stay here and work the farm, and even if he did let me be an adventurer, we couldn't afford to buy armor.
translations.chinese: 他说需要我留在这儿，在农场干活，就算他想让我当冒险家，我们也买不起盔甲。

translations.english: I want to be an adventurer like you, but my father says I can't.
translations.chinese: 我想成为像你一样的冒险家，但我父亲说我做不到。

translations.english: His name's Mralki, and he's the innkeeper here. I hope you can change his mind.
translations.chinese: 他叫穆拉基，是这里的旅店老板。我希望你能帮我劝劝他。

translations.english: I'll take your challenge, but if I win I get to start a new life as an adventurer, and with no objections from you.
translations.chinese: 我接受挑战，但如果我赢了，我就开始新的冒险生活，而且你不许反对。

agentText:

translations.english: Thank you. I can't stand the thought of being trapped in this village for the rest of my days.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。一想到我余生都要困在这个村子里，我就受不了了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Strong, yes, but how clever are you? I'll tell you what, if you can open the lock on my chest, you can have everything in it.
translations.chinese: 你是够强壮了，但聪明呢？这样吧，如果你能打开箱子上的锁，就拿走里面的所有东西吧。

translations.english: Some folk here will tell you I'm sheltering my boy too much, but I ask you, isn't it a father's duty to keep his children safe?
translations.chinese: 有些人说我太护着我儿子了，但我问问你，保护孩子的安全不是父亲的责任吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I was a different man, once -- strong, commanding, ah, and young. But the Great War was a long time ago.
translations.chinese: 我以前很不一样的——强壮、威严，啊，还年轻。但浩大战争过去很久咯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004EC4D]

translations.english: You look like you've seen your share of adventure. I envy you that. In fact, maybe you can help me with something. Will you hear me out?
translations.chinese: 你看起来像是冒过险的人。真羡慕你。其实，也许你能帮我个忙。你愿意听我说说嘛？

translations.english: I'll make the preparations immediately!
translations.chinese: 我马上准备！

translations.english: Hmmm. I don't think you've got enough to cover my expenses with Silver-Bloods, much less convince me give my words away.
translations.chinese: 嗯。你这点钱不够我在银血家的开销，也不够把我的诗买走。

translations.english: This is insane! I didn't steal anything! I never saw this ring before in my entire life!
translations.chinese: 这不可能！我什么都没偷！我从没见过这个戒指！

translations.english: All right, Brand-Shei. Turn out your pockets, we know you have it.
translations.chinese: 好了，布兰德-谢，把你的口袋翻出来，我们知道在你这。

translations.english: I'm telling you, I don't... wait, what's this ring? This isn't mine!
translations.chinese: 我告诉你了，我没……等等，这戒指是怎么回事？这不是我的啊！

translations.english: We can do this one of two ways. You can walk with me up to the keep, or I can drag your lifeless body. Your choice.
translations.chinese: 现在给你两条路。要么，跟我们走回城堡，要么，我把你尸体拖过去。自己选吧。

translations.english: Have what? What in blazes are you talking about?
translations.chinese: 什么东西？你在说什么？

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have what? What in blazes are you talking about? | ZH: 什么东西？你在说什么？ | SID: 00310F

translations.english: But... I... very well.
translations.chinese: 但……我……好吧。

translations.chinese: 这就对了。这不是你的。你被捕了，布兰德-谢。

translations.english: A storeroom. See if you can find any potions. We'll need them.
translations.chinese: 储藏室。看看能不能找到我们需要的药剂。

translations.english: No, I haven't seen him since the dragon showed up.
translations.chinese: 不，龙出现以后我就没再见到他。

translations.english: Damn, that dragon doesn't give up easy.
translations.chinese: 该死，看来这头龙是不会轻易离开了。

translations.english: Was Jarl Ulfric with you?
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克领主和你一起吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Was Jarl Ulfric with you? | ZH: 乌弗瑞克领主和你一起吗？ | SID: 003E9B

translations.english: Shor's bones. We were too late. Damn the Empire.
translations.chinese: 舒尔的骨头。我们来晚了，该死的帝国。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004F424]

translations.english: The Hall of Valor, where heroes wait to follow Shor to the final battle.
translations.chinese: 勇士大厅，英雄们在那里等待追随舒尔奔赴最后一战。

translations.english: Don't you know? What drew you here? Surely your dreams showed you the way?
translations.chinese: 你不知道？那是什么吸引你来的？你的梦肯定给你指明了方向吧？

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Don't you know? What drew you here? Surely your dreams showed you the way? | ZH: 你不知道？那是什么吸引你来的？你的梦肯定给你指明了方向吧？ | SID: 00C3D8

translations.english: Speak with Amaund Motierre at the Bannered Mare in Whiterun. He will know the true Emperor's location.
translations.chinese: 去白漫城的悬旗母马找阿蒙德·莫提雷。他知道真皇帝在哪里。

translations.english: But first, inform Nazir of your plans. For you are the Listener, and must bind this Family together.
translations.chinese: 但首先，和纳兹尔说你的计划。你是聆听者，必须把这个家凝聚起来。

translations.english: But while you live, the Dark Brotherhood lives. We must fulfill our contract. Emperor Titus Mede II must be eliminated.
translations.chinese: 但只要你还活着，黑暗兄弟会就存在。我们必须执行契约。提图斯·迈德二世必须死。

translations.english: Astrid is dead. It is as it should be. May she find redemption in the Void.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德已死。顺理成章。愿她在虚空中获得救赎。

translations.english: I hope your stay in Markarth treats you better.
translations.chinese: 希望你在马卡斯能好过一点。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope your stay in Markarth treats you better. | ZH: 希望你在马卡斯能好过一点。 | SID: 000C37

translations.english: Underneath the College. It's not the nicest place, so if you go down there, please do be careful.
translations.chinese: 学院地下。那不是什么善地，如果要去，请务必小心。

translations.english: If it's important, maybe Tolfdir knows. He seems to know a lot.
translations.chinese: 如果很重要的话，托夫迪尔应该知道。他好像知道很多。

translations.english: The what of what? No. No idea.
translations.chinese: 什么跟什么？不知道，不知道。

translations.english: Very well. It's not something often discussed, as it might be... misunderstood by the locals.
translations.chinese: 很好。这不是经常被拿来讨论的事，虽然可能是……被当地人误解了。

translations.english: The Augur is down in the Midden, below the College. I don't recommend going down there unless it's absolutely necessary.
translations.chinese: 占卜师就在学院下面的秽道里。除非你有绝对需要，否则我不建议你去那里。

translations.english: What brings you, wayfarer grim, to wander here, in Sovngarde, souls-end, Shor's gift to honored dead?
translations.chinese: 冷酷的旅者，你因何来到这灵魂之终点，舒尔赐予荣耀死者之地——松加德？

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah! It's been too long since last I faced a doom-driven hero of the dragon blood. | ZH: 哈！我很久没见过身负龙血的末日英雄了。 | SID: 001D70

translations.english: Do not mistake the night-shrouded thief's stealthily-taken spoils, stolen and unearned, for a warrior's plunder, won in honorable battle.
translations.chinese: 别把夜盗偷来的不劳而获之物和战士在光荣一战中取得的战利混为一谈。

translations.english: Your doom already binds you to your dark mistress, but your errand I will not hinder, if my wrath you can withstand.
translations.chinese: 你的终末注定与黑暗女士交织一起，但只要你能承受我的愤怒，那我不会阻止你的使命。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FA44]

translations.english: Perhaps before the end you will earn the right to pass this way.
translations.chinese: 但或许在末日来临前，你能获得通过此路的权利。

translations.english: Welcome I do not offer, but your errand I will not hinder, if my wrath you can withstand.
translations.chinese: 我不欢迎你，只要你能承受我的愤怒，我就不会阻拦你的使命。

translations.english: You trespass here, shadow-walker. Shor does not know you.
translations.chinese: 暗影行者，你擅闯此地。舒尔并不相信你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FA46]
Translations:

translations.english: I welcome the chance to challenge the blade of Ysgramor's heir, honored shield-brother to Kodlak Whitemane, whom I've watched for in vain.
translations.chinese: 很高兴有机会挑战伊斯格拉默之刃的继承者，“白鬃”克拉科光荣的盾牌兄弟，我等他很久了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FA47]

translations.english: Well met, mage of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 你好，天际的法师。

translations.english: Here in Shor's house we honor it still.
translations.chinese: 在舒尔之殿，我们仍旧尊重它。

translations.english: The Nords may have forgotten their forefathers' respect for the Clever Craft, but your comrades throng this hall.
translations.chinese: 诺德人可能已经忘记了他们的祖先对聪慧技艺的尊敬，但你的同志们正在大厅里。

agentText:

translations.english: There is no help for you here.
translations.chinese: 这里帮不了你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FBEF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There is no help for you here. | ZH: 这里帮不了你。 | SID: 00B2C3

translations.english: There is no solace in knowing what is to come.
translations.chinese: 知道将要发生的事是得不到任何安慰的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FBF0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There is no solace in knowing what is to come. | ZH: 知道将要发生的事是得不到任何安慰的。 | SID: 0054B2

translations.english: Your perseverance will only lead you to disappointment.
translations.chinese: 你的坚持只会带来失望。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FBF2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your perseverance will only lead you to disappointment. | ZH: 你的坚持只会带来失望。 | SID: 00240E

translations.english: Still you persist? Very well, you may enter.
translations.chinese: 你还是要坚持吗？好吧，你可以进来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FBF3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Still you persist? Very well, you may enter. | ZH: 你还是要坚持吗？好吧，你可以进来了。 | SID: 008E8C

translations.english: Never done an honest day's work in your life for all that coin you're carrying, eh lad?
translations.chinese: 你这辈子都没靠正当营生赚过钱吧，小子？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FCDA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Never done an honest day's work in your life for all that coin you're carrying, eh lad? | ZH: 你这辈子都没靠正当营生赚过钱吧，小子？ | SID: 00314A

translations.english: Running a little light in the pockets, lass?
translations.chinese: 要给口袋添点光吗，姑娘？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FCDB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Running a little light in the pockets, lass? | ZH: 要给口袋添点光吗，姑娘？ | SID: 000B12

translations.english: Your pockets... they're a little low on coin. I can tell.
translations.chinese: 我是说，你的囊中……有些羞涩啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FCDC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your pockets... they're a little low on coin. I can tell. | ZH: 我是说，你的囊中……有些羞涩啊。 | SID: 00B86B

translations.english: The Thalmor came seeking answers as well, unaware they will be his undoing.
translations.chinese: 那个梭默也来寻找答案，殊不知会导致自己的毁灭。

translations.english: Like others before you, you blindly follow a path to your own destruction.
translations.chinese: 像你之前的人一样，你盲目地走上了自我毁灭的道路。

translations.english: Indeed. And so you have come looking, though you do not know why.
translations.chinese: 确实。所以你就来找我了。虽然你根本不知道为了什么。

translations.english: Your path now follows his, though you will arrive too late.
translations.chinese: 现在你的道路紧随他后，尽管你来的太晚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD3C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: The Thalmor came seeking answers as well, unaware they will be his undoing. | ZH: 那个梭默也来寻找答案，殊不知会导致自己的毁灭。 | SID: 00479B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Like others before you, you blindly follow a path to your own destruction. | ZH: 像你之前的人一样，你盲目地走上了自我毁灭的道路。 | SID: 006E51
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Indeed. And so you have come looking, though you do not know why. | ZH: 确实。所以你就来找我了。虽然你根本不知道为了什么。 | SID: 00A7FB
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Your path now follows his, though you will arrive too late. | ZH: 现在你的道路紧随他后，尽管你来的太晚。 | SID: 00E261

translations.english: You seek meaning, shelter in Knowledge. You will not find it.
translations.chinese: 你想在知识中寻找意义和庇护。徒劳无果。

translations.english: You seek that which all who wield magic seek. Knowledge.
translations.chinese: 你所追寻的，是所有使用魔法者都在追寻的。知识。

translations.english: The Thalmor sought the same thing, and it shall lead to his end as it has so many others.
translations.chinese: 那个梭默也在寻求同样的东西，那只会让他和其他很多人一样迎来灭亡。

translations.english: You shall find this: Knowledge will corrupt. It will destroy. It will consume.
translations.chinese: 你会发现：知识会腐朽，会摧毁，会消耗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You will kill me, and I have accepted that fate. But regardless of your path through life, I sense in you a certain... ambition.
translations.chinese: 你会杀了我，我也已经认命了。但不管你人生道路如何，我能够感受到你内在的……抱负。

translations.english: This person, whomever he or she may be, must be punished for their treachery.
translations.chinese: 不管那人是谁，都得为他们自己的奸诈付出代价。

translations.english: Once you have been rewarded for my assassination, I want you to kill the very person who ordered it. Would you do me this kindness?
translations.chinese: 等你拿到刺杀我的报酬，我要你杀了指使你的人。你能帮我这个忙吗？

translations.english: So I ask of you a favor. An old man's dying wish. While there are many who would see me dead, there is one who set the machine in motion.
translations.chinese: 所以我想请你帮个忙。算是一个老人的遗愿吧。很多人想要我死，但其中一个迈出了这一步。

translations.english: You will hear me out, then? Good.
translations.chinese: 你愿意听我说完？好。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: Well, I don't know.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我不知道。

translations.english: I suppose you should go to the docks and... swim?
translations.chinese: 我觉得你到码头之后应该……游泳？

translations.english: It's in the Solitude Inlet - that's the channel just north of the docks.
translations.chinese: 它停泊在独孤城海湾，码头北的海峡那里。

translations.english: This ship, the Katariah. How will I get onboard?
translations.chinese: 我该怎么登上这卡塔瑞亚号？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD53]
Translations:

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD54]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 00440B

translations.english: But I wonder... would you suffer an old man a few more words before the deed is done?
translations.chinese: 但我希望……你动手之前，能听老人家多说几句？

translations.english: I know why you're here. I must die. And you must deliver the blow. It is simply the way it is.
translations.chinese: 我知道你为什么在这里。我必须死，而你必须出手。就这么简单。

translations.english: Oh, you can save your sinister bravado. I'll not go to my grave whimpering like an infant.
translations.chinese: 哦吼，你不必如此大逞淫威。我也不会像个娃娃一样哭哭啼啼地去死。

translations.english: Your rule is at an end! Sithis commands it!
translations.chinese: 以西帝斯的名义！你的统治结束了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But I wonder... would you suffer an old man a few more words before the deed is done? | ZH: 但我希望……你动手之前，能听老人家多说几句？ | SID: 00B4CB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I know why you're here. I must die. And you must deliver the blow. It is simply the way it is. | ZH: 我知道你为什么在这里。我必须死，而你必须出手。就这么简单。 | SID: 00CA0F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, you can save your sinister bravado. I'll not go to my grave whimpering like an infant. | ZH: 哦吼，你不必如此大逞淫威。我也不会像个娃娃一样哭哭啼啼地去死。 | SID: 00CA11
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Your rule is at an end! Sithis commands it! | ZH: 以西帝斯的名义！你的统治结束了！ | SID: 00AF5F

translations.english: Tsk. How unfortunate. I had hoped you would honor an old man's dying wish. Well, let's be done with it then.
translations.chinese: 啧啧。真不幸。我还指望你能尊重一个老人的遗愿呢。好吧，那我们就说到此为止吧。

translations.english: I've heard enough. Your life ends now.
translations.chinese: 我听够了。你命到头了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD56]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tsk. How unfortunate. I had hoped you would honor an old man's dying wish. Well, let's be done with it then. | ZH: 啧啧。真不幸。我还指望你能尊重一个老人的遗愿呢。好吧，那我们就说到此为止吧。 | SID: 00A1BA
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've heard enough. Your life ends now. | ZH: 我听够了。你命到头了。 | SID: 003B89

translations.english: Sithis is due a soul. Wouldn't you agree?
translations.chinese: 西帝斯正需要一个灵魂。你不觉得吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD57]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Sithis is due a soul. Wouldn't you agree? | ZH: 西帝斯正需要一个灵魂。你不觉得吗？ | SID: 002710

translations.english: Thank you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。

translations.english: Now, on to the business at hand I suppose, hmm?
translations.chinese: 现在，我们应该谈正事了吧？

translations.english: I'll... consider your request.
translations.chinese: 我会……考虑你的请求。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Thank you. | ZH: 谢谢。 | SID: 006D2C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now, on to the business at hand I suppose, hmm? | ZH: 现在，我们应该谈正事了吧？ | SID: 008DA5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'll... consider your request. | ZH: 我会……考虑你的请求。 | SID: 00B6FB

translations.english: Hmph. Pity. I had hoped to obtain even a modicum of justice.
translations.chinese: 嗯。真遗憾。我还希冀能得到一点公正的待遇。

translations.english: Well, on to the business at hand then, hmm?
translations.chinese: 好吧，那就说正事吧？

translations.english: A Dark Brotherhood assassin doesn't do... "favors."
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会的刺客可不会……“帮忙”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Hmph. Pity. I had hoped to obtain even a modicum of justice. | ZH: 嗯。真遗憾。我还希冀能得到一点公正的待遇。 | SID: 0038D9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, on to the business at hand then, hmm? | ZH: 好吧，那就说正事吧？ | SID: 004998
- INFO:RNAM | EN: A Dark Brotherhood assassin doesn't do... "favors." | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会的刺客可不会……“帮忙”。 | SID: 00C2E7

translations.english: The Emperor is still in Skyrim, but not for long. He's onboard his ship, the Katariah, moored offshore in the Solitude Inlet. But you must hurry!
translations.chinese: 皇帝还在天际，不过不会待太久了。他现在在自己的船，卡塔瑞亚号上。停泊在独孤城的海湾。你必须快点！

translations.english: You mean, after all that's transpired, the Dark Brotherhood will still... honor the contract?
translations.chinese: 你是说，即使已经暴露，黑暗兄弟会还愿意继续……执行契约？

translations.english: If you can get onboard that ship. Kill Titus Mede II, as contracted... I will reveal the location of the dead drop that holds your payment.
translations.chinese: 如果你能顺利登船。按照约定杀死提图斯·迈德二世……我会告诉你存放酬金的秘密地点。

translations.english: Why, this is astounding news! Wonderful news!
translations.chinese: 真是令人震惊的好消息！

translations.english: The Emperor. The real Emperor. Where is he?
translations.chinese: 皇帝，真正的皇帝在哪儿？

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: If you can get onboard that ship. Kill Titus Mede II, as contracted... I will reveal the location of the dead drop that holds your payment. | ZH: 如果你能顺利登船。按照约定杀死提图斯·迈德二世……我会告诉你存放酬金的秘密地点。 | SID: 00CA22

translations.english: Well? I won't fight you, so we may as well get this over with.
translations.chinese: 怎么了？我不会和你打的，我们还是把这事儿了结了吧。

translations.english: You will kill me, and I have accepted that fate. But regardless of your path through life, I sense in you a certain... ambition.
translations.chinese: 你会杀了我，我也已经认命了。但不管你人生道路如何，我能够感受到你内在的……抱负。

translations.english: This person, whomever he or she may be, must be punished for their treachery.
translations.chinese: 不管那人是谁，都得为他们自己的奸诈付出代价。

translations.english: I thank you for your courtesy.
translations.chinese: 感谢你如此礼貌。

translations.english: So I ask of you a favor. An old man's dying wish. While there are many who would see me dead, there is one who set the machine in motion.
translations.chinese: 所以我想请你帮个忙。算是一个老人的遗愿吧。很多人想要我死，但其中一个迈出了这一步。

translations.english: I'm listening.
translations.chinese: 我听着呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: Once you have been rewarded for my assassination, I want you to kill the very person who ordered it. Would you do me this kindness? | ZH: 等你拿到刺杀我的报酬，我要你杀了指使你的人。你能帮我这个忙吗？ | SID: 000364
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: You will kill me, and I have accepted that fate. But regardless of your path through life, I sense in you a certain... ambition. | ZH: 你会杀了我，我也已经认命了。但不管你人生道路如何，我能够感受到你内在的……抱负。 | SID: 0047DD
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: This person, whomever he or she may be, must be punished for their treachery. | ZH: 不管那人是谁，都得为他们自己的奸诈付出代价。 | SID: 00C0F0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: I thank you for your courtesy. | ZH: 感谢你如此礼貌。 | SID: 00CA0B
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: So I ask of you a favor. An old man's dying wish. While there are many who would see me dead, there is one who set the machine in motion. | ZH: 所以我想请你帮个忙。算是一个老人的遗愿吧。很多人想要我死，但其中一个迈出了这一步。 | SID: 00E419
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm listening. | ZH: 我听着呢。 | SID: 000849

translations.english: But I wonder... would you suffer an old man a few more words before the deed is done?
translations.chinese: 但我希望……你动手之前，能听老人家多说几句？

translations.english: Yes, I must die. And you must deliver the blow. It is simply the way it is.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我必须死。而你必须动手。事情就这么简单。

translations.english: You and I have a date with destiny, it would seem. But so it is with assassins and emperors, hmm?
translations.chinese: 看来你与我命中注定有此一会了。即使一个刺客和一个皇帝，嗯？

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But I wonder... would you suffer an old man a few more words before the deed is done? | ZH: 但我希望……你动手之前，能听老人家多说几句？ | SID: 003CD2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Yes, I must die. And you must deliver the blow. It is simply the way it is. | ZH: 是啊，我必须死。而你必须动手。事情就这么简单。 | SID: 004D95

- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 002CC0

translations.english: Now, on to the business at hand...
translations.chinese: 好了，该回到手头的事了……

translations.english: Well. Perhaps you'll at least consider it, hmm?
translations.chinese: 好。也许你至少会考虑一下，嗯？

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: You were... expecting me?
translations.chinese: 你是在……等我？

translations.english: Come now, don't be shy. You haven't come this far just to stand there gawking.
translations.chinese: 来吧，别那么害羞。你大老远跑来不是为了傻站着看看我吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come now, don't be shy. You haven't come this far just to stand there gawking. | ZH: 来吧，别那么害羞。你大老远跑来不是为了傻站着看看我吧。 | SID: 00CA17

translations.english: We have unfinished business, Motierre.
translations.chinese: 我们还有未了的事，莫提雷。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD62]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: We have unfinished business, Motierre. | ZH: 我们还有未了的事，莫提雷。 | SID: 00CA20

translations.english: All right. Had I known the deal would bring me this much trouble, I never would have accepted the gold.
translations.chinese: 好吧。要是我知道这笔交易会给我带来这么大麻烦，我是决不会接受这笔钱的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FD6A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right. Had I known the deal would bring me this much trouble, I never would have accepted the gold. | ZH: 好吧。要是我知道这笔交易会给我带来这么大麻烦，我是决不会接受这笔钱的。 | SID: 0008F6

translations.english: Ha! Well, I certainly do feel that way.
translations.chinese: 哈！我确实这么觉得。

translations.english: Now, if, um... you'll get going?
translations.chinese: 现在，那个，呃……你要走吗？

translations.english: Today is the luckiest day of your life.
translations.chinese: 今天是你一生中最幸运的一天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ha! Well, I certainly do feel that way. | ZH: 哈！我确实这么觉得。 | SID: 0013C9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now, if, um... you'll get going? | ZH: 现在，那个，呃……你要走吗？ | SID: 00CA00
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Today is the luckiest day of your life. | ZH: 今天是你一生中最幸运的一天。 | SID: 00D0FB

translations.english: I know! I know! I received the news not moments ago! Ha ha! This is glorious!
translations.chinese: 我知道！我知道！我刚刚收到了消息！哈哈！何等光荣！

translations.english: Now please, go. Collect your money, and let us never look upon one another again. Our business, thank the gods, is concluded.
translations.chinese: 现在，请吧。去收钱，然后永远别再见面了。诸神在上，咱们的交易，结束了。

translations.english: Your payment waits for you at a dead drop. It is inside an urn, in the very chamber where we first met, in Volunruud.
translations.chinese: 你的钱放在一个瓮里。就在我们第一次见面的沃伦鲁德。

translations.english: Ah, but you care little for politics, am I right? You want money! And money you shall have!
translations.chinese: 啊，但你不太关心政治吧？你只想要钱！那钱就归你了！

translations.english: My friend, you may not realize it, but you have served the Empire, indeed all of Tamriel, in ways you cannot possibly imagine.
translations.chinese: 朋友，你可能还没意识到，但你为帝国、乃至泰姆瑞尔以你无法想象的方式做出了贡献。

translations.english: Titus Mede II lies dead.
translations.chinese: 提图斯·迈德二世死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA3]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Titus Mede II lies dead. | ZH: 提图斯·迈德二世死了。 | SID: 00062C

translations.english: And what might that be?
translations.chinese: 什么事？

translations.english: Actually, Motierre, there is one more thing...
translations.chinese: 其实，莫提雷，还有一件事……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And what might that be? | ZH: 什么事？ | SID: 00844F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Actually, Motierre, there is one more thing... | ZH: 其实，莫提雷，还有一件事…… | SID: 00BED5

translations.english: You assassins and your riddles. It really does get very annoying, you know. Now if you'll excuse me...
translations.chinese: 你们这些杀手的哑谜太多了。这确实有点烦人。现在，如果你不介意的话……

translations.english: Just a favor... for an honorable man.
translations.chinese: 只是为了帮个小忙……为了一个高尚的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You assassins and your riddles. It really does get very annoying, you know. Now if you'll excuse me... | ZH: 你们这些杀手的哑谜太多了。这确实有点烦人。现在，如果你不介意的话…… | SID: 00F3B8

translations.english: Aha! You're back!
translations.chinese: 啊哈！你回来了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA6]
Translations:

translations.english: Your payment awaits. And don't worry, I'm not stupid enough to betray you.
translations.chinese: 去拿你的报酬吧。别担心，我还没蠢到背叛你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0004FDA7]

translations.english: Very well, then. If you'll just... get going now...
translations.chinese: 好吧，那，你现在能不能……走开呢……

translations.english: Yes? No? Nothing?
translations.chinese: 是？不是？到底怎么了？

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

translations.english: Still... everyone assumes the Dark Brotherhood has been completely destroyed. They may be a bit more lax than usual.
translations.chinese: 不过……人人都以为黑暗兄弟会已经玩完了。他们可能会比平时更松懈一点。

translations.english: Surely you're joking?
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑？

translations.english: This is the true Emperor, not some half-Septim lookalike. He'll be surrounded by elite bodyguards, I'm sure. You'll have your work cut out for you.
translations.chinese: 这可是真皇帝，不是冒充他的什么半吊子塞普汀了。他肯定会被精英护卫严密保护。你的工作会很困难。

translations.english: What kind of security should I expect?
translations.chinese: 那里的安保怎么样？

translations.english: Look, that's all I know. I never promised you I'd have all the answers.
translations.chinese: 听着，我就知道这些。我也没说过我什么都知道吧。

translations.english: Now, since our transaction is done, I'll be on my way.
translations.chinese: 现在，既然你我的交易达成，我就告辞了。

translations.english: She flashed a bag of gold in my face and said all I had to do was pay Aringoth for the estate.
translations.chinese: 她在我面前亮出一袋金子，说我只需要把钱给阿林格斯就行。

translations.english: I brought him the coin and walked away with her copy of the deed.
translations.chinese: 我把钱交给他，然后把她的契约副本拿走了。

translations.english: I was approached by a woman who wanted me to act as the broker for something big.
translations.chinese: 有个女人来找我，想要我给一桩大买卖做中间人。

translations.english: Not at all. I tend not to ask too many questions when I'm on the job. I'm sure you understand.
translations.chinese: 没有。我在工作时一般不会问太多。你应该能理解。

translations.english: However, I did notice she was quite angry and it was being directed at Mercer Frey.
translations.chinese: 不过，我注意到她对墨瑟·弗雷很愤怒。

translations.english: In this business we rarely deal in names; our identity comes from how much coin we carry.
translations.chinese: 干这行，我们很少用真名，我们的身份都是来自于我们带了多少钱。

translations.chinese: 欢迎来到秽道。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005036E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome to the Midden. | ZH: 欢迎来到秽道。 | SID: 002672

translations.english: Oh, no. No, that won't do at all.
translations.chinese: 哦，不不。那个不能谈。

translations.english: Not my problem. Not even a little. Take it to Tolfdir, he's supposed to be looking after you lot.
translations.chinese: 跟我没关系。一点也没有。跟托夫迪尔去说，你们是归他照看的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005036F]

translations.chinese: 这不关你的事。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Did you ask Mirabelle? She runs things around here, after all.
translations.chinese: 你去问过米拉贝勒了吗？毕竟现在这里是她管事。

translations.english: Huh? That sounds ominous. Are you getting yourself into even more trouble?
translations.chinese: 嗯？听起来很不祥啊。你要给自己惹更多麻烦吗？

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Huh? That sounds ominous. Are you getting yourself into even more trouble? | ZH: 嗯？听起来很不祥啊。你要给自己惹更多麻烦吗？ | SID: 00F853

translations.english: Clear Skies - combine our Shouts!
translations.chinese: 一起用澄澈天空！

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Shor's favor has found you, Dragonborn. The Hall of Valor, heart's-ease, awaits.
translations.chinese: 舒尔会赞赏你的，龙裔。勇士大厅正在默默等待。

translations.chinese: 我们没法在迷雾里战斗！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005039D]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We cannot fight the foe in this mist! | ZH: 我们没法在迷雾里战斗！ | SID: 0051E9

translations.english: You fought well. I find you worthy.
translations.chinese: 打得好。你很够格。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005039E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You fought well. I find you worthy. | ZH: 打得好。你很够格。 | SID: 007DD1

translations.english: It is long since one of the living has entered here. May Shor's favor follow you and your errand.
translations.chinese: 很久没有生者来到此地了。愿舒尔的恩惠伴随你和你的使命。

translations.english: It's a little gift from the dwarves. Who knew they would end up helping our cause?
translations.chinese: 矮人们留下的小礼物。谁知道最后帮了我们？

translations.english: We have to move. We'll talk more once we see the sky.
translations.chinese: 我们得走了。等我们看到天空再谈吧。

translations.chinese: 我说了你迎来提前出狱了。走吧。

translations.english: Into the tunnel. Let's go.
translations.chinese: 进隧道。我们走。

translations.english: I'm ready.
translations.chinese: 我准备好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000503B8]

translations.english: My brothers, we have been here long enough. It's time to leave Cidhna Mine and continue our fight against the Nords.
translations.chinese: 兄弟们，我们已经在这里待得够久了。是时候离开希讷矿场继续与诺德人作战了。

translations.english: Well, what do you say, my brothers?
translations.chinese: 好了，你们怎么看，兄弟们？

translations.english: Through this gate, just beside my quarters, is a tunnel. A tunnel that leads right through the old Dwarven ruins of Markarth, into the city.
translations.chinese: 穿过我住处旁边的那扇门，就是一条隧道。直穿马卡斯的古代矮人废墟，进入城里。

translations.chinese: 好。我知道你靠得住。

translations.chinese: 行动要秘密谨慎。领主的卫兵可不会容忍有人在总管的私人住处乱翻。

translations.english: First on my list, is a problem with our supply caravans being constantly harassed by a giant. Need to deal with that hairy brute. And soon.
translations.chinese: 首要问题是，我们的补给车队经常被巨人骚扰。得尽快对付那个毛畜生。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000504E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: First on my list, is a problem with our supply caravans being constantly harassed by a giant. Need to deal with that hairy brute. And soon. | ZH: 首要问题是，我们的补给车队经常被巨人骚扰。得尽快对付那个毛畜生。 | SID: 00E03B

translations.english: The last few supply caravans have been attacked... by a giant. As if I didn't have enough to deal with. Need that damn hairy brute straightened out.
translations.chinese: 最近的几个补给车队遭到了巨人的袭击。好像我还不够忙一样。得把那个毛畜生干掉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: And then there's a tiny problem with a giant that's been raiding our supply caravans... You heard me right. A giant. Need to put a stop to that.
translations.chinese: 有个巨人造成了些小问题。他一直在袭击咱们的补给车队……你没听错，是巨人。我们得阻止一下。

translations.chinese: 真不敢相信我们终于出来了。

translations.chinese: 快点，走了。我们要杀诺德人去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00050524]

translations.english: Ha! I knew it, you rascal! By Sithis, the old man was worth the trouble.
translations.chinese: 哈！我就知道，你个小无赖！那个老东西肯定是值钱的。

translations.english: Gotcha! It was 20,000 gold.
translations.chinese: 铛铛！是20000金币。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005072D]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Gotcha! It was 20,000 gold. | ZH: 铛铛！是20000金币。 | SID: 00AC5D

translations.english: Well? What word of the Emperor?
translations.chinese: 嗯？有皇帝的信儿吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005072E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well? What word of the Emperor? | ZH: 嗯？有皇帝的信儿吗？ | SID: 00C97C

translations.english: Ha! Clearly, we should have killed that old bastard years ago!
translations.chinese: 哈！我们几年前就该杀那个老家伙了！

translations.english: 10,000 gold. (Lie)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005072F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! Clearly, we should have killed that old bastard years ago! | ZH: 哈！我们几年前就该杀那个老家伙了！ | SID: 004673
- INFO:RNAM | EN: 10,000 gold. (Lie) | ZH: 10000金币。（撒谎） | SID: 000213

translations.english: Could you have brought us more wondrous news? Recent events notwithstanding, this is a happy day for us, my friend.
translations.chinese: 还有别的好消息么？虽然最近发生了一些事，但今天对在咱们来说却是快乐的一天。朋友。

translations.english: Truly?
translations.chinese: 真的？

translations.english: Despite your misfortunes, you stayed true to the Dark Brotherhood. You've saved us all, and for this you have my eternal thanks.
translations.chinese: 尽管遭遇了不幸，但你仍然忠于黑暗兄弟会。你救了我们大家，非常感谢。

translations.english: Now, of course I must ask... Killing the Emperor... How much did Motierre pay for such a thing?
translations.chinese: 现在我得问问……杀了皇帝……莫提雷给了多少钱？

translations.english: Titus Mede II is dead... by my hand.
translations.chinese: 提图斯·迈德二世死了……被我亲手杀了。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ha! Remarkable! Well, the old bastard certainly made it worth your while, didn't he?
translations.chinese: 哈！赚大了！那个老混蛋还挺值钱不是吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00050731]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! Remarkable! Well, the old bastard certainly made it worth your while, didn't he? | ZH: 哈！赚大了！那个老混蛋还挺值钱不是吗？ | SID: 00C9C6
- INFO:RNAM | EN: 20,000 gold. | ZH: 20000金币。 | SID: 00C9C5

translations.english: Come now! You're joking with old Nazir! Surely the Emperor's life was worth more than that.
translations.chinese: 得了吧！你跟老纳兹尔开玩笑呢吧！皇帝的性命肯定值不少钱。

translations.english: Oh. Is that all? Really?
translations.chinese: 哦，就这些？真的？

translations.english: 5,000 gold. (Lie)

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00050732]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Come now! You're joking with old Nazir! Surely the Emperor's life was worth more than that. | ZH: 得了吧！你跟老纳兹尔开玩笑呢吧！皇帝的性命肯定值不少钱。 | SID: 009DD6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh. Is that all? Really? | ZH: 哦，就这些？真的？ | SID: 00E645
- INFO:RNAM | EN: 5,000 gold. (Lie) | ZH: 5000金币。（撒谎） | SID: 00C476

translations.english: Pfft. You'd think an emperor would fetch at least twice that. Damn that motherless cheapskate, Motierre.
translations.chinese: 呸。还以为皇帝得至少值这个的两倍呢。莫提雷那个死妈玩意儿抠门鬼。

translations.english: Mallory is an expert "obtainer of goods." We can use the money to repair and refit this Sanctuary. Make a true home for us, eh?
translations.chinese: 马洛里是“拿货”的专家，可以用这笔钱来修理装修一下这个圣所。给我们一个真正的家，怎样？

translations.english: In any event, here's my advice. Go to Riften's Ratway, find Delvin Mallory. I believe Astrid had you visit him once before, no?
translations.chinese: 无论如何，我还是有些建议。去裂谷城的鼠道里找戴尔文·马洛里。我想阿斯垂德之前派你找过他一次吧？

translations.english: Sorry, no joke. 5,000 gold. (Lie)
translations.chinese: 抱歉，没开玩笑。就5000金币。（撒谎）

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: In any event, here's my advice. Go to Riften's Ratway, find Delvin Mallory. I believe Astrid had you visit him once before, no? | ZH: 无论如何，我还是有些建议。去裂谷城的鼠道里找戴尔文·马洛里。我想阿斯垂德之前派你找过他一次吧？ | SID: 00AD46
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Sorry, no joke. 5,000 gold. (Lie) | ZH: 抱歉，没开玩笑。就5000金币。（撒谎） | SID: 00C9CA

translations.english: Watch it!
translations.chinese: 小心点！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005073C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Watch it! | ZH: 小心点！ | SID: 006591

translations.english: Oh.
translations.chinese: 哦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005073E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh. | ZH: 哦。 | SID: 000DFC

translations.english: I'll be fine. I just need a minute to catch my breath. Find Savos...
translations.chinese: 我没事。只是需要喘口气。去找萨沃斯……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00050781]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll be fine. I just need a minute to catch my breath. Find Savos... | ZH: 我没事。只是需要喘口气。去找萨沃斯…… | SID: 00BA39

translations.english: What if I told you about a large shipment of gold and weapons?
translations.chinese: 要是我告诉你一大批金子和武器呢？

translations.english: What kind of agreement did you have in mind?
translations.chinese: 你想达成什么协议？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005092C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What if I told you about a large shipment of gold and weapons? | ZH: 要是我告诉你一大批金子和武器呢？ | SID: 00F2D1
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What kind of agreement did you have in mind? | ZH: 你想达成什么协议？ | SID: 00A45E

translations.english: I have no strong love for the Stormcloaks but I can't say I'm all that fond of the Empire, either.
translations.chinese: 我不太喜欢风暴斗篷，但我也不是多喜欢帝国。

translations.english: This war of yours makes it difficult for a resourceful woman to advance her interests.
translations.chinese: 你们的这次战争很难让一个聪明的女人获益。

translations.english: So. You're an Imperial spy... Interesting...
translations.chinese: 所以，你是帝国间谍……有意思……

translations.english: Perhaps we can find a way for both of us to prosper from this unfortunate discovery?
translations.chinese: 或许我们能在这不幸当中找到双赢的办法？

translations.english: You rebels are doing a fine job destroying yourselves. Soldiers running errands?
translations.chinese: 你们这群叛军真是自掘坟墓。居然派士兵去跑腿？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005092F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I have no strong love for the Stormcloaks but I can't say I'm all that fond of the Empire, either. | ZH: 我不太喜欢风暴斗篷，但我也不是多喜欢帝国。 | SID: 004557
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: This war of yours makes it difficult for a resourceful woman to advance her interests. | ZH: 你们的这次战争很难让一个聪明的女人获益。 | SID: 007F0E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: So. You're an Imperial spy... Interesting... | ZH: 所以，你是帝国间谍……有意思…… | SID: 00AEF7
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Perhaps we can find a way for both of us to prosper from this unfortunate discovery? | ZH: 或许我们能在这不幸当中找到双赢的办法？ | SID: 00C1D0
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You rebels are doing a fine job destroying yourselves. Soldiers running errands? | ZH: 你们这群叛军真是自掘坟墓。居然派士兵去跑腿？ | SID: 006065

translations.english: But I've seen first hand what Ulfric is capable of, given the chance. Suffice it to say, he is no friend to Markarth, and no friend of mine.
translations.chinese: 但我曾有机会亲眼目睹了乌弗瑞克的能耐。我只想说，他不是马卡斯的朋友，也不是我的朋友。

translations.english: My first and only loyalties are to my nephew, and to this city.
translations.chinese: 我唯一效忠的对象就是我的侄子和这座城市。

translations.english: So. You're one of Ulfric's spies...
translations.chinese: 这么说。你是乌弗瑞克的间谍了……

translations.english: I can't deny the man is right about a few things...
translations.chinese: 我不否认他在一些事情上的正确性……

translations.english: If you believe in Talos, why don't you join our cause?
translations.chinese: 如果你相信塔洛斯，为什么不加入我们的事业？

translations.english: Good work. I'll send some men with a wagon to collect the prize. We can use the weapons here, and I'll pass on the coin to Solitude.

translations.english: I suppose you're here to extort something from me? Is that it?

translations.english: Let's get down there. We have to do something.
translations.chinese: 咱们下去吧。得做点什么。

translations.english: It 'may be' in danger? Take a look. I don't think there's much question.
translations.chinese: “可能”有危险？看看。我没觉得有什么问题。

translations.english: We've lost more clients in the last decade than I'd care to count, but Maven's stuck with us through throughout the entire ordeal.
translations.chinese: 过去十年里，我们流失的客户数不胜数，但玛雯一直在陪伴我们。

translations.english: Look, in case you hadn't noticed, these aren't the glory days of the Guild.
translations.chinese: 听着，你可能没注意到，现在公会不是处在辉煌时期。

translations.english: I'll be damned if I'm going to lose her to... well, to whatever they are.
translations.chinese: 一旦她输给了……不管是谁，那我都惨了。

translations.english: If you were to bring me the deed to Goldenglow Estate, so I was the full owner, that would be a step in the right direction.
translations.chinese: 如果你能把金色光辉庄园的地契给我，让我成为它的全权所有者，那就行了。

agentText:

translations.english: Goldenglow Estate provided a huge payout for us before Aringoth locked us out.
translations.chinese: 在阿林格斯把我们拒之门外前，金色光辉庄园给我们提供了大量资金。

translations.english: Maven looked the other way as long as the honey kept flowing and we kept him in line.
translations.chinese: 只要蜂蜜持续产出，我们又让他懂得守规矩，玛雯就不会管。

translations.english: I take care of my friends.
translations.chinese: 我很照顾朋友的。

translations.english: Since I know losing the farm's payments will harm the Guild, I intend to make a substantial contribution for compensation.
translations.chinese: 因为我知道失去养蜂场的付款会对公会造成损失，所以我打算给一笔可观的补偿。

translations.english: If Sabjorn ever managed to push Maven off her pedestal, we'd all be in trouble.
translations.chinese: 如果撒布乔恩把玛雯从宝座上拉下来，那我们就都有麻烦了。

translations.english: Word on the street was that Honningbrew tasted better, cost less and Sabjorn didn't shove it down everyone's throat.
translations.chinese: 有传言说，蜜之酿的味道更佳，成本更低，而且撒布乔恩并没有把它强灌进每个人的喉咙。

translations.english: Let's not kid ourselves. Black-Briar Mead is swill. The only thing keeping it successful is Maven.
translations.chinese: 我们就别再自欺欺人了。黑棘蜜酒就是泔水。唯一让它保持成功的，就是玛雯。

translations.english: If that fails, follow him and see what he's up to. If I know Gulum-Ei, he's in way over his head and you'll be able to use it as leverage.
translations.chinese: 如果失败了，就跟踪他，看看他在做什么。如果我了解古鲁姆-埃，他现在有点力不胜任，你可以利用这点作为筹码。

translations.english: You're going to have to buy him off; it's the only way to get his attention.
translations.chinese: 你得收买他，这是唯一能引起他注意的方法。

translations.english: I hope for all your sakes you find out who's behind this supposed "plot."
translations.chinese: 为了你们大家，希望你们能够找出那个假设的“黑幕”。

translations.chinese: 现在，一个匿名的对手神秘出现，从我手中夺走了这座庄园。

translations.english: Having Goldenglow kept in line by the Thieves Guild has kept the honey flowing with minimal cost.
translations.chinese: 由盗贼公会负责维持的金色光辉以最小的成本保证了蜂蜜的流通。

translations.chinese: 这是我听过最好的消息！

translations.english: You did? Really?

translations.english: I mean, I knew the Dark Brotherhood was good... just not that good! You killed the old hag before I even asked!

translations.chinese: 失陪了，我得去集合船员。我得赶在其他海象团的知道是谁泄密之前赶回落锤。

translations.english: Haldyn will take my hide for this, but Skyrim's been feeling a bit confining lately.
translations.chinese: 哈尔丁让我藏在这儿，但最近在天际感觉有点受限。

translations.english: So where are the Blood Horkers?
translations.chinese: 所以血腥海象在哪？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00052262]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We draw council at Japhet's Folly. The fools in Windhelm won't go near it, which is fine by us. | ZH: 我们都是在贾菲特之愚开会。风舵城的傻子们不会靠近，对我们来说是好事。 | SID: 006970
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you'll pardon me now, my crew needs gathering. Should be in Hammerfell before the other Horkers know who let slip their secret. | ZH: 失陪了，我得去集合船员。我得赶在其他海象团的知道是谁泄密之前赶回落锤。 | SID: 00B4A8

- INFO:RNAM | EN: So where are the Blood Horkers? | ZH: 所以血腥海象在哪？ | SID: 00FED4

translations.english: Oh, we've got other things in mind for our mouths, sweetie.
translations.chinese: 哦，我们的嘴边还得有点其他东西，甜心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00052263]
Translations:

translations.english: Haldyn? I've heard of the man, but never guess he'd join up with some pirates.
translations.chinese: 哈尔丁？我听说过他，没想到他和海盗混到一起了。

translations.english: This could be even more dangerous than I thought. Head to the ships. We'll plan the assault on the way.
translations.chinese: 这可能会比想象的要危险。上船吧。我们路上计划怎么进攻。

translations.english: Know about them? Lass, you're looking at them.
translations.chinese: 看见他们了吗？姑娘，远在天边近在眼前。

translations.english: I hear you're a man who might know something about pirates.
translations.chinese: 我听说你对海盗团有所了解。

translations.english: It was a truly terrifying scene. Beautiful, in some respects.
translations.chinese: 这场景真吓人。但某种意义上，很美。

EDID: [000522B7]

translations.english: Please, get that to Avulstein right away.
translations.chinese: 拜托，马上给阿武斯特恩送去。

translations.english: I knew he wasn't gone, I just knew it!
translations.chinese: 我就知道他没死，我就知道！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000524CD]

translations.chinese: 如果你能找到我儿子就好了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000524CE]
Translations:

translations.english: Thorald's disappearance has left our family in shambles.
translations.chinese: 索拉德失踪让我们家一片混乱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000524CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thorald's disappearance has left our family in shambles. | ZH: 索拉德失踪让我们家一片混乱。 | SID: 00BEA8

translations.english: I never thought I'd see another friendly face again.
translations.chinese: 我从没想过还能见到友善的面孔。

translations.english: We need to get to safety as soon as possible. Let's move.
translations.chinese: 我们得尽快逃到安全的地方。我们走。

translations.english: I'm here to rescue you.
translations.chinese: 我是来救你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000524D0]
Translations:

translations.english: Thorald's disappearance has been hard on all of us, but Avulstein has taken it badly.
translations.chinese: 索拉德失踪我们都很难过，但阿武斯特恩更难过。

translations.english: He's afraid of being taken as well, so he hasn't left the house. All he talks about is Thorald.
translations.chinese: 他害怕也被带走，所以足不出户。成天都在念叨索拉德。

translations.english: Please, help Avulstein if you can. Something has to be done, or we're all going to lose our minds.
translations.chinese: 拜托了，帮帮阿武斯特恩。必须做点什么，否则我们都要疯了。

translations.english: Can you tell me anything else about what's going on?
translations.chinese: 能告诉我发生什么了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000524D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Thorald's disappearance has been hard on all of us, but Avulstein has taken it badly. | ZH: 索拉德失踪我们都很难过，但阿武斯特恩更难过。 | SID: 00171F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He's afraid of being taken as well, so he hasn't left the house. All he talks about is Thorald. | ZH: 他害怕也被带走，所以足不出户。成天都在念叨索拉德。 | SID: 006797

translations.english: Now I suggest you turn around and go back the way you came.
translations.chinese: 我建议你掉过头去，哪里来回哪里去的好。

translations.english: Even if we had a prisoner by that name, the only way he'd be released is by order of the Imperial Legion.
translations.chinese: 就算我们有叫这个的囚犯，也只有帝国军团的命令才能释放他。

translations.english: Are you joking?
translations.chinese: 你开玩笑吧？

translations.chinese: 梭默？你知道自己在问什么吗？

translations.english: I'm sorry, that's just not possible. It would cause far too many problems.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，这是不可能的。会引发很多问题

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.chinese: 有什么关系？你身上温暖干燥……而且活蹦乱跳。老桂罗可就不一样。嗯？

translations.english: What? Where am I? Who are you?
translations.chinese: 什么？我在哪儿？你又是谁？

translations.english: Let's go.
translations.chinese: 我们走。

translations.english: Almost ever since he became leader of the tribe.
translations.chinese: 几乎是从他成为部落首领就开始了。

translations.english: He killed Shagrol in combat, which none of us thought possible. But the winner is made Chief. That is how it is done.
translations.chinese: 他在战斗中出人意料地杀了沙葛洛。但按照惯例，胜者将成为酋长。

translations.chinese: 本不该是这样的。我以为他们是需要我的帮助，结果却是想拿我做实验！

translations.english: They threw me in here until they were ready to use me in one of their experiments.
translations.chinese: 他们把我扔在这里，等着拿我做实验。

translations.english: An astute observation.

translations.chinese: 你最好照我说的做，否则的话……（打架）

translations.english: Just head north - you can't miss it. It's the capital of Whiterun Hold.
translations.chinese: 一路往北，很好找的。那里是白漫领的首府。

translations.english: Jarl Balgruuf still hasn't declared for one side or the other, so at least you won't run into any Imperials along the way.
translations.chinese: 巴尔古夫领主还没宣布支持哪边，所以至少不用担心在路上碰到帝国兵。

translations.chinese: 过河往北走，经过瀑布之后你就能看见山上的白漫城。

translations.english: But what's this all about? What are you two doing here?
translations.chinese: 但到底是怎么了？你们俩来这干什么？

translations.english: Of course. Here's a key to the house. Stay as long as you like. If there's anything else you need, just let me know.
translations.chinese: 当然。这是房门的钥匙。你想待多久就待多久。如果还需要什么东西的话，尽管跟我提。

translations.chinese: 拉罗夫？你怎么认识他的？

translations.english: Ralof said you could help me out.
translations.chinese: 拉罗夫说你可以帮我。

translations.english: Like I said, I'm glad to help in any way I can. Help yourself to whatever you need, within reason.
translations.chinese: 我说了，我很乐意帮忙。在合理范围内你随意取用就是。

translations.english: You did? We heard that Ulfric was captured...
translations.chinese: 真的？我们听说乌弗瑞克被俘了……

translations.english: ... no, sorry, but in times like these I can't just take the word of a stranger who wanders into town claiming to be my brother's friend.
translations.chinese: ……不行，抱歉了。这种时候我不能相信随便来个陌生人就说是我兄弟的朋友。

translations.english: I promise to join you there as soon as I can.
translations.chinese: 我保证尽快去和你会合。

translations.english: I'm afraid not. There are preparations to make and Gallus's remains to lay to rest.
translations.chinese: 恐怕不行。还有准备工作要做，而且我想把加卢斯的遗体安葬好。

translations.english: Ah yes, quite an amusing anecdote actually. I caught him trying to break into my laboratory.
translations.chinese: 啊对，说来确实有意思。我撞见他正企图闯进我的实验室。

translations.english: I was astounded and in turn it lead to a conversation. Who'd have imagined it would lead to such a strong friendship?
translations.chinese: 我很震惊，反而和他聊了起来。谁能想到就这么结下了如此深厚的交情呢？

translations.english: I was about to show him the error of his ways when he made a curiously astute comment about my research notes.
translations.chinese: 我正要把他逮住的时候，他对我的研究笔记提出了一个真知灼见。

translations.chinese: 大概是因为泰姆瑞尔只有少数人识得这种语言？

translations.english: Sadly, we never had the opportunity to speak about the details.
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，我们再没有机会谈论细节。

translations.english: I'm fairly certain he was planning some sort of a heist that involved a deep understanding of the Falmer language.
translations.chinese: 我很确定他在策划一场劫案，需要深入了解伐莫语。

translations.chinese: 他很清楚，比起弓着身子读那些满是灰尘的书，他更喜欢翻窗上梁。

translations.english: Well, for the thrill of course.
translations.chinese: 当然是为了寻求刺激了。

translations.chinese: 讽刺的是，我给他指的方向和指给你的一样。马卡斯的卡塞莫。

translations.english: I'm only hoping whatever means he used to learn the language will still be available to you.
translations.chinese: 我只希望他学习语言的方法对你仍然有用。

translations.chinese: 拜托，没多少时间了。有事吗？

translations.english: Please, make it brief. We have much to do.
translations.chinese: 请长话短说。我们还有很多事要做。

EDID: [0005306A]

translations.english: Back, eh? And how was our friend Calcelmo?
translations.chinese: 回来了啊？咱们的朋友卡塞莫怎么样了？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005306B]

translations.english: Can I help you with anything else?
translations.chinese: 还有什么我能帮你的吗？

agentText:

translations.english: Ah yes, my matchmaker. What is it I can do for you?
translations.chinese: 啊，是我的大媒人啊。需要效劳吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005306D]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah yes, my matchmaker. What is it I can do for you? | ZH: 啊，是我的大媒人啊。需要效劳吗？ | SID: 00678B

translations.english: Remember, speak only to Enthir. Trust no one else.
translations.chinese: 记住，只和恩希尔交谈。不要相信其他人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005306E]

translations.english: If you have further need of me, you can find me in the College.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要我的帮助，可以到学院找我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053070]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you have further need of me, you can find me in the College. | ZH: 如果你需要我的帮助，可以到学院找我。 | SID: 00B1EA

translations.english: Be careful.
translations.chinese: 小心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053071]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Be careful. | ZH: 小心。 | SID: 005199

translations.english: I suppose that risk always coexisted with his line of work, I just never thought his luck would run out.
translations.chinese: 我知道他的工作是把脑袋拴在裤腰带上，只不过没料到他也会有气运耗尽的一天。

translations.english: He was a dear friend of mine and a surprisingly astute pupil of academia... I was devastated when he was killed.
translations.chinese: 他是我的挚友，也是个聪明绝顶的学者。他被害的时候，我很伤心。

translations.english: Wish I could say the same for us.
translations.chinese: 真希望我们也能说出同样的话。

translations.english: Tolfdir and I can try and keep this contained. You need to get your hands on the Staff of Magnus. Now.
translations.chinese: 托夫迪尔和我会试着控制局面。你得去拿玛格努斯之杖。现在就去。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: At least tell me where you're going, so we can send someone after you if you don't come back.
translations.chinese: 至少告诉我你要去哪里，如果你不回来，我们也好派人去找你。

translations.english: I certainly hope so. I don't know how long we can keep this up.
translations.chinese: 希望如此吧。我不知道还能撑多久。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I certainly hope so. I don't know how long we can keep this up. | ZH: 希望如此吧。我不知道还能撑多久。 | SID: 00F7F9

translations.english: I've got to stay here, to see if we can get to Ancano and stop this. I need someone I can trust to do it.
translations.chinese: 我得留在这儿，看看能不能阻止安卡诺然后停下这一切。我需要有个信得过的人来办这件事。

translations.english: Besides, you're the one having all of these visions, aren't you?
translations.chinese: 再说，那些幻象都是你看到的，不是吗？

translations.english: It's coming loose. I can feel it.
translations.chinese: 已经松了。我能感觉到。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053114]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's coming loose. I can feel it. | ZH: 已经松了。我能感觉到。 | SID: 008D2D

translations.english: That's it. Keep hacking at it.
translations.chinese: 就是这样。再加把劲。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053115]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's it. Keep hacking at it. | ZH: 就是这样。再加把劲。 | SID: 00C81E

translations.english: Don't stop. Keep cutting.
translations.chinese: 不要停。继续砍。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053116]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't stop. Keep cutting. | ZH: 不要停。继续砍。 | SID: 00AC22

translations.english: We must hasten to Riften before Mercer can do any more damage to the Guild.
translations.chinese: 我们必须赶在墨瑟对公会造成更大伤害前赶回裂谷城。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000531A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We must hasten to Riften before Mercer can do any more damage to the Guild. | ZH: 我们必须赶在墨瑟对公会造成更大伤害前赶回裂谷城。 | SID: 00EEA7

translations.english: In the meantime, I wanted you to have this. It belonged to Gallus, but given the circumstances I think he'd approve.
translations.chinese: 还有，我想把这个给你。这是加卢斯的遗物，但此情此景，我想他会同意的。

translations.english: I'll make for Riften and scout the situation; see if I can discover what Mercer's up to. When you're ready, meet me at the Ragged Flagon.
translations.chinese: 我先去裂谷城侦察一下情况，看看能不能查出墨瑟在搞什么鬼。等你准备好了，就去漏壶那找我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000531A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: In the meantime, I wanted you to have this. It belonged to Gallus, but given the circumstances I think he'd approve. | ZH: 还有，我想把这个给你。这是加卢斯的遗物，但此情此景，我想他会同意的。 | SID: 002192

translations.english: I felt the same way when Gallus first revealed these things to me.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯第一次和我透露时，我也这么觉得。

translations.english: I think given time, you'll understand what I mean.
translations.chinese: 给你一段时间，就能明白我的意思了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I think given time, you'll understand what I mean. | ZH: 给你一段时间，就能明白我的意思了。 | SID: 006D52

translations.english: Now it seems Mercer's broken his oath with Nocturnal and defiled the very thing he swore to protect.
translations.chinese: 现在看来，墨瑟违背了他对诺克图娜尔的誓言，玷污了他誓要保护的东西。

translations.english: Everything that represents Nocturnal's influence is contained within the walls of the Sepulcher.
translations.chinese: 一切代表诺克图娜尔影响的东西，都在坟墓的墙壁上。

agentText:

translations.english: The Twilight Sepulcher is the temple to Nocturnal. It's what the Nightingales are sworn to protect with their lives.
translations.chinese: 黄昏坟墓是诺克图娜尔的神庙。是夜莺立誓用生命保护的地方。

translations.english: You've come this far, so I see no harm in concealing it any longer.
translations.chinese: 到了这个地步，我看再瞒下去也没用了。

translations.english: Ah yes, excellent samples. Thank you. This coin should compensate you for all the bother.
translations.chinese: 啊，非常好的样品。谢谢。这些钱应该能补偿你的麻烦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005325C]
Translations:

translations.english: Oh, and if you bump into Indaryn from the meadery, keep your mouth shut. He'd rat us out in a second.
translations.chinese: 哦，如果你在蜜酒庄碰见印达林，千万把嘴管好。他会马上出卖咱们的。

translations.english: I need someone to take this small keg of Black-Briar Mead to Wilhelm at the Vilemyr Inn in Ivarstead.
translations.chinese: 我需要有人把这一小桶黑棘蜜酒送到伊瓦尔镇的烂醉如泥旅店的威尔海姆那儿。

translations.english: Drop it off and he'll trade you something for the delivery. Keep it as payment for the legwork.
translations.chinese: 把它放在那儿，他会给你些东西。留着做跑腿费吧。

agentText:

translations.english: No, I'm sorry. You must have me mistaken for someone else. I've never even heard that name before.
translations.chinese: 不，抱歉。你一定是把我认错成什么人了。我从没听过这个名字。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005325F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, I'm sorry. You must have me mistaken for someone else. I've never even heard that name before. | ZH: 不，抱歉。你一定是把我认错成什么人了。我从没听过这个名字。 | SID: 00D79A

translations.english: Sibbi and I were to be married. We were supposed to be happy together forever.
translations.chinese: 我和西比就快结婚了。我们应该永远幸福地在一起。

translations.english: I was scared so I told my brother Wulfur. He went to talk to Sibbi for me and... and... Sibbi killed him. My brother wasn't even armed!
translations.chinese: 我很害怕，就告诉了我兄弟乌尔富尔。他去帮我跟西比谈谈，然后……然后……西比杀了他。我哥甚至没拿武器！

translations.english: Then I found that wretched poetry from Svana. When I confronted Sibbi about it, he threatened to kill me.
translations.chinese: 然后我发现了斯瓦纳的那首烂诗。当我和西比对质的时候，他威胁要杀了我。

translations.english: When I heard what Sibbi did, I fled. Now you've found me, and you're going to tell him where I am.
translations.chinese: 当我一听西比的所作所为，就逃走了。现在你找到了我，要向他报告我的所在。

translations.english: All I need is someone to deliver it for me. If anyone saw me leave Riften, they'd get suspicious.
translations.chinese: 我只需要有人帮我送出去。如果有人看到我离开裂谷城，会起疑心的。

translations.english: I sell cases of it for half of what the inns and taverns pay through the Meadery.
translations.chinese: 我成箱成箱地卖，价钱是蜜酒庄卖给酒馆客栈的一半。

translations.english: No, no friend. You've got it all wrong. I'm not selling cheap mead. I'm selling good mead for cheap... Black-Briar Mead.
translations.chinese: 不，不，朋友。你错了。我卖的不是廉价蜜酒，是物美价廉的蜜酒……黑棘牌儿的。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I sell cases of it for half of what the inns and taverns pay through the Meadery. | ZH: 我成箱成箱地卖，价钱是蜜酒庄卖给酒馆客栈的一半。 | SID: 00C7F6

translations.english: Allow me to give you her gift... a true blessing to aid you in times of need. Despair not, her warmth will protect you always!
translations.chinese: 请允许我把她的赐福……一份真正的祝福送给你，会在你需要的时候帮助你。愿你永不绝望，她的温暖会永远保护你！

translations.english: Oh, splendid! Just splendid! Mara smiles upon us this day.
translations.chinese: 哦，好！实在太好了！玛拉今天向我们微笑了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053266]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Allow me to give you her gift... a true blessing to aid you in times of need. Despair not, her warmth will protect you always! | ZH: 请允许我把她的赐福……一份真正的祝福送给你，会在你需要的时候帮助你。愿你永不绝望，她的温暖会永远保护你！ | SID: 00A930
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, splendid! Just splendid! Mara smiles upon us this day. | ZH: 哦，好！实在太好了！玛拉今天向我们微笑了。 | SID: 00C880

translations.english: When you told me of your intent to join the Thieves Guild, I honestly didn't think we'd have much to speak about ever again.
translations.chinese: 当你告诉我你打算加入盗贼公会的时候，我真的觉得咱们没什么可谈的了。

translations.english: Yet here you are with my weapon that you could have easily sold or kept for yourself.
translations.chinese: 但你却拿着本可以轻易卖掉或者自己留着的武器还给我。

translations.english: Forgive me for my hasty opinion of you, I see that I was wrong and that there's much I can learn from you.
translations.chinese: 请原谅我对你草率的看法，是我错了，我可以从你身上学到很多东西。

translations.english: If you'd permit me, I'd be honored to accompany you in your travels for a time.
translations.chinese: 如果你允许的话，我很愿意陪你旅行一段时间。

agentText:

translations.english: Exactly! And now I have to stare at these bars for eight months. Can you believe it?
translations.chinese: 没错！现在我得盯着这些栏杆看八个月。你能相信？

translations.english: I was about to let that wench marry into the richest family in Riften, and this is how she repays me.
translations.chinese: 我正要让那丫头嫁进裂谷城最有钱的人家，她就是这样报答我的。

translations.english: I'd do anything to have that whore's head on a platter. All I need to know is where she is.
translations.chinese: 只要能把那婊子的脑袋放在盘子里，我愿意做任何事。我只需要知道她在哪里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I was about to let that wench marry into the richest family in Riften, and this is how she repays me. | ZH: 我正要让那丫头嫁进裂谷城最有钱的人家，她就是这样报答我的。 | SID: 00C7E9

translations.english: Look, we all have our flaws; mine is that women can't get enough of me.
translations.chinese: 听着，我们都有自己的小毛病，我的毛病就是所有女人都对我爱的不行。

translations.english: Well, she finds out and she tells her brother, Wulfur. Then her brother attacks me with a knife... I mean, I had to defend myself!
translations.chinese: 然后她发现了，告诉她哥哥乌尔富尔。她哥就拿刀攻击我……我是，正当防卫！

translations.english: So I had this little affair going on while I was betrothed to a beautiful girl named Svidi.
translations.chinese: 我和一个叫丝薇蒂的姑娘订婚时发生过一段小小的婚外情。

translations.english: Aye, I suspected as much but I've never been able to catch that little sneak with proof.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我也这么怀疑，但我一直没能抓到那个混蛋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005326C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aye, I suspected as much but I've never been able to catch that little sneak with proof. | ZH: 是啊，我也这么怀疑，但我一直没能抓到那个混蛋。 | SID: 00FE19

translations.english: So, the whore thinks the Black-Briar reach ends at the border of Skyrim, eh? She'll soon discover her mistake.
translations.chinese: 那个婊子以为黑棘的手只能伸到天际边境吗？她很快就会发现自己想错了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053270]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, the whore thinks the Black-Briar reach ends at the border of Skyrim, eh? She'll soon discover her mistake. | ZH: 那个婊子以为黑棘的手只能伸到天际边境吗？她很快就会发现自己想错了。 | SID: 00FC1E

translations.english: Oh, he'll rot in prison for this one I promise you. As soon as Maven finds out, it's all over for him.
translations.chinese: 哦，我向你保证他会烂在监狱里的。一旦玛雯知道，他就完了。

translations.english: Here, take this as a bit of a reward for nabbing our little thief.
translations.chinese: 给，这是你抓到小偷的奖励。

translations.english: That fetcher! I gave him the same keg just this morning and told him to store it in the cellars.
translations.chinese: 那个费彻！我今早还给了他一桶，叫他放在地窖里。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, take this as a bit of a reward for nabbing our little thief. | ZH: 给，这是你抓到小偷的奖励。 | SID: 00C811

translations.english: The secret is my forge. It consumes fire salts, a strange mineral that burns as hot as Red Mountain lava.
translations.chinese: 秘密就在我的熔炉里。它是烧火盐的，那是种奇怪的矿物，燃烧起来就像红山的熔岩一样热。

translations.english: Smithing's been in my blood for generations. I owe my success to my forefathers and their recipe for flame.
translations.chinese: 我们家几代人都是铁匠。我的成功归功于祖先和他们的火焰秘方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053272]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The secret is my forge. It consumes fire salts, a strange mineral that burns as hot as Red Mountain lava. | ZH: 秘密就在我的熔炉里。它是烧火盐的，那是种奇怪的矿物，燃烧起来就像红山的熔岩一样热。 | SID: 000E24
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Smithing's been in my blood for generations. I owe my success to my forefathers and their recipe for flame. | ZH: 我们家几代人都是铁匠。我的成功归功于祖先和他们的火焰秘方。 | SID: 00305C

translations.english: Well, it was. Sadly, this forge is dying and I've used the last of my fire salts. If I can't feed it soon, it may grow cold.
translations.chinese: 嗯，那是。可惜，这锻炉快要死了，我把最后的火盐用完了。如果不马上喂饱它，它就该冷下来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053273]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, it was. Sadly, this forge is dying and I've used the last of my fire salts. If I can't feed it soon, it may grow cold. | ZH: 嗯，那是。可惜，这锻炉快要死了，我把最后的火盐用完了。如果不马上喂饱它，它就该冷下来了。 | SID: 009C59

translations.english: Good, good. Just point me in the right direction and I'll do the rest.
translations.chinese: 好，好。只要告诉我位置就行。剩下的我来办。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053275]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good, good. Just point me in the right direction and I'll do the rest. | ZH: 好，好。只要告诉我位置就行。剩下的我来办。 | SID: 001B37

translations.english: The arrangement called for a trade. I hope you'll find this suitable.
translations.chinese: 这交易讲究一次付清。希望你觉得价钱合适。

translations.english: All right, pipe down. You want the whole blessed place to hear you?
translations.chinese: 好了，小点声。你想让所有人都听见吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053276]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The arrangement called for a trade. I hope you'll find this suitable. | ZH: 这交易讲究一次付清。希望你觉得价钱合适。 | SID: 00AE14
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: All right, pipe down. You want the whole blessed place to hear you? | ZH: 好了，小点声。你想让所有人都听见吗？ | SID: 00C7FE

translations.english: Oh my, how wonderful! Lady Mara will be so pleased!
translations.chinese: 哦，天呐，太好了！玛拉女神会很高兴的！

translations.english: Here you are. Now make sure you give out every single one, we can't afford to let even one lost soul stray from Her warmth.
translations.chinese: 给你。确保每一份都发出去，我们不能让任何一个迷失的灵魂离开她的温暖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053278]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh my, how wonderful! Lady Mara will be so pleased! | ZH: 哦，天呐，太好了！玛拉女神会很高兴的！ | SID: 005CC6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here you are. Now make sure you give out every single one, we can't afford to let even one lost soul stray from Her warmth. | ZH: 给你。确保每一份都发出去，我们不能让任何一个迷失的灵魂离开她的温暖。 | SID: 00C81C

translations.english: Good, my experiments are at a critical stage and these are just what I need to finish. Here's some coin for all the trouble.
translations.chinese: 好，我的实验正在关键阶段，我正需要这些来完成呢。这些钱给你，麻烦你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00053279]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good, my experiments are at a critical stage and these are just what I need to finish. Here's some coin for all the trouble. | ZH: 好，我的实验正在关键阶段，我正需要这些来完成呢。这些钱给你，麻烦你了。 | SID: 0020B7

translations.english: Ivarstead? So close to Riften? She's an even bigger fool than I thought.
translations.chinese: 伊瓦尔镇？离裂谷城这么近？她比我想的还要蠢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005327A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ivarstead? So close to Riften? She's an even bigger fool than I thought. | ZH: 伊瓦尔镇？离裂谷城这么近？她比我想的还要蠢。 | SID: 00D8F9

translations.english: Riften is drowning in a sea of sin and wickedness and it's my personal mission to let everyone know that the warmth of Mara can see them through.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城正淹没在罪孽和邪恶的海洋中，而我个人的使命就是让大家知道玛拉的温暖，帮助他们渡过难关。

translations.english: All I need is a messenger to bring Her words to these poor souls by distributing these missives.
translations.chinese: 我需要一个信使把她的话语传递给这些可怜的灵魂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005327C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Riften is drowning in a sea of sin and wickedness and it's my personal mission to let everyone know that the warmth of Mara can see them through. | ZH: 裂谷城正淹没在罪孽和邪恶的海洋中，而我个人的使命就是让大家知道玛拉的温暖，帮助他们渡过难关。 | SID: 006E09
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: All I need is a messenger to bring Her words to these poor souls by distributing these missives. | ZH: 我需要一个信使把她的话语传递给这些可怜的灵魂。 | SID: 00A842

translations.english: I already have the gold band, but all I need are three flawless amethysts to complete the setting.
translations.chinese: 我已经准备好了金戒指，但还需要三枚无瑕的紫水晶才能完成整个镶嵌。

translations.english: In Black Marsh, tradition dictates we present a potential mate a unique wedding ring to represent our future bond.
translations.chinese: 在黑沼泽，我们的传统是要送给潜在的伴侣一枚独特的婚戒来代表我们未来的关系。

translations.english: I met her when I wandered into Riften a few years ago. Been smitten with her ever since. In fact, I'm thinking of asking her to marry me.
translations.chinese: 几年前我在裂谷城游荡时遇到了她。从那之后就被她迷住了。实际上，我正在考虑向她求婚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005327D]

translations.chinese: 你想了解更多吗？去问卡塞莫吧。他一般会在遗迹的前面，就在隧道下边。

translations.english: It means "Dwarven Museum." Lost race of people that built the city.
translations.chinese: 也就是“矮人博物馆”，建造这个城市的遗失种族。

translations.chinese: 卡塞莫。他是领主的魔法顾问，但他大部分时间都在研究遗迹。

translations.chinese: 如果你想进去，必须征得卡塞莫同意。他一般会在尼楚安德-泽尔遗迹前面，就在隧道下边。

translations.chinese: 听着，进去吧。不要惹麻烦。在马卡斯别问太多问题。这样对大家都更安全。

translations.chinese: 你有意见？那就去找他吧。他白天都会在遗迹前。就在隧道下边。

translations.english: That's the best I can offer.
translations.chinese: 这是我能提供的最大限度了。

translations.chinese: 奥拉夫发现他睡着了。

translations.english: Elisif has forbidden the Burning of King Olaf, a Festival put on by the Bards College. We need to change her mind.
translations.chinese: 艾利西弗禁止吟游诗人学院举办火烧奥拉夫王的节日。我们得想办法让她回心转意。

translations.english: To convince her I want to read King Olaf's Verse. A part of the Poetic Edda, the living history of Skyrim. Unfortunately the verse was lost long ago.
translations.chinese: 我想给她读《奥拉夫王之诗》来说服她。那是天际最鲜活的历史——《诗歌埃达》的一部分。可惜，那首诗遗失很久了。

translations.english: It means that the Burning of King Olaf, which the Bards College has held for time immemorial, won't be happening.
translations.chinese: 也就意味着，吟游诗人学院自古以来举办的火烧奥拉夫王活动就不能再重现了。

translations.english: If she isn't convinced of the festival's importance then she won't reverse her decision to stop the effigy burning.
translations.chinese: 如果她不信这个节日很重要的话，就不可能撤销停止焚烧肖像的决定。

translations.english: It means I can't read it to the court. Without the verse I won't be able to convince Elisif of the importance of The Burning of King Olaf Festival.
translations.chinese: 意思就是我没法在宫廷上吟诵。没有这首诗，我就没法说服艾利西弗相信火烧奥拉夫节有多重要。

translations.english: Welcome to the Bards College. I am the headmaster here. How may I help you?
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到吟游诗人学院。我是这里的校长。有什么事吗？

translations.english: "His men dressed up and then went out to fight, but they reversed Olaf's orders much to Winterhold's sorrow."
translations.chinese: “他的部下整装上阵，却颠倒了奥拉夫的命令，致使冬堡追悔莫及。”

translations.english: "Olaf gave orders, Winterhold disguises. An attack on Solitude total destruction to follow."
translations.chinese: “奥拉夫下达了命令，换上了冬堡的旗号。独孤城的彻底毁灭旋踵而至。”

translations.english: And the parts that are readable... well... bardic verse has come a long way since ancient times.
translations.chinese: 而那些可读的部分……哎……吟游诗歌自古以来发展的足够长远了。

translations.english: I have to admit I didn't think it would actually be there. Now let's take a look at this...

translations.chinese: 快了，快了。这些事情必须做得更完美，你将成为节日的一部分。

translations.english: I need you to go speak to Jorn. He was preparing the Effigy of King Olaf.
translations.chinese: 你去跟乔恩谈谈。他正在准备奥拉夫王的肖像。

translations.english: Tell him to finish the preparations, the Festival is back on.
translations.chinese: 告诉他赶紧准备好，节日又要开始了。
