translations.english: "No shouting match between dragon and man, no fire or fury did this battle entail."
translations.chinese: “人类与龙族之间并无嫌隙，战火未燃，仇恨未结。”

translations.english: "Olaf captured a fast-sleeping dragon, a mighty feat which the meek would not fail."
translations.chinese: “奥拉夫捕获了一只沉睡的巨龙，乘龙之危的壮举稳胜不败。”

translations.chinese: 我觉得不大可能……但宫廷会喜欢的。我这就写上。

translations.chinese: 我应该可以按照你给我的残本，模仿他的风格，但我不知道这些句子之间发生了什么。

translations.english: Make it up? That doesn't seem appropriate...

translations.english: Olaf made a deal with Numinex.
translations.chinese: 奥拉夫与怒米奈科斯做了交易。

translations.chinese: 虽然很平淡，但也是最有可能的答案了。我这就写上。

translations.english: He convinced Solitude to attack Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 他说服了独孤城进攻冬堡。

translations.english: Unbelievable! You have done us a great service here. I can't begin to thank you enough.
translations.chinese: 难以置信！你帮了我们大忙了。我不知道该怎么感谢你才好。

translations.english: Oh that is exciting! I'm sure the court and the Jarl will love it. I'm writing it in now.
translations.chinese: 哦，太刺激了！领主和宫廷成员会喜欢的。我现在就写上。

translations.english: You should be aware that many apply but we accept very few people.
translations.chinese: 你应该知道，申请者虽众，但我们录取的很少。

translations.english: Always a pleasure to meet a prospective bard.
translations.chinese: 很高兴能见到一位未来的吟游诗人。

translations.english: When possible, we ask applicants to perform tasks the college needs completed. In this case, I do have a task befitting an aspiring bard...
translations.chinese: 在可能的情况下，我们会要求申请人完成学院下达的任务。现在我确实有一个适合有抱负的吟游诗人去完成的任务……

translations.chinese: 听起来不错。虽然不确定宫廷会不会相信奥拉夫拥有什么巫术力量，但可以试试看。

translations.english: You have proven your point, Viarmo. The festival is truly a celebration of Solitude and a condemnation of false kings.
translations.chinese: 你已经证明了你的观点，维阿墨。这个节日确实是独孤城的庆典和对伪王们的谴责。

translations.english: I believe King Olaf's verse will provide that proof.
translations.chinese: 我相信奥拉夫王的诗歌可以证明这一点。

translations.english: I've tried to convince her the festival is many centuries old and celebrates Solitude but I need proof.
translations.chinese: 我试着劝说她这个节日是独孤城延续多年的传统庆典，但我还需要证据。

translations.english: As you may be aware Elisif's husband High King Torygg was recently killed.
translations.chinese: 你应该知道，艾利西弗的丈夫，至高王托依格最近被害了。

translations.english: Elisif mourns her husband deeply and she feels that a festival that burns a King in effigy is... distasteful.
translations.chinese: 艾利西弗深深地悼念亡夫，觉得火烧国王肖像的节日……令人反感。

translations.english: "In Solitude bards train for their service, they also gather each year and burn a King who deserves it."
translations.chinese: “独孤城的吟游诗人训练有素，他们年年聚会，火烧一位罪有应得的王。”

translations.english: "So ends the story of Olaf the liar, a thief and a scoundrel we of Solitude commit to the fire."
translations.chinese: “奥拉夫的故事就此告终，欺世盗名的窃国刁棍，我们独孤的人民将他扔到火里焚烧殆尽。”

translations.chinese: 说不定有一天，天际的人们不再需要我们的服务？我看不会。

translations.chinese: 我已经把板子拆了，这样酒庄就会被祸害，你从那开始就行了。

translations.english: Both of the buildings are connected by tunnels made by the pests infesting the meadery.
translations.chinese: 这两栋建筑由害虫形成的隧道连接起来了。

translations.english: There's an entrance to it in the basement storeroom of the warehouse that used to be boarded over.
translations.chinese: 仓库的地下储藏室有个入口，不过被木板围起来了。

translations.chinese: 要是他看到酒庄这副德行，我就完了。

translations.english: Are you kidding me? Look at this place.

agentText:

EDID: [0005413D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm supposed to be holding a tasting of the new Honningbrew Reserve for the Captain of the Guard. | ZH: 我要为卫兵队长举办一场蜜之酿珍藏酒的品尝会。 | SID: 000FD7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If he sees the meadery in this state, I'll be ruined. | ZH: 要是他看到酒庄这副德行，我就完了。 | SID: 005EEE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Are you kidding me? Look at this place. | ZH: 你在和我开玩笑？看看这里吧。 | SID: 008A59

translations.english: Nothing like free labor to make operating costs cheaper.
translations.chinese: 没有什么比免费劳力更能降低运营成本了。

translations.english: Mallus is the best deal I've ever made. Lent him a bit of gold some time ago I knew he'd never be able to pay back.
translations.chinese: 莫鲁斯是我做成的最好的一笔交易。我知道他永远也还不起钱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005413E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Nothing like free labor to make operating costs cheaper. | ZH: 没有什么比免费劳力更能降低运营成本了。 | SID: 001238
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Mallus is the best deal I've ever made. Lent him a bit of gold some time ago I knew he'd never be able to pay back. | ZH: 莫鲁斯是我做成的最好的一笔交易。我知道他永远也还不起钱。 | SID: 00FB33

translations.english: He treats me like a slave... I have to do every nasty, dirty job in the meadery.
translations.chinese: 他待我如同奴隶……酒庄所有脏活累活都是我干。

translations.english: I made the mistake of borrowing coin from Sabjorn. He's allowing me to pay it back, but he's working my fingers to the bone!
translations.chinese: 我就不该找撒布乔恩借钱。他允许我做工抵债，却把我累得七死八活！

agentText:

translations.english: Consider it just more of the dirty work. I did my part getting them in there, now you need to clear them out.
translations.chinese: 就当是更脏的活吧。我把它们弄进去，现在还得你把它们清出来。

translations.english: Once Sabjorn is out of the way, Maven has plans for this place. One way or another, we don't want the pests coming back.
translations.chinese: 一旦撒布乔恩滚蛋，玛雯就会计划接管这里。不管怎样，我们都不希望害虫卷土重来吧。

translations.english: Remember, Sabjorn will be needing a helping hand. Make it look good.
translations.chinese: 记着，撒布乔恩需要帮助。要装的像一点。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054142]

translations.english: Good luck. I'll be here if you need me.
translations.chinese: 祝你好运。如果你需要帮助，就来我这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054143]

translations.english: Suit yourself.
translations.chinese: 随你便。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054144]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Suit yourself. | ZH: 随你便。 | SID: 00B9F4

translations.english: Well... yes. I mean, all of the gold didn't come from me. I have a silent partner that helped with the finances.
translations.chinese: 嗯……没错。我是说，并不是全部资金都由我来出。我有个秘密合伙人，帮我解决财务问题。

translations.english: One of the Jarls has asked for our help.
translations.chinese: 有位领主向我们求助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054216]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: One of the Jarls has asked for our help. | ZH: 有位领主向我们求助。 | SID: 001B94

translations.english: Good work. The mindless cretins didn't stand a chance.
translations.chinese: 干得好。那些没脑子的畜生根本没机会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054217]

translations.english: Welcome to Riften.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到裂谷城。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054406]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome to Riften. | ZH: 欢迎来到裂谷城。 | SID: 00BD7B

translations.english: You want in, you need to cooperate.
translations.chinese: 想要进，就配合点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054407]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You want in, you need to cooperate. | ZH: 想要进，就配合点。 | SID: 0040DC

translations.english: Keep at it. We need to work twice as hard now that fat-headed Leigelf has declared war!
translations.chinese: 坚持下去。我们得加倍努力工作，那个笨蛋雷盖尔夫已经宣战了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000545D0]

translations.english: That was a close one!
translations.chinese: 好险啊！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005467E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That was a close one! | ZH: 好险啊！ | SID: 005EAD

translations.english: I don't know, but this place is full of them. Every one I've encountered has been enchanted or the like.
translations.chinese: 我不知道，但这地方到处都是。我遇到的每一个都被施了魔法之类的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054686]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't know, but this place is full of them. Every one I've encountered has been enchanted or the like. | ZH: 我不知道，但这地方到处都是。我遇到的每一个都被施了魔法之类的。 | SID: 008010

translations.english: Tell Cicero the time has come. Tell him the words he has been waiting for, all these years: "Darkness rises when silence dies."
translations.chinese: 告诉西塞罗，时间到了。告诉他这些年来他一直等的那句话“沉寂消亡之时，便是黑暗崛起之日”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000546CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tell Cicero the time has come. Tell him the words he has been waiting for, all these years: "Darkness rises when silence dies." | ZH: 告诉西塞罗，时间到了。告诉他这些年来他一直等的那句话“沉寂消亡之时，便是黑暗崛起之日”。 | SID: 004DA6

translations.english: What? What treachery! Defiler! Debaser and defiler! You have violated the sanctity of the Night Mother's tomb! Explain yourself!
translations.chinese: 什么？这是背叛！是亵渎！是卑劣的亵渎！你居然敢亵渎夜母的圣棺！给我解释！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054741]

translations.english: Poor Cicero has failed you. Poor Cicero is sorry, sweet mother. I've tried, so very hard. But I just can't find the Listener.
translations.chinese: 可怜的西塞罗让您失望了。可怜的西塞罗很抱歉，亲爱的母亲。但我试过了，很努力的试过了。但我就是找不到聆听者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054742]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Poor Cicero has failed you. Poor Cicero is sorry, sweet mother. I've tried, so very hard. But I just can't find the Listener. | ZH: 可怜的西塞罗让您失望了。可怜的西塞罗很抱歉，亲爱的母亲。但我试过了，很努力的试过了。但我就是找不到聆听者。 | SID: 00E08D

translations.english: These look like good quality, too. I know it's not the glamorous, heroic work, but don't be surprised if I ask you to do it again.
translations.chinese: 看起来质量不错。我知道这工作不太华丽，也不太显你勇，但如果我再交给你一次，别太惊讶。

agentText:

translations.english: Shame. But, I'm sure one of the whelps around here will take it up.
translations.chinese: 丢人啊。不过我肯定别的崽子会去接手的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005475B]

translations.english: Thank the Divines! Let's move!
translations.chinese: 感谢圣灵！我们快走吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005475D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank the Divines! Let's move! | ZH: 感谢圣灵！我们快走吧！ | SID: 00F2DA

translations.english: Unfortunate. Let's be more careful next time.
translations.chinese: 真不幸。下次可得小心点。

translations.english: <Alias=Victim> was killed.
translations.chinese: <Alias=Victim>被杀了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005475E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unfortunate. Let's be more careful next time. | ZH: 真不幸。下次可得小心点。 | SID: 00DA07
- INFO:RNAM | EN: <Alias=Victim> was killed. | ZH: <Alias=Victim>被杀了。 | SID: 00C0E4

translations.english: I'm ever so grateful. Please, give my regard to the rest of the Companions.
translations.chinese: 感激不尽，请代我向其他战友问好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005475F]

translations.english: And I have already received word that the client is satisfied. You have done well for yourself, and for the Companions.
translations.chinese: 我得到消息说客户很满意。你为自己和战友团做得很好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054760]

translations.english: Another job well done. Your payment is secure, and you have my thanks.
translations.chinese: 又是次出色的工作。你的报酬在这儿，多谢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I expected no less of you. And once again, you have not disappointed.
translations.chinese: 我一直很看好你。你又一次没让我失望。

translations.english: We've got some traders coming in, and are short on Cave Bear pelts.
translations.chinese: 有些商人来了，现在洞穴熊皮很短缺。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054763]

translations.english: I knew you could be counted on. Do what must be done.
translations.chinese: 我就知道你可靠。去做该做的事吧。

EDID: [00054765]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excellent. Show them no mercy. | ZH: 很好，别对他们手软。 | SID: 00C6D6

translations.english: Good. Do not spare them your blade.
translations.chinese: 好。对他们可别吝惜你的剑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054766]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Do not spare them your blade. | ZH: 好。对他们可别吝惜你的剑。 | SID: 00DE71

translations.english: Nothing but a bunch of lowly bandits. Cowards, who will take little effort.
translations.chinese: 不过是一群卑鄙的强盗。用不着你费多少力气的懦夫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: The restless dead. Not pretty, but if you don't stop them, they'll move on to the locals.
translations.chinese: 不得安宁的死者。不太麻烦，但如果不阻止他们，当地人可能要遭殃。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054768]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The restless dead. Not pretty, but if you don't stop them, they'll move on to the locals. | ZH: 不得安宁的死者。不太麻烦，但如果不阻止他们，当地人可能要遭殃。 | SID: 006A42

translations.english: The Falmer. There have been reports that they've been attacking people at night.
translations.chinese: 伐莫。有消息说它们在晚上袭击人了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00054769]
Translations:

translations.english: It's a problem with the Forsworn. Unpredictable, unknowable, and dangerous. Be careful.
translations.chinese: 弃誓者的问题。不可预测、难以理解、十分危险。小心点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005476A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a problem with the Forsworn. Unpredictable, unknowable, and dangerous. Be careful. | ZH: 弃誓者的问题。不可预测、难以理解、十分危险。小心点。 | SID: 00C6CF

translations.english: It's a clan of giants. The war is driving them out of their lands, and they've started attacking settlements.
translations.chinese: 是个巨人部落。战争把它们赶出了自己的土地，它们就开始攻击定居点了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You'll be clearing a nest of those Hagraven things. I've never faced one myself, but I hear... disturbing things about them.
translations.chinese: 你要清理一窝乌鸦鬼婆。我自己从没见过，但听说……它们很令人不安。

agentText:

translations.english: Oddly enough, Spriggans. Usually they let alone, but for some reason, this particular grove isn't.
translations.chinese: 挺奇怪的，是木灵。一般情况下它们挺安静的。但不知道为什么这片树林的不是。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Bloodsuckers. Vampires. Take every precaution. One bite, and you could end up as one of them.
translations.chinese: 嗜血族。吸血鬼。记得采取一切预防措施。只要被咬上一口，你可能就成了他们一员了。

translations.english: Rogue wizards. I've never trusted magic types. The College is bad enough. Destroy them.
translations.chinese: 流氓巫师。我从来不相信会魔法的人。学院已经够糟糕了。去摧毁他们。

translations.english: There's some trouble in Eastmarch. Farmers getting troubled by some bad types who've built up a stronghold in the area.
translations.chinese: 东陲领有些麻烦。农民们收到一些恶类的困扰，他们在那里建立了据点。

agentText:

translations.english: There's some trouble in Falkreath. There's always some sort of trouble down there, but now it's come to a head.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯领有些麻烦。那里倒是总有麻烦，不过这次有点大。

agentText:

EDID: [00054772]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's some trouble in Falkreath. There's always some sort of trouble down there, but now it's come to a head. | ZH: 佛克瑞斯领有些麻烦。那里倒是总有麻烦，不过这次有点大。 | SID: 002020

translations.english: There's some trouble in Haafingar. The Legion's too busy with the war, and they're hiring us to take care of their problems.
translations.chinese: 海芬加有麻烦了。军团忙着打仗，所以雇我们来解决他们的问题。

translations.chinese: 所以让卫兵把我扔到这里作为“惩罚”就像从木头上掉下来一样容易。

translations.chinese: 因为大混蛋布林乔夫不喜欢我偷东西的方式。

translations.chinese: 现在我在这里数着恶鼠粪球，他却和玛雯一起喝着黑棘蜜酒。

translations.english: Where to start? Well, the news you heard about Ulfric was true. The Imperials ambushed us outside Darkwater Crossing.
translations.chinese: 从何说起呢？好吧，你听到的乌弗瑞克的消息是真的。帝国军队在暗水岔口伏击了我们。

translations.english: We stopped in Helgen this morning, and I thought it was all over. Had us lined up to the headsman's block and ready to start chopping.
translations.chinese: 今早我们在海尔根停下了。我以为万事休矣。他们让我们在断头台前排好准备挨砍。

translations.chinese: “奥拉夫传信于独孤领主，几近嘲弄哄骗，企图与其一战。”

translations.chinese: “奥拉夫从冬堡发出消息，但一遇攻击就消失的无影无踪。”

EDID: [000550CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And Betrid Silver-Blood is always asking for more potions to fuel Thonar's "ambitions." Gives him a temper fiercer than any bear. | ZH: 而且贝垂德·银血总是想要更多药水来推动托纳尔的“野心”。他的脾气变得比熊还要暴躁。 | SID: 005802
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We'd be better off without the Silver-Bloods. They send their brute, Yngvar, to shake some coins from me every few days. | ZH: 没有银血家的话我们会过得更好。他们每隔几天就派他们那个凶蛮的英格瓦来找我要钱。 | SID: 00C640

translations.english: How about a septim? Wait, make that two septims, I feel like living it up.
translations.chinese: 给个塞普汀行吧？等等，给两个。我得好好享受一下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How about a septim? Wait, make that two septims, I feel like living it up. | ZH: 给个塞普汀行吧？等等，给两个。我得好好享受一下。 | SID: 004EB8

translations.english: Come on, you outsiders always have plenty of gold on you. Spare a piece!
translations.chinese: 来吧，你们这些外来的身上有的是钱。拿点出来！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, you outsiders always have plenty of gold on you. Spare a piece! | ZH: 来吧，你们这些外来的身上有的是钱。拿点出来！ | SID: 002873

translations.english: I'm taking mother to a new home. A new crypt. But... aggh! Wagon wheel! Damnedest wagon wheel! It broke! Don't you see?
translations.chinese: 我要带母亲去一个新家。一个新坟墓。但是……啊啊啊！车轮！该死的车轮！坏掉了！你看不见吗？

translations.english: Poor Cicero is stuck. Can't you see? I was transporting my dear, sweet mother. Well, not her. Her corpse! She's quite dead.
translations.chinese: 可怜的西塞罗被卡住了。看不出来吗？我在运送我可爱的母亲。好吧，不是她本人。她的尸体！她确实死了。

translations.english: Problem?
translations.chinese: 有问题吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm taking mother to a new home. A new crypt. But... aggh! Wagon wheel! Damnedest wagon wheel! It broke! Don't you see? | ZH: 我要带母亲去一个新家。一个新坟墓。但是……啊啊啊！车轮！该死的车轮！坏掉了！你看不见吗？ | SID: 00C628
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Poor Cicero is stuck. Can't you see? I was transporting my dear, sweet mother. Well, not her. Her corpse! She's quite dead. | ZH: 可怜的西塞罗被卡住了。看不出来吗？我在运送我可爱的母亲。好吧，不是她本人。她的尸体！她确实死了。 | SID: 00C62C
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Problem? | ZH: 有问题吗？ | SID: 0090EA

translations.english: Convince Loreius to fix my wheel! Do that, and poor Cicero will reward you. With coin! Gleamy, shiny coin!
translations.chinese: 劝罗瑞尤斯来修我的轮子！做得好，可怜的西塞罗会报答你的。用金币！闪闪发光的金币！

translations.english: Go to the farm - the Loreius Farm. Just over there, off the road. Talk to Loreius. He has tools! He can help me! But he won't! He refuses!
translations.chinese: 去那边的农场，罗瑞尤斯农场。就在那边，路边上。和罗瑞尤斯说话。他有工具！他可以帮我！但是他不帮！他拒绝我！

translations.english: Oh. Oh yes! Yes, the kindly stranger can certainly help!
translations.chinese: 哦。哦，没错！好心的陌生人当然能帮上忙！

translations.english: Is there some way I can help?
translations.chinese: 有什么需要我帮助的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Convince Loreius to fix my wheel! Do that, and poor Cicero will reward you. With coin! Gleamy, shiny coin! | ZH: 劝罗瑞尤斯来修我的轮子！做得好，可怜的西塞罗会报答你的。用金币！闪闪发光的金币！ | SID: 009CB6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Go to the farm - the Loreius Farm. Just over there, off the road. Talk to Loreius. He has tools! He can help me! But he won't! He refuses! | ZH: 去那边的农场，罗瑞尤斯农场。就在那边，路边上。和罗瑞尤斯说话。他有工具！他可以帮我！但是他不帮！他拒绝我！ | SID: 00A26C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh. Oh yes! Yes, the kindly stranger can certainly help! | ZH: 哦。哦，没错！好心的陌生人当然能帮上忙！ | SID: 00D18D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there some way I can help? | ZH: 有什么需要我帮助的吗？ | SID: 0018AF

translations.english: Hmm. You have a point. What can I do to help?
translations.chinese: 嗯，你说的有道理。我能帮上什么忙？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E1]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Hmm. You have a point. What can I do to help? | ZH: 嗯，你说的有道理。我能帮上什么忙？ | SID: 008A13

translations.english: Why can't he just leave us alone?
translations.chinese: 他就不能放过我们吗？

translations.english: Hmph. Tell me something I don't know. Crazy fool's already asked me about five times. Seems he's not satisfied with my answer.
translations.chinese: 嗯。说点新鲜的吧。那疯子小丑已经问了我五次了。看来他对我的回答不满意。

translations.english: That Cicero feller?
translations.chinese: 那个叫西塞罗的家伙？

translations.english: The, um, little man really needs your help. With his wagon?
translations.chinese: 那，呃，那小子真需要你帮忙。能帮他修修车轮吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Why can't he just leave us alone? | ZH: 他就不能放过我们吗？ | SID: 000F2F

translations.english: Crazy fool's asked me to fix his broken wagon wheel five times. He won't take no for an answer. Why can't he just leave us alone?
translations.chinese: 那个疯子小丑叫我修他的坏车轮，五次了。他不接受拒绝。他就不能放过我们吗？

translations.english: Or maybe you missed the demented little man in the jester's garb, down by the road? Goes by the name of Cicero?
translations.chinese: 你可能没看到路边那个疯子小丑？那个叫西塞罗的？

translations.english: Is something wrong. "Is something wrong?" she asks. Yes, something is bloody well wrong!
translations.chinese: 有什么问题。你还说“有什么问题”。没错，就是他妈的有问题！

translations.english: Is something wrong?
translations.chinese: 有什么问题吗？

agentText:

translations.english: Ha! Wonderful!
translations.chinese: 哈！好极了！

translations.english: You tell him that jester is up to no good, and he'll deal with it. Then come back here, and I'll toss a few coins your way, yeah?
translations.chinese: 告诉他那个小丑在干坏事，他就会处理的。回来之后我会给你些金币当报酬的，好吗？

translations.english: Like I said, the guard is down by the road. You really can't miss him.
translations.chinese: 照我说的做，卫兵就在路边。很容易看到的。

translations.english: I'll do it. I'll report Cicero to the guard.
translations.chinese: 我会的。我会去向卫兵举报西塞罗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E6]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You tell him that jester is up to no good, and he'll deal with it. Then come back here, and I'll toss a few coins your way, yeah? | ZH: 告诉他那个小丑在干坏事，他就会处理的。回来之后我会给你些金币当报酬的，好吗？ | SID: 005E19

translations.english: So what's the problem? I'm sure he'll pay you...
translations.chinese: 所以有什么问题呢？我保证他会给你钱的……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E7]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So what's the problem? I'm sure he'll pay you... | ZH: 所以有什么问题呢？我保证他会给你钱的…… | SID: 001530

translations.english: And just who in Mara's name are you, anyway? Hmm? Come here, telling me my business. And for what? To help a... a... a fool!
translations.chinese: 玛拉在上你到底是谁？嗯？来这儿，跟我说什么？帮助一个……一个小丑！

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.english: He's a stranger who needs assistance. Please, do the right thing.
translations.chinese: 他是个需要帮助的过路人。拜托了，行行好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And just who in Mara's name are you, anyway? Hmm? Come here, telling me my business. And for what? To help a... a... a fool! | ZH: 玛拉在上你到底是谁？嗯？来这儿，跟我说什么？帮助一个……一个小丑！ | SID: 0003B7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? | ZH: 什么？ | SID: 00C61F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: He's a stranger who needs assistance. Please, do the right thing. | ZH: 他是个需要帮助的过路人。拜托了，行行好。 | SID: 006985

translations.english: You... you did? He has?
translations.chinese: 你……成功了？他同意了？

translations.english: Here, here. For your troubles! Shiny, clinky gold! A few coins for a kind deed! And thank you! Thank you again.
translations.chinese: 给你，给你。你的辛苦费！闪闪发光的金币！好人有好报！谢谢你！再次谢谢你！

translations.english: Oh stranger! You have made Cicero so happy! So jubilant and ecstatic! But more! Even more! My mother thanks you!
translations.chinese: 哦！陌生人！你让西塞罗好开心啊！让人欣喜若狂！但更重要的是！更重要的是！我的母亲会感谢你的！

translations.english: I talked to Loreius. He's agreed to fix your wagon wheel.
translations.chinese: 我跟罗瑞尤斯说完了。他同意帮你修车轮。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You... you did? He has? | ZH: 你……成功了？他同意了？ | SID: 001945
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, here. For your troubles! Shiny, clinky gold! A few coins for a kind deed! And thank you! Thank you again. | ZH: 给你，给你。你的辛苦费！闪闪发光的金币！好人有好报！谢谢你！再次谢谢你！ | SID: 00537E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh stranger! You have made Cicero so happy! So jubilant and ecstatic! But more! Even more! My mother thanks you! | ZH: 哦！陌生人！你让西塞罗好开心啊！让人欣喜若狂！但更重要的是！更重要的是！我的母亲会感谢你的！ | SID: 00C31E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I talked to Loreius. He's agreed to fix your wagon wheel. | ZH: 我跟罗瑞尤斯说完了。他同意帮你修车轮。 | SID: 005617

translations.english: Agh! Bother and befuddle! Stuck here! Stuck! My mother, my poor mother. Unmoving. At rest, but too still!
translations.chinese: 啊！烦死了！困在这里了！困在这里了！母亲啊，可怜的母亲。一动不动。就这么安息着，但也太安静了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550EA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Agh! Bother and befuddle! Stuck here! Stuck! My mother, my poor mother. Unmoving. At rest, but too still! | ZH: 啊！烦死了！困在这里了！困在这里了！母亲啊，可怜的母亲。一动不动。就这么安息着，但也太安静了！ | SID: 0046A6

translations.english: Poor mother... Her new home seems so very far...
translations.chinese: 可怜的母亲……她的新家好像还很遥远……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Poor mother... Her new home seems so very far... | ZH: 可怜的母亲……她的新家好像还很遥远…… | SID: 00C5F7

translations.english: Hmph. Fine. Suit yourself. But you're wrong, anyway. Just look at the fool. I don't know what it is, but he's damn well guilty of something.
translations.chinese: 嗯。好吧。随你便。但不管怎样，你肯定错了。看看那个小丑吧。虽然我说不上来，但他一定在干什么违法勾当。

translations.english: I won't condemn an innocent man.
translations.chinese: 我不会平白说人有罪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. Fine. Suit yourself. But you're wrong, anyway. Just look at the fool. I don't know what it is, but he's damn well guilty of something. | ZH: 嗯。好吧。随你便。但不管怎样，你肯定错了。看看那个小丑吧。虽然我说不上来，但他一定在干什么违法勾当。 | SID: 007DAF
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I won't condemn an innocent man. | ZH: 我不会平白说人有罪。 | SID: 00D1C6

translations.english: Oh, for the love of Mara. What now?
translations.chinese: 啊，玛拉之爱在上。又怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, for the love of Mara. What now? | ZH: 啊，玛拉之爱在上。又怎么了？ | SID: 00A06F

translations.english: You need to report that crazy jester to the guard. He should be patrolling the road.
translations.chinese: 你得向卫兵举报那个疯子小丑。他应该就在这条路上巡逻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You need to report that crazy jester to the guard. He should be patrolling the road. | ZH: 你得向卫兵举报那个疯子小丑。他应该就在这条路上巡逻。 | SID: 00C608

translations.english: I thought we'd talked enough. Unless you've reconsidered my offer? That Cicero needs sortin'...
translations.chinese: 我觉得咱们说的够多了。除非你重新考虑我的提议？西塞罗必须……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I thought we'd talked enough. Unless you've reconsidered my offer? That Cicero needs sortin'... | ZH: 我觉得咱们说的够多了。除非你重新考虑我的提议？西塞罗必须…… | SID: 00EDC0

translations.english: Here, for your trouble.
translations.chinese: 给，辛苦你了。

translations.english: Stendarr's Mercy to you. If my Horgeir doesn't give up the mead this time, I'll hit him over the head with it.
translations.chinese: 斯丹达尔保佑你。如果我家霍格尔这次还戒不了酒，我就用它来打他的头。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000550F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here, for your trouble. | ZH: 给，辛苦你了。 | SID: 001D63
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Stendarr's Mercy to you. If my Horgeir doesn't give up the mead this time, I'll hit him over the head with it. | ZH: 斯丹达尔保佑你。如果我家霍格尔这次还戒不了酒，我就用它来打他的头。 | SID: 0094A1

translations.english: Jewelry for sale. Redguard craftsmanship in every piece.
translations.chinese: 卖珠宝。红卫工艺的珠宝。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055101]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Jewelry for sale. Redguard craftsmanship in every piece. | ZH: 卖珠宝。红卫工艺的珠宝。 | SID: 00D11A

translations.english: You there, uh, the finest silver in Markarth is sold right here.
translations.chinese: 喂，马卡斯最好的银器就在这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055102]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You there, uh, the finest silver in Markarth is sold right here. | ZH: 喂，马卡斯最好的银器就在这里。 | SID: 00E37F

translations.english: Maybe you could buy a gift for a friend? A best friend?
translations.chinese: 想给好朋友买些礼物？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055103]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maybe you could buy a gift for a friend? A best friend? | ZH: 想给好朋友买些礼物？ | SID: 00C0CC

translations.english: With Lisbet gone, I'll be taking care of you.
translations.chinese: 利斯拜特走了，有什么事找我好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055104]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: With Lisbet gone, I'll be taking care of you. | ZH: 利斯拜特走了，有什么事找我好。 | SID: 003800

translations.english: Let me know if there's something you need to buy.
translations.chinese: 如果想买什么，请告诉我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055105]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me know if there's something you need to buy. | ZH: 如果想买什么，请告诉我。 | SID: 00C853

translations.english: I'm keeping Arnleif and Sons going, as best I can.
translations.chinese: 我会尽我所能把阿雷夫父子贸易商行经营下去的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055106]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm keeping Arnleif and Sons going, as best I can. | ZH: 我会尽我所能把阿雷夫父子贸易商行经营下去的。 | SID: 00272E

translations.english: Never thought I'd be running the store. I'm not used to it.
translations.chinese: 从没想过我会经营这家店。我还不太习惯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055107]

translations.chinese: 他甚至喊了一群狼来给他看酒。我真该割了他的舌头，这样他就不能再喝了。

translations.english: He promised me, swore on his ancestors, that he'd give up the mead. And what do I find out? He's been stashing drink in a cave nearby.
translations.chinese: 他向我保证过，还对着祖宗发誓，要戒了蜜酒。结果你猜我发现了什么？他一直在附近的山洞里藏酒。

translations.english: They pay us next to nothing. We get beaten if we make a mistake, and where are our kind Nord rulers? What are they doing? Typical.
translations.chinese: 他们几乎不给我们钱。如果我们犯了错，还要被打，我们善良亲切的诺德统治者在哪儿？他们在干什么？不用想都知道。

translations.english: He's a damn tyrant. Always being goaded on by the Silver-Bloods to get more work out of us.
translations.chinese: 他就是个该死的暴君。银血家总是让他逼我们干更多活。

translations.english: You've having trouble with Mulush?
translations.chinese: 你对穆鲁什有意见？

translations.chinese: 窝棚区以前有几个人在这儿工作。德加因摔断了几根骨头。艾翠斯辞职了。凯林又病得厉害。

translations.english: Me and Hathrasil mostly. Mulush barks at us all day, but I wouldn't call that honest work.
translations.chinese: 主要是我和哈什拉希尔。穆鲁什成天对着我们大吼大叫，但那算不上是什么工作。

translations.english: Who else works here?
translations.chinese: 都有谁在这儿工作？

translations.english: We've lost a lot of good people to that damn crusade. Drive out the Nords, they say. Well, the Nord ain't driven out.
translations.chinese: 我们在那场该死的运动里失去了不少好人。他们扬言把诺德人赶出去。哼，痴心妄想。

translations.english: Tell me about the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说弃誓者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000553C5]

translations.chinese: 那我可以少打他几下。成交。

translations.chinese: 我唯一能理解的就是你在打扰我。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000554DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The only thing I understand is you bothering you. | ZH: 我唯一能理解的就是你在打扰我。 | SID: 005E8A

translations.chinese: 好吧，好吧。你说话像个军团军官似的，但我懂。我会饶他的。但最好不要影响到我们的业绩。

translations.english: You're working him to death. Lay off. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 你快把他累死了。停下吧。（说服）

translations.chinese: 里面的酒你随便喝，但请把那瓶龙息蜜酒拿给我。那是他的最爱，他肯定在那儿藏了一瓶。

translations.english: If you want to try, but I'll keep my dagger sharpened just in case.
translations.chinese: 如果你想试试，那我得把匕首磨快点以防万一。

translations.english: I convinced <Alias.ShortName=Target> to ease up a bit.
translations.chinese: <Alias.ShortName=Target>答应我会温和一点。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Then we do this the hard way. (Brawl) | ZH: 那我们只能来硬的了。（打架） | SID: 0080A8

translations.english: Here you are. So sorry about that.
translations.chinese: 给你。真是很抱歉了。

translations.english: What? Oh! How could I have possibly forgotten. Your reward, of course... of course.
translations.chinese: 什么？哦！我怎么能忘了呢。当然，你的报酬……当然。

translations.english: Ah, Bolli finally got someone out here. Well it's about time. I've been waiting for weeks.
translations.chinese: 啊，波利终于派人来了。也是时候了。我都等了几个星期了。

translations.english: Well, thank you for bringing it I suppose. Have a good day.
translations.chinese: 嗯，谢谢你把它送来。祝你今天愉快。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Certainly.
translations.chinese: 那行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055680]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Certainly. | ZH: 那行。 | SID: 00E123

translations.english: Good. Kleppr will pay you as soon as you arrive with the letter. Here you are.
translations.chinese: 好。等你带着信一到，克莱珀会付钱给你的。拿好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Lazy good-for-nothing, isn't he? Sent you down here when I'm a stone's throw from the keep?
translations.chinese: 他可真是又懒又没用，是吧？我这里离城堡就几步道儿，还得派你过来？

translations.english: Here's the sword. Tell Harrald to stop slaying walls and perhaps his blade will stay in better condition!
translations.chinese: 这是他的剑。告诉海拉德别再砍墙了，这样他的剑会更好用！

translations.english: I sell my catch across a good portion of Skyrim... it's worth its weight in gold to me.
translations.chinese: 我在天际出售我的渔获……对我来说，它就像金子一样值钱。

translations.english: The only untapped market left is Markarth. However, I just got word that Kleppr at The Silver Blood Inn might be interested.
translations.chinese: 唯一还没有开发过的市场就是马卡斯了。不过，我刚听说银血旅店的克莱珀可能会有兴趣。

translations.english: If you're headed that way, I would appreciate you delivering a purchase agreement for me. You'd be paid, of course.
translations.chinese: 如果你顺路的话，希望你能帮我送一份购买协议。当然，不会让你白跑的。

translations.english: Took your sweet time getting it to me.
translations.chinese: 让你费时间了。

translations.english: Here you go, for your trouble.
translations.chinese: 给你，麻烦了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556AD]
Translations:

translations.english: Hmph. I should have known better than to ask a knave.
translations.chinese: 哼。我真不该问个混混。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. I should have known better than to ask a knave. | ZH: 哼。我真不该问个混混。 | SID: 00E7BD

translations.english: Thank you. Do hurry please.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。请快点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. Do hurry please. | ZH: 谢谢。请快点。 | SID: 00C5EE

translations.english: But you have indulged my weakness for speech long enough. Krosis. Now I will answer your question.
translations.chinese: 但你已经纵容我之嗜好太久了。科洛西斯。我现在得回答你的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But you have indulged my weakness for speech long enough. Krosis. Now I will answer your question. | ZH: 但你已经纵容我之嗜好太久了。科洛西斯。我现在得回答你的问题。 | SID: 0016D7

translations.english: Nid. If you wish me to answer your question, you must answer mine.
translations.chinese: 聂德。你希望我回答你的问题，就得先回答我的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nid. If you wish me to answer your question, you must answer mine. | ZH: 聂德。你希望我回答你的问题，就得先回答我的问题。 | SID: 00C5A9

translations.english: And he is no fool. Ni mey, rinik gut nol. Far from it. He began as the wisest and most far-seeing of us all.
translations.chinese: 他并不愚蠢。尼 米埃，日尼克 古特 诺尔。远非如此。他曾经是我们之中最为睿智远见者。

translations.english: Alduin believes that he will prevail, with good reason. Rok mul.
translations.chinese: 奥杜因坚信他会胜利，理由很充分。若克 穆尔。

translations.english: Dez motmahus. Even to the dov, who ride the currents of Time, destiny is elusive.
translations.chinese: 德兹 莫特马胡斯。即使是驾驭时间之流的都瓦，命运也是难以捉摸的。

translations.english: And so, perhaps, your destiny will be fulfilled. Who can say?
translations.chinese: 所以，或许，你的命运终会实现。谁知道呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556DB]

translations.english: But why? Why must you stop Alduin?
translations.chinese: 但到底为什么？你为什么要阻止奥杜因？

translations.english: Yes. Alduin... zeymah. The elder brother. Gifted, grasping and troublesome as is so often the case with firstborn.
translations.chinese: 是啊。奥杜因…… 泽玛。我的兄长。天赋异禀却也贪得无厌、麻烦不断，这样的长子很常见。

translations.english: Bah! Stop wasting my time!
translations.chinese: 呸！别浪费我时间！

translations.english: Never mind. I... I was mistaken.
translations.chinese: 没事。我……闹误会了。

translations.english: You need something?
translations.chinese: 你需要什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You need something? | ZH: 你需要什么吗？ | SID: 00E70C

translations.english: You don't want to go up to that farmhouse, citizen. It's a terrible sight. The farmer and his wife, slaughtered in the night. So many knife wounds...
translations.chinese: 你绝不会想去那个农舍的，公民。那景象太可怕。农夫夫妇在夜里遇害了，浑身都是刀伤。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You don't want to go up to that farmhouse, citizen. It's a terrible sight. The farmer and his wife, slaughtered in the night. So many knife wounds... | ZH: 你绝不会想去那个农舍的，公民。那景象太可怕。农夫夫妇在夜里遇害了，浑身都是刀伤。 | SID: 009700

translations.english: What about him?
translations.chinese: 他怎么了？

translations.english: It's that odd jester, Cicero. The one with the wagon...
translations.chinese: 就是那个古怪的小丑，西塞罗。那辆马车的主人……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What about him? | ZH: 他怎么了？ | SID: 00B28D

translations.english: My thanks for bringing this to my attention, citizen. Don't worry, I'll take care of it.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的报告，公民。别担心，我会处理的。

translations.english: Nobody pilfers property on my watch.
translations.chinese: 没人能在我眼皮子底下偷鸡摸狗。

translations.english: Did he now?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

translations.english: He, um... stole something! I saw him! (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 他，呃……偷东西了！我看见了！（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F7]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Nobody pilfers property on my watch. | ZH: 没人能在我眼皮子底下偷鸡摸狗。 | SID: 00C581

translations.english: How dare that little fool! And right under my nose!
translations.chinese: 那个小丑竟敢在我眼皮底下做这种事！

translations.english: My thanks for bringing this to my attention, citizen. Don't worry, I'll take care of it.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的报告，公民。别担心，我会处理的。

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.english: He's transporting war contraband! In the coffin! (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 他在运输战争违禁品！就在那具棺材里！（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F8]

translations.english: Ha ha! Oh, I knew I had a good feeling about you!
translations.chinese: 哈哈！我就知道没看错你！

translations.english: Here, my friend. A few septims, to show my thanks, hmm? And may that twisted little jester rot in a cell for a fortnight!
translations.chinese: 来，朋友。几个塞普汀，算是我的感谢，怎么样？但愿那个扭曲的小丑在牢房里待上十天半个月！

translations.english: I have. Cicero won't be bothering you again.
translations.chinese: 我做完了。西塞罗不会再打扰你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ha ha! Oh, I knew I had a good feeling about you! | ZH: 哈哈！我就知道没看错你！ | SID: 00AC6E

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have. Cicero won't be bothering you again. | ZH: 我做完了。西塞罗不会再打扰你了。 | SID: 00C592

translations.english: My thanks for bringing this to my attention, citizen. Don't worry, I'll take care of it.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的报告，公民。别担心，我会处理的。

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.english: An assault. On my watch. By the gods, he'll not get away with this.
translations.chinese: 在我眼前搞袭击？诸神在上，他逃不掉。

translations.english: He... attacked a traveler! On the road! I saw it! (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 他……在攻击旅行者！就在路上！我看到了！（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FA]

translations.english: Well all right, then.
translations.chinese: 那好吧。

translations.english: No, nothing. I'll just be moving on.
translations.chinese: 不，没事。我只是路过。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well all right, then. | ZH: 那好吧。 | SID: 00C572
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No, nothing. I'll just be moving on. | ZH: 不，没事。我只是路过。 | SID: 00C571

translations.english: The farmer is at his farm! Where else would he be? Loreius is his name. Talk to him. Convince him to help poor Cicero.
translations.chinese: 农夫就在农场里！他还会去哪儿呢？他叫罗瑞尤斯。跟他说说。让他来帮帮可怜的西塞罗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The farmer is at his farm! Where else would he be? Loreius is his name. Talk to him. Convince him to help poor Cicero. | ZH: 农夫就在农场里！他还会去哪儿呢？他叫罗瑞尤斯。跟他说说。让他来帮帮可怜的西塞罗。 | SID: 00F5E3

translations.english: Poor mother... she's been waiting here so long... Stupid farmer and his stupid tools! Why won't he help us?
translations.chinese: 可怜的母亲……她还要在这儿等多久……笨蛋农夫、笨蛋工具！他为什么不帮帮我们？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Poor mother... she's been waiting here so long... Stupid farmer and his stupid tools! Why won't he help us? | ZH: 可怜的母亲……她还要在这儿等多久……笨蛋农夫、笨蛋工具！他为什么不帮帮我们？ | SID: 00C5F8

translations.english: Unfair! Unjust! Cicero has done nothing wrong! Loreius will pay for his treachery! Oh, how he will pay... And you! You were no help! Not at all!
translations.chinese: 不公平！不公平！西塞罗没有做错什么！罗瑞尤斯要为背叛付出代价！哦，他要怎么付呢……还有你！你帮不上忙！一点也帮不上！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unfair! Unjust! Cicero has done nothing wrong! Loreius will pay for his treachery! Oh, how he will pay... And you! You were no help! Not at all! | ZH: 不公平！不公平！西塞罗没有做错什么！罗瑞尤斯要为背叛付出代价！哦，他要怎么付呢……还有你！你帮不上忙！一点也帮不上！ | SID: 00993C

translations.english: I will wait for Loreius! Oh yes, mother and I will wait right here, right here until he fixes our wheel.
translations.chinese: 我会等着罗瑞尤斯！对，母亲和我就在这里等他，就在这里，直到他修好我们的轮子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000556FF]
Translations:

translations.english: Well? Is it done? Have you reported the fool to the guard?
translations.chinese: 嗯？完事儿了吗？向卫兵举报那个小丑了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055700]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well? Is it done? Have you reported the fool to the guard? | ZH: 嗯？完事儿了吗？向卫兵举报那个小丑了吗？ | SID: 00C604

translations.english: Ha! That'll teach the little jester to go bothering the decent, hardworking folk of Skyrim. Fool never should have come here.
translations.chinese: 哈！教训教训那个小丑少来打搅天际正派勤劳的人们才能待的地方。傻子少往这里跑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: You can tell Cicero I'll be along presently. I just need to do a couple things here first, and gather my tools.
translations.chinese: 告诉西塞罗我马上就过去。我得先处理手头的事，然后拿上工具。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055702]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You can tell Cicero I'll be along presently. I just need to do a couple things here first, and gather my tools. | ZH: 告诉西塞罗我马上就过去。我得先处理手头的事，然后拿上工具。 | SID: 006590

translations.english: You need something talk to my husband. Vantus Loreius. Or just Loreius, if it's all the same to you.
translations.chinese: 需要什么的话，就去和我丈夫谈谈吧。万图斯·罗瑞尤斯。如果不介意的话，就叫罗瑞尤斯也行。

translations.english: Would you now?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

translations.english: Well, spit it out. What's the matter?
translations.chinese: 好吧，有话就说吧。到底怎么了？

translations.english: Yes. I'd like to report a crime.
translations.chinese: 对，我是来报案的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ro fus... maybe you only balance the forces that work to quicken the end of this world.
translations.chinese: 洛 伏斯……也许你只是在平衡那些毁灭此世的力量。

translations.english: Those who try to hasten the end, may delay it. Those who work to delay the end, may bring it closer.
translations.chinese: 试图加速终结者，也可能拖延它的到来；努力推迟终结者，也可能加速它的临近。

translations.english: Paaz. A fair answer.
translations.chinese: 帕兹。公允的答案。

translations.english: Even we who ride the currents of Time cannot see past Time's end. Wuldsetiid los tahrodiis.
translations.chinese: 即使我们乘着时间之流，也难以窥见时间的尽头。 乌德瑟提德 洛斯 塔洛迪斯。

translations.english: In fact, if you'd fetch my blade from him I'd be most appreciative.
translations.chinese: 其实，如果你能把我的剑从他那儿拿回来，我会很感激的。

translations.english: My blade bit right into the stonework next to the keep and needed serious repairs. Thankfully our smith Balimund works wonders.
translations.chinese: 我的剑正好刺中了堡垒旁边的石雕，需要好好修理。谢天谢地，我们的铁匠巴利蒙德创造了奇迹。

translations.english: If you must know, I was practicing in the yard when the guard I was sparring with feinted when I specifically told him to duck!
translations.chinese: 如果你非得知道，我当时在院子里练习，我特意嘱咐和我对打的那个卫兵让他闪开，结果他做了假动作。

translations.english: Did you get that purchase agreement to Markarth yet?
translations.chinese: 你把购买协议送到马卡斯了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did you get that purchase agreement to Markarth yet? | ZH: 你把购买协议送到马卡斯了吗？ | SID: 00283A

translations.english: There's nothing like fishing on Lake Honrich, you should try it sometime.
translations.chinese: 没什么比在霍利奇湖里钓鱼更好的了，你应该找时间试试。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557AC]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's nothing like fishing on Lake Honrich, you should try it sometime. | ZH: 没什么比在霍利奇湖里钓鱼更好的了，你应该找时间试试。 | SID: 0062E1

translations.english: Let me out of here, damn it! I'm not a criminal!
translations.chinese: 放我出去，该死的！我不是罪犯！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me out of here, damn it! I'm not a criminal! | ZH: 放我出去，该死的！我不是罪犯！ | SID: 00403F

translations.english: This is what happens to you when you speak your mind in this city.
translations.chinese: 这就是你在这座城市说出自己想法的下场。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is what happens to you when you speak your mind in this city. | ZH: 这就是你在这座城市说出自己想法的下场。 | SID: 000EDA

translations.english: They threw me in here because I called Ulfric a liar; a deceiver.
translations.chinese: 他们把我扔进来就因为我说乌弗瑞克是个骗子，是个诈骗犯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557B8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They threw me in here because I called Ulfric a liar; a deceiver. | ZH: 他们把我扔进来就因为我说乌弗瑞克是个骗子，是个诈骗犯。 | SID: 007DE2

translations.english: Ulfric doesn't care about Talos. He yearns for the throne of Skyrim and he'll say anything to rally people to his side.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克不在乎塔洛斯，他只是想登上天际的王位宝座，为了让人们站在他那边，他什么都说得出来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557B9]

translations.english: But now, because of Ulfric's greed, countless lives have been lost.
translations.chinese: 但现在，因为乌弗瑞克的贪婪，无数人失去了生命。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000557C0]

translations.english: On second thought, maybe I'm better off in here. At least I'll die with a clear conscience.
translations.chinese: 转念一想，也许我在这里更好。至少死的时候问心无愧。

agentText:

translations.english: Sure, my voice could use a rest.
translations.chinese: 可以啊，我正要歇歇嗓子呢。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005585A]
Translations:

translations.english: Sure, what can I do for you?
translations.chinese: 当然，你有什么需要吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005585B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sure, what can I do for you? | ZH: 当然，你有什么需要吗？ | SID: 00C56E

translations.english: You look like an adventurous one. I bet we're kindred spirits, you and I.
translations.chinese: 你看起来很爱冒险。我打赌咱们志趣相投。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005585C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You look like an adventurous one. I bet we're kindred spirits, you and I. | ZH: 你看起来很爱冒险。我打赌咱们志趣相投。 | SID: 00ADFF

translations.english: Aaah... yes! Sossedov los mul. The dragonblood runs strong in you. It is long since I had the pleasure of speech with one of my own kind.
translations.chinese: 啊……没错！索瑟都瓦 洛斯 穆尔。你体内流淌着强大的龙血。我很久没有跟同族交谈过了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005586A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aaah... yes! Sossedov los mul. The dragonblood runs strong in you. It is long since I had the pleasure of speech with one of my own kind. | ZH: 啊……没错！索瑟都瓦 洛斯 穆尔。你体内流淌着强大的龙血。我很久没有跟同族交谈过了。 | SID: 00EE85

translations.english: By long tradition, the elder speaks first.
translations.chinese: 根据悠久的传统。应该长者先开口。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005586E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By long tradition, the elder speaks first. | ZH: 根据悠久的传统。应该长者先开口。 | SID: 0076E7

translations.english: But, I bow before your certainty. In a way I envy you. The curse of much knowledge is often indecision.
translations.chinese: 但是，我被你的坚定折服了。也可以说，我很羡慕你。过多的知识也会导致优柔寡断。

translations.english: If you can see your destiny clearly, your sight is clearer than mine.
translations.chinese: 你如果能清晰地洞察自己的命运，那你的视野比我清明得多。

translations.english: Dahmaan - remember, Alduin also follows his destiny, as he sees it.
translations.chinese: 达曼 记住。奥杜因也在追随自己看到的命运。

translations.english: Drem. All in good time. First, a question for you. Why do you want to learn this Thu'um?
translations.chinese: 旦姆。不要着急。我先问你。你为什么要学那个吐'目？

translations.english: You were there for Roggvir's execution...
translations.chinese: 罗吉维尔被处决的时候你在场……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055872]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You were there for Roggvir's execution... | ZH: 罗吉维尔被处决的时候你在场…… | SID: 008AED

translations.english: I'm a little busy at the moment. I've got all sorts of errands to run.
translations.chinese: 我现在有点忙。有各种事要办。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055873]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm a little busy at the moment. I've got all sorts of errands to run. | ZH: 我现在有点忙。有各种事要办。 | SID: 00B584

translations.english: Mama, why are you and papa fighting?
translations.chinese: 妈妈，你为什么和爸爸吵架？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055972]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mama, why are you and papa fighting? | ZH: 妈妈，你为什么和爸爸吵架？ | SID: 00C562

translations.english: The only thing I'll tell you about Markarth is stay out of our business. We have enough around here without some outsider causing trouble.
translations.chinese: 关于马卡斯，我唯一能告诉你的，就是别多管闲事。我们这里的麻烦更多了，不能再让外人惹麻烦了。

translations.english: Then you're talking to the wrong man. You want that elf in the keep. Calcelmo.
translations.chinese: 那你找错人了。去找要塞里的那个精灵吧。他叫卡塞莫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055973]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The only thing I'll tell you about Markarth is stay out of our business. We have enough around here without some outsider causing trouble. | ZH: 关于马卡斯，我唯一能告诉你的，就是别多管闲事。我们这里的麻烦更多了，不能再让外人惹麻烦了。 | SID: 00C546

translations.english: There is nothing else but philosophy to a dovah. It is no accident that we do battle with our Thu'um, our Voices.
translations.chinese: 对都瓦来说除哲学别无他物。我们用吐'目，吼声战斗绝非偶然。

translations.english: There is no distinction between debate and combat to a dragon. Tinvaak los grah. For us it is one and the same.
translations.chinese: 于龙而言，辩难与战斗毫无差别。 提沃克 洛斯 格拉。对我们而言是一样的。

translations.english: Hahaha! You have much to learn of the dov, then.
translations.chinese: 哈哈哈！那你还有很多要向都瓦学学。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: There is no distinction between debate and combat to a dragon. Tinvaak los grah. For us it is one and the same. | ZH: 于龙而言，辩难与战斗毫无差别。 提沃克 洛斯 格拉。对我们而言是一样的。 | SID: 008337

translations.english: Haven't attacked each other yet. Good a sign as any.
translations.chinese: 还没有互相打架。好兆头。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005597F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Haven't attacked each other yet. Good a sign as any. | ZH: 还没有互相打架。好兆头。 | SID: 00519C

translations.english: Markarth. Is it bloody enough for you?
translations.chinese: 马卡斯。对你来说够血腥吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055980]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Markarth. Is it bloody enough for you? | ZH: 马卡斯。对你来说够血腥吗？ | SID: 00C492

translations.english: You have not answered my question. Why do you need to learn this Thu'um?
translations.chinese: 你还没回答我的问题。你为什么要学这个吐'目？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055981]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have not answered my question. Why do you need to learn this Thu'um? | ZH: 你还没回答我的问题。你为什么要学这个吐'目？ | SID: 003424

translations.english: What am I supposed to do? Never leave the house? You want that, Endon?
translations.chinese: 你要我怎么办？永远不出门吗？你想怎么样，恩东？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055982]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What am I supposed to do? Never leave the house? You want that, Endon? | ZH: 你要我怎么办？永远不出门吗？你想怎么样，恩东？ | SID: 00C55F

translations.english: Wasn't enough for me, though. I left. Didn't want to end up as the third wife of some lowly chieftain.
translations.chinese: 但对我来说不够。所以我离开了。我可不想成为某个二流酋长的第三个老婆。

translations.english: That's right. An Orc stronghold. Kept to ourselves. Lived as our ancestors would have wanted.
translations.chinese: 没错。兽人要塞。自治自管。按照我们祖先的意志生活。

agentText:

EDID: [00055983]

translations.english: I work for them. The inn is named after them. When the guards make an arrest, they check with them first.
translations.chinese: 我替他们工作。连旅店都是用他们的名字命名的。当卫兵要逮捕谁时，都要先和他们核对。

translations.english: They have a whole mine filled with prisoners to dig up silver ore, gets smelted by workers they pay, and they own half the city.
translations.chinese: 他们坐拥整个矿场，里面全是被派去挖银矿的囚犯，再由他们雇工冶炼，而且他们还拥有半个城市。

translations.english: It's right there in the name of the most powerful family in Markarth. The Silver-Bloods.
translations.chinese: 这就是马卡斯最有权势的家族的名字。银血。

translations.english: You strike your metal like a new mother giving her babe a light slap. Hit it harder.
translations.chinese: 你敲金属的时候就像刚当妈的轻轻拍孩子。大着点儿劲。

agentText:

EDID: [00055986]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You strike your metal like a new mother giving her babe a light slap. Hit it harder. | ZH: 你敲金属的时候就像刚当妈的轻轻拍孩子。大着点儿劲。 | SID: 00C55E

translations.english: Think we should buy more horses next season?
translations.chinese: 我们下个季度要不要多买点马？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055987]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Think we should buy more horses next season? | ZH: 我们下个季度要不要多买点马？ | SID: 00894F

translations.english: And once you've had your fill of mead, do us all a favor and go home. Markarth has enough trouble.
translations.chinese: 等你喝完蜜酒，再帮我们个忙，回家去吧。马卡斯的麻烦已经够多了。

translations.english: That's about the only harmless thing you can do in this city. Silver-Blood Inn is the place to go.
translations.chinese: 这大概是你能在这城里做得唯一人畜无害的事了。银血旅馆是个好地方。

translations.chinese: 现在，让我看看你的能耐。不要以凡人的方式问候我，要像个都瓦一样！

translations.english: The Silver-Bloods pay me, let me crack a few skulls, and keep the guards off my back. That's all I need.
translations.chinese: 银血家雇了我，让我敲碎几个人的脑袋，还让卫兵不敢管我。这才是我需要的。

translations.english: Been here ever since I left the Bards College. Turns out a few muscles earn more gold than a damn lute.
translations.chinese: 我离开吟游诗人学院之后就一直在这里。原来卖弄肌肉比该死的鲁特琴要赚得多。

translations.english: No. I live in a nice house in Solitude where the air isn't filled with smoke from the silver smelters and golden-haired girls shine my shield.
translations.chinese: 不。我住在独孤城的一所好房子里，空气里没有冶炼银矿的烟雾，到处都是金发女孩儿。

translations.chinese: 我在要塞里长大，每个兽人女孩都会有机会去照看铁匠铺。

translations.english: But a girl has to grow up, and life in the stronghold asked for a lot in return, so I joined the Legion. Mastered my trade there.
translations.chinese: 但女孩儿总会长大，要塞里的生活要求很多回报，所以我加入了军团，在那里掌握了自己的手艺。

translations.chinese: 我会尽力维持这里。现在就去，快！

translations.english: There's more. Something's happened to Winterhold. It must be whatever Ancano did. You need to get out there and make sure it's safe.
translations.chinese: 还有。冬堡城区出事了。肯定也是安卡诺干的好事。你得快去确保那里的安全。

translations.english: Is he responsible for this? The Arch-Mage, dead?
translations.chinese: 他是罪魁祸首？大法师是因他而死？

translations.english: By the Nine...
translations.chinese: 九圣灵……

translations.chinese: 他是我儿子。我们……母子连心啊。如果你有孩子你也会明白的。

translations.english: It's hardly a secret that they have ties to the Empire, and hate anyone who speaks out against it.
translations.chinese: 他们和帝国有联系，这不是什么秘密，他们痛恨任何公开反对帝国的人。

translations.english: An axe of great vengeance. Each fragment is precious.

translations.english: With open arms, with cheers and song, with joy in my heart and tears in my eyes!
translations.chinese: 张开双臂，欢呼歌唱，心中欢乐，眼含热泪！

translations.english: Praise be to Talos, this is a glorious day for Whiterun and for all Skyrim! Our liberators have come at last!
translations.chinese: 赞美塔洛斯，这是白漫与全天际都为之光荣的一天！我们的解放者终于到来了！

translations.english: Both sides want to tell you how you should live your life. Guess I'd rather hear it from a real Nord than some Emperor down south.
translations.chinese: 双方都想告诉你该如何生活。我宁愿听真正的诺德人来说，也不会听南边皇帝的。

translations.english: Comes the end of the day, Imperials and Stormcloaks ain't much different.
translations.chinese: 说到底，帝国和风暴斗篷没什么不同。

translations.english: Of course they have! I've made no secret of my loyalty to the Empire. I'm no coward.
translations.chinese: 当然了！我毫不掩饰自己对帝国的忠诚。我可不是懦夫。

translations.english: Lately, they've been threatening to send my whole family into exile if we're caught collaborating with the Empire. They think we're spies!
translations.chinese: 最近，他们威胁说如果抓到我们与帝国勾结，就把我全家流放。他们觉得我们是间谍！

translations.english: Needless to say, these rebels and I have no love for each other.
translations.chinese: 也不消说了，反正这些叛军和我互相看不顺眼。

translations.english: Twice I've been robbed, and good luck getting any kind of justice from Vignar now that he's the Jarl. He probably told the Stormcloaks to do it.
translations.chinese: 我被抢了两次，现在维吉纳当了首领，也就没处讨公道了。估计也是他指使风暴斗篷来干的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Lately, they've been threatening to send my whole family into exile if we're caught collaborating with the Empire. They think we're spies! | ZH: 最近，他们威胁说如果抓到我们与帝国勾结，就把我全家流放。他们觉得我们是间谍！ | SID: 007922

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Twice I've been robbed, and good luck getting any kind of justice from Vignar now that he's the Jarl. He probably told the Stormcloaks to do it. | ZH: 我被抢了两次，现在维吉纳当了首领，也就没处讨公道了。估计也是他指使风暴斗篷来干的。 | SID: 00DB3C

translations.english: Can't say I ever much liked the idea of the Empire telling us what to do an' how to do it.
translations.chinese: 我可不喜欢帝国来告诉我们什么该做什么不该做。

translations.english: Pleased enough, I suppose. At least they appreciate the ways and traditions of the Nord people.
translations.chinese: 当然很高兴。至少他们欣赏诺德人的生活方式和传统。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Can't say I ever much liked the idea of the Empire telling us what to do an' how to do it. | ZH: 我可不喜欢帝国来告诉我们什么该做什么不该做。 | SID: 003836
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Pleased enough, I suppose. At least they appreciate the ways and traditions of the Nord people. | ZH: 当然很高兴。至少他们欣赏诺德人的生活方式和传统。 | SID: 004877

translations.english: No doubt he thought it was the only way to make his point. And also because he knew he could.
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问，他觉得这是表明自己观点的唯一途径。而且他也知道自己能做到。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No doubt he thought it was the only way to make his point. And also because he knew he could. | ZH: 毫无疑问，他觉得这是表明自己观点的唯一途径。而且他也知道自己能做到。 | SID: 00228E

translations.english: Ulfric Stormcloak would say that I owe my allegiance to the Nord people as they fight for Skyrim's independence. Perhaps this is also true.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷会说我应该忠于为天际独立而战的诺德人。也许这也没错。

translations.english: No doubt General Tullius and his friends in the Empire will tell you that I owe them my loyalty, and perhaps I do.
translations.chinese: 图留斯将军和他在帝国那侧的朋友们无疑会告诉你，我应该对他们忠诚，也许我确实该如此。

translations.english: The day might come when I am forced to draw my sword for one side or the other.
translations.chinese: 总有一天我会被迫拔剑为其中一方而战。

translations.english: But that day has not come yet.
translations.chinese: 但这一天还未到来。

translations.english: If it's the war you're referring to, I'm on the side of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 如果你是指这场战争，那我是站在白漫这边的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DFA]
Translations:

translations.english: I hope Vignar doesn't find them. He'll ask a king's ransom, I'm sure.
translations.chinese: 希望维吉纳找不到他们。我敢肯定他会索要一大笔赎金的。

translations.english: If the gods are merciful, they've found a safe place to hide in the city.
translations.chinese: 若是诸神垂怜，他们应该已经在城里找到了安全的藏身之所。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DFB]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If the gods are merciful, they've found a safe place to hide in the city. | ZH: 若是诸神垂怜，他们应该已经在城里找到了安全的藏身之所。 | SID: 00F6A0

translations.english: I serve Jarl Baalgruuf as steward.
translations.chinese: 我是巴尔古夫领主的总管。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DFC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I serve Jarl Baalgruuf as steward. | ZH: 我是巴尔古夫领主的总管。 | SID: 0023B7

translations.english: After Whiterun is retaken, Ulfric will pay in blood for his insolence.
translations.chinese: 等白漫城被夺回来，乌弗瑞克要为他的无礼付出血债。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DFD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: After Whiterun is retaken, Ulfric will pay in blood for his insolence. | ZH: 等白漫城被夺回来，乌弗瑞克要为他的无礼付出血债。 | SID: 006F22

translations.english: Keep your distance...
translations.chinese: 保持距离……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055DFE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep your distance... | ZH: 保持距离…… | SID: 00C18D

translations.english: We're causing no trouble. All we ask is to look for her.
translations.chinese: 我们不是来找麻烦的。只是要找到她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're causing no trouble. All we ask is to look for her. | ZH: 我们不是来找麻烦的。只是要找到她。 | SID: 0022D7

translations.english: I don't care what you're doing, after what happened you're lucky I don't toss you in jail. Now get lost.
translations.chinese: 不管你们要干什么，没把你们扔进监狱算你们走运。赶快离去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't care what you're doing, after what happened you're lucky I don't toss you in jail. Now get lost. | ZH: 不管你们要干什么，没把你们扔进监狱算你们走运。赶快离去。 | SID: 0064CD

translations.english: Look, you've already been told you're not allowed here. Turn around and go back the way you came.
translations.chinese: 听着，已经告诉过你们了，你们不能进去。转过身，哪来的回哪去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look, you've already been told you're not allowed here. Turn around and go back the way you came. | ZH: 听着，已经告诉过你们了，你们不能进去。转过身，哪来的回哪去吧。 | SID: 002E92

translations.english: We will be back. This is not over.
translations.chinese: 我们会回来的。这事儿没完。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FAC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We will be back. This is not over. | ZH: 我们会回来的。这事儿没完。 | SID: 00C0B5

translations.english: She gets the books, I get you. It's very simple.
translations.chinese: 她拿到书，我拿到你。就这么简单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FAD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She gets the books, I get you. It's very simple. | ZH: 她拿到书，我拿到你。就这么简单。 | SID: 00B0A4

translations.english: Trying to make Mercer look bad in front of Maven, eh? Clever lass.
translations.chinese: 想让墨瑟在玛雯跟前出丑？聪明的姑娘。

translations.english: Was there anything else?
translations.chinese: 还有别的事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Trying to make Mercer look bad in front of Maven, eh? Clever lass. | ZH: 想让墨瑟在玛雯跟前出丑？聪明的姑娘。 | SID: 00AD94
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Was there anything else? | ZH: 还有别的事吗？ | SID: 00B52C

translations.english: Look, before I have you help track Mercer down I need to know what you learned from Karliah. I mean everything.
translations.chinese: 听着，在我让你帮我找到墨瑟前，我得知道你从卡莱亚那里知道了什么。我是说，知道的一切。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FC4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look, before I have you help track Mercer down I need to know what you learned from Karliah. I mean everything. | ZH: 听着，在我让你帮我找到墨瑟前，我得知道你从卡莱亚那里知道了什么。我是说，知道的一切。 | SID: 001368

translations.english: Museums, keeps, estates... you name it. By the time Mercer took over the Guild we must have had a few dozen.
translations.chinese: 博物馆、要塞、庄园……应有尽有。墨瑟接管公会的时候，我们肯定还剩几十个。

translations.english: Before Mercer took over, Gallus started collecting every bit of material he could on locations the Guild could heist.
translations.chinese: 在墨瑟接手前，加卢斯就开始在公会可以洗劫的地方收集了他能收集到的所有材料。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Museums, keeps, estates... you name it. By the time Mercer took over the Guild we must have had a few dozen. | ZH: 博物馆、要塞、庄园……应有尽有。墨瑟接管公会的时候，我们肯定还剩几十个。 | SID: 0090CC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Before Mercer took over, Gallus started collecting every bit of material he could on locations the Guild could heist. | ZH: 在墨瑟接手前，加卢斯就开始在公会可以洗劫的地方收集了他能收集到的所有材料。 | SID: 00E13A

translations.english: Aye. I feared that was the case. From that last entry in Gallus's diary, it looks like he was getting close to exposing Mercer to the Guild.
translations.chinese: 嗯。我担心情况正是如此。加卢斯日记的最后一篇来看，他似乎快要把墨瑟的事报告给公会了。

translations.english: Anything else?
translations.chinese: 还有别的事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Aye. I feared that was the case. From that last entry in Gallus's diary, it looks like he was getting close to exposing Mercer to the Guild. | ZH: 嗯。我担心情况正是如此。加卢斯日记的最后一篇来看，他似乎快要把墨瑟的事报告给公会了。 | SID: 007264
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Anything else? | ZH: 还有别的事吗？ | SID: 00C3C8

translations.english: Was there anything else she told you?
translations.chinese: 她还和你说了什么？

translations.english: What? Nightingales? But, I always assumed they were just a tale... a way to keep the young footpads in line.
translations.chinese: 什么？夜莺？但是，我以为那只是个传说……为了让年轻的小贼们守规矩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FC7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Was there anything else she told you? | ZH: 她还和你说了什么？ | SID: 00DDC1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? Nightingales? But, I always assumed they were just a tale... a way to keep the young footpads in line. | ZH: 什么？夜莺？但是，我以为那只是个传说……为了让年轻的小贼们守规矩。 | SID: 00F65A

translations.english: Without two keys, it's impossible to open. I have a key, Delvin has a key, and Mercer has a key. That's it. There are no other copies.
translations.chinese: 没有两把钥匙一起根本打不开。我、戴尔文、墨瑟都有钥匙。除此之外，没有其他备份了。

translations.english: I don't have a clue. That door is impenetrable.
translations.chinese: 不知道。那扇门坚固无比。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00055FC8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Without two keys, it's impossible to open. I have a key, Delvin has a key, and Mercer has a key. That's it. There are no other copies. | ZH: 没有两把钥匙一起根本打不开。我、戴尔文、墨瑟都有钥匙。除此之外，没有其他备份了。 | SID: 002042
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't have a clue. That door is impenetrable. | ZH: 不知道。那扇门坚固无比。 | SID: 00DB03

translations.english: All I can tell you for now is that he's abused his authority as a Nightingale.
translations.chinese: 我现在只能告诉你，他滥用了作为夜莺的职权。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056155]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All I can tell you for now is that he's abused his authority as a Nightingale. | ZH: 我现在只能告诉你，他滥用了作为夜莺的职权。 | SID: 001F1A

translations.english: As a Nightingale, I took an oath and was sworn to secrecy.
translations.chinese: 作为夜莺，我发誓要保守秘密。

translations.english: Be patient and your time will come.
translations.chinese: 耐心点，会有机会解释的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056156]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: As a Nightingale, I took an oath and was sworn to secrecy. | ZH: 作为夜莺，我发誓要保守秘密。 | SID: 0048BE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Be patient and your time will come. | ZH: 耐心点，会有机会解释的。 | SID: 006D68

translations.english: Changed your mind? You ready to pledge your blood and honor for Skyrim's freedom?
translations.chinese: 改主意了？准备好为天际的自由奉献鲜血与荣耀了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056178]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Changed your mind? You ready to pledge your blood and honor for Skyrim's freedom? | ZH: 改主意了？准备好为天际的自由奉献鲜血与荣耀了吗？ | SID: 00A45F

translations.english: Hey, I'm not done talking to you yet. Come back here!
translations.chinese: 喂，我还没和你说完呢。回来！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562E0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hey, I'm not done talking to you yet. Come back here! | ZH: 喂，我还没和你说完呢。回来！ | SID: 00F484

translations.english: I don't know for sure. I spoke out against the Aldmeri Dominion publicly; I suspect that's why these men were hired to hunt me down.
translations.chinese: 我不确定。可能是我公开反对先祖神洲，所以这些人就被雇来追捕我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't know for sure. I spoke out against the Aldmeri Dominion publicly; I suspect that's why these men were hired to hunt me down. | ZH: 我不确定。可能是我公开反对先祖神洲，所以这些人就被雇来追捕我了。 | SID: 0089C0

translations.english: Guards and Jarls can be bought. And the Alik'r are close; I'm running out of time, so I'm choosing to trust you.
translations.chinese: 卫兵和领主也可以被收买。再说阿里克'尔逼近，我快没有时间了，所以我选择相信你。

translations.english: These men are ruthless. Cunning, deceitful... they'll pay off whoever they can. I can't trust anyone here in Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 那些人都是冷血动物。狡诈、虚伪……他们会给任何付钱给他们的人效劳。我不相信白漫城的任何人。

translations.english: You think I'd be in hiding if this was something I trusted town guards to handle?
translations.chinese: 如果这件事能交给卫兵，我还用躲起来吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Guards and Jarls can be bought. And the Alik'r are close; I'm running out of time, so I'm choosing to trust you. | ZH: 卫兵和领主也可以被收买。再说阿里克'尔逼近，我快没有时间了，所以我选择相信你。 | SID: 00695C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: These men are ruthless. Cunning, deceitful... they'll pay off whoever they can. I can't trust anyone here in Whiterun. | ZH: 那些人都是冷血动物。狡诈、虚伪……他们会给任何付钱给他们的人效劳。我不相信白漫城的任何人。 | SID: 00A2B8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You think I'd be in hiding if this was something I trusted town guards to handle? | ZH: 如果这件事能交给卫兵，我还用躲起来吗？ | SID: 00C398

translations.english: Without them at our backs, we'd be in serious trouble.
translations.chinese: 如果没有他们做后盾，我们的麻烦就大了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562F1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Without them at our backs, we'd be in serious trouble. | ZH: 如果没有他们做后盾，我们的麻烦就大了。 | SID: 002F85

translations.english: Keep doing right by us and there's plenty more where that came from.
translations.chinese: 只要继续跟我们好好干，钱肯定是更多的。

translations.english: Of course... your pay. Haha! You're smart as a whip, lad.
translations.chinese: 当然……你的报酬。哈哈！很聪明嘛，小子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Keep doing right by us and there's plenty more where that came from. | ZH: 只要继续跟我们好好干，钱肯定是更多的。 | SID: 002D27
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Of course... your pay. Haha! You're smart as a whip, lad. | ZH: 当然……你的报酬。哈哈！很聪明嘛，小子。 | SID: 00813F

translations.english: No! I'm not about to let you ruin everything I've worked so hard for!
translations.chinese: 不！我绝不会让你毁了我努力奋斗得来的一切！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No! I'm not about to let you ruin everything I've worked so hard for! | ZH: 不！我绝不会让你毁了我努力奋斗得来的一切！ | SID: 00C3A3

translations.english: Give it your best shot!
translations.chinese: 有本事就来吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562FE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Give it your best shot! | ZH: 有本事就来吧！ | SID: 00335A

translations.english: All eyes are on you, lass. Don't disappoint us.
translations.chinese: 大伙都看着你呢，姑娘。不要让我们失望。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000562FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All eyes are on you, lass. Don't disappoint us. | ZH: 大伙都看着你呢，姑娘。不要让我们失望。 | SID: 00184E

translations.english: Let me show you the operation, then you can ask your questions.
translations.chinese: 我先告诉你怎么做，你再提问。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056300]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me show you the operation, then you can ask your questions. | ZH: 我先告诉你怎么做，你再提问。 | SID: 00DABE

translations.english: Go, leave me in peace.
translations.chinese: 去吧，别打扰我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056302]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Go, leave me in peace. | ZH: 去吧，别打扰我。 | SID: 004BFC

translations.english: Let me put it to you this way.
translations.chinese: 我这么跟你说吧。

translations.english: Nothing happens in Riften without Maven's consent. One word from her and you could spend the rest of the fourth era in prison.
translations.chinese: 玛雯不点头，在裂谷城寸步难行。只消一句话，你就得在监狱里度过第四纪元剩下的日子了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056309]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Let me put it to you this way. | ZH: 我这么跟你说吧。 | SID: 007C83
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Nothing happens in Riften without Maven's consent. One word from her and you could spend the rest of the fourth era in prison. | ZH: 玛雯不点头，在裂谷城寸步难行。只消一句话，你就得在监狱里度过第四纪元剩下的日子了。 | SID: 00CF66

translations.english: I don't believe you. That's not your way.
translations.chinese: 我不相信你。这不是你的风格。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005630E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't believe you. That's not your way. | ZH: 我不相信你。这不是你的风格。 | SID: 00AA9C

translations.english: Yes, Yes. It is an ancient and ruined city. Built by the Dwemer. The dwarf folk. It is nearby, but I'd stay clear. People say it is quite dangerous.
translations.chinese: 知道。是座古老破败的城市遗迹。锻莫建造的。也就是矮人。就在附近，但我会离那儿远点。都说那里很危险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056551]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, Yes. It is an ancient and ruined city. Built by the Dwemer. The dwarf folk. It is nearby, but I'd stay clear. People say it is quite dangerous. | ZH: 知道。是座古老破败的城市遗迹。锻莫建造的。也就是矮人。就在附近，但我会离那儿远点。都说那里很危险。 | SID: 00C395

translations.english: Indeed. Avanchnzel is as much a library as it is a city. Built to hold the vast memories of the Dwemer.
translations.chinese: 确实。阿旺晨泽尔既是城市，也是图书馆。用来储存锻莫的庞大记忆。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: This place is huge.
translations.chinese: 这地方真大。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This place is huge. | ZH: 这地方真大。 | SID: 00C367

translations.english: Why are all these metal... things... ignoring us?
translations.chinese: 为什么这些金属……家伙……会无视我们？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why are all these metal... things... ignoring us? | ZH: 为什么这些金属……家伙……会无视我们？ | SID: 0083E8

translations.chinese: 德恩南！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Drennen! | ZH: 德恩南！ | SID: 00AA33

translations.english: Enough. Their services will be more than adequate. Let us continue.
translations.chinese: 足够了。有他们帮忙绰绰有余。我们继续前进吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E5]
Translations:

translations.english: So we grab it and we get out, right?
translations.chinese: 那我们拿了就走，对吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So we grab it and we get out, right? | ZH: 那我们拿了就走，对吧？ | SID: 002018

translations.english: I assure you, it is. The knowledge contained in the Lexicon created everything you see around you.
translations.chinese: 我向你保证，肯定的。方典中包含的知识创造了你周围的这一切。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I assure you, it is. The knowledge contained in the Lexicon created everything you see around you. | ZH: 我向你保证，肯定的。方典中包含的知识创造了你周围的这一切。 | SID: 00451F

translations.english: You said they were sleeping. I said they were waiting. It seems a few of them were "waiting" for someone to try and take the Lexicon.
translations.chinese: 你说他们在睡觉，我看他们是在等咱们。他们中某些可能正“等”着有人尝试拿走方典。

translations.english: Something doesn't feel right.
translations.chinese: 有点不对劲。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Something doesn't feel right. | ZH: 有点不对劲。 | SID: 00C37F

translations.english: The Lexicon had better be worth all this trouble.
translations.chinese: 那个方典最好值得你费这么大力气。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Lexicon had better be worth all this trouble. | ZH: 那个方典最好值得你费这么大力气。 | SID: 003FCB

translations.english: We're almost there. I can hear the Lexicon. Come on. Quickly!
translations.chinese: 我们差不多到了。我能听到方典的呼唤了。来吧，赶快！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're almost there. I can hear the Lexicon. Come on. Quickly! | ZH: 我们差不多到了。我能听到方典的呼唤了。来吧，赶快！ | SID: 00682D

translations.english: I can't hold these things! We need to leave!
translations.chinese: 我拿不住这些东西了！我们得走！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't hold these things! We need to leave! | ZH: 我拿不住这些东西了！我们得走！ | SID: 00C385

translations.english: And yet none of us can pick a damned lock.
translations.chinese: 但我们没人撬得开那把该死的锁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And yet none of us can pick a damned lock. | ZH: 但我们没人撬得开那把该死的锁。 | SID: 00E4D9

translations.english: I thought you said these things were "sleeping"?
translations.chinese: 你不是说这些东西在“睡觉”吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I thought you said these things were "sleeping"? | ZH: 你不是说这些东西在“睡觉”吗？ | SID: 00C36D

translations.english: Ours. Soon the Lexicon's knowledge will be ours.
translations.chinese: 是归我们。方典的知识很快就要归我们所有了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ours. Soon the Lexicon's knowledge will be ours. | ZH: 是归我们。方典的知识很快就要归我们所有了。 | SID: 00DF5F

translations.english: The way out is right there! Run, damn it!
translations.chinese: 出去的路在那儿！跑啊，该死的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F6]
Translations:

translations.english: This place is unbelievable.
translations.chinese: 这地方太不可思议了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This place is unbelievable. | ZH: 这地方太不可思议了。 | SID: 0072EE

translations.chinese: 阿旺晨泽尔正等着你呢。

agentText:

EDID: [000565F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Anavchnzel is waiting. | ZH: 阿旺晨泽尔正等着你呢。 | SID: 003979

translations.chinese: 我们快到了。能听到方典的呼唤吗？

EDID: [000565FA]

translations.chinese: 所以呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So? | ZH: 所以呢？ | SID: 00C36B

translations.english: Drennen, you do understand that the Lexicon at the bottom of this place holds the accumulated memories of centuries of Dwemer.
translations.chinese: 德恩南，你应该知道这地方底下保存的方典存着锻莫几个世纪积累的记忆吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565FD]
Translations:

translations.english: Absolutely.
translations.chinese: 当然了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000565FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Absolutely. | ZH: 当然了。 | SID: 004FAF

translations.english: It is large, indeed. I did not anticipate Avanchnzel's size or the time needed to uncover the entrance.
translations.chinese: 确实够大。我没想到阿旺晨泽尔的体积这么大，打开入口需要这么长时间。

translations.english: We are thieves, you fool. We're stealing the cube.
translations.chinese: 我们就是贼，傻瓜。我们来就是要偷方典的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056601]
Translations:

translations.english: I told you we should have hired a thief.
translations.chinese: 我就说我们应该雇个盗贼。

agentText:

EDID: [00056602]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I told you we should have hired a thief. | ZH: 我就说我们应该雇个盗贼。 | SID: 00768C

translations.chinese: 我拿到方典了！基座呢？

agentText:

EDID: [00056603]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have the Lexicon! Where's the podium? | ZH: 我拿到方典了！基座呢？ | SID: 00C383

translations.english: I did not come all the way here just to walk out empty-handed.
translations.chinese: 我大老远到这里不能空手而归。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056606]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I did not come all the way here just to walk out empty-handed. | ZH: 我大老远到这里不能空手而归。 | SID: 00C386

translations.english: Calm yourself, Breya. We are closing in on the Lexicon. I can feel it calling. We'll continue without Drennen.
translations.chinese: 冷静点，布莱亚。我们就快找到方典了。我能够感受到它在召唤我。没了德恩南，咱们也得继续。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056607]

translations.english: So we're not turning back, you fool.

translations.english: I don't like this place. It feels like we're being... watched.
translations.chinese: 我不喜欢这地方。感觉好像我们被什么……盯着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005660B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't like this place. It feels like we're being... watched. | ZH: 我不喜欢这地方。感觉好像我们被什么……盯着。 | SID: 003C34

translations.english: It's a simple job, Drennen. We get in, we steal the Lexicon, we leave. Don't get jumpy.
translations.chinese: 这工作很简单，德恩南。我们进去，偷走方典，然后离开。不要紧张兮兮的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005660C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a simple job, Drennen. We get in, we steal the Lexicon, we leave. Don't get jumpy. | ZH: 这工作很简单，德恩南。我们进去，偷走方典，然后离开。不要紧张兮兮的。 | SID: 00C362

translations.english: Let the field mouse run. Your pay will be double.
translations.chinese: 让那田鼠跑吧。你的报酬就能翻倍了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005660D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let the field mouse run. Your pay will be double. | ZH: 让那田鼠跑吧。你的报酬就能翻倍了。 | SID: 00E37C

translations.english: My pay will be nothing if we die in here!
translations.chinese: 如果我们死在这里，我什么都拿不到了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005660E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My pay will be nothing if we die in here! | ZH: 如果我们死在这里，我什么都拿不到了！ | SID: 00948E

translations.english: You sure that's power we're meant to have?
translations.chinese: 你确定这是咱们能拥有的力量吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005660F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You sure that's power we're meant to have? | ZH: 你确定这是咱们能拥有的力量吗？ | SID: 00BF92

translations.english: Once we have the Lexicon, we'll need to take it to its podium. I know what to do from there. Soon the Lexicon's knowledge will be mine.
translations.chinese: 等我们拿到方典，我们就得把它放到基座上。我知道接下来该怎么做。方典里的知识很快就归我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056610]
