translations.english: Great.
translations.chinese: 非常好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056611]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Great. | ZH: 非常好。 | SID: 004D35

translations.english: If you two cannot handle this, we can find others to hire.
translations.chinese: 如果你们俩处理不了，我们可以再雇别人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056613]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you two cannot handle this, we can find others to hire. | ZH: 如果你们俩处理不了，我们可以再雇别人。 | SID: 002AA5

translations.english: Maybe we should turn back. I don't want to sleep here.
translations.chinese: 也许我们应该回去。我可不想睡在这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056614]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maybe we should turn back. I don't want to sleep here. | ZH: 也许我们应该回去。我可不想睡在这里。 | SID: 00BAF7

translations.english: Seriously, you don't know? That was Ulfric Stormcloak himself.
translations.chinese: 你真不知道？那可是乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷本人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AA8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Seriously, you don't know? That was Ulfric Stormcloak himself. | ZH: 你真不知道？那可是乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷本人。 | SID: 0092F4

translations.english: Ulfric ordered us to stop fighting. Didn't want us all to die for nothing, I guess.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克命令我们停止战斗。我猜他是不想我们都白白送死。

translations.english: I thought they were taking us south to Cyrodiil. Parade us in front of the Emperor. But then we stopped in Helgen, and you know the rest.
translations.chinese: 我以为他们会把我们南送希罗帝尔交到皇帝面前。结果却在海尔根停下了，后头的事你都知道了。

translations.english: The Imperials were waiting for us. As pretty an ambush as I ever saw. We were outnumbered five to one, at least.
translations.chinese: 帝国军埋伏在那。确实是一场漂亮的伏击战，我们要与五倍于自己的敌人作战。

translations.english: I was assigned to Ulfric's guard. We were on our way to Darkwater Crossing, in the south of Eastmarch.
translations.chinese: 我被派去充任乌弗瑞克的护卫。结果我们在向暗水岔口进发的路上遭到了伏击，就在东陲领的南部。

translations.english: How did you end up as Imperial prisoners?
translations.chinese: 你是怎么沦为帝国的犯人的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Ulfric ordered us to stop fighting. Didn't want us all to die for nothing, I guess. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克命令我们停止战斗。我猜他是不想我们都白白送死。 | SID: 007D80
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I thought they were taking us south to Cyrodiil. Parade us in front of the Emperor. But then we stopped in Helgen, and you know the rest. | ZH: 我以为他们会把我们南送希罗帝尔交到皇帝面前。结果却在海尔根停下了，后头的事你都知道了。 | SID: 00AD2D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Imperials were waiting for us. As pretty an ambush as I ever saw. We were outnumbered five to one, at least. | ZH: 帝国军埋伏在那。确实是一场漂亮的伏击战，我们要与五倍于自己的敌人作战。 | SID: 00C137
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I was assigned to Ulfric's guard. We were on our way to Darkwater Crossing, in the south of Eastmarch. | ZH: 我被派去充任乌弗瑞克的护卫。结果我们在向暗水岔口进发的路上遭到了伏击，就在东陲领的南部。 | SID: 00F37E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: How did you end up as Imperial prisoners? | ZH: 你是怎么沦为帝国的犯人的？ | SID: 00C135

translations.english: Surely even down in Cyrodiil people have heard news of the war in Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 即便你人在希罗帝尔，也应该听到天际战争的消息了吧？

translations.english: The Nords are tired of spending our blood fighting the Empire's wars, and paying for the Empire's decadence with our taxes.
translations.chinese: 我们诺德人厌倦了为帝国的战争流血，也不会再用自己的税收为帝国的堕落买单了。

translations.english: Ulfric is our rightful High King. He's leading the fight to drive the Empire out of Skyrim, once and for all.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克是我们合法的至高王。他正在领导一场将帝国永远逐出天际的战斗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Surely even down in Cyrodiil people have heard news of the war in Skyrim? | ZH: 即便你人在希罗帝尔，也应该听到天际战争的消息了吧？ | SID: 002B90
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The Nords are tired of spending our blood fighting the Empire's wars, and paying for the Empire's decadence with our taxes. | ZH: 我们诺德人厌倦了为帝国的战争流血，也不会再用自己的税收为帝国的堕落买单了。 | SID: 00C12D

translations.english: Don't even say such things! I hope that dragon stays away from Riverwood. We don't need that kind of trouble.
translations.chinese: 别这么说！这龙离这越远越好。我们可不想惹这种麻烦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't even say such things! I hope that dragon stays away from Riverwood. We don't need that kind of trouble. | ZH: 别这么说！这龙离这越远越好。我们可不想惹这种麻烦。 | SID: 00FBBA

translations.english: Lucky for us it attacked when it did, eh? I wasn't looking forward to getting a shave from the Imperial headsman.
translations.chinese: 不过所幸它来袭击了。我可不想让帝国的刽子手给我刮两下。

translations.english: What? Oh, hardly! I don't think even Ulfric could pull a dragon out of his pocket.
translations.chinese: 什么？啊，不是！我觉得即使是乌弗瑞克也没法从他口袋里掏出只龙来。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? Oh, hardly! I don't think even Ulfric could pull a dragon out of his pocket. | ZH: 什么？啊，不是！我觉得即使是乌弗瑞克也没法从他口袋里掏出只龙来。 | SID: 00B182

translations.english: So you saw a dragon, did you? Tell me, what was it like? As big as a house?
translations.chinese: 这么说你见过龙了？跟我说说，长什么样？跟房子一样大吗？

agentText:

translations.english: Oh, right, they said you were captured crossing the border.
translations.chinese: 啊对，他们说你在越境时被捕了。

translations.english: Still, I'm surprised you haven't heard of Ulfric. He's our leader - the leader of the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 不过我还是很惊讶你居然没听说过乌弗瑞克。他是我们风暴斗篷的领袖。

translations.english: I bet my uncle Ralof is tougher than you are.
translations.chinese: 我打赌我叔叔拉罗夫比你强壮。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AAF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I bet my uncle Ralof is tougher than you are. | ZH: 我打赌我叔叔拉罗夫比你强壮。 | SID: 006BF9

translations.english: Not that I actually want to see one, understand. I hope that dragon stays far away from here.
translations.chinese: 啊，我不是真的想看。我也想那龙离这远点。

translations.english: Well I'll be! That'd be a sight to see.
translations.chinese: 喔！那一定很值得一看。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well I'll be! That'd be a sight to see. | ZH: 喔！那一定很值得一看。 | SID: 00C35C

translations.english: The Empire may have been good for Skyrim once upon a time, but those days are long past.
translations.chinese: 加入帝国对天际很好，但那时代早就过去了。

translations.english: I'm glad Ralof is helping drive them out of here. If I was a bit younger, I might have joined the fight myself.
translations.chinese: 我很高兴拉罗夫能参加驱逐他们的战斗。如果我再年轻点，我也会亲自参战的。

translations.english: Banning the worship of Talos was the last straw. Thalmor everywhere, dragging people off for honoring our own gods!
translations.chinese: 禁止塔洛斯信仰是压垮骆驼的最后稻草。现在到处都是梭默，四处抓捕坚持信仰的人。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'm glad Ralof is helping drive them out of here. If I was a bit younger, I might have joined the fight myself. | ZH: 我很高兴拉罗夫能参加驱逐他们的战斗。如果我再年轻点，我也会亲自参战的。 | SID: 00614E

translations.english: I've got enough to worry about, taking care of my family. I don't concern myself with such matters.
translations.chinese: 我单是操心家人就够忙了。这些事与我无关了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AB2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've got enough to worry about, taking care of my family. I don't concern myself with such matters. | ZH: 我单是操心家人就够忙了。这些事与我无关了。 | SID: 00ABB2

translations.english: Right. The leader of our fight against the Empire. I forget that most people don't know what he looks like, except for those Imperial wanted posters.
translations.chinese: 没错。他是我们反抗帝国的领袖。我忘记了，大部分人不知道他的相貌，除非看过帝国通缉令。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Sure, sure. It's just, you know, not every day I meet someone who's laid eyes on a dragon.
translations.chinese: 当然当然。只是你得知道，龙这东西可不是天天能见到的。

agentText:

EDID: [00056AB4]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sure, sure. It's just, you know, not every day I meet someone who's laid eyes on a dragon. | ZH: 当然当然。只是你得知道，龙这东西可不是天天能见到的。 | SID: 00B0E8

translations.english: We can head back whenever you're set. There's celebrating to be done!
translations.chinese: 你准备好我们就回去。要准备庆祝了！

translations.english: Hope you didn't catch any of the fire.
translations.chinese: 希望你没什么事。

translations.english: Impressive work. We started the attack once you made the fog scamper away like that.
translations.chinese: 干得漂亮。你把雾驱散之后我们就开始进攻了。

translations.english: Name is Stig Salt-Plank, one of the captains of the Blood Horkers.
translations.chinese: “咸木板”斯蒂，血腥海象的船长之一。

translations.english: I've got a top man on the job right now. He should be returning any moment.
translations.chinese: 我现在有个顶尖的好手在办这件事。他应该很快就回来了。

agentText:

translations.english: I've got a sharp woman on the job right now. She should be returning any moment.
translations.chinese: 我现在有个顶尖的好手在办这件事。她应该很快就回来了。

translations.english: Hard to say. The weather's taken a bit of a turn, here.
translations.chinese: 难说。天气有变。

translations.english: Haldyn's been known to obscure his hideaways with magic.
translations.chinese: 哈尔丁会用魔法隐蔽自己的据点。

translations.english: If we take care of him, the way should be clear to properly assault the island.
translations.chinese: 如果我们搞定他，就能顺利进攻这座岛了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AF4]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If we take care of him, the way should be clear to properly assault the island. | ZH: 如果我们搞定他，就能顺利进攻这座岛了。 | SID: 00AC79

translations.english: This must be him, then.
translations.chinese: 就是他吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AF5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This must be him, then. | ZH: 就是他吧。 | SID: 00D3A1

translations.english: This must be her, then.
translations.chinese: 就是她吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056AF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This must be her, then. | ZH: 就是她吧。 | SID: 00C34F

translations.english: He's always used the ban on the worship of Talos to stir people up against the Empire.
translations.chinese: 他老是利用塔洛斯信仰禁令来煽动人民起来反对帝国。

translations.english: It's pretty simple. Ulfric founded the Stormcloaks years ago, as a sort of private army to advance his ambitions.
translations.chinese: 很简单，乌弗瑞克在几年前组建了风暴斗篷作为他的私人军队以推动他个人的野心。

translations.english: He never succeeded in getting much support, so a few months ago he murdered the High King! That got the Empire's attention.
translations.chinese: 他没能获得多少支持，所以几个月前他谋杀了至高王！这引起了帝国的注意。

translations.english: You haven't heard of the civil war in Skyrim? I guess down in Cyrodiil people have other things to worry about.
translations.chinese: 你没听说过天际的内战？我猜希罗帝尔的人们在关心别的事吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056B1E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: He's always used the ban on the worship of Talos to stir people up against the Empire. | ZH: 他老是利用塔洛斯信仰禁令来煽动人民起来反对帝国。 | SID: 001974
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: It's pretty simple. Ulfric founded the Stormcloaks years ago, as a sort of private army to advance his ambitions. | ZH: 很简单，乌弗瑞克在几年前组建了风暴斗篷作为他的私人军队以推动他个人的野心。 | SID: 003C98
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: He never succeeded in getting much support, so a few months ago he murdered the High King! That got the Empire's attention. | ZH: 他没能获得多少支持，所以几个月前他谋杀了至高王！这引起了帝国的注意。 | SID: 00C125
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You haven't heard of the civil war in Skyrim? I guess down in Cyrodiil people have other things to worry about. | ZH: 你没听说过天际的内战？我猜希罗帝尔的人们在关心别的事吧。 | SID: 00C12A

translations.english: He surrendered pretty meekly, too. So much for his death-or-glory reputation.
translations.chinese: 他很配合地投降了，他那非死即荣的名声也到头了。

translations.english: We've been trying to catch Ulfric since the war started, but he always seemed to slip through our fingers... like he knew we were coming.
translations.chinese: 从战争开始，我们就想捉住乌弗瑞克，但他总能从我们的指缝间溜走……就像知道我们要来似的。

translations.english: A masterstroke by General Tullius! He's only been in charge here for a few months, but he's turned things around for the Empire.
translations.chinese: 这是图留斯将军的妙计！他只来了几个月就为帝国扭转了局面。

translations.english: I thought we were taking Ulfric back to Cyrodiil, but I guess the General changed his mind. You know the rest.
translations.chinese: 我原以为会押着乌弗瑞克回希罗帝尔，但我猜将军改主意了。后头的事你都知道了。

translations.english: This time, the General turned the tables on him. Ulfric rode right into our ambush with only a few bodyguards.
translations.chinese: 这次，将军转变了战局。乌弗瑞克带来几个贴身侍卫就闯进了我们的伏击圈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056B1F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: He surrendered pretty meekly, too. So much for his death-or-glory reputation. | ZH: 他很配合地投降了，他那非死即荣的名声也到头了。 | SID: 001041
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: We've been trying to catch Ulfric since the war started, but he always seemed to slip through our fingers... like he knew we were coming. | ZH: 从战争开始，我们就想捉住乌弗瑞克，但他总能从我们的指缝间溜走……就像知道我们要来似的。 | SID: 001621
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: A masterstroke by General Tullius! He's only been in charge here for a few months, but he's turned things around for the Empire. | ZH: 这是图留斯将军的妙计！他只来了几个月就为帝国扭转了局面。 | SID: 002F30
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: I thought we were taking Ulfric back to Cyrodiil, but I guess the General changed his mind. You know the rest. | ZH: 我原以为会押着乌弗瑞克回希罗帝尔，但我猜将军改主意了。后头的事你都知道了。 | SID: 0062A4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: This time, the General turned the tables on him. Ulfric rode right into our ambush with only a few bodyguards. | ZH: 这次，将军转变了战局。乌弗瑞克带来几个贴身侍卫就闯进了我们的伏击圈。 | SID: 00C133

translations.english: They claim to be fighting for Skyrim's freedom, but the war is really all about Ulfric wanting to be High King of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 他们声称为天际的自由而战，实际上是乌弗瑞克想当天际至高王。

translations.english: Right, the leader of the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 没错，风暴斗篷的领袖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056B20]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They claim to be fighting for Skyrim's freedom, but the war is really all about Ulfric wanting to be High King of Skyrim. | ZH: 他们声称为天际的自由而战，实际上是乌弗瑞克想当天际至高王。 | SID: 00C33E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Right, the leader of the Stormcloaks. | ZH: 没错，风暴斗篷的领袖。 | SID: 00C33F

translations.english: That's the part that Ulfric's supporters always conveniently forget about. Unless the Empire stands together, the Thalmor will destroy us all.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克的支持者很容易忘了这一点。帝国如果不能团结一致，早晚要被梭默一网打尽。

translations.english: Even I'll admit it hasn't been the Empire's finest hour. But it wasn't like the Emperor had any choice, did he?
translations.chinese: 我承认这对帝国来说很不光彩。但皇帝也别无选择，不是吗？

translations.english: I guess that wasn't such a big deal elsewhere in the Empire, but here it's caused a lot of resentment. Native son and all that.
translations.chinese: 我想这在帝国的其他地方算不上什么大事。不过却在这里引发很多不满。尤其是本地人。

translations.english: If he hadn't signed the peace treaty with the Thalmor, they would have destroyed the Empire - then where would Skyrim be?
translations.chinese: 如果他没和梭默签订和平条约，那梭默就会摧毁帝国。到时候，天际又该何去何从呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00056B21]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: That's the part that Ulfric's supporters always conveniently forget about. Unless the Empire stands together, the Thalmor will destroy us all. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克的支持者很容易忘了这一点。帝国如果不能团结一致，早晚要被梭默一网打尽。 | SID: 0001FA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Even I'll admit it hasn't been the Empire's finest hour. But it wasn't like the Emperor had any choice, did he? | ZH: 我承认这对帝国来说很不光彩。但皇帝也别无选择，不是吗？ | SID: 0005E0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I guess that wasn't such a big deal elsewhere in the Empire, but here it's caused a lot of resentment. Native son and all that. | ZH: 我想这在帝国的其他地方算不上什么大事。不过却在这里引发很多不满。尤其是本地人。 | SID: 0074EC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: If he hadn't signed the peace treaty with the Thalmor, they would have destroyed the Empire - then where would Skyrim be? | ZH: 如果他没和梭默签订和平条约，那梭默就会摧毁帝国。到时候，天际又该何去何从呢？ | SID: 00C34D

translations.english: It's from that treaty that ended the Great War, remember, when the Emperor was forced by the Thalmor to outlaw Talos worship.
translations.chinese: 正是这个条约结束了浩大战争，记得吗？当时皇帝在梭默的被迫下宣布了塔洛斯信仰非法化。

translations.english: We didn't pay much attention to it when I was a boy - everyone still had their little shrine to Talos.
translations.chinese: 我小时候也没谁在意，当时每个人都有祭拜塔洛斯的小神龛。

translations.english: But then Ulfric and his "Sons of Skyrim" started agitating about it, and sure enough the Emperor had to crack down.
translations.chinese: 可是后来乌弗瑞克和他的那群“天际之子”开始闹起来了，皇帝不得不镇压他们。

translations.english: Dragging people off in the middle of the night... one of the main causes of this war, if you ask me.
translations.chinese: 在半夜把人拖走……在我看来这就是战争的主因。

translations.english: Why are the Thalmor allowed to arrest people for worshipping Talos?
translations.chinese: 为什么梭默能被允许逮捕塔洛斯信徒？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Dragging people off in the middle of the night... one of the main causes of this war, if you ask me. | ZH: 在半夜把人拖走……在我看来这就是战争的主因。 | SID: 00C343

translations.english: Oh, right, you were caught trying to cross the border into Skyrim, weren't you?
translations.chinese: 哦对，你在企图越境的时候被抓了？

translations.english: You're not kidding. Ulfric's the leader of the Stormcloaks - you know, the traitors trying to break Skyrim away from the Empire.
translations.chinese: 你怕不是在开玩笑。乌弗瑞克是风暴斗篷的首领。你肯定知道，这是群想把天际从帝国分裂出去的叛党。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh, right, you were caught trying to cross the border into Skyrim, weren't you? | ZH: 哦对，你在企图越境的时候被抓了？ | SID: 009F0C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You're not kidding. Ulfric's the leader of the Stormcloaks - you know, the traitors trying to break Skyrim away from the Empire. | ZH: 你怕不是在开玩笑。乌弗瑞克是风暴斗篷的首领。你肯定知道，这是群想把天际从帝国分裂出去的叛党。 | SID: 00C204

translations.english: But was it worth tearing Skyrim apart, and maybe destroying the Empire? No, Ulfric will have a lot to answer for in the end.
translations.chinese: 但因为这就把天际搞得四分五裂，甚至为此毁了整个帝国？乌弗瑞克最后要为很多事负责。

translations.english: Nords have always supported the Empire, and the Empire has always been good for Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 诺德人一直支持着帝国，而帝国也没亏待了天际。

translations.english: People are rightly stirred up about the damn Thalmor being allowed to roam around arresting people, just for worshipping Talos.
translations.chinese: 人们对梭默能够四处抓捕塔洛斯信徒感到愤怒。

translations.english: I just hope the war doesn't come to Riverwood. There's enough trouble in the world without those Stormcloaks stirring up more.
translations.chinese: 我只希望战火不要烧到河木镇来。就算没这群风暴斗篷瞎搅和，世界也已经够乱了。

translations.english: Hard to believe it was just a coincidence, that the first dragon anyone's seen for centuries attacks just as Ulfric was about to be executed.
translations.chinese: 很难相信这是巧合。几百年来人们第一次看到的龙，就是在乌弗瑞克要被处死时现身袭击。

translations.english: So did I! If the damn Stormcloaks somehow found one, or woke it up... the war might be about to take an ugly turn.
translations.chinese: 我也是！如果那群混蛋风暴斗篷找到或者唤醒了一个……那战况就不妙了。

translations.chinese: 没错。根据我们的历史守护者吉劳德的说法，和奥拉夫王有关的那部分《埃达》很可能还存在亡者之栖。

translations.chinese: 哦。哦不。这根本行不通。副本根本不完整，已经老朽到不能识读了。

translations.english: We're headed to Korvanjund. But, if old King Borgas is indeed buried there, we're bound to run into trouble of some kind.
translations.chinese: 我们要去科万琼德。但是如果先代王博加斯真的葬在那里，我们一定会碰上麻烦的。

translations.english: I've found the final resting place of the Jagged Crown. Can you believe it? Well, I'm almost certain.
translations.chinese: 我找到了锯齿王冠的下落了。你信吗？我可是很肯定。

translations.english: Your fellow Stormcloaks are already assembling outside the tomb. I'll meet you there as soon as I'm finished up here.
translations.chinese: 你的风暴斗篷战友已经在墓外集结了。我办完这里的事情就去找你们。

translations.english: What's the Legion doing here? Damn Imperial spies... Well, should be fun for us, at least. They don't seem to know we're here yet.
translations.chinese: 军团在这里做什么？该死的帝国间谍……好吧，至少能找点乐子。他们还不知道我们来了。

translations.english: Ready to spill some Imperial blood for Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 准备好为天际献上帝国人的血了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Follow me. Quickly and quietly now. I want their guts on the ground before they even know we're here.
translations.chinese: 跟我来。要又快又静。得让他们发现我们前就趴下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: But do not make the mistake of underestimating the Legion. Plenty of them are Nords same as us.
translations.chinese: 但不要低估了军团。他们中很多也是诺德人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057DC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But do not make the mistake of underestimating the Legion. Plenty of them are Nords same as us. | ZH: 但不要低估了军团。他们中很多也是诺德人。 | SID: 003A1F

translations.english: My wife Beitild is dead. Can't say I miss that old sabre cat.
translations.chinese: 我老婆贝提尤德死了。我可不想那个母老虎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057E23]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My wife Beitild is dead. Can't say I miss that old sabre cat. | ZH: 我老婆贝提尤德死了。我可不想那个母老虎。 | SID: 004912

translations.english: So polite! So nice! Cicero likes you. The Night Mother is sure to like you too. Oh, we're going to be fast friends. Fast friends.
translations.chinese: 真有礼貌！太好了！西塞罗喜欢你。夜母肯定也喜欢你。我们很快会成为好朋友的。很快的，朋友。

translations.english: It's good to meet you too, Cicero.
translations.chinese: 我也很高兴见到你，西塞罗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So polite! So nice! Cicero likes you. The Night Mother is sure to like you too. Oh, we're going to be fast friends. Fast friends. | ZH: 真有礼貌！太好了！西塞罗喜欢你。夜母肯定也喜欢你。我们很快会成为好朋友的。很快的，朋友。 | SID: 0035B4
- INFO:RNAM | EN: It's good to meet you too, Cicero. | ZH: 我也很高兴见到你，西塞罗。 | SID: 00256F

translations.english: Do you mistrust poor Cicero? I am, as you say, just an innocent jester. A fool! Oh, but my work is not foolish, no. For I am our mother's Keeper.
translations.chinese: 你不信任可怜的西塞罗吗？你说的对，我就是个无辜的小丑。一个傻瓜！哦，但我的工作可不蠢。我可是母亲的守护者。

translations.english: Keep your distance, jester, and we'll get along just fine.
translations.chinese: 保持距离，小丑，我们会彼此相安无事的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you mistrust poor Cicero? I am, as you say, just an innocent jester. A fool! Oh, but my work is not foolish, no. For I am our mother's Keeper. | ZH: 你不信任可怜的西塞罗吗？你说的对，我就是个无辜的小丑。一个傻瓜！哦，但我的工作可不蠢。我可是母亲的守护者。 | SID: 00BD1A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Keep your distance, jester, and we'll get along just fine. | ZH: 保持距离，小丑，我们会彼此相安无事的。 | SID: 00C317

translations.english: Oooh... So silent. So menacing. A true assassin of the old way. Cicero likes you. Oh yes, Cicero likes you, indeed.
translations.chinese: 哦……如此沉默，又如此具有威慑。老牌刺客。西塞罗喜欢你哦。没错，西塞罗可喜欢你了。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oooh... So silent. So menacing. A true assassin of the old way. Cicero likes you. Oh yes, Cicero likes you, indeed. | ZH: 哦……如此沉默，又如此具有威慑。老牌刺客。西塞罗喜欢你哦。没错，西塞罗可喜欢你了。 | SID: 00D93F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 006E85

translations.english: Keep talking, little man, and we'll see who gets "punished."
translations.chinese: 继续说啊，小子，看看谁会被“惩罚”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep talking, little man, and we'll see who gets "punished." | ZH: 继续说啊，小子，看看谁会被“惩罚”。 | SID: 008A95

translations.english: I am! I am! But not just my mother. Our mother, hmm? The Night Mother! Oh yes!
translations.chinese: 我是！我是！但不只是我的母亲，是我们的母亲。嗯？夜母！没错！

translations.english: Oh, you may have pleased me, but you have surely pleased the Night Mother. And our mother, she will never forget.
translations.chinese: 哦，你让我很高兴，肯定也让夜母很高兴。我们的母亲不会忘记的。

translations.english: And you helped me! You helped poor Cicero! You talked to Loreius, got him to fix my wheel!
translations.chinese: 你还帮了我！你帮助了可怜的西塞罗！你跟罗瑞尤斯谈过了，让他帮忙修轮子！

translations.english: You're the man with the wagon! Transporting his mother...
translations.chinese: 你是那个驾着马车的！要送母亲……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I am! I am! But not just my mother. Our mother, hmm? The Night Mother! Oh yes! | ZH: 我是！我是！但不只是我的母亲，是我们的母亲。嗯？夜母！没错！ | SID: 001CBC

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're the man with the wagon! Transporting his mother... | ZH: 你是那个驾着马车的！要送母亲…… | SID: 00B2AD

translations.english: I am! I am! But not just my mother. Our mother, hmm? The Night Mother! Oh yes!
translations.chinese: 我是！我是！但不只是我的母亲，是我们的母亲。嗯？夜母！没错！

translations.english: Oh, but you didn't help poor Cicero! You helped that stupid farmer! Stupid Loreius! Oh, the guard said cruel things about us. Untrue things...
translations.chinese: 但你没帮可怜的西塞罗！你帮了那个笨蛋种地的！那个傻子罗瑞尤斯！卫兵污蔑我们。都是假的……

translations.english: You're the man with the wagon! Transporting his mother...
translations.chinese: 你是那个驾着马车的！要送母亲……

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're the man with the wagon! Transporting his mother... | ZH: 你是那个驾着马车的！要送母亲…… | SID: 008F2A

translations.english: Wait, oh wait. I know you! Yes, yes. From the road! Cicero never forgets a face.
translations.chinese: 哦，等一下。我认识你！对，对。在路上！西塞罗忘不了那张脸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F81]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wait, oh wait. I know you! Yes, yes. From the road! Cicero never forgets a face. | ZH: 哦，等一下。我认识你！对，对。在路上！西塞罗忘不了那张脸。 | SID: 0029D7

translations.english: Another member of the Family! Hello, hello. So very good to meet you.
translations.chinese: 又一个家庭成员！你好，你好。很高兴见到你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F82]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Another member of the Family! Hello, hello. So very good to meet you. | ZH: 又一个家庭成员！你好，你好。很高兴见到你。 | SID: 00C307

translations.english: No time to talk now, my friend. No time. Out mistress needs tending. Keeping.
translations.chinese: 现在没时间说话，朋友。没时间。我们的主母需要被照顾。守护。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F83]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No time to talk now, my friend. No time. Out mistress needs tending. Keeping. | ZH: 现在没时间说话，朋友。没时间。我们的主母需要被照顾。守护。 | SID: 006557

translations.english: Why talk? Cicero has nothing to say to you. Call it a matter of... trust.
translations.chinese: 为什么要说话？西塞罗没什么好跟你说的。就当成是……信任吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F84]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why talk? Cicero has nothing to say to you. Call it a matter of... trust. | ZH: 为什么要说话？西塞罗没什么好跟你说的。就当成是……信任吧。 | SID: 00C306

translations.english: Oh, I do wish we could get to know each other better. But not now! I must tend to mother. See her settled.
translations.chinese: 哦。我真希望我们更加深入了解彼此。但现在不行！我得照顾母亲。帮她安居。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F85]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, I do wish we could get to know each other better. But not now! I must tend to mother. See her settled. | ZH: 哦。我真希望我们更加深入了解彼此。但现在不行！我得照顾母亲。帮她安居。 | SID: 00C305

translations.english: He said I attacked someone! On the road! But it never happened. Never. Sweet mother and I were just waiting. My knife was sheathed!
translations.chinese: 他说我袭击了某人！在路上！但这是没有的事。从来没有。亲爱的母亲和我只是在等待。我的刀已经插好了。

translations.english: But I...
translations.chinese: 但我……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F87]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He said I attacked someone! On the road! But it never happened. Never. Sweet mother and I were just waiting. My knife was sheathed! | ZH: 他说我袭击了某人！在路上！但这是没有的事。从来没有。亲爱的母亲和我只是在等待。我的刀已经插好了。 | SID: 00C316
- INFO:RNAM | EN: But I... | ZH: 但我…… | SID: 00AB9E

translations.english: He said I was transporting weapons! For the war! In mother's coffin! He made me... open it! Indignity! Sacrilege!
translations.chinese: 他说我在偷运武器！是战争贩子！在母亲的棺材里！他让我……打开它！这是侮辱！是亵渎！

translations.english: But I...
translations.chinese: 但我……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F88]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He said I was transporting weapons! For the war! In mother's coffin! He made me... open it! Indignity! Sacrilege! | ZH: 他说我在偷运武器！是战争贩子！在母亲的棺材里！他让我……打开它！这是侮辱！是亵渎！ | SID: 00C312
- INFO:RNAM | EN: But I... | ZH: 但我…… | SID: 00E1D5

translations.english: He said I stole something! Me! Poor Cicero. A common thief. The very thought is insulting. One might even say... maddening.
translations.chinese: 他说我偷东西了！我！可怜的西塞罗。是一个普通的小贼。这想法本身就是侮辱。有人甚至会说……令人抓狂。

translations.english: But I...
translations.chinese: 但我……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057F89]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He said I stole something! Me! Poor Cicero. A common thief. The very thought is insulting. One might even say... maddening. | ZH: 他说我偷东西了！我！可怜的西塞罗。是一个普通的小贼。这想法本身就是侮辱。有人甚至会说……令人抓狂。 | SID: 007A52
- INFO:RNAM | EN: But I... | ZH: 但我…… | SID: 00138F

translations.english: We meet at last, my dear lady.
translations.chinese: 我们终于见面了，亲爱的女士。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We meet at last, my dear lady. | ZH: 我们终于见面了，亲爱的女士。 | SID: 00C2F1

translations.english: If you really think this is the only way, I trust you. Let's not waste any time.
translations.chinese: 如果你真觉得这是唯一出路，我相信你。不要浪费时间了。

translations.english: After all this, I have to pick up and leave again?
translations.chinese: 经历了这一切，我又得收拾东西走人？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you really think this is the only way, I trust you. Let's not waste any time. | ZH: 如果你真觉得这是唯一出路，我相信你。不要浪费时间了。 | SID: 00C0DF
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: After all this, I have to pick up and leave again? | ZH: 经历了这一切，我又得收拾东西走人？ | SID: 00C2FE

translations.english: What have you done?
translations.chinese: 你做了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What have you done? | ZH: 你做了什么？ | SID: 00970C

translations.english: What is this?
translations.chinese: 这是怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What is this? | ZH: 这是怎么回事？ | SID: 00C2F3

translations.english: But where will I go? I can't keep running forever!
translations.chinese: 但我又能去哪儿？我不能一直逃下去！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But where will I go? I can't keep running forever! | ZH: 但我又能去哪儿？我不能一直逃下去！ | SID: 00C2F6

translations.english: Oh, come now. You didn't really expect to manipulate people forever, did you? Your luck had to run out sometime.
translations.chinese: 哦，得了吧。你不会真想永远操纵别人吧？运气总有花光的一天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, come now. You didn't really expect to manipulate people forever, did you? Your luck had to run out sometime. | ZH: 哦，得了吧。你不会真想永远操纵别人吧？运气总有花光的一天。 | SID: 008C0B

translations.english: Please, our tribe suffers and we need help.
translations.chinese: 拜托了，我们的部落正在受苦，需要帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FB1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, our tribe suffers and we need help. | ZH: 拜托了，我们的部落正在受苦，需要帮助。 | SID: 00CA1B

translations.english: No, don't go!
translations.chinese: 不，留步！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FB2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, don't go! | ZH: 不，留步！ | SID: 00C6BE

translations.english: Yamarz refuses help, but I sense that you may be just what we need.
translations.chinese: 亚马兹拒绝求援，但我觉得你正是我们要找的人。

translations.english: He is weak, and so our tribe is weak. The giants sense this, and intrude on our territory. Now they assault our very home.
translations.chinese: 他变弱了，部落也就变弱了。巨人们有所察觉，并入侵我们的领地。现在他们就在攻击我们的家园。

translations.english: Our Chief, Yamarz, was once a strong and proud warrior. Now he is stricken, cursed.
translations.chinese: 我们的酋长亚马兹，曾经是个强壮骄傲的战士。但他现在遭受打击，中了诅咒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00057FB3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Yamarz refuses help, but I sense that you may be just what we need. | ZH: 亚马兹拒绝求援，但我觉得你正是我们要找的人。 | SID: 000C43
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He is weak, and so our tribe is weak. The giants sense this, and intrude on our territory. Now they assault our very home. | ZH: 他变弱了，部落也就变弱了。巨人们有所察觉，并入侵我们的领地。现在他们就在攻击我们的家园。 | SID: 0083C5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Our Chief, Yamarz, was once a strong and proud warrior. Now he is stricken, cursed. | ZH: 我们的酋长亚马兹，曾经是个强壮骄傲的战士。但他现在遭受打击，中了诅咒。 | SID: 00C2E9

translations.english: Good. They'll think twice before crossing us while their command structure is in disarray.
translations.chinese: 很好。当他们指挥结构混乱时，就会在越过我们前三思后行了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005809A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. They'll think twice before crossing us while their command structure is in disarray. | ZH: 很好。当他们指挥结构混乱时，就会在越过我们前三思后行了。 | SID: 0054E8

translations.english: I pray Talos overlooks our less than honorable approach. But he knows our purpose is just and true. I'm glad you made it out alive.
translations.chinese: 希望塔洛斯不会在意我们不光彩的做法。但他一定知道我们的目的是正义而真实的。我很高兴你能活着出来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005809B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I pray Talos overlooks our less than honorable approach. But he knows our purpose is just and true. I'm glad you made it out alive. | ZH: 希望塔洛斯不会在意我们不光彩的做法。但他一定知道我们的目的是正义而真实的。我很高兴你能活着出来。 | SID: 008F5E

translations.english: Good work. This was a double victory. We took a garrison away from the Stormcloaks and further proved the hollowness of their cause.
translations.chinese: 干得漂亮。这是双重意义的胜利。我们让风暴斗篷从那里撤军，还证明了他们事业的空虚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005809C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good work. This was a double victory. We took a garrison away from the Stormcloaks and further proved the hollowness of their cause. | ZH: 干得漂亮。这是双重意义的胜利。我们让风暴斗篷从那里撤军，还证明了他们事业的空虚。 | SID: 00B5F9

translations.english: Excellent. That's one less settlement in Imperial hands, and one more sign to all that our cause is true.
translations.chinese: 很好。又一个聚落从帝国手里解脱了。我们再次证明了事业的正确性。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005809D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excellent. That's one less settlement in Imperial hands, and one more sign to all that our cause is true. | ZH: 很好。又一个聚落从帝国手里解脱了。我们再次证明了事业的正确性。 | SID: 000794

translations.english: Hmph.
translations.chinese: 嗯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005809E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. | ZH: 嗯。 | SID: 00C304

translations.english: I don't dare show my face, lest they recognize me, so you'll have to find out where they are.
translations.chinese: 我不敢露面，怕被他们认出来，所以你得找出他们的所在。

translations.english: They're mercenaries, only in it for the money. They're led by a man named Kematu. Get rid of him, and the rest will scatter.
translations.chinese: 他们是雇佣兵，眼里只有钱。领头的人叫凯马图。除掉他，其他人也就作鸟兽散了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000580A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't dare show my face, lest they recognize me, so you'll have to find out where they are. | ZH: 我不敢露面，怕被他们认出来，所以你得找出他们的所在。 | SID: 0092DC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: They're mercenaries, only in it for the money. They're led by a man named Kematu. Get rid of him, and the rest will scatter. | ZH: 他们是雇佣兵，眼里只有钱。领头的人叫凯马图。除掉他，其他人也就作鸟兽散了。 | SID: 00C2E1

translations.english: We're looking for information about a woman -- a foreigner in these lands. She's a Redguard, like us.
translations.chinese: 我们在找一个异邦女人的消息。是个和我们一样的红卫人。

translations.english: We believe she may be hiding in Whiterun, but we're checking everywhere to be sure.
translations.chinese: 我们确信她可能藏在白漫城，但我们正在四处搜查确保无误。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000580A1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We're looking for information about a woman -- a foreigner in these lands. She's a Redguard, like us. | ZH: 我们在找一个异邦女人的消息。是个和我们一样的红卫人。 | SID: 0035E6

translations.english: Where have you been?
translations.chinese: 你去哪儿了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005829B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where have you been? | ZH: 你去哪儿了？ | SID: 007853

translations.english: We did well today, Shield-Brother.
translations.chinese: 我们今天干得很好，盾牌兄弟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005829C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We did well today, Shield-Brother. | ZH: 我们今天干得很好，盾牌兄弟。 | SID: 00C2E0

translations.english: Aela's laid claim to your services, and I've learned the hard way not to upset her. Best you stick to her for now.
translations.chinese: 艾拉要求你去帮她，我学聪明了，不要惹她。你现在最好去找她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005829E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aela's laid claim to your services, and I've learned the hard way not to upset her. Best you stick to her for now. | ZH: 艾拉要求你去帮她，我学聪明了，不要惹她。你现在最好去找她。 | SID: 00C2DD

translations.english: Aela said you were hers, and I wasn't supposed to interfere. She scares me.
translations.chinese: 艾拉说你现在归她，我不该干涉。她让我感到害怕。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005829F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aela said you were hers, and I wasn't supposed to interfere. She scares me. | ZH: 艾拉说你现在归她，我不该干涉。她让我感到害怕。 | SID: 003070

translations.english: And there is more work to be done, but I fear that Kodlak's gotten wind of our recent efforts. He's asked to see you.
translations.chinese: 还有很多工作，但恐怕咱们最近的努力被克拉科知道了。他要见你。

translations.english: My advice? Always be honest with the old man, but don't tell him anything he doesn't need to know.
translations.chinese: 要我说？对老爷子永远要诚实，但有的事犯不着告诉他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582A0]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: My advice? Always be honest with the old man, but don't tell him anything he doesn't need to know. | ZH: 要我说？对老爷子永远要诚实，但有的事犯不着告诉他。 | SID: 004A9F

translations.english: We fought them off, but...
translations.chinese: 我们击退了他们，但是……

translations.english: The Silver Hand. They finally found enough courage to attack Jorrvaskr.
translations.chinese: 是银手。他们终于有胆子来进攻月瓦斯卡了。

translations.english: The old man... Kodlak... he's dead.
translations.chinese: 老爷子……克拉科……死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We fought them off, but... | ZH: 我们击退了他们，但是…… | SID: 00190A

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The old man... Kodlak... he's dead. | ZH: 老爷子……克拉科……死了。 | SID: 00C2BC

translations.english: Have you heard the story of how we came to be werewolves?
translations.chinese: 你有听说过我们变成狼人的故事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you heard the story of how we came to be werewolves? | ZH: 你有听说过我们变成狼人的故事吗？ | SID: 00588A

translations.english: We grieve.
translations.chinese: 我们哀伤。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We grieve. | ZH: 我们哀伤。 | SID: 00C2C7

translations.english: You shall have no Shield-Brother this time. But the spirit of Ysgramor goes with you, to restore the honor of his legacy.
translations.chinese: 这次没有盾牌兄弟了。但是伊斯格拉默的精神与你同在，恢复他遗产的荣耀吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You shall have no Shield-Brother this time. But the spirit of Ysgramor goes with you, to restore the honor of his legacy. | ZH: 这次没有盾牌兄弟了。但是伊斯格拉默的精神与你同在，恢复他遗产的荣耀吧。 | SID: 004CFF

translations.english: Do you have the fragments of Wuuthrad, still?
translations.chinese: 你还有巫斯拉德的碎片吗？

translations.english: I'll need to prepare them for mounting again.
translations.chinese: 我得准备好让它们再度归一。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Do you have the fragments of Wuuthrad, still? | ZH: 你还有巫斯拉德的碎片吗？ | SID: 00C2CF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll need to prepare them for mounting again. | ZH: 我得准备好让它们再度归一。 | SID: 00F46C

translations.english: And perhaps some day, you'll join us in that battle. But for today, return to Jorrvaskr. Triumph in your victory.
translations.chinese: 也许有一天，你也会加入我们的战斗。但今天，还是回月瓦斯卡吧，为你的胜利欢呼。

translations.english: Perhaps from Sovngarde, the heroes of old can join me in their rescue. The Harrowing of the Hunting Grounds. It would be a battle of such triumph.
translations.chinese: 也许松加德的古老英雄可以加入我的营救行动。对猎场的痛击将是一场胜利之战。

translations.english: And lead the Companions to further glory.
translations.chinese: 要继续领导战友团走向荣光。

translations.english: And so slain the beast inside of me.
translations.chinese: 这样我体内的野兽就被杀死了。

translations.english: I thank you for this gift. The other Harbingers remain trapped by Hircine, though.
translations.chinese: 感谢你给我的礼物。然而，其他的先驱还被海尔辛困着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582D7]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: Perhaps from Sovngarde, the heroes of old can join me in their rescue. The Harrowing of the Hunting Grounds. It would be a battle of such triumph. | ZH: 也许松加德的古老英雄可以加入我的营救行动。对猎场的痛击将是一场胜利之战。 | SID: 007910

translations.english: And now I've found the answer. The witches' magic ensnared us, and only their magic can release us.
translations.chinese: 现在我找到答案了。女巫们的魔法困住了我们，只有用她们的魔法来解救。

translations.english: I want you to seek them out. Go to their coven in the wilderness. Strike them down as a true warrior of the wild.
translations.chinese: 我希望你去把她们找出来。去她们在野外的集会地。像一名战士一样击败她们。

translations.english: And bring me their heads. The seat of their abilities. From there, we may begin to undo centuries of impurity.
translations.chinese: 把她们的头带回来给我。那是她们的能力所在。这样我们就能消除这几个世纪以来的不洁了。

translations.english: That's what I've spent my twilight years trying to find out.
translations.chinese: 这是我晚年以来一直想弄清楚的。

translations.english: They won't give it willingly, but we can extract their foul powers by force.
translations.chinese: 她们自然不会心甘情愿，但我们可以用武力榨取她们的邪恶力量。

translations.english: For the fallen...
translations.chinese: 为此人的陨落……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: For the fallen... | ZH: 为此人的陨落…… | SID: 00C2CB

translations.english: They did not believe the change would be permanent. The witches offered payment, like anyone else.
translations.chinese: 他们知道变化无法永久维持。而毫不意外地，那些女巫们也为此要求代价。

translations.english: But we had been deceived.
translations.chinese: 但我们被骗了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But we had been deceived. | ZH: 但我们被骗了。 | SID: 00C299

translations.english: It always is.
translations.chinese: 事情总是这样。

translations.english: The boy has a nugget of truth, but the reality is more complicated than that.
translations.chinese: 那孩子说的有些道理，但真相远比此要复杂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582DC]
Translations:

translations.english: One of the fiercest battles I've ever seen.
translations.chinese: 这是我见过的最激烈的战斗之一了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582DD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: One of the fiercest battles I've ever seen. | ZH: 这是我见过的最激烈的战斗之一了。 | SID: 00C2B9

translations.english: Ah yes, their trickery.
translations.chinese: 啊对，她们的诡计。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah yes, their trickery. | ZH: 啊对，她们的诡计。 | SID: 0011F0

translations.english: Come up to the Skyforge to pay your respects.
translations.chinese: 到天空锻炉行礼吧。

translations.english: The others have probably prepared Kodlak's funeral by now.
translations.chinese: 其他人现在应该准备好克拉科的葬礼了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582DF]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The others have probably prepared Kodlak's funeral by now. | ZH: 其他人现在应该准备好克拉科的葬礼了。 | SID: 00C2C3

translations.english: The Companions are nearly five thousand years old. This matter of beastblood has only troubled us for a few hundred.
translations.chinese: 战友团有近五千年的历史了。但野兽血脉困扰我们也只是这几百年的事。

translations.english: If the Companions would hunt in the name of their lord, Hircine, we would be granted great power.
translations.chinese: 如果战友团以她们的主人海尔辛之名狩猎，就能被赋予强大的力量。

translations.english: One of my predecessors was a good, but short-sighted man. He made a bargain with the witches of Glenmoril Coven.
translations.chinese: 我的一位前任是个好人，但目光短浅。他和格仑摩利女巫团做了个交易。

translations.english: Before the ancient flame...
translations.chinese: 在远古的火焰之前……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Before the ancient flame... | ZH: 在远古的火焰之前…… | SID: 004F65

translations.english: In any case, I have a task for you.
translations.chinese: 无论怎样，我有个任务交给你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: In any case, I have a task for you. | ZH: 无论怎样，我有个任务交给你。 | SID: 00C284

translations.english: We will avenge Kodlak. And they will know terror before the end.
translations.chinese: 我们要为克拉科报仇。让他们体会死前的恐怖。

translations.english: We will bring the battle to their chief camp. There will be none left living to tell their stories. Only songs of Jorrvaskr will be sung.
translations.chinese: 我们要到他们的大本营去。让他们的故事就此断绝。月瓦斯卡的赞歌会被永久传唱。

translations.english: But you and I are going to reclaim them.
translations.chinese: 你和我一起去夺回来。

translations.english: No, but they made off with all our fragments of Wuuthrad.
translations.chinese: 没了，但他们把咱们所有的巫斯拉德碎片都抢走了。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: We will bring the battle to their chief camp. There will be none left living to tell their stories. Only songs of Jorrvaskr will be sung. | ZH: 我们要到他们的大本营去。让他们的故事就此断绝。月瓦斯卡的赞歌会被永久传唱。 | SID: 009EF4

translations.english: We'll get to that.
translations.chinese: 我们会的。

translations.english: It's not so simple as just killing them, though.
translations.chinese: 但这不是杀死她们那么简单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We grieve.
translations.chinese: 我们哀伤。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We grieve. | ZH: 我们哀伤。 | SID: 00C2C6

translations.english: This is not about your desires, lad.
translations.chinese: 这与你的意愿无关，小子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is not about your desires, lad. | ZH: 这与你的意愿无关，小子。 | SID: 00C2B7

translations.english: The witches didn't lie, of course. But it's more than our bodies.
translations.chinese: 当然，女巫们没有撒谎。不过起变化的远不止身体。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The witches didn't lie, of course. But it's more than our bodies. | ZH: 当然，女巫们没有撒谎。不过起变化的远不止身体。 | SID: 00137F

translations.english: Don't get too flowery on me, lad.
translations.chinese: 别整的太花哨了，小子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't get too flowery on me, lad. | ZH: 别整的太花哨了，小子。 | SID: 00B699

translations.english: Of course. My fellow Harbingers and I have been warming ourselves here. Trying to evade Hircine.
translations.chinese: 没错。我和其他先驱在这里取暖。试图躲避海尔辛。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. My fellow Harbingers and I have been warming ourselves here. Trying to evade Hircine. | ZH: 没错。我和其他先驱在这里取暖。试图躲避海尔辛。 | SID: 00BB97

translations.english: Return Wuuthrad to Ysgramor. It should open the way.
translations.chinese: 将巫斯拉德还给伊斯格拉默。应该就能打开道路。

agentText:

EDID: [000582EA]

translations.english: We did well today, Shield-Sister.
translations.chinese: 我们今天干得很好，盾牌姐妹。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We did well today, Shield-Sister. | ZH: 我们今天干得很好，盾牌姐妹。 | SID: 00BD12

translations.english: Mind you, it's no business of mine what each Companion does in the name of honor.
translations.chinese: 随你，每个战友以名誉的名义做了什么与我无关。

translations.english: But this sneaking around. It doesn't befit warriors of your standing. Aela knows better, and so should you.
translations.chinese: 但这样并不光彩。不适合你这样身份的勇士。艾拉更清楚，你也应该明白。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Good. Now move quickly. And don't leave any of them alive.
translations.chinese: 好。现在快去吧。别留活口。

translations.english: Aye, that sounds like him.
translations.chinese: 啊，听起来像他会说的话。

translations.english: As in all matters of faith, though, the reality is more complicated than one believer would tell you.
translations.chinese: 然而，就像所有关于信仰的事一样，事实总会比信徒告诉你的要复杂许多。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We grieve. | ZH: 我们哀伤。 | SID: 002F10

translations.english: Lass, I know what you've been up to.
translations.chinese: 姑娘，我知道你在做什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582F0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lass, I know what you've been up to. | ZH: 姑娘，我知道你在做什么。 | SID: 002EDC

translations.english: I hope it was important, because it means you weren't here to defend him.
translations.chinese: 希望是要紧到让你没能来保护他的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582F1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope it was important, because it means you weren't here to defend him. | ZH: 希望是要紧到让你没能来保护他的事。 | SID: 00C2B8

translations.english: And that is their choice. But I am still a true Nord. And I wish for Sovngarde as my spirit home.
translations.chinese: 这是他们的选择。但我仍然是一个真正的诺德人。我希望魂归松加德。

translations.english: For some, this is a paradise. They want nothing more than to chase prey with their master for eternity.
translations.chinese: 对一些人来说，那里就是乐园。他们只知道与主人一起永远地追逐猎物。

translations.english: Upon death, werewolves are claimed by Hircine for his Hunting Grounds.
translations.chinese: 狼人死后，会被海尔辛带进自己的猎场位面。

translations.english: The disease, you see, affects not just our bodies. It seeps into the spirit.
translations.chinese: 你看，这种疾病不止是影响了我们的身体，还渗透进我们的精魂当中。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000582F2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: And that is their choice. But I am still a true Nord. And I wish for Sovngarde as my spirit home. | ZH: 这是他们的选择。但我仍然是一个真正的诺德人。我希望魂归松加德。 | SID: 00B830
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: For some, this is a paradise. They want nothing more than to chase prey with their master for eternity. | ZH: 对一些人来说，那里就是乐园。他们只知道与主人一起永远地追逐猎物。 | SID: 00C2A9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Upon death, werewolves are claimed by Hircine for his Hunting Grounds. | ZH: 狼人死后，会被海尔辛带进自己的猎场位面。 | SID: 00C2AA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: The disease, you see, affects not just our bodies. It seeps into the spirit. | ZH: 你看，这种疾病不止是影响了我们的身体，还渗透进我们的精魂当中。 | SID: 00C2AB

translations.english: They should be back shortly. You're welcome to wait here if you like.
translations.chinese: 他们很快就会回来。如果你愿意，也欢迎在这里等。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000585F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: They should be back shortly. You're welcome to wait here if you like. | ZH: 他们很快就会回来。如果你愿意，也欢迎在这里等。 | SID: 00E749

translations.english: This temple is dedicated to Mara, and the light of love she shines on us all.
translations.chinese: 这座神庙是献给玛拉的，她的爱之光芒照耀着我们。

translations.english: I'm only a humble acolyte, though. If you wish to avail yourself of Mara's blessing, you should speak with Dinya Balu or Maramal.
translations.chinese: 不过，我只是个卑微的侍僧。如果你希望得到玛拉的祝福，可以去找丁雅·巴鲁或者玛拉莫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000585FA]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This temple is dedicated to Mara, and the light of love she shines on us all. | ZH: 这座神庙是献给玛拉的，她的爱之光芒照耀着我们。 | SID: 0096BD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm only a humble acolyte, though. If you wish to avail yourself of Mara's blessing, you should speak with Dinya Balu or Maramal. | ZH: 不过，我只是个卑微的侍僧。如果你希望得到玛拉的祝福，可以去找丁雅·巴鲁或者玛拉莫。 | SID: 00C280

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058655]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: ... | ZH: …… | SID: 009FE0

translations.english: Get yourself kitted out with what you need. Welcome to the fight, brother!
translations.chinese: 把你需要的东西准备好。欢迎加入战斗，兄弟！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058656]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get yourself kitted out with what you need. Welcome to the fight, brother! | ZH: 把你需要的东西准备好。欢迎加入战斗，兄弟！ | SID: 00A63B

translations.english: Aye, lass... and I've come to a decision.
translations.chinese: 好，姑娘……我已经做出决定了。

translations.english: Mercer Frey tried to kill both of you, he betrayed the Guild, murdered Gallus and made us question our future. He needs to die.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟·弗雷企图谋害你俩，背叛公会，杀害加卢斯，让我们对未来充满迷茫。他必须死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Aye, lass... and I've come to a decision. | ZH: 好，姑娘……我已经做出决定了。 | SID: 00C259
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Mercer Frey tried to kill both of you, he betrayed the Guild, murdered Gallus and made us question our future. He needs to die. | ZH: 墨瑟·弗雷企图谋害你俩，背叛公会，杀害加卢斯，让我们对未来充满迷茫。他必须死。 | SID: 00E2CD

translations.english: Then it's all true... everything I heard in the stories. The Nightingales, their allegiance to Nocturnal and the Twilight Sepulcher.
translations.chinese: 那这一切都是真的……传说里的一切。忠于诺克图娜尔和黄昏坟墓的夜莺。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then it's all true... everything I heard in the stories. The Nightingales, their allegiance to Nocturnal and the Twilight Sepulcher. | ZH: 那这一切都是真的……传说里的一切。忠于诺克图娜尔和黄昏坟墓的夜莺。 | SID: 00890C

translations.english: From the moment you were struck with my poisoned arrow at Snow Veil Sanctum, my path changed its course.
translations.chinese: 从你在雪幔圣所被我的毒箭射中的那一刻起，我的道路就改变了。

translations.english: Perhaps I couldn't bring Mercer back alive, but together, we were able to clear my name and to put Gallus's memory to rest.
translations.chinese: 也许我没法活捉墨瑟，但我们可以合作，洗清我的罪名，也让加卢斯安息。

translations.english: I'd always intended Mercer's fate to ultimately be decided by the Guild, and it seems they've spoken.
translations.chinese: 我一直想让公会对墨瑟的命运做最终决断，现在看来他们已经决定了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: From the moment you were struck with my poisoned arrow at Snow Veil Sanctum, my path changed its course. | ZH: 从你在雪幔圣所被我的毒箭射中的那一刻起，我的道路就改变了。 | SID: 0019EC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Perhaps I couldn't bring Mercer back alive, but together, we were able to clear my name and to put Gallus's memory to rest. | ZH: 也许我没法活捉墨瑟，但我们可以合作，洗清我的罪名，也让加卢斯安息。 | SID: 00C26F
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'd always intended Mercer's fate to ultimately be decided by the Guild, and it seems they've spoken. | ZH: 我一直想让公会对墨瑟的命运做最终决断，现在看来他们已经决定了。 | SID: 00F990

translations.english: Brynjolf, the time has come to decide Mercer's fate. Until a new Guild Master is chosen, the decision falls to you.
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫，决定墨瑟命运的时刻到了。在新的公会大师被选出前，由你来做决定吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Brynjolf, the time has come to decide Mercer's fate. Until a new Guild Master is chosen, the decision falls to you. | ZH: 布林乔夫，决定墨瑟命运的时刻到了。在新的公会大师被选出前，由你来做决定吧。 | SID: 0073C1

translations.english: We have to be very careful, Brynjolf. Mercer is a Nightingale, an Agent of Nocturnal.
translations.chinese: 我们得慎之又慎，布林乔夫。墨瑟是夜莺，是诺克图娜尔的特使。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We have to be very careful, Brynjolf. Mercer is a Nightingale, an Agent of Nocturnal. | ZH: 我们得慎之又慎，布林乔夫。墨瑟是夜莺，是诺克图娜尔的特使。 | SID: 00C25B

translations.english: At the end of that path is a clearing and an old standing stone. I'd ask you both meet me there.
translations.chinese: 小路尽头有一块空地和一块古老的立石。你们俩去那里和我会合吧。

translations.english: Just outside of Riften, beyond the Southeast Gate is a small path cut up the mountainside.
translations.chinese: 在裂谷城外，东南门后面有一条沿山坡斜插的小路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: At the end of that path is a clearing and an old standing stone. I'd ask you both meet me there. | ZH: 小路尽头有一块空地和一块古老的立石。你们俩去那里和我会合吧。 | SID: 00C25C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Just outside of Riften, beyond the Southeast Gate is a small path cut up the mountainside. | ZH: 在裂谷城外，东南门后面有一条沿山坡斜插的小路。 | SID: 00C25D

translations.english: Time's wasting and Mercer's still out there. Let's get this show on the road.
translations.chinese: 别再浪费时间了，墨瑟还在逍遥法外。我们快开始吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Time's wasting and Mercer's still out there. Let's get this show on the road. | ZH: 别再浪费时间了，墨瑟还在逍遥法外。我们快开始吧。 | SID: 0030D2

translations.english: I'm just as puzzled as you, lad.
translations.chinese: 我和你一样困惑，小子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm just as puzzled as you, lad. | ZH: 我和你一样困惑，小子。 | SID: 0086EC

translations.english: I think we can trust Karliah. Let's see what she's on about.
translations.chinese: 我觉得卡莱亚可以信任。看看她要说什么吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think we can trust Karliah. Let's see what she's on about. | ZH: 我觉得卡莱亚可以信任。看看她要说什么吧。 | SID: 007F64

translations.english: Not now, lad. Karliah said it was important.
translations.chinese: 现在不行，小子。卡莱亚说这事很重要。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587FE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not now, lad. Karliah said it was important. | ZH: 现在不行，小子。卡莱亚说这事很重要。 | SID: 00146E

translations.english: Not now, lass. Karliah said it was important.
translations.chinese: 现在不行，姑娘。卡莱亚说这事很重要。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000587FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not now, lass. Karliah said it was important. | ZH: 现在不行，姑娘。卡莱亚说这事很重要。 | SID: 004948

translations.english: We'll speak when the Oath is complete.
translations.chinese: 等立誓之后我们再谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058800]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We'll speak when the Oath is complete. | ZH: 等立誓之后我们再谈。 | SID: 007560

translations.english: I think we can all profit from the situation in which we find ourselves.
translations.chinese: 我觉得咱们可以各退一步。

translations.english: My men will not attack you, if you will lower your weapons.
translations.chinese: 如果你放下武器，我的人是不会攻击你的。

translations.english: It's no secret why you're here and you have proven your skill in combat. Let us talk a moment, and no one else needs to die.
translations.chinese: 你来这里已经不是什么秘密了，你在战斗中也证明了自己的实力。我们来谈一谈，不要再有无谓的伤亡了。

translations.english: Stay your hand, warrior!
translations.chinese: 不要动，勇士！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058B37]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I think we can all profit from the situation in which we find ourselves. | ZH: 我觉得咱们可以各退一步。 | SID: 00205B
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: My men will not attack you, if you will lower your weapons. | ZH: 如果你放下武器，我的人是不会攻击你的。 | SID: 00AE86
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: It's no secret why you're here and you have proven your skill in combat. Let us talk a moment, and no one else needs to die. | ZH: 你来这里已经不是什么秘密了，你在战斗中也证明了自己的实力。我们来谈一谈，不要再有无谓的伤亡了。 | SID: 00C254
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Stay your hand, warrior! | ZH: 不要动，勇士！ | SID: 00C255

translations.english: And as for you, I owe you a portion of the reward, don't I?
translations.chinese: 至于你，我还欠你一份报酬，对吧？

translations.english: Not on the way back. Once she gets there, it's not up to me to decide what's done with her.
translations.chinese: 在回去的路上是不会的。但等她到了那里，就不是由我来决定了。

translations.english: Well, here you go. Spend it wisely, and if I may... Don't allow yourself to be fooled by a pretty face. You're better than that.
translations.chinese: 好了，给你。好好用吧，如果可以的话……不要被漂亮脸蛋儿给迷惑了。你不是那种人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058B38]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And as for you, I owe you a portion of the reward, don't I? | ZH: 至于你，我还欠你一份报酬，对吧？ | SID: 00AEA2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not on the way back. Once she gets there, it's not up to me to decide what's done with her. | ZH: 在回去的路上是不会的。但等她到了那里，就不是由我来决定了。 | SID: 00BF41
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Well, here you go. Spend it wisely, and if I may... Don't allow yourself to be fooled by a pretty face. You're better than that. | ZH: 好了，给你。好好用吧，如果可以的话……不要被漂亮脸蛋儿给迷惑了。你不是那种人。 | SID: 00C250

translations.english: Now, we'll take our friend here back to Hammerfell, where she will pay the price for her treason.
translations.chinese: 现在，得带着这位朋友回落锤了，在那里她要为叛国罪付出代价。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058B39]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now, we'll take our friend here back to Hammerfell, where she will pay the price for her treason. | ZH: 现在，得带着这位朋友回落锤了，在那里她要为叛国罪付出代价。 | SID: 00C24B

translations.english: Irgnir, get a hold of yourself. They're just dreams. Please tell her, Erandur.
translations.chinese: 伊格涅尔，自制一点。依兰杜尔，快告诉她这就是梦罢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C43]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Irgnir, get a hold of yourself. They're just dreams. Please tell her, Erandur. | ZH: 伊格涅尔，自制一点。依兰杜尔，快告诉她这就是梦罢了。 | SID: 009320

translations.english: It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you!
translations.chinese: 同一个梦一遍遍重复。你觉得这正常？我告诉你，这是邪祟！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C44]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's the same dream over and over again. You think that's normal? It's evil I tell you! | ZH: 同一个梦一遍遍重复。你觉得这正常？我告诉你，这是邪祟！ | SID: 00B235

translations.english: Erandur, she has a point. You keep telling us no harm will follow these dreams, but they must be an omen.
translations.chinese: 依兰杜尔，她说的也有道理。你一直说我们不会被梦伤害，但那肯定是什么预兆。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C45]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Erandur, she has a point. You keep telling us no harm will follow these dreams, but they must be an omen. | ZH: 依兰杜尔，她说的也有道理。你一直说我们不会被梦伤害，但那肯定是什么预兆。 | SID: 00C244

translations.english: I... I will. Thank you...
translations.chinese: 我……我会的。谢谢你……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C46]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I... I will. Thank you... | ZH: 我……我会的。谢谢你…… | SID: 00FB8E

translations.english: It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town.
translations.chinese: 这是诅咒！一定是的！我得离开这个镇子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C47]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a curse! It has to be! I've got to get out of this town. | ZH: 这是诅咒！一定是的！我得离开这个镇子。 | SID: 00C243

translations.english: No. I don't have anything for bad dreams, so don't ask.
translations.chinese: 不。我不想再谈噩梦的事了，别再问了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C48]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No. I don't have anything for bad dreams, so don't ask. | ZH: 不。我不想再谈噩梦的事了，别再问了。 | SID: 00F368

translations.english: Lady Mara will save us from these nightmares. You'll see.
translations.chinese: 玛拉女士会把我们从噩梦中拯救出来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lady Mara will save us from these nightmares. You'll see. | ZH: 玛拉女士会把我们从噩梦中拯救出来。 | SID: 007117

translations.english: Can't sleep well no matter how much drink I put in me.
translations.chinese: 不管喝多少酒就都睡不踏实。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't sleep well no matter how much drink I put in me. | ZH: 不管喝多少酒就都睡不踏实。 | SID: 006B36

translations.english: I envy you travelers. Dreams aren't affecting anyone not from here.
translations.chinese: 真羡慕你们这些旅行者。噩梦影响不到你们这些外来者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I envy you travelers. Dreams aren't affecting anyone not from here. | ZH: 真羡慕你们这些旅行者。噩梦影响不到你们这些外来者。 | SID: 001B3E

translations.english: If you're here about the nightmares, I'm afraid my pleas to the College of Winterhold go unheard.
translations.chinese: 如果你是为噩梦的事情而来，恐怕我向冬堡学院的请求至今无人理睬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you're here about the nightmares, I'm afraid my pleas to the College of Winterhold go unheard. | ZH: 如果你是为噩梦的事情而来，恐怕我向冬堡学院的请求至今无人理睬。 | SID: 00EFF5

translations.english: Seems like no one is getting a decent night's rest in Dawnstar, stranger. Best buy your steel and move on.
translations.chinese: 晨星城没人睡过安生觉，陌生人。你买完装备最好赶紧走吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Seems like no one is getting a decent night's rest in Dawnstar, stranger. Best buy your steel and move on. | ZH: 晨星城没人睡过安生觉，陌生人。你买完装备最好赶紧走吧。 | SID: 00F1C4

translations.english: Unless you're here to solve this nightmare problem, I don't need you.
translations.chinese: 除非你是来解决噩梦问题，否则我用不上你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unless you're here to solve this nightmare problem, I don't need you. | ZH: 除非你是来解决噩梦问题，否则我用不上你。 | SID: 00F1BC

translations.english: Need a room? Don't worry. Nightmares don't seem to happen for travelers.
translations.chinese: 需要房间吗？别担心，旅行者好像不会做噩梦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C4F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Need a room? Don't worry. Nightmares don't seem to happen for travelers. | ZH: 需要房间吗？别担心，旅行者好像不会做噩梦。 | SID: 008323

translations.english: You come to Dawnstar at a bad time. Tempers are... fiery.
translations.chinese: 你来晨星的时机不好。大家脾气都很……暴躁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00058C52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You come to Dawnstar at a bad time. Tempers are... fiery. | ZH: 你来晨星的时机不好。大家脾气都很……暴躁。 | SID: 00F28E

translations.english: I don't know how you made it this far, but you'll go no farther.

translations.english: Skyrim will not bow to a false king any longer. Ulfric is the true king.
translations.chinese: 天际不会再向伪王俯首了。乌弗瑞克才是真正的王。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A30E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Skyrim will not bow to a false king any longer. Ulfric is the true king. | ZH: 天际不会再向伪王俯首了。乌弗瑞克才是真正的王。 | SID: 0095A4

translations.english: The tenacity of the Imperial Legion is legendary. We need to be ready for them.
translations.chinese: 帝国军团素以坚韧著称。我们得做好准备。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A30F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The tenacity of the Imperial Legion is legendary. We need to be ready for them. | ZH: 帝国军团素以坚韧著称。我们得做好准备。 | SID: 00E743

translations.english: Oh, it's just wonderful being Skald's servant. He's not demanding in the least.
translations.chinese: 哦，当斯卡德的仆人真是太好了。他可是一点也不苛刻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A310]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, it's just wonderful being Skald's servant. He's not demanding in the least. | ZH: 哦，当斯卡德的仆人真是太好了。他可是一点也不苛刻。 | SID: 001363

translations.english: I had hoped life would be simpler here, but war seems to find a way of following me.
translations.chinese: 我本希望这里的生活会简单些，但战争似乎总会追上我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A311]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I had hoped life would be simpler here, but war seems to find a way of following me. | ZH: 我本希望这里的生活会简单些，但战争似乎总会追上我。 | SID: 0059A7

translations.english: Like inside the Night Mother's coffin.
translations.chinese: 比如，夜母的棺材里。

translations.english: Dear brother, I need you to steal into that chamber, and eavesdrop on their meeting.
translations.chinese: 亲爱的兄弟，我需要你偷偷溜进房间，偷听他们的会面。

translations.english: It'll be no use clinging to the shadows. They'll see you for sure. No, you need a hiding place. Somewhere they'd never think to look.
translations.chinese: 隐藏在阴影里没用。他们一定会看到你。所以你需要一个藏身之处。一个他们从没想过要查看的地方。

translations.english: What do you want me to do?
translations.chinese: 你想让我做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A409]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Like inside the Night Mother's coffin. | ZH: 比如，夜母的棺材里。 | SID: 0029A8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Dear brother, I need you to steal into that chamber, and eavesdrop on their meeting. | ZH: 亲爱的兄弟，我需要你偷偷溜进房间，偷听他们的会面。 | SID: 007EBC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It'll be no use clinging to the shadows. They'll see you for sure. No, you need a hiding place. Somewhere they'd never think to look. | ZH: 隐藏在阴影里没用。他们一定会看到你。所以你需要一个藏身之处。一个他们从没想过要查看的地方。 | SID: 00C1AF
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What do you want me to do? | ZH: 你想让我做什么？ | SID: 00111C

translations.english: Our order will not forget your deeds.
translations.chinese: 我们教团不会忘记你的贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A40F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Our order will not forget your deeds. | ZH: 我们教团不会忘记你的贡献。 | SID: 008FD0

translations.english: You have done the world a great service.
translations.chinese: 你为世界做出了巨大的贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A410]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have done the world a great service. | ZH: 你为世界做出了巨大的贡献。 | SID: 00B082

translations.english: You... you were at Helgen. One of the prisoners. What makes you think I'm interested in someone like you for the Legion?
translations.chinese: 你……你是在海尔根的囚犯。你凭什么觉得我会对你这种人加入军团感兴趣？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You... you were at Helgen. One of the prisoners. What makes you think I'm interested in someone like you for the Legion? | ZH: 你……你是在海尔根的囚犯。你凭什么觉得我会对你这种人加入军团感兴趣？ | SID: 00C198

translations.english: Are you now? You were at Helgen, one of the prisoners. Although no one seems to know how you got mixed up in that affair.
translations.chinese: 你吗？我记得你当时也是海尔根的囚犯吧。不过好像没人知道你为什么被抓。

translations.english: So what do you have to say for yourself? How can I be sure you're not an Imperial spy?
translations.chinese: 有什么要说的吗？我如何鉴别你是不是帝国奸细？

translations.english: But I've had some disturbing reports of you... seen talking to General Tullius in Castle Dour, for example.
translations.chinese: 但我也听说了一些令人不安的情报……比如你在阴郁堡与图留斯将军的对话。

translations.english: Normally, I would have welcomed someone like you -- resourceful, clearly no friend of the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我通常都会欢迎你这样聪明能干、反对帝国的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Are you now? You were at Helgen, one of the prisoners. Although no one seems to know how you got mixed up in that affair. | ZH: 你吗？我记得你当时也是海尔根的囚犯吧。不过好像没人知道你为什么被抓。 | SID: 0015EE
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: So what do you have to say for yourself? How can I be sure you're not an Imperial spy? | ZH: 有什么要说的吗？我如何鉴别你是不是帝国奸细？ | SID: 009F0B
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But I've had some disturbing reports of you... seen talking to General Tullius in Castle Dour, for example. | ZH: 但我也听说了一些令人不安的情报……比如你在阴郁堡与图留斯将军的对话。 | SID: 00C194
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Normally, I would have welcomed someone like you -- resourceful, clearly no friend of the Empire. | ZH: 我通常都会欢迎你这样聪明能干、反对帝国的人。 | SID: 00C728

translations.english: Well... you did show remarkable initiative. And you didn't have to bring the crown to me...
translations.chinese: 嗯……你确实够主动。不然你也不会把王冠带给我……

translations.english: You can prove your new allegiance to me, by delivering an important message to the Jarl of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 你要向我证明自己的忠诚。去给白漫领主传递一个重要信息。

translations.english: But let me warn you - joining the Legion is for life. Any previous loyalties... I trust we understand each other.
translations.chinese: 但我要警告你，加入军团是一辈子的事儿。以前效忠的都不作数了……我觉得咱们能彼此理解。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well... you did show remarkable initiative. And you didn't have to bring the crown to me... | ZH: 嗯……你确实够主动。不然你也不会把王冠带给我…… | SID: 006219
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You can prove your new allegiance to me, by delivering an important message to the Jarl of Whiterun. | ZH: 你要向我证明自己的忠诚。去给白漫领主传递一个重要信息。 | SID: 009B4F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But let me warn you - joining the Legion is for life. Any previous loyalties... I trust we understand each other. | ZH: 但我要警告你，加入军团是一辈子的事儿。以前效忠的都不作数了……我觉得咱们能彼此理解。 | SID: 00D3FF

translations.english: You'd do well to get out of here before I change my mind and have you locked in irons...
translations.chinese: 在我改变主意把你锁起来前，最好赶紧离开……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6A9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd do well to get out of here before I change my mind and have you locked in irons... | ZH: 在我改变主意把你锁起来前，最好赶紧离开…… | SID: 001501

translations.english: You... what? How could you possibly...
translations.chinese: 你……什么？怎么可能……

translations.english: Oh, so you're trying to play both sides, is that it? What do you really want?
translations.chinese: 哦，你是想耍两面派不成？你到底想要什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You... what? How could you possibly... | ZH: 你……什么？怎么可能…… | SID: 007BC5
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh, so you're trying to play both sides, is that it? What do you really want? | ZH: 哦，你是想耍两面派不成？你到底想要什么？ | SID: 00C19B

translations.english: Now, to prove yourself to me, I have a task for you. Take my axe, and deliver it to the Jarl of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 现在，为了证明自己，我有个任务交给你办。把我的斧头交给白漫领主。

translations.english: Why would Tullius waste resources getting the crown only to give it to me? Poisoned perhaps? No. He's not that cunning.
translations.chinese: 图留斯干什么费这么大力气抢完王冠又送给我？想下毒吗？不对。他没那么狡猾。

translations.english: Alright. I believe you. You aren't the first to turn away from the Empire in disgust.
translations.chinese: 好吧。我信你。你不是第一个讨厌地离开帝国的。

translations.english: You're not short of guts, are you? What's your game?
translations.chinese: 你很勇敢啊？你在玩什么把戏？

translations.english: But remember - you're one of us now, forever. Whatever Imperial loyalties you may have had... that's all in the past, forgotten.
translations.chinese: 但记住，你从今往后都是是我们的一员。不管你对帝国多忠诚，那都是过去的事，忘了吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: Why would Tullius waste resources getting the crown only to give it to me? Poisoned perhaps? No. He's not that cunning. | ZH: 图留斯干什么费这么大力气抢完王冠又送给我？想下毒吗？不对。他没那么狡猾。 | SID: 008859

translations.english: The Imperials wouldn't have just let you walk away. Remember that.
translations.chinese: 记住，帝国军是不会这么放过你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6B7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Imperials wouldn't have just let you walk away. Remember that. | ZH: 记住，帝国军是不会这么放过你的。 | SID: 009772

translations.english: So you as good as admit you're working for the Imperials. Yet you walk in here, and ask to join me. What are you playing at?
translations.chinese: 那你算是承认自己为帝国人工作了。现在却又来要求加入我。你在耍什么把戏？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A6B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So you as good as admit you're working for the Imperials. Yet you walk in here, and ask to join me. What are you playing at? | ZH: 那你算是承认自己为帝国人工作了。现在却又来要求加入我。你在耍什么把戏？ | SID: 0032D9

translations.english: I suppose. But what about the old man? Son killed, family name ruined... and he acts as if nothing even happened. Think he's even fit for duty?
translations.chinese: 我知道。但那老头怎么办？儿子被杀了，家族声誉也毁了……他居然像个没事人似的。你觉得他能好好尽职吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A864]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I suppose. But what about the old man? Son killed, family name ruined... and he acts as if nothing even happened. Think he's even fit for duty? | ZH: 我知道。但那老头怎么办？儿子被杀了，家族声誉也毁了……他居然像个没事人似的。你觉得他能好好尽职吗？ | SID: 00C18F

translations.english: I'm going to pretend I didn't hear that. Commander Maro is the best the Penitus Oculatus has ever produced. You should be half the man he is.
translations.chinese: 我可不愿意听这话。马洛指挥官是洞察眼建立以来最优秀的。你还不如他一半爷们儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A865]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm going to pretend I didn't hear that. Commander Maro is the best the Penitus Oculatus has ever produced. You should be half the man he is. | ZH: 我可不愿意听这话。马洛指挥官是洞察眼建立以来最优秀的。你还不如他一半爷们儿。 | SID: 005C4D

translations.english: You misunderstand. It's just... I feel for him, is all. To carry a weight like that. It's got to take its toll. That happened to me, I'd be a wreck.
translations.chinese: 你误会了。我只是……很同情他，仅此而已。背负这么多，人是会伤的。要换我，早就垮了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A866]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You misunderstand. It's just... I feel for him, is all. To carry a weight like that. It's got to take its toll. That happened to me, I'd be a wreck. | ZH: 你误会了。我只是……很同情他，仅此而已。背负这么多，人是会伤的。要换我，早就垮了。 | SID: 00B13D

translations.english: This city is crawling with Imperial Legion, and you know what? I'm still nervous.
translations.chinese: 你知道吗，这座城里到处都是帝国军团的人。我还是很紧张。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A867]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This city is crawling with Imperial Legion, and you know what? I'm still nervous. | ZH: 你知道吗，这座城里到处都是帝国军团的人。我还是很紧张。 | SID: 0080FF

translations.english: All these damn Stormcloaks. They're making me nervous. Never in a million years did I imagine they'd gain control of Solitude.
translations.chinese: 这些该死的风暴斗篷。他们让我很紧张。我从没想过他们能够控制独孤城。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A868]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All these damn Stormcloaks. They're making me nervous. Never in a million years did I imagine they'd gain control of Solitude. | ZH: 这些该死的风暴斗篷。他们让我很紧张。我从没想过他们能够控制独孤城。 | SID: 00F0C5

translations.english: Lazy and useless, the lot of them. They can't even keep the Stormcloaks in line. No way I trust them with the Emperor's life.
translations.chinese: 这群人又懒又没用。连风暴斗篷都制不住。我怎么放心把陛下的身家性命交给他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A86B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lazy and useless, the lot of them. They can't even keep the Stormcloaks in line. No way I trust them with the Emperor's life. | ZH: 这群人又懒又没用。连风暴斗篷都制不住。我怎么放心把陛下的身家性命交给他们。 | SID: 00331A

translations.english: I'm all for diplomacy, but the sooner the Emperor deals with this civil war mess, the sooner we can get back to Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 我赞成外交，但皇帝越快处理好内战问题，我们就能越早回到希罗帝尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A86C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm all for diplomacy, but the sooner the Emperor deals with this civil war mess, the sooner we can get back to Cyrodiil. | ZH: 我赞成外交，但皇帝越快处理好内战问题，我们就能越早回到希罗帝尔。 | SID: 00E283

translations.english: You worry too much. The Emperor's never been safer. You think assassination attempts are planned overnight? We discovered the plot. End of threat.
translations.chinese: 你多虑了。皇帝从没有过现在这么安全的时候。你觉得暗杀计划是一夜就能想好的吗？我们已经发现了阴谋，终结了威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005A86D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You worry too much. The Emperor's never been safer. You think assassination attempts are planned overnight? We discovered the plot. End of threat. | ZH: 你多虑了。皇帝从没有过现在这么安全的时候。你觉得暗杀计划是一夜就能想好的吗？我们已经发现了阴谋，终结了威胁。 | SID: 005D90

translations.english: I'm afraid so. There's a problem with one of the Jarls here in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 恐怕是的。天际有位领主有点麻烦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE8B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid so. There's a problem with one of the Jarls here in Skyrim. | ZH: 恐怕是的。天际有位领主有点麻烦。 | SID: 00179C

translations.english: Well, that's good to know. I suggest you tell your people at the College to keep a tighter leash on their mages.
translations.chinese: 好，这是好消息。我建议你告诉你们学院的人，要对自己的法师严加管教。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE8C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, that's good to know. I suggest you tell your people at the College to keep a tighter leash on their mages. | ZH: 好，这是好消息。我建议你告诉你们学院的人，要对自己的法师严加管教。 | SID: 006730

translations.english: We have, of course, severed all ties with the mage in question, but the Jarl isn't appeased.
translations.chinese: 当然，我们已经切断了与法师的所有联系，但领主还没消气。

translations.english: So, the mage needs to be "taken care of," if you understand me.
translations.chinese: 所以，法师需要被“照顾”，明白吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE8D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We have, of course, severed all ties with the mage in question, but the Jarl isn't appeased. | ZH: 当然，我们已经切断了与法师的所有联系，但领主还没消气。 | SID: 0008C0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So, the mage needs to be "taken care of," if you understand me. | ZH: 所以，法师需要被“照顾”，明白吧。 | SID: 0077CB

translations.english: Ah, so they've finally sent someone to deal with that lunatic.
translations.chinese: 哦，这么说他们终于派人来对付那个疯子了。

translations.english: Well, is it taken care of?
translations.chinese: 好了，处理了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE8E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, so they've finally sent someone to deal with that lunatic. | ZH: 哦，这么说他们终于派人来对付那个疯子了。 | SID: 001C50
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, is it taken care of? | ZH: 好了，处理了吗？ | SID: 00A161

translations.english: He's been complaining of a member of the College running amok in his hold.
translations.chinese: 他一直在抱怨有个学院成员在自己的领地上乱跑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE8F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's been complaining of a member of the College running amok in his hold. | ZH: 他一直在抱怨有个学院成员在自己的领地上乱跑。 | SID: 00461B

translations.english: She's been complaining of a member of the College running amok in her hold.
translations.chinese: 她一直在抱怨有个学院成员在自己的领地上乱跑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE90]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's been complaining of a member of the College running amok in her hold. | ZH: 她一直在抱怨有个学院成员在自己的领地上乱跑。 | SID: 00C188

translations.english: All of us possess untapped abilities; the potential to wield great power, securely sealed within our minds.
translations.chinese: 我们都有未开发出来的潜力，拥有强大的潜能，只不过被牢牢封存在脑海里。

translations.english: Well, yes. But the Key isn't only restricted to physical barriers.
translations.chinese: 嗯，没错。但并不仅限于物理意义上的障碍。

translations.english: Once you realize the Key can access these traits, the potential becomes limitless.
translations.chinese: 一旦你意识到钥匙激发这些特质，潜力也就变得无限。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005AE9D]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 这样一来，我们与诺克图娜尔的联系就被破坏了，运气也逐渐枯竭。

translations.english: I do. Sadly, I'm one of the few traditional Saxhleel Jewelers that remains in Tamriel; it's becoming a lost art.
translations.chinese: 是的。遗憾的是，我已经是泰姆瑞尔为数不多的传统萨克希尔珠宝匠人了，这门艺术快要失传了。

translations.english: Only trouble is gathering materials has become hazardous. The roads to the mines and to the other cities are thick with bandits... and worse.
translations.chinese: 唯一的麻烦就是收集材料越来越危险了。通往矿山和其他城市的路上挤满了强盗……甚至更糟。

translations.english: Would you be interested in gathering some materials for me? I'd certainly be happy to compensate you.
translations.chinese: 你有兴趣帮我收集些材料吗？当然，我很乐意为此补偿你。

translations.chinese: 他一直滔滔不绝说因甘在炼金术方面很有天赋。但他永远不会当着她面说，这就是他的做法。

translations.english: I just think Elgrim's taken it upon himself to mentor the young thing so he focuses a lot of attention on her.
translations.chinese: 我只是觉得艾尔格瑞姆承担了指导这孩子的责任，所以把很多注意力都放在了她身上而已。

translations.english: Oh! No, I didn't mean it that way. Elgrim can barely put his on his own shoes let alone have the energy to pursue a young girl.

translations.english: Then right before the spiders had moved in, we found that chunk of ore. Never seen anything like it.
translations.chinese: 就在蜘蛛搬进去之前，我们发现了那块矿石，从来没见过这样的东西。

translations.english: Redbelly is supposed to be nothing but an iron mine. Been working it for years.
translations.chinese: 红腹矿场只是个铁矿，我已经挖了很多年了。

translations.chinese: 帝国想要我们变成他们的奴隶，一如他们变成了梭默的奴隶。我无论生死，都绝不会像奴隶一样。

translations.chinese: 无数亡者萦绕着无数不眠之夜……等天际重归统一，我或许也能去安息了。

translations.chinese: 当我们从帝国手中夺回家园，就去和梭默战斗。他们无疑才是真正的敌人。
