translations.chinese: 如果乌弗瑞克会信任别人在这儿胡出主意，那我肯定就会跟你们出去一起打仗了。

translations.english: Wait just one moment...
translations.chinese: 等下……

translations.english: Buy it? This? An Elder Council amulet?
translations.chinese: 买下？这个？元老院护符？

translations.english: You bring that back to your lovely mistress. With my regards.
translations.chinese: 把这个给你那可爱的女主人吧。顺便帮我问好。

translations.english: Here. It's a letter of credit. Usable, by Astrid only, for any service or item I can provide. As per our standard arrangement.
translations.chinese: 来，这是信用凭证。只有阿斯垂德能用，可以从我这儿换取物品或服务。按照我们协议的标准来。

translations.english: Oh yes. Oh yes, indeed.
translations.chinese: 哦，没错没错。确实。

translations.english: Will you buy it?
translations.chinese: 你愿意买下吗？

translations.english: Was Mallory willing to buy the amulet?
translations.chinese: 马洛里愿意收购护符吗？

translations.english: Oh, now that explains quite a bit. Motierre, you naughty, naughty boy. Hiring the Dark Brotherhood to help you rise beyond your station. Delicious.
translations.chinese: 哦，这样就清楚了。莫提雷这个淘气的孩子，想要雇佣黑暗兄弟会来帮助自己提高地位。好想法。

translations.english: The Elder Council...
translations.chinese: 元老院……

translations.english: Yes, and specially made for members of the Elder Council.
translations.chinese: 没错，而且是专门为元老院成员预备的。

translations.english: Look, it ain't my business ta tell the Dark Brotherhood its business, but if you killed a member of the Elder Council, you'd better belie-
translations.chinese: 听着，告诉黑暗兄弟会我可不想沾包，要是你杀了元老院成员，最好别……

translations.english: Where oh where did you get this? Don't answer - I don't want to know.
translations.chinese: 你从哪儿弄来的？别回答，我不想知道。

translations.english: This is an amulet of the Emperor's Elder Council. Specially crafted for each member. Worth a small fortune. Ain't somethin' you'd give up lightly.
translations.chinese: 这是皇帝的元老院成员们佩戴的特制护符。值不少钱。不是轻易能拿出手的。

translations.english: Let's see...
translations.chinese: 看一下……

translations.english: What can you tell me about this? (Give Delvin the amulet)
translations.chinese: 关于这个你能告诉我什么？（把护符交给戴尔文）

translations.english: Good, you're back. Well, what did Mallory have to say? Is the amulet authentic?
translations.chinese: 好，你回来了。马洛里怎么说？这个护符靠谱么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005B493]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good, you're back. Well, what did Mallory have to say? Is the amulet authentic? | ZH: 好，你回来了。马洛里怎么说？这个护符靠谱么？ | SID: 010E25

translations.english: So, uh... how is Astrid doing' these days? Tell her to stop by some time. We can have a drink. Catch up.
translations.chinese: 所以，呃……阿斯垂德最近如何？告诉她可以抽空来一趟。我们可以一起喝一杯。

translations.english: Ah, but business! Of course. What kind of business?
translations.chinese: 哦，还是先说业务吧！当然可以。什么业务？

translations.english: Well, you're makin' friends all over, ain't ya?
translations.chinese: 看来你的交际很广啊？

translations.english: Oh. Oh I see.
translations.chinese: 哦，我明白。

translations.english: Actually, I'm here on Dark Brotherhood business.
translations.chinese: 其实，我是为黑暗兄弟会跑业务来的。

translations.english: Oh. Oh I see.
translations.chinese: 哦，我明白。

translations.english: Well now, how is Astrid doin' these days, uh? Tell her to stop by some time. We can have a drink. Catch up.

translations.english: The Dark Brotherhood requires your services.
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会需要你的帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005B495]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Ah, but we can discuss that later, yeah? What does the Brotherhood need? | ZH: 哦，还是先说业务，对吧？黑暗兄弟会想要些什么？ | SID: 0033AB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh. Oh I see. | ZH: 哦，我明白。 | SID: 00C6CD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well now, how is Astrid doin' these days, uh? Tell her to stop by some time. We can have a drink. Catch up. | ZH: 说吧，阿斯垂德最近如何？告诉她可以抽空来一趟。我们可以一起喝一杯。 | SID: 00ED6C
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Dark Brotherhood requires your services. | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会需要你的帮助。 | SID: 0049B5

translations.english: Somethin' ya need? Anything for the guild.
translations.chinese: 你需要些什么？为公会什么都行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005B496]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Somethin' ya need? Anything for the guild. | ZH: 你需要些什么？为公会什么都行。 | SID: 000C60

translations.english: Ah, now you must be lost. Best ya scurry off while you're able. The Ratway, well, it has a habit of swallowin' up the uninvited.
translations.chinese: 啊，你一定是迷路了。最好还是趁早离开吧。鼠道，嗯，有个习惯，就是把不请自来的人吞下去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Poor Cicero. Dear Cicero. Such a humble servant. But he will never hear my voice. For he is not the Listener.
translations.chinese: 可怜的西塞罗。亲爱的西塞罗。真是个谦卑的好仆人。但他永远听不到我的声音。因为他不是聆听者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005B5C4]

translations.english: Rexus. The items.
translations.chinese: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005BF26]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Rexus. The items. | ZH: 雷萨斯。东西拿来。 | SID: 001CCE

translations.english: Oh, Rexus is no mere servant. He has been with the Motierre family since I was a child. I trust the man with my life.
translations.chinese: 哦，雷萨斯不只是个仆从。我还是个孩子时他就在莫提雷家了。他值得我托付性命。

translations.english: You can trust your servant to keep this secret?
translations.chinese: 你相信你的仆从会保守秘密吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005BF27]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, Rexus is no mere servant. He has been with the Motierre family since I was a child. I trust the man with my life. | ZH: 哦，雷萨斯不只是个仆从。我还是个孩子时他就在莫提雷家了。他值得我托付性命。 | SID: 00BBBF
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You can trust your servant to keep this secret? | ZH: 你相信你的仆从会保守秘密吗？ | SID: 00C081

translations.english: I have vowed to serve Amaund Motierre until my dying breath. Best remember that.
translations.chinese: 我发誓要效忠于阿蒙德·莫提雷，直到最后一刻。记住了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005BF28]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have vowed to serve Amaund Motierre until my dying breath. Best remember that. | ZH: 我发誓要效忠于阿蒙德·莫提雷，直到最后一刻。记住了。 | SID: 00C07F

translations.english: Here.
translations.chinese: 给。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005BF29]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Here. | ZH: 给。 | SID: 00A75E

translations.english: The Jarl trusts few, and they will be his undoing. The dark child knows of what I speak.
translations.chinese: 领主信任之人少之又少，但就是他们会把他置于死地。那个阴暗的孩子明白我说的是什么。

translations.english: Let him guide your path.
translations.chinese: 让他给你引路。

translations.english: The whole of Whiterun is ripe with paranoia and tensions. The Jarl's court is right to fear the power I hold behind this door.
translations.chinese: 整个白漫城充满了偏执和紧张。也难怪领主宫廷畏惧我隐藏在门后的力量。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005BF36]

translations.english: I hope you're just playing dumb. I'm the one who left the note in Ustengrav.
translations.chinese: 真希望你只是在装傻。是我在乌斯滕格拉留的字条。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C2FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you're just playing dumb. I'm the one who left the note in Ustengrav. | ZH: 真希望你只是在装傻。是我在乌斯滕格拉留的字条。 | SID: 000B9D

translations.english: But that isn't important right now. What is important is that you might be Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 但现在当务之急是，你到底是不是龙裔。

translations.english: Yes. We're very old enemies. And if my suspicions are correct, they might have something to do with the dragons returning.
translations.chinese: 没错。我们是老对手了。如果我猜的没错，龙族回归就和他们有关。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Good. The whole point of being in hiding is to appear to be someone you're not.
translations.chinese: 很好。藏起来就是为了让自己看上去和原先不一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C2FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. The whole point of being in hiding is to appear to be someone you're not. | ZH: 很好。藏起来就是为了让自己看上去和原先不一样。 | SID: 00C07B

translations.english: Speak, if you have aught to say worth the listening.
translations.chinese: 说吧，如果有什么值得一听的，就说出来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C302]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Speak, if you have aught to say worth the listening. | ZH: 说吧，如果有什么值得一听的，就说出来吧。 | SID: 0075DD

translations.english: And finally, there's the matter of the Patronage that Elisif wanted me to give you.
translations.chinese: 最后，艾利西弗希望我转交你这些赏赐。

translations.english: What's more, Elisif has declared the Burning of King Olaf should become a weekly event.
translations.chinese: 更重要的是，艾利西弗宣布火烧奥拉夫应该成为每周都举办的活动。

translations.english: Due to your adventurous nature several of the college professors have some things they wish you to do.
translations.chinese: 鉴于你的冒险精神，有些学院教授希望你帮些忙。

translations.english: Yes. Congratulations, you are now a full-fledged member of the Bards College.
translations.chinese: 没错。恭喜，你现在是吟游诗人学院的正式成员了。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: What's more, Elisif has declared the Burning of King Olaf should become a weekly event. | ZH: 更重要的是，艾利西弗宣布火烧奥拉夫应该成为每周都举办的活动。 | SID: 00C070
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Due to your adventurous nature several of the college professors have some things they wish you to do. | ZH: 鉴于你的冒险精神，有些学院教授希望你帮些忙。 | SID: 00C072
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yes. Congratulations, you are now a full-fledged member of the Bards College. | ZH: 没错。恭喜，你现在是吟游诗人学院的正式成员了。 | SID: 00C073

translations.english: Not many come to see me. What do you want?
translations.chinese: 很少有人来拜访我。你有何贵干？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C61F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not many come to see me. What do you want? | ZH: 很少有人来拜访我。你有何贵干？ | SID: 005626

translations.english: I have met Daedra and Dwemer and everything in between and I know enough to see a vampire where others would see a man.
translations.chinese: 我甚至在其中见过迪德拉和锻莫，而别人看着像人的，我却能认出是吸血鬼。

translations.english: I know many things. I have studied things beyond the reach of most humans, traveled the Oblivion planes, seen things one should not see.
translations.chinese: 我是懂得不少。我研究过大多数人没接触过的东西，也曾在湮灭位面旅行，见过很多不该见的东西。

translations.english: I've heard you're an expert in vampirism.
translations.chinese: 我听说你是研究吸血鬼的专家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C620]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I know many things. I have studied things beyond the reach of most humans, traveled the Oblivion planes, seen things one should not see. | ZH: 我是懂得不少。我研究过大多数人没接触过的东西，也曾在湮灭位面旅行，见过很多不该见的东西。 | SID: 00C078
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've heard you're an expert in vampirism. | ZH: 我听说你是研究吸血鬼的专家。 | SID: 00C077

translations.english: Great. Looks like you'll be one of us soon. We'll gather outside the College for the Burning of King Olaf.
translations.chinese: 太好了。看来你很快就要加入我们了。咱们在学院外面会合，准备火烧奥拉夫王。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C621]
Translations:

translations.english: Ah the bard-to-be. Did Viarmo send you?
translations.chinese: 啊，是准吟游诗人啊。维阿墨派你来的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C622]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah the bard-to-be. Did Viarmo send you? | ZH: 啊，是准吟游诗人啊。维阿墨派你来的？ | SID: 00C074

translations.english: Could you... could you give her this letter, and say it's from Sven? I think I've matched that Nord's lack of cleverness perfectly.
translations.chinese: 你能……你能把这封信给她吗，就说是斯万送去的？我已经尽量用诺德那不太聪明的口吻来写了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C81D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Could you... could you give her this letter, and say it's from Sven? I think I've matched that Nord's lack of cleverness perfectly. | ZH: 你能……你能把这封信给她吗，就说是斯万送去的？我已经尽量用诺德那不太聪明的口吻来写了。 | SID: 00C01F

translations.english: I appreciate your help. Please, take this. Some gold I've saved up from working at the mill.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的帮助。拿着吧。这是我在木材厂工作攒的钱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C81E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I appreciate your help. Please, take this. Some gold I've saved up from working at the mill. | ZH: 感谢你的帮助。拿着吧。这是我在木材厂工作攒的钱。 | SID: 00C04A

translations.english: Here. Give this letter to Camilla and tell her it's from Sven. Let's see what she thinks of him after reading that.
translations.chinese: 给，把这封信给凯米拉，就说是斯万写的。看看她看完有什么想法。

translations.english: So, he thinks he can turn Camilla against me? Two can play at this.
translations.chinese: 他觉得能让我和凯米拉反目成仇吗？谁不会这手啊。

translations.english: What is that blowhard up to now?
translations.chinese: 那个吹牛大王又在干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C81F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here. Give this letter to Camilla and tell her it's from Sven. Let's see what she thinks of him after reading that. | ZH: 给，把这封信给凯米拉，就说是斯万写的。看看她看完有什么想法。 | SID: 005608
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: So, he thinks he can turn Camilla against me? Two can play at this. | ZH: 他觉得能让我和凯米拉反目成仇吗？谁不会这手啊。 | SID: 00BDF8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: What is that blowhard up to now? | ZH: 那个吹牛大王又在干什么？ | SID: 00C038

translations.english: I've been thinking... maybe Camilla needs a little help seeing Sven for what he is.
translations.chinese: 我一直在想……也许凯米拉需要点帮助才能看清斯万的真面目。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C822]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've been thinking... maybe Camilla needs a little help seeing Sven for what he is. | ZH: 我一直在想……也许凯米拉需要点帮助才能看清斯万的真面目。 | SID: 00294F

translations.english: I've seen him sneaking over to the Riverwood Trader to speak with her when I'm not around. He's wasting his time.
translations.chinese: 我见过他趁我不在偷偷溜进河木镇贸易行跟她聊天。这是浪费时间。

translations.english: Camilla Valerius knows I'm the best man in Riverwood. That elf is kidding himself if he thinks she would choose him over me.
translations.chinese: 凯米拉·瓦勒瑞斯知道我是河木镇最好的男人。如果那个精灵觉得她会选他不是我，那就是自欺欺人了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C823]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've seen him sneaking over to the Riverwood Trader to speak with her when I'm not around. He's wasting his time. | ZH: 我见过他趁我不在偷偷溜进河木镇贸易行跟她聊天。这是浪费时间。 | SID: 006007
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Camilla Valerius knows I'm the best man in Riverwood. That elf is kidding himself if he thinks she would choose him over me. | ZH: 凯米拉·瓦勒瑞斯知道我是河木镇最好的男人。如果那个精灵觉得她会选他不是我，那就是自欺欺人了。 | SID: 00C02E

translations.english: Here, let me give you a particularly venomous letter. Say it's from Faendal. That should get Camilla to stop inviting the elf over.
translations.chinese: 给，我给你一封特别恶毒的信，就说是法恩达尔写的。这样凯米拉就不会再邀请那个精灵了。

translations.english: Is that sarcasm? I've heard better wisecracks from Orgnar.
translations.chinese: 这是讽刺吗？我听奥格那说过比这更好的俏皮话。

translations.english: Still, you have a point. Camilla letting Faendal visit her isn't a good thing for me.
translations.chinese: 不过，你说的有道理。让法恩达尔多看凯米拉对我不是好事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C824]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, let me give you a particularly venomous letter. Say it's from Faendal. That should get Camilla to stop inviting the elf over. | ZH: 给，我给你一封特别恶毒的信，就说是法恩达尔写的。这样凯米拉就不会再邀请那个精灵了。 | SID: 00C032
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Is that sarcasm? I've heard better wisecracks from Orgnar. | ZH: 这是讽刺吗？我听奥格那说过比这更好的俏皮话。 | SID: 00C034

translations.english: Thinks his ballads and sonnets are going to convince Camilla Valerius to marry him. As if she would say "yes."
translations.chinese: 自以为他的民谣和十四行诗就能说服凯米拉·瓦勒瑞斯嫁给他。就跟她会答应似的。

translations.english: An intelligent, beautiful woman like her wouldn't fall for that nonsense... I hope.
translations.chinese: 像她这样聪明漂亮的女人是不会上当的……但愿吧。

translations.english: He's a bard, so he says. Occasionally he finds time to do his job here at the mill.
translations.chinese: 他自称是个吟游诗人，偶尔会抽时间在木材厂干活。

translations.english: I will be back at your house if you need me, Thane.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要我，我就在你家里等着，武卫大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C826]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I will be back at your house if you need me, Thane. | ZH: 如果你需要我，我就在你家里等着，武卫大人。 | SID: 00C05A

translations.english: (whine)
translations.chinese: （呜呜）

translations.english: It's time for you to go back home, dog.
translations.chinese: 狗，你该回家了。

EDID: [0005C827]

translations.english: Looks like you've already got someone with you.
translations.chinese: 你好像已经有人陪着了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Looks like you've already got someone with you. | ZH: 你好像已经有人陪着了。 | SID: 00B0D6

translations.english: Ready to get going?
translations.chinese: 准备好出发了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0005C82B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ready to get going? | ZH: 准备好出发了？ | SID: 001E5D

translations.english: Mara protect us both.
translations.chinese: 玛拉会保佑我们的。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mara protect us both. | ZH: 玛拉会保佑我们的。 | SID: 00C762

translations.english: This is your initiation into the coven. Go ahead. Have the first bite.
translations.chinese: 这是你加入集会的仪式。去吧。尝第一口。

translations.english: You can tell Sven that he already has a mother. I'm not speaking to him anymore.

translations.english: What is this? The elf playing at treachery? Shocking.

translations.chinese: 奥格那。我要去旅行了。我回来前就由你打理旅馆了。

translations.english: I have a contact inside the Embassy. He's not up for this kind of high-risk mission, but he can help you.
translations.chinese: 我在大使馆有个线人。虽然他不会冒险，但可以协助你。

translations.english: While you're doing that, I'll work on getting you an invitation to Elenwen's little party.
translations.chinese: 你去碰头的时候，我会给你弄一张爱琳温宴会的请柬。

translations.english: The Thalmor ambassador, Elenwen, regularly throws parties where the rich and connected cozy up to the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 梭默大使爱琳温经常会请一些豪富和关系户参加宴会。

translations.english: I'll get word for him to meet you in Solitude, at the Winking Skeever -- you know it?
translations.chinese: 我会传话给他。你们俩可以在独孤城的眨眼恶鼠碰头。你认识吗？

translations.english: His name's Malborn. Wood elf, plenty of reason to hate the Thalmor. You can trust him.
translations.chinese: 他叫马伯恩。是个木精灵，有充足的理由恨梭默。你可以信任他。

translations.english: I can get you into one of those parties. Once you're inside the Embassy, you get away and find Elenwen's secret files.
translations.chinese: 我会让你去参加宴会。一旦你混进大使馆，就离开宴会并寻找爱琳温的机密文件。

translations.english: Meet me at the Solitude stables after you've arranged things with Malborn. Any questions?
translations.chinese: 等你跟马伯恩把事安排好以后，到独孤城外的马厩找我。没问题吧？

translations.english: On the other hand, you've weeded out the weak from among those who would deign worship me.
translations.chinese: 话说回来。你把这群弱者从我的信徒中剔除出去。

translations.english: Make a thrall. Lure him to my shrine. Prove your will is stronger. Convince him to embrace the Pillar of Sacrifice, and then slay him without mercy.
translations.chinese: 找一个奴隶，把他引到我的祭坛来。说服他拥抱献祭之柱，然后无情地杀了他，这样，就证明你意志坚强。

translations.english: Do this and I shall remember you and bestow an important task upon you. Do this not, and I shall forget you, and your soul will waste in obscurity.
translations.chinese: 照做，我就会记住你，并把一项重要任务交给你。做不到，我会忘记你，你的灵魂会默默无闻地消散。

translations.english: I have a purpose for which you might prove useful. But first I must test the deftness of your guile, and the strength of your purpose.
translations.chinese: 我有一个目标，或许你能帮上忙。但我必须先测试一下你的狡诈和决心。

translations.english: I abide only those whose will is aligned to my own. Those who oppose my desires perish in the most dreadful of ways.
translations.chinese: 我只会与意志和我一致者同在。那些忤逆我愿者死相凄惨。

translations.english: There's enough real troubles in the world without making new ones up.

translations.chinese: 我们迪德拉比任何神都要强大。在我的兄弟中，属我最为可怕。

translations.english: A god? Assuredly not! When was the last time you saw evidence of Aedra in the world?
translations.chinese: 神？肯定不是！你最后一次看到伊德拉的迹象是什么时候？

translations.chinese: 你是某种神吗？

translations.english: I... I'm sorry I... I got too excited. I'm in the middle of some very... stressful work, and I shouldn't have yelled. How can I help you?
translations.chinese: 哦……抱歉……我太兴奋了。我正在忙一些……压力很大的工作，我不该这么大吼大叫的。有什么需要帮忙的吗？

translations.english: You idiot. Do you even know who I am? The most recognized scholar on the Dwemer in all of Tamriel, and you people keep bothering me!
translations.chinese: 你个白痴，你知道我谁吗？全泰姆瑞尔最著名的锻莫学者，你们这些人就知道打扰我！

translations.chinese: 又是魔法。他们总想要这些。不关注历史。不关注失落种族的奥秘。就知道法术和魔法。

translations.english: Jarl Igmund can refuse to see me all he wants. The Silver-Blood family will be heard.
translations.chinese: 依格蒙德领主可以拒绝见我。但银血家族的意见必然会被听到。

translations.english: There's a war on and you don't know what I'm talking about? The Empire is destroying everything Skyrim stands for.
translations.chinese: 战争正在进行，你不知道我在说什么？帝国正在摧毁天际所代表的一切。

translations.chinese: 我们没有发现任何线索。它好像知道我何时会去那里。

translations.english: If you can get to the bottom of this, the Priesthood of Arkay will reward you. Take my key, and be careful.
translations.chinese: 如果你能弄清这件事，阿尔凯祭司团会酬谢你的。拿着我的钥匙，小心点。

translations.english: We've discovered that some of the dead have been... eaten. Flesh has been chewed off, bones were snapped to get at the marrow inside.
translations.chinese: 我们发现有死者的尸体被……吃了。肉被咬过，骨头被敲碎，里面的骨髓也被吸食了。

translations.chinese: 尼楚安德-泽尔？马卡斯城下的遗迹？我耗费人类两辈子时间研究的大量文物的价值？

translations.english: Finally, someone with decent sense. The Empire is destroying everything Skyrim stands for. Honor. Pride. Mighty Talos.
translations.chinese: 终于找到个有良心的了。帝国正在摧毁天际所代表的一切。荣誉、骄傲、强大的塔洛斯。

translations.english: Jarl Igmund can't ignore us for much longer. Not if the Silver-Blood family has a say.
translations.chinese: 依格蒙德领主不能再忽视我们多久了。只要银血家族发话，他们就得听着。

translations.english: What are you doing here? The excavation site is closed. I don't need any more workers or guards.
translations.chinese: 你在这儿做什么？挖掘现场已经关闭了。我不需要工人和护卫了。

translations.english: If you find a book called "The Last Scabbard of Akrash," could you bring it to me? Tacitus sure isn't learning by example.
translations.chinese: 如果你能找到一本叫《阿卡拉什的最后剑鞘》的书，能带给我吗？塔西佗肯定是不愿意自己学了。

translations.english: Tacitus? Boy's an Imperial. I keep showing him how to treat the iron, but he never gets it.
translations.chinese: 塔西佗？这孩子是个帝国人。我一直在教他怎么处理钢铁，但他不上道。

translations.english: In the Legion, the Imperial smiths used to read books when they couldn't set their hammers straight. Wisdom of the old, I guess.
translations.chinese: 在军团里，如果帝国人铁匠没法把铁锤摆正的时候就会去看书。我猜这是老辈人的智慧吧。

translations.chinese: 你可以告诉依格蒙德领主，银血家族不会再容忍他的懦弱了。

translations.english: It is his shrine people pray to when they visit the Hall. That his divinity will watch over their ancestors on the way to the next life.
translations.chinese: 这是他的神祠，人们可以在拜访大厅时祈祷。他的神性将在他们的祖先进入来世的路上守护他们。

translations.english: Arkay. One of the Eight Divines. God of the Cycle of Birth and Death.
translations.chinese: 阿尔凯。八圣灵之一。生与死轮回之神。

translations.english: He used the Thu'um. Shouted those Forsworn from the walls. Then he led a band of Nord warriors in to take the city.
translations.chinese: 他用了吐'目。朝城墙上的那些弃誓者咆哮。然后带领一群诺德战士占领了城市。

translations.english: Just like Talos himself at the Battle of Old Hroldan, reclaiming the Reach from those heathen natives.
translations.chinese: 就像塔洛斯本人在古霍尔丹战役里那样，从野蛮的原住民手里夺回了瑞驰。

translations.chinese: 书。不知道帝国人为什么很喜欢这些。应该能帮助那孩子吧，玛拉凯斯在上。

translations.english: He's busy forgetting that Ulfric Stormcloak saved this city from the Forsworn. Ulfric's a hero, not a damn criminal.
translations.chinese: 他正忙着忘记乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷从弃誓者手里拯救了这座城市。乌弗瑞克是英雄，不是罪犯。

translations.english: We own Cidhna Mine. Best prison in Skyrim, and source of half the wealth in this city.
translations.chinese: 我们拥有希讷矿场。天际最好的监狱，也是这座城市半数财富的来源。

translations.english: It has languished too long outside the winds of alliance and betrayal.
translations.chinese: 它已经太久没有暴露在外面那分分合合的纷争之风中了。

translations.english: Now, I trust you're sharp enough to see that the sword doesn't match the description of the Ebony Blade you may know.
translations.chinese: 现在，相信你已经看出来，这把剑与你所知的黑檀刃描述不符。

translations.english: For some reason that door is special. Only two people can open it, Balgruuf and Farengar, the court wizard.
translations.chinese: 由于一些原因，那扇门很特别。只有两个人能打开它，巴尔古夫和他的宫廷巫师法仁加。

translations.english: I told you, I know everything about this castle.
translations.chinese: 我告诉过你，这城堡里没我不知道的事。

translations.english: How you get it from them is up to you. Nobody would notice if Farengar went missing, I promise you.
translations.chinese: 如何拿到钥匙随你便。我保证，没人会注意到法仁加失踪了。

translations.english: Do you know how to open the Whispering Door?
translations.chinese: 你知道如何打开低语之门吗？

translations.english: You get killed on account of this thing, it's not my fault. Got it?
translations.chinese: 要是你因为这事儿把小命丢了，可不赖我。明白吗？

translations.english: But, I suppose, if it does actually turn out to be worth something, let me know, will you?
translations.chinese: 但是，我想，如果它真的很值钱，请告诉我一声，好吗？

translations.english: Yeah, it was stupid of me.
translations.chinese: 是啊，我可真傻。

translations.chinese: 我在想什么？就算这是真的，我也不会走进什么充满鬼东西的古墓啊。

translations.english: Some line about this claw thing and Yngol Barrow. He said it was worth more than its weight in gold if I took it back there.
translations.chinese: 关于这个龙爪还有英格尔古坟的事。他说如果我把它拿回去，绝对物超所值。

translations.english: I'm sure you've noticed that Winterhold isn't exactly overflowing with people.

translations.chinese: 我经历过几次失败，做了几笔糟糕的生意，但大部分情况，还是成功了。

translations.chinese: 拜托，问问他她喜欢什么。这是我唯一的机会了。

translations.english: There is one... Yngvar. He's quite popular with the ladies.
translations.chinese: 有一个……英瓦尔。他很受女士们欢迎。

translations.english: Thankfully Faleen is not quite his type, but they've been friends for some time, and he may have some ideas.
translations.chinese: 幸好法琳不是他喜欢的类型，但他们当朋友也有一阵子了，也许他会有主意。

translations.chinese: 黎明会向你走来，孩子。你要带着它的光芒去照亮所有人。

translations.english: Helping out Ainethach, huh? Give me a reason not to plunge a dagger in your chest.
translations.chinese: 想帮艾尼塔克？给我一个不一刀捅死你的理由。

translations.chinese: 不。这是我的土地。你想让我把它交给那些银血暴徒？

translations.english: You haven't heard of the Silver-Blood family? They're the most important people in the Reach.
translations.chinese: 你没听说过银血家族？他们是瑞驰最显赫的人。

translations.english: They practically own the city of Markarth. And we're here on their coin.
translations.chinese: 他们几乎坐拥整个马卡斯城，也是我们的雇主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They practically own the city of Markarth. And we're here on their coin. | ZH: 他们几乎坐拥整个马卡斯城，也是我们的雇主。 | SID: 009EF1

translations.english: Forsworn attacked a while back. Jarl had no men to spare, so the Silver-Bloods generously offered to send us to clean things up.
translations.chinese: 前阵子弃誓者发动过进攻。领主没有多余的人手，所以银血家族很慷慨地派我们去清理。

translations.english: We just want that old native to hand over his land in payment for our services. Then we'll leave, and everyone can get back to work.
translations.chinese: 我们只是想让那个老土著交出自己的土地作为我们服务的报酬。然后我们就走，大家都可以回去工作了。

translations.chinese: 谢谢你。你为我和我的工人们干了件好事。给。这些是给你的。

translations.english: That won't be the last we hear from the Silver-Bloods, but at least we can get back to work.
translations.chinese: 这不会是我们最后一次收到银血家的消息，但至少现在我们可以回去工作了。

translations.english: The Silver-Blood family own half the Reach, and they won't stop until they own all of it.
translations.chinese: 银血家族拥有大半个瑞驰领，他们不占据全部土地是不会罢休的。

translations.chinese: 然后是海姆英，玛雯的儿子，一个被宠坏的小屁孩，也是她帝国的继承人。他就像条忠犬跟着主子一样听玛雯的话。

translations.english: Well, there's Ingun Black-Briar, Maven's daughter. Strange girl. She likes to spend time down in Elgrim's Elixirs working on her alchemy.

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You, an assassin for the Dark Brotherhood, have just made an attempt on the Emperor's life. Would have succeeded, had it been the real man. | ZH: 你，黑暗兄弟会的刺客，刚刚企图弑君。要是真身的话，你现在已经成功了。 | SID: 00E500

translations.english: Quite. Yet that recent business with the young officer. Maro, was it? How dreadful. The son of your commander, plotting your assassination.
translations.chinese: 就是。最近那个年轻军官的事。马洛，是吧？太可怕了。你指挥官的儿子居然要策划刺杀你。

agentText:

translations.english: Surprised? So was I, when a member of your "Family" came to me with the plan. We worked out a deal, you see. An exchange.
translations.chinese: 很惊讶？当你的“家人”带着计划找到我的时候，我也很惊讶。我们达成了一个交易。一个交换。

translations.english: Ah, the Potage le Magnifique. So delicious. My friends, as Emperor, I of course reserve the right of first taste.
translations.chinese: 啊，美味浓汤确实美味。朋友们，作为皇帝，我应该保有优先品尝的权利吧。

translations.english: Yes, an unfortunate turn of events, that. But an isolated incident. And I have been assured that the fault was with the man's son alone.
translations.chinese: 是啊，真是个不幸的转折。但这就是个孤立的事件。我确信一切都是他儿子的错。

translations.english: I get you, and the Dark Brotherhood gets to continue its existence.
translations.chinese: 我得到你，黑暗兄弟会则继续存在下去。

translations.english: Kill him. And make sure there's nothing left to bury.
translations.chinese: 杀了他。连渣滓都不要剩下。

translations.english: By the gods! The Gourmet has killed the Emperor! Attack!
translations.chinese: 神啊！美食家杀了皇帝！拿下！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000640CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By the gods! The Gourmet has killed the Emperor! Attack! | ZH: 神啊！美食家杀了皇帝！拿下！ | SID: 00BC46

translations.english: By the gods! The Gourmet and the chef have poisoned the Emperor! Get them!
translations.chinese: 神啊！美食家和厨师毒杀皇帝！拿下他们！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You mean the wedding? My cousin's apparent murder? An unfortunate misunderstanding, no more. Cold mead, hot tempers... these things happen.
translations.chinese: 你说婚礼上我表妹被刺杀的事？那只是个不幸的误会，仅此而已。暴脾气们喝冷蜜酒……总会发生些事情的。

agentText:

EDID: [00064114]
Translations:

translations.english: But you know what? I've changed my mind. How about this? I kill you, and butcher each and every one of your miserable little friends?
translations.chinese: 但你知道吗？我改主意了。这样如何？我杀了你，再屠了你所有倒霉的小朋友？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But you know what? I've changed my mind. How about this? I kill you, and butcher each and every one of your miserable little friends? | ZH: 但你知道吗？我改主意了。这样如何？我杀了你，再屠了你所有倒霉的小朋友？ | SID: 00BC31

translations.english: Have you found something?
translations.chinese: 找到什么了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064164]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you found something? | ZH: 找到什么了吗？ | SID: 00BC1A

translations.english: Good, good. Does it say where he may be headed?
translations.chinese: 好，很好。上面有没有说他可能去哪儿？

translations.english: Yes, Cicero's journal.
translations.chinese: 对，西塞罗的日记。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064165]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good, good. Does it say where he may be headed? | ZH: 好，很好。上面有没有说他可能去哪儿？ | SID: 00CF9E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Yes, Cicero's journal. | ZH: 对，西塞罗的日记。 | SID: 000FAE

translations.english: Cicero may have overheard me talking to one of the others about the Night Mother. It's possible I was... not entirely respectful.
translations.chinese: 西塞罗可能无意中听到了我和别人谈论夜母。我可能……不是太尊重吧。

translations.english: No, nothing. At least nothing I'm aware of.
translations.chinese: 不，没有。至少我不知道。

translations.english: Well... If I'm being honest, I haven't exactly been discreet lately in expressing my frustration with this whole situation.
translations.chinese: 嗯……说实话，我在对近况的态度表达上一直不太谨慎。

translations.english: Obeying the Night Mother. You being the Listener. It's ridiculous. No offense.
translations.chinese: 服从夜母、你成为聆听者。这太荒谬了，无意冒犯。

translations.english: But to go this far. To attempt to murder the leader of a Sanctuary. Cicero must pay with his life. There is no other option.
translations.chinese: 但走到这一步，西塞罗既然企图杀害圣所首领，就必须偿命了。没有其他选择。

translations.english: Did something set Cicero off?
translations.chinese: 西塞罗受了什么刺激吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064166]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: Cicero may have overheard me talking to one of the others about the Night Mother. It's possible I was... not entirely respectful. | ZH: 西塞罗可能无意中听到了我和别人谈论夜母。我可能……不是太尊重吧。 | SID: 0001E8

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: Obeying the Night Mother. You being the Listener. It's ridiculous. No offense. | ZH: 服从夜母、你成为聆听者。这太荒谬了，无意冒犯。 | SID: 0070EF
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: But to go this far. To attempt to murder the leader of a Sanctuary. Cicero must pay with his life. There is no other option. | ZH: 但走到这一步，西塞罗既然企图杀害圣所首领，就必须偿命了。没有其他选择。 | SID: 00BC19
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Did something set Cicero off? | ZH: 西塞罗受了什么刺激吗？ | SID: 00AABB

translations.english: Never mind, it doesn't matter. You need to leave. Now.
translations.chinese: 没关系，不要紧。你现在得出发了。

translations.english: Find Arnbjorn. Make sure my husband's all right.
translations.chinese: 去找艾恩乔恩。确保我丈夫没事。

translations.english: The Dawnstar Sanctuary? Whatever for?
translations.chinese: 晨星圣所？怎么会？

translations.english: And then, send that jester's twisted little soul to the Void, in as many pieces as possible.
translations.chinese: 然后，把那个小丑扭曲的小灵魂尽可能撕得碎点，送到虚空去。

translations.english: Every moment counts, so I want you to take my horse. His name is Shadowmere. You'll find him outside, by the pool. Let's just say he's... one of us.
translations.chinese: 现在分秒必争，所以我想让你骑上我的马。叫微影。你可以在外面的水池找到他。这么说吧，他……也是我们的一员。

translations.english: Yes, an abandoned Sanctuary in Dawnstar. I have the passphrase.
translations.chinese: 没错，晨星的一座废弃圣所。我已经拿到暗语了。

translations.english: But aren't even you the least bit nervous? After everything that's happened?
translations.chinese: 你就一点不紧张吗？发生了这么多事之后？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006416C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But aren't even you the least bit nervous? After everything that's happened? | ZH: 你就一点不紧张吗？发生了这么多事之后？ | SID: 00C08C

translations.english: Truth is, we are in no danger whatsoever. Killing an Emperor can be useful, but befriending one? Now that's beneficial - as I'm sure you'd all agree.
translations.chinese: 事实就是，我们没有任何危险。杀皇帝是有用，但和皇帝交好呢？那是大有益处的，我相信你们都认可这点。

agentText:

translations.chinese: （笑声）

Translations:

translations.chinese: （鼓掌声）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006422A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: (Clapping.) | ZH: （鼓掌声） | SID: 00BC2D

translations.english: Here we are. Gods, I'm nervous. We'll go in in just a moment. Please, I'll serve. You just stand there and... be amazing.
translations.chinese: 我们到了。神啊，我太紧张了。我们快点进去吧。请吧，由我来服侍他们。你就站在那里……准备惊叹吧。

translations.english: That man was, by far, the most insufferable decoy the Emperor has ever employed. I'm glad he's dead. Ah, but I'm even happier that you killed him.
translations.chinese: 到目前为止，那家伙是皇帝替身里最烦人的。他总算死了。啊，但你杀他就更让我高兴了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064266]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That man was, by far, the most insufferable decoy the Emperor has ever employed. I'm glad he's dead. Ah, but I'm even happier that you killed him. | ZH: 到目前为止，那家伙是皇帝替身里最烦人的。他总算死了。啊，但你杀他就更让我高兴了。 | SID: 00089C

translations.english: Your Sanctuary's being put to the sword right now. That's what I think of this "deal." You killed my son! All of you! And now you'll pay the price.
translations.chinese: 你的圣所现在就要被毁了。这就是我对“交易”的看法。你，你们所有人！杀了我儿！现在你们要付出代价！

agentText:

translations.english: Ugh... damn thing.
translations.chinese: 啊……该死的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006429B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ugh... damn thing. | ZH: 啊……该死的东西。 | SID: 00F409

translations.english: Just... stay back.
translations.chinese: 快……退后。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006429C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just... stay back. | ZH: 快……退后。 | SID: 00BC12

translations.chinese: 后退。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006429D]

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't trust these things. | ZH: 不能相信这些东西。 | SID: 001717

translations.english: Beem! What are you doing?
translations.chinese: 毕姆！你在干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000643E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Beem! What are you doing? | ZH: 毕姆！你在干什么？ | SID: 00DD15

translations.english: Any idea how I can get my daughter's head out of the clouds?
translations.chinese: 要怎么样才能让我闺女不那么糊涂？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064616]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Any idea how I can get my daughter's head out of the clouds? | ZH: 要怎么样才能让我闺女不那么糊涂？ | SID: 00C613

translations.english: I can't decide if things are about to get worse or better.
translations.chinese: 我不能确定事态是变好还是转坏。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064765]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't decide if things are about to get worse or better. | ZH: 我不能确定事态是变好还是转坏。 | SID: 00AAE9

translations.english: At least we don't have a dragon to worry about, for the moment.
translations.chinese: 至少现在我们不用担心那头龙的事了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064766]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: At least we don't have a dragon to worry about, for the moment. | ZH: 至少现在我们不用担心那头龙的事了。 | SID: 002BB0

translations.english: No. I'm a Breton from High Rock, and I refuse to be mistaken for a filthy native.
translations.chinese: 不是。我是高岩的布莱顿人，我不想被误认为是肮脏的土著。

translations.english: What have I done for the gods to take me so far from my beloved Daggerfall?
translations.chinese: 我到底做了什么，众神让我离开我心爱的匕落？

translations.english: I don't care if we share the same ancestors, these people are savages. Half of them are Forsworn barbarians, and have you seen what they eat?
translations.chinese: 我不在乎我们是不是有共同的祖先，他们都是野蛮人。他们有大半都是弃誓者，你见过他们吃什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No. I'm a Breton from High Rock, and I refuse to be mistaken for a filthy native. | ZH: 不是。我是高岩的布莱顿人，我不想被误认为是肮脏的土著。 | SID: 00A09D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: What have I done for the gods to take me so far from my beloved Daggerfall? | ZH: 我到底做了什么，众神让我离开我心爱的匕落？ | SID: 00BBFB

translations.english: The Empire exists because we allow it to exist, and I'm here to make sure the Jarl of Markarth remembers that.
translations.chinese: 帝国之所以存在是我们允许它存在，我来这里就是为了确保马卡斯的领主记住这一点。

translations.english: We're the ruling body of the Aldmeri Dominion. Saviors of Mer. Victors of the Great War.
translations.chinese: 我们是先祖神洲的统治机构。莫的救世主。浩大战争的胜利者。

agentText:

translations.english: Damn Elves! You'll pay for this!
translations.chinese: 该死的精灵！你会为此付出代价的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006477C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn Elves! You'll pay for this! | ZH: 该死的精灵！你会为此付出代价的！ | SID: 00690C

translations.english: Praise Talos!
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯万岁！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006477D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Praise Talos! | ZH: 塔洛斯万岁！ | SID: 002C36

translations.english: We intend to prove the superiority of Mer over Man, one century at a time.
translations.chinese: 我们要每一百年证明一次莫比人优越得多。

translations.english: The Thalmor saved all of Elven-kind during the Oblivion Crisis. We've been watching over our lands for 200 years.
translations.chinese: 梭默在湮灭危机中拯救了全体精灵族。我们已经守护我们的土地200年了。

translations.english: We re-founded the Aldmeri Dominion, an alliance between us and our Bosmer cousins. You might know them from their common name. Wood elves.
translations.chinese: 我们重建了先祖神洲，这是我们和波斯莫兄弟的联盟。你可能知道他们的通用名，木精灵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006477E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We intend to prove the superiority of Mer over Man, one century at a time. | ZH: 我们要每一百年证明一次莫比人优越得多。 | SID: 0006E6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Thalmor saved all of Elven-kind during the Oblivion Crisis. We've been watching over our lands for 200 years. | ZH: 梭默在湮灭危机中拯救了全体精灵族。我们已经守护我们的土地200年了。 | SID: 00465E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We re-founded the Aldmeri Dominion, an alliance between us and our Bosmer cousins. You might know them from their common name. Wood elves. | ZH: 我们重建了先祖神洲，这是我们和波斯莫兄弟的联盟。你可能知道他们的通用名，木精灵。 | SID: 00CE45

translations.english: Hmph. Fine.
translations.chinese: 嗯。好吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006477F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. Fine. | ZH: 嗯。好吧。 | SID: 002D24

translations.english: Very well.
translations.chinese: 非常好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064780]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very well. | ZH: 非常好。 | SID: 00556F

translations.english: Ogmund the skald. He's old, respected, and I know for a fact that he worships Talos in his home.
translations.chinese: 那个吟唱者欧格蒙。他是个受尊敬的老人，而且我知道他在家里崇拜塔洛斯。

translations.english: But the Jarl has been hesitant to call for his arrest. I want you to break in to his home and find evidence.
translations.chinese: 但领主一直在犹豫要不要逮捕他。我要你进他家找证据。

translations.english: Good hunting.
translations.chinese: 狩猎愉快。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064782]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good hunting. | ZH: 狩猎愉快。 | SID: 00AD2A

translations.english: I would like to personally thank you on behalf of myself and the Thalmor for your assistance. Here, for your work.
translations.chinese: 我谨代表我个人和梭默感谢你的协助。给，这是你的报酬。

translations.english: Ah, there we have it. This will be all I need to have Ogmund taken care of.
translations.chinese: 啊，好了。这下我就能解决欧格蒙的一切了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00064783]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I would like to personally thank you on behalf of myself and the Thalmor for your assistance. Here, for your work. | ZH: 我谨代表我个人和梭默感谢你的协助。给，这是你的报酬。 | SID: 0012BA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, there we have it. This will be all I need to have Ogmund taken care of. | ZH: 啊，好了。这下我就能解决欧格蒙的一切了。 | SID: 00BBF1

translations.english: You get me a heart, I get you some armor. Interested?
translations.chinese: 你给我心脏，我给你些护甲。怎么样？

translations.english: If you want some heavy armor, I might have a deal we could work out. I need a Daedra's Heart. Jarl wants me to cool his new sword in blood.
translations.chinese: 如果你想要重甲的话，我们可以做个交易。我需要一颗迪德拉之心。领主想让我用迪德拉的血冷却他的新剑。

translations.english: Depends on what you need. A light armor is good for travel. Less to carry. A heavy armor weighs you down, but no true warrior goes without it.
translations.chinese: 这取决于你的需求。轻甲适合旅行。负重更小。厚重的盔甲会让你疲惫不堪，但真正的战士是离不开它的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If you want some heavy armor, I might have a deal we could work out. I need a Daedra's Heart. Jarl wants me to cool his new sword in blood. | ZH: 如果你想要重甲的话，我们可以做个交易。我需要一颗迪德拉之心。领主想让我用迪德拉的血冷却他的新剑。 | SID: 00BC0A

translations.english: You're awfully inquisitive, aren't you? I like that. Perhaps you'd care to solve a little problem I'm having?
translations.chinese: 你很爱好奇，是吗？我喜欢这样的。也许你能帮我解决个小问题？

translations.english: The Empire has agreed to accept our beliefs, and its citizens have a responsibility to cease their heretical worship.
translations.chinese: 帝国已经同意接受我们的主张，帝国公民有义务停止他们的异端崇拜。

translations.english: It's a religious matter. The Thalmor do not recognize Talos as a god. He was only a man, and does not deserve to a place in our pantheon.
translations.chinese: 这是宗教问题。梭默不承认塔洛斯是神灵。他只是个人，不配在我们的神殿中占有一席之地。

translations.english: He's the real head of this family. He may not be the eldest, but all the work that keeps us respected is handled by my Thonar.
translations.chinese: 他才是这个家真正主人。他也许不是最年长的，但所有让我们受到尊敬的事都是我的托纳尔做的。

translations.english: Anything. Served in the Legion with my sister, Ghorza, for over 10 years. We've seen every piece you can imagine.
translations.chinese: 都能造。我和我姐姐果扎曾经在军团服役十多年。你能想到的我们都见过了。

translations.english: Have you met her? She runs the forge near the smelter. Just don't bother talking to her apprentice. Boy has no talent.
translations.chinese: 你见过她吗？她在冶炼厂附近的铁匠铺。别找她徒弟，那孩子没天赋。

translations.english: I was sent here to lead the Thalmor's interests in this corner of Skyrim. It's my mission to root out all Talos worship in this city.
translations.chinese: 我是被派来领导梭默在天际这个角落的利益的。我的任务就是铲除这座城里所有塔洛斯信仰。

translations.english: As if this craggy, wretch of a city could give birth to a superiorly bred Mer such as myself. No, I'm not from Markarth.
translations.chinese: 似乎这么崎岖的城市养不出我这么有教养的莫。对，我不是马卡斯的。

translations.chinese: 给，这是我最好的盔甲。好好穿着吧。

translations.english: Good. I'd prefer using water to cool my metal, but it's what the Jarl wants.
translations.chinese: 好。虽然我更喜欢拿水来冷却我的金属，但领主想要这个。

translations.chinese: 领主想怎么拒绝接见我都行。但他不可能永远不理我们。

translations.chinese: 我丈夫托纳尔负责我们家族所有的生意。他可是个大人物。

translations.english: The Dominion is here, and we're watching you.
translations.chinese: 先祖神洲就在此处，我们正盯着你呢。

translations.chinese: 梭默有的是办法对付塔洛斯信徒。

translations.chinese: 啊，好吧，如果哈达瓦替你担保的话，我看问题不大。

translations.english: Hey, weren't you on the carts with the Stormcloaks?
translations.chinese: 嘿，你不是那个和风暴斗篷在车上的吗？

translations.english: I saw Caius.. that dragon just grabbed him and... I don't know how I made it out of there...
translations.chinese: 我看见凯亚斯……龙把他抓住然后……我不知道我是怎么逃出来的……

translations.english: Thank Talos you came along... I thought I was going to die down here.
translations.chinese: 感谢塔洛斯，你来了……我还以为我会死在这。

translations.english: Imperial dogs... there's nothing that's too low for them.

translations.chinese: 拿起武器。如果再遇到帝国人，我需要你帮我。

translations.chinese: 帮大忙了。我不会忘记的。

translations.english: I'm sure she'll be angry. Brace yourself.
translations.chinese: 我肯定她会生气的。振作点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006494F]

translations.chinese: 我不会让你白跑一趟的。没人会在意下批货里是不是少了几块锭子。

translations.english: But... You could take word to her in Solitude, let her know it'll be coming soon.
translations.chinese: 但……你可以去独孤城跟她说说，让她知道很快就会来了。

translations.english: Can't do that and keep an eye on things here at the same time.
translations.chinese: 没法一边讲理一边盯着这里的事情啊。

translations.english: In exchange, I'm willing to let a few ingots go missing. Maybe more than a few.
translations.chinese: 作为交换，我可以让几个锭子失踪。也许还不止几个。

translations.english: That's good news. I was starting to fear something had happened.

translations.chinese: 没有。

translations.english: At least, when we can get shipments to her. We're late on the last one. I expect her to start breathin' fire any moment now.
translations.chinese: 至少是我们把货交到她手里的时候。上一批我们送迟了。我想她现在随时都会喷火了。

translations.english: But that's not the point.
translations.chinese: 但这不是重点。

translations.english: Bryling owns the mine, and she's not selling. We make her some decent coin running this place. Keeps her living well in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 白灵是矿主，而且她不会卖的。我们帮她经营这里赚了不少钱，让她在独孤城过得不错。

translations.english: She's already come down hard on us for missing shipments. Likely to do it again, since we're late.
translations.chinese: 她已经因为我们丢了货而狠狠训斥过我们了。但可能会再来一次，因为我们延误了。

translations.english: I'm just protecting Bryling's investment. She's the owner, even though we're the ones here doing all the work.
translations.chinese: 我只是保护白灵的投资。虽然所有的活儿都是我们在干，但她是所有人。

translations.english: I hear you want someone to look into that house fire.

translations.chinese: 我的人民相信它是被诅咒了。我又有什么资格反驳他们？

translations.chinese: 火灾第二天他就搬过去和她住了。连我都觉得可疑。

translations.english: They think he did it to get rid of his wife so he could be with Alva.
translations.chinese: 他们都觉得他是为了摆脱妻子和阿尔瓦在一起才这么干的。

translations.english: Why would he do that to his own family?
translations.chinese: 他为什么要这么对自己的家人？

translations.chinese: 当他向阿尔瓦宣誓的时候，那些灰烬还是热的呢。

translations.english: Why would he do that to his own family?

translations.english: You have a kind heart; much too kind for Riften. Don't worry about me, I'll be just fine.
translations.chinese: 你有颗善良的心，对于裂谷城来说太好了。别担心，我没事。

translations.chinese: 寒冷的石头和潮湿的空气……很适合我，斯瓦纳。

translations.chinese: 我再也受不了，泰迪斯。印达林一直欺负我，而我没有做错什么。

translations.chinese: 我告诉她这不是什么好主意，她不适合做这种事，但她不听。

translations.chinese: 所以我给了她一些建议，让她去铁架猿坠落洞穴看看，就是这样。

translations.chinese: 他的脑袋将被送到希罗帝尔，然后钉在帝都的墙上。

translations.english: Let this day be a final warning to all who would still call themselves Stormcloaks.

translations.english: And now, to deliver a speech.

translations.english: There's bound to be resistance. There are many Stormcloak camps tucked away in the hills.
translations.chinese: 一定还会有抵抗。山里还有很多风暴斗篷的隐藏营地。

translations.english: But without Ulfric to inflame their passions, they'll settle down and return to their homes eventually.
translations.chinese: 但是如果没有乌弗瑞克来点燃他们的激情，他们最终会安定下来，回到自己的家。

translations.english: They'll no doubt strike whenever and wherever they can.
translations.chinese: 他们无疑会随时随地发动袭击。

translations.chinese: 我知道的都已经告诉你了，你还想干什么？

translations.chinese: 谢谢你的帮助，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065AE3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I thank you for your help, my friend. | ZH: 谢谢你的帮助，朋友。 | SID: 00BA55

translations.english: Therefore, by my authority as Jarl, I pronounce you Thane of Riften and award you all of the benefits befitting your station. Congratulations.
translations.chinese: 因此，我以领主的名义，宣布你成为裂谷城武卫，并授予你一切与身份相称之福利。祝贺你了。

translations.english: You've been a beacon of hope in these dark times for my people and I will never forget it.
translations.chinese: 在这个黑暗的年代，你一直是我人民的希望之光，我永远不会忘记的。

translations.english: I should be the one thanking you. You've solved more problems in the short time you've been here then anyone in my court has their entire careers.
translations.chinese: 是我该感谢你才对。你在如此短短时间里解决的问题比我宫廷里所有人整个供职生涯都要多。

translations.english: I expect that you'll distance yourself from the affairs of state. In other words, keep your nose out of my business and we'll do just fine.
translations.chinese: 我希望你能远离领地的政务。换句话说，你别妨碍我的事，咱们就会相处愉快。

translations.english: Just remember that you're only a part of my court, this doesn't make you one of the family.
translations.chinese: 好好记得，你只是我宫廷的一员，不代表你是我家里人。

translations.english: I guess all that's left is to bestow the title. What were those words again?
translations.chinese: 我想剩下就是授予头衔了吧。还有什么来着？

translations.english: Doesn't matter... the title is yours. I henceforth name you Thane of Riften. Don't disappoint me.
translations.chinese: 算了……头衔归你了。从今以后，我任命你为裂谷城武卫。不要让我失望了。

translations.english: I've purchased Honeyside.
translations.chinese: 我已经买下了甜蜜湾。

translations.chinese: 请允许我为你无私的付出赠予一份补偿。

translations.english: Well done! Your continued efforts have been of great benefit to the people of Riften.
translations.chinese: 干得好！你的持续努力让裂谷城的人民受益匪浅。

translations.english: Here, this should suffice as your cut of the... or rather, a reward for your actions. Now, if you'll excuse me...
translations.chinese: 给，应该够你那份了……准确来说，是对你行动的奖励。现在，失陪了……

translations.english: I'll send my men to secure any of the remaining goods you left behind. We can't have that substance falling into the wrong hands now, can we?
translations.chinese: 我会派人去确保你留下的货物。我们不能让那东西落入坏人之手，对吧？

translations.english: Much like Mjoll, you've become champion of our hold; helping people with their difficulties and providing assistance for their needs.
translations.chinese: 就像穆月尔一样，你成为了我们领地的勇士，帮助别人克服困难，满足他们的需要。

translations.english: As the Jarl of Riften, I feel it's my duty to honor your selfless behavior by honoring you with the title Thane of Riften.
translations.chinese: 身为裂谷城领主，我觉得我有责任授予你裂谷城武卫的头衔来表彰你无私的行为。

translations.english: Oh don't pretend to be modest. I'm talking about your new role as champion. Apparently, you've taken my people under your wing.
translations.chinese: 别装孙子了。我说的是你作为勇士的新角色。你很明显已经把我下面的人置于自己的庇护下了。

translations.english: If you think you can steal my throne by winning the hearts of the people, that's where you're wrong. Keep that in mind.
translations.chinese: 如果你认为可以通过赢得民众的心来偷走我的宝座，那你就错了。好好记住。

translations.english: However, since it wouldn't behoove me to make you disappear, I'd rather have you on my side as Thane of Riften.
translations.chinese: 不过，既然我不该让你消失，那我宁愿让你站在我这边，做个裂谷城武卫吧。

translations.english: I've been informed by my steward that you've made quite an impression in the Rift; several of our citizens have expressed their admiration.
translations.chinese: 我的总管告诉我，你在裂谷城很有一番作为，我们的一些公民对你很是钦佩。

translations.english: Ah, there you are. I was wondering when you'd visit us again.
translations.chinese: 啊，你来了。我还在想你什么时候会再来呢。

translations.english: So, I've been hearing your name in court quite a bit lately.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我最近在宫廷里经常听到你的名字。

translations.english: I've been informed by my steward that you've made quite an impression in the Rift; the people won't stop blathering about you.
translations.chinese: 我的总管告诉我，你在裂谷城很有一番作为，人们都在念叨你。

translations.chinese: 你已经采取了必要的步骤以获得头衔。

translations.english: Therefore all that remains is to bestow it upon you.
translations.chinese: 所以剩下的就是把它赐予你了。

translations.chinese: 我已经和我的宫廷核实过了，显然你完全有资格……没有什么能阻挡我授予你这个头衔了。

translations.english: You damn well better.
translations.chinese: 最好是这样。

translations.chinese: 我的总管那里有所房子可供出售。我想你会发现这里的居住条件很令人满意的。

translations.english: When the house is yours, return to me and I will present you the title.
translations.chinese: 等房子归你，回来找我要头衔吧。

translations.english: A Thane of Riften is expected to maintain permanent residence within the city walls.
translations.chinese: 裂谷城武卫可以在城内永久居住。

translations.english: Before I can present you with the title, there's but a single requirement you must fulfill.
translations.chinese: 在我授予你头衔前，你需要满足一个要求。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The fiercest of the remaining rebels will continue to harass us, but by in large, the people here desire peace. | ZH: 最凶猛的叛军残党会继续袭击我们。但总体来讲，这里的人民渴望和平。 | SID: 001850
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What I'm not so sure about is the peace we've made with the Thalmor. But we'll keep that between the two of us, alright? | ZH: 我不太确定我们会和梭默一直保持和平。但这事儿不传六耳，好吗？ | SID: 00DDE0
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Now that Ulfric is dead, will there be peace? | ZH: 现在乌弗瑞克死了，和平就会到来了？ | SID: 00C404

translations.english: And they should enjoy it while they can... I suspect all of Tamriel will again be called to arms in the not too distant future.
translations.chinese: 他们应该趁现在好好享受。我怀疑不久的将来全泰姆瑞尔人还会被征召入伍。

translations.english: The ordinary citizen will be happy to get back to life as normal, to have their families return home.
translations.chinese: 一般公民是很高兴家人们返回故乡，回归正常生活的。

translations.english: There are those who still call themselves Stormcloaks, who continue to fight us, and bring misery to the people... but they are few in number.
translations.chinese: 有些人仍自称风暴斗篷，还会与我们继续作战，给人民带去苦难……但数量很少了。

translations.english: Now that Ulfric is dead, will there be peace?
translations.chinese: 现在乌弗瑞克死了，和平就会到来了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The ordinary citizen will be happy to get back to life as normal, to have their families return home. | ZH: 一般公民是很高兴家人们返回故乡，回归正常生活的。 | SID: 00BA0D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: There are those who still call themselves Stormcloaks, who continue to fight us, and bring misery to the people... but they are few in number. | ZH: 有些人仍自称风暴斗篷，还会与我们继续作战，给人民带去苦难……但数量很少了。 | SID: 00BA0E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Now that Ulfric is dead, will there be peace? | ZH: 现在乌弗瑞克死了，和平就会到来了？ | SID: 00BA0A

translations.english: Because getting rid of the Empire was only half the problem.
translations.chinese: 因为摆脱帝国只是解决了一半问题。

translations.english: There will be peace for a time, during which we must rebuild Skyrim into the land it once was. Strong. Self-reliant. The center of mankind.
translations.chinese: 和平会持续一段时间。这段时间里我们必须把天际重建成曾经那个强大、自力更生的人类中心。

translations.english: Soon, the elves will again seek to rule the world. We must ready ourselves to fight them.
translations.chinese: 精灵们很快会再次寻求统治世界。我们必须做好与他们作战的准备。

translations.english: For it will be Skyrim that shall lead Tamriel in those dark days, when the fate of the world is finally determined.
translations.chinese: 因为当世界的命运被最终决定，只有天际才能带领全泰姆瑞尔度过黑暗的年代。

translations.english: Now that we've defeated the Imperials, will there be peace?
translations.chinese: 既然我们已经打败了帝国，这里会和平吗？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Now that we've defeated the Imperials, will there be peace? | ZH: 既然我们已经打败了帝国，这里会和平吗？ | SID: 00AD50

translations.english: It'll be Skyrim that leads the charge. Mark my words. And that time around, mankind will either succeed once and for all or die trying.
translations.chinese: 天际应该带头冲锋。记住，到那时，人类要么一战成功，要么就是一败涂地。

translations.english: It's only a matter of time before their pointy ears start itching to rule the world again.
translations.chinese: 那群尖耳朵再次渴望统治世界只是时间问题。

translations.english: And that's as it should be. In the darkest days ahead, it'll be us Nords who lead the fight against the elves.
translations.chinese: 这是应该的。在未来的最黑暗时代，我们诺德人会领导与精灵的战斗。

translations.english: Peace? When has any Nord ever known peace? Skyrim breeds warriors. It's who we are, it's in our blood.
translations.chinese: 和平？诺德人何时知道和平？天际孕育的都是战士。这才是我们的本性，我们的血脉。

translations.english: Now that we've defeated the Imperials, will there be peace?
translations.chinese: 既然我们已经打败了帝国，这里会和平吗？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Peace? When has any Nord ever known peace? Skyrim breeds warriors. It's who we are, it's in our blood. | ZH: 和平？诺德人何时知道和平？天际孕育的都是战士。这才是我们的本性，我们的血脉。 | SID: 00BA02
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Now that we've defeated the Imperials, will there be peace? | ZH: 既然我们已经打败了帝国，这里会和平吗？ | SID: 0055E5

translations.english: Ulfric is dead and his army destroyed. There's not much more I could ask of you. The gods, however, I suspect, may have plans for you elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克死了，他的军队也被摧毁了。我没什么可要求你的了。但我怀疑诸神对你另有安排。

translations.english: With luck, they'll soon lose heart and return to their homes and families. If not, we'll be forced to put them all to the sword.
translations.chinese: 所幸他们很快就会失去信心，回家团聚。否则，我们就不得不把他们赶尽杀绝。

translations.english: That said, Stormcloak true believers are still operating out of hidden military camps in the hills. If you encounter any on you travels, kill them.
translations.chinese: 而且，风暴斗篷的死忠仍然在山里的隐蔽军营里活动。如果在路上遇到，杀。

translations.english: Is there anything further I can do for the Legion?
translations.chinese: 我还能为军团做些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C74]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ulfric is dead and his army destroyed. There's not much more I could ask of you. The gods, however, I suspect, may have plans for you elsewhere. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克死了，他的军队也被摧毁了。我没什么可要求你的了。但我怀疑诸神对你另有安排。 | SID: 000905
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: With luck, they'll soon lose heart and return to their homes and families. If not, we'll be forced to put them all to the sword. | ZH: 所幸他们很快就会失去信心，回家团聚。否则，我们就不得不把他们赶尽杀绝。 | SID: 008043
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That said, Stormcloak true believers are still operating out of hidden military camps in the hills. If you encounter any on you travels, kill them. | ZH: 而且，风暴斗篷的死忠仍然在山里的隐蔽军营里活动。如果在路上遇到，杀。 | SID: 00A556
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything further I can do for the Legion? | ZH: 我还能为军团做些什么？ | SID: 00B9E0

translations.english: The Legion's work is far from finished, but you are free to roam. I suspect you'll be of greater good to Skyrim out there, in the world.
translations.chinese: 军团的工作远未结束。但你可以自由行动了。我觉得你能对世界和天际产生更大好处。

translations.english: If while you're out there, you stumble into any Stormcloak military camps, I expect you to destroy them. I've reports they are hiding in the hills.
translations.chinese: 如果在外面碰到任何风暴斗篷军营，希望你能去摧毁它们。我听说他们还躲在山里。

translations.english: Is there anything further I can do for the Legion?
translations.chinese: 我还能为军团做些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C75]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The Legion's work is far from finished, but you are free to roam. I suspect you'll be of greater good to Skyrim out there, in the world. | ZH: 军团的工作远未结束。但你可以自由行动了。我觉得你能对世界和天际产生更大好处。 | SID: 003659
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If while you're out there, you stumble into any Stormcloak military camps, I expect you to destroy them. I've reports they are hiding in the hills. | ZH: 如果在外面碰到任何风暴斗篷军营，希望你能去摧毁它们。我听说他们还躲在山里。 | SID: 00B9DC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything further I can do for the Legion? | ZH: 我还能为军团做些什么？ | SID: 00BD5C

translations.english: True sons and daughters of Skyrim reign in every city, we've crippled the Imperial Legion, and cut off its head by killing General Tullius himself.
translations.chinese: 每座城市都已经被真正的天际儿女掌控，我们摧毁了帝国军团。还杀死了图留斯将军，破坏了他们的指挥头脑。

translations.english: What more could I ask of you? No, you're free to roam. I suspect the gods have needs for you elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 我还能要求你做什么呢？你现在可以自由行动了。我猜诸神还需要你去别的地方。

translations.english: If you come across any Imperials in your travels, I expect you'll know what to do.
translations.chinese: 如果在路上遇到帝国兵，我想你知道该怎么做。

translations.english: That said, some of the Legion's staunchest men have organized themselves, and are operating out of hidden military camps in the wilderness.
translations.chinese: 另外，军团的一些死忠已经组织起来，退守在荒野的隐蔽军营里开展活动了。

translations.english: Is there anything further I can do for the cause?
translations.chinese: 我还能为这个事业做些什么？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything further I can do for the cause? | ZH: 我还能为这个事业做些什么？ | SID: 00B9CE

translations.english: No. I trust you'll do more good out there in the world, wherever you damn well please to go. You're a true son of Skyrim. You'll know what to do.
translations.chinese: 不。我相信不管你去哪，总会为世界做更多好事的。你是真正的天际之子。你知道该怎么做。

translations.english: To begin with, killing any Legionnaire you find out in the wilderness. I've reports they've hidden military camps out there.
translations.chinese: 首先，在野外发现任何军团成员，都要杀死。我听说他们还有隐藏的军营。

translations.english: Is there anything further I can do for the cause?
translations.chinese: 我还能为这个事业做些什么？

translations.english: Is there anything further I can do for the cause?

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything further I can do for the cause? | ZH: 我还能为这个事业做些什么？ | SID: 00B439

translations.english: Can't say I'll ever get used to the damn cold, or understand these Nords... but, I've come to respect them.
translations.chinese: 我不敢说已经适应了这倒霉的寒冷，或者理解了诺德人……但是，我开始尊重他们了。

translations.english: The harshness of Skyrim has a way of carving a man down to his true self.
translations.chinese: 天际的严酷让人看清真实的自我。

translations.english: No, I suspect Skyrim to be my home for many years.
translations.chinese: 不，看来接下来很长时间天际都是我的家了。

translations.english: Will you return to Cyrodiil now?
translations.chinese: 你现在要回希罗帝尔了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C79]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Can't say I'll ever get used to the damn cold, or understand these Nords... but, I've come to respect them. | ZH: 我不敢说已经适应了这倒霉的寒冷，或者理解了诺德人……但是，我开始尊重他们了。 | SID: 00067C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The harshness of Skyrim has a way of carving a man down to his true self. | ZH: 天际的严酷让人看清真实的自我。 | SID: 00A9DE

translations.english: I may understand things here in Skyrim better than the General, but I'm a soldier at heart, not a politician. But I'll do my best.
translations.chinese: 我可能比将军更加了解天际，可我心里永远是个兵，不是政治家。不过我会勉力去做。

translations.english: The General's put me in charge of assisting the new governments.
translations.chinese: 将军让我负责协助新的各领地政府。

translations.english: This is the land of my birth, the land that shaped me. I'm proud to have any part in making it strong again.
translations.chinese: 这是生我养我的土地。我很自豪能让它重新强大起来。

translations.english: What's next for the accomplished Legate Rikke?
translations.chinese: 我们多才多艺的瑞姬副官接下来有什么打算？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C7A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I may understand things here in Skyrim better than the General, but I'm a soldier at heart, not a politician. But I'll do my best. | ZH: 我可能比将军更加了解天际，可我心里永远是个兵，不是政治家。不过我会勉力去做。 | SID: 00B9F9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The General's put me in charge of assisting the new governments. | ZH: 将军让我负责协助新的各领地政府。 | SID: 00B9FA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: This is the land of my birth, the land that shaped me. I'm proud to have any part in making it strong again. | ZH: 这是生我养我的土地。我很自豪能让它重新强大起来。 | SID: 00C72D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's next for the accomplished Legate Rikke? | ZH: 我们多才多艺的瑞姬副官接下来有什么打算？ | SID: 008EAF

translations.english: The Empire may try to reclaim Skyrim, and I need everyone ready for that. Though the biggest threat, of course, is the elves.
translations.chinese: 帝国可能会试图夺回天际，我需要大家都做好准备。但是，精灵肯定是最大的威胁。

translations.english: But, that doesn't mean I won't start acting like it. There's much to do. The new Jarls need help building armies, and enforcing their right to rule.
translations.chinese: 但这不代表我会等着开会无所事事。事情很多，得帮助新的领主们建立军队，确保他们实行统治。

translations.english: No, not yet. We'll wait for the Moot to name me High King. It'll be better for all that way.
translations.chinese: 不，还没有。我们得等领主议会的任命。那样会更好。

translations.english: So, do I call you High King now?
translations.chinese: 那我现在该称你为至高王了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The Empire may try to reclaim Skyrim, and I need everyone ready for that. Though the biggest threat, of course, is the elves. | ZH: 帝国可能会试图夺回天际，我需要大家都做好准备。但是，精灵肯定是最大的威胁。 | SID: 000CC0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But, that doesn't mean I won't start acting like it. There's much to do. The new Jarls need help building armies, and enforcing their right to rule. | ZH: 但这不代表我会等着开会无所事事。事情很多，得帮助新的领主们建立军队，确保他们实行统治。 | SID: 00B9EC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: No, not yet. We'll wait for the Moot to name me High King. It'll be better for all that way. | ZH: 不，还没有。我们得等领主议会的任命。那样会更好。 | SID: 00B9ED
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So, do I call you High King now? | ZH: 那我现在该称你为至高王了？ | SID: 000935

translations.english: Can't say I'm looking forward to that. But, I'll also be training men and women for their new armies.
translations.chinese: 虽然不是很期待。但我会帮他们的新军队训练士兵。

translations.english: We'll need trained, disciplined and creative warriors ready for all that.
translations.chinese: 我们需要一批训练有素、纪律严明、富有创造力的战士为这一切做好准备。

translations.english: Heh. Ulfric's put me in charge of keeping an eye on the new Jarls. You know, make sure they're generally following orders.
translations.chinese: 哈。乌弗瑞克让我负责监视新任的领主们。你知道，得让他们基本上服从命令才行。

translations.english: The Empire might send over a few Legionnaires to make sure we're serious, and of course, we'll be taking the fight to the elves soon enough.
translations.chinese: 帝国可能会派一些军队来试探我们，另外，我们肯定很快会和精灵开战。

translations.english: What's next for the mighty Galmar Stone-Fist?
translations.chinese: 我们强大的加尔玛·石拳接下来有什么打算？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00065C7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Can't say I'm looking forward to that. But, I'll also be training men and women for their new armies. | ZH: 虽然不是很期待。但我会帮他们的新军队训练士兵。 | SID: 001A56
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: We'll need trained, disciplined and creative warriors ready for all that. | ZH: 我们需要一批训练有素、纪律严明、富有创造力的战士为这一切做好准备。 | SID: 004360
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Heh. Ulfric's put me in charge of keeping an eye on the new Jarls. You know, make sure they're generally following orders. | ZH: 哈。乌弗瑞克让我负责监视新任的领主们。你知道，得让他们基本上服从命令才行。 | SID: 007BC8
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: The Empire might send over a few Legionnaires to make sure we're serious, and of course, we'll be taking the fight to the elves soon enough. | ZH: 帝国可能会派一些军队来试探我们，另外，我们肯定很快会和精灵开战。 | SID: 00B9E7

translations.english: I'm ready. I made my peace with the gods long ago.
translations.chinese: 我准备好了。诸神很久前就让我平静了。

translations.english: Head over there, unless you feel like helping my wife pick crops. And then 50 years later you'll wake up and still be here.
translations.chinese: 去那边吧。除非你想帮我老婆收庄稼。50年后醒来时还在这里。

translations.chinese: 你就一直盯着脚下看吗？看到前面的大城市了？马卡斯？

translations.chinese: 迪德拉君主瓦尔迷纳对记忆的渴求造就了这些幻象。

translations.english: In any other circumstance, I'd agree with you. However, these aren't normal dreams.
translations.chinese: 在其他时候，我都会同意你的说法。但是，这些可不是普通的梦。

translations.english: The nightmares are an echo of her presence as she feeds.

translations.english: I am Savos Aren, Arch-Mage of the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 我叫萨沃斯·阿冉，是冬堡学院的大法师。

translations.english: I am quite content to see nearly any aspect of magic explored and investigated here.
translations.chinese: 我很满意能在这里看到魔法的方方面面都能被探索和研究。

translations.english: But I do not and will not approve of any research or experiments that cause purposeful harm to your fellow members of the College.
translations.chinese: 但我也不会因此而批准任何会伤害到其他学院成员的研究或实验。

translations.english: The Greybeards are a solitary lot. I don't think they've ever ventured outside their monastery.
translations.chinese: 灰胡子们很孤僻。他们可能从来没出过修道院。

translations.english: We get the occasional pilgrim passing through here on their way to the summit, but almost all of them have returned disappointed.
translations.chinese: 偶尔会有朝圣者在登顶的时候路过，但几乎所有人都失望而归了。

translations.english: Well, not that they would. They seem peaceful, but I wouldn't want to provoke them.
translations.chinese: 当然他们也不会这么干了，他们看起来很和平，但我不想激怒他们。

translations.english: I've been to the monastery many times, but I've never even laid eyes on one of the Greybeards. Not that I'd care to.
translations.chinese: 我去过修道院很多次，但从没见到过灰胡子。我倒也是不想见。

translations.chinese: 有时候我肯定是听到了奇怪的声音从上面滚下来。听起来像是打雷，可又不下雨。

translations.chinese: 你答应过我的，亚尔提。你不是说等咱们打下霍尔丹之后，咱们俩拜把子么。

translations.english: Give me your sword, Hjalti. That we may become brothers as you promised.
translations.chinese: 把你的剑给我吧，亚尔提。我们可以像你说的那样成为兄弟。

translations.english: And I've waited. Even after the enemies' arrows dug into my chest and their hammers crushed my bones. I've waited.
translations.chinese: 所以我一直等着。即使敌人的箭射进了我的胸膛，锤子击碎了我的骨头。我还是一直在等着。

translations.english: Loose ends and all that.
translations.chinese: 琐事需要做干净。

translations.english: I believe so. Therefore, you are to obtain that information from Virane - who the Gourmet really is, and where he can be found.
translations.chinese: 我相信如此。因此，你得从维拉尼那里获取到这些情报，美食家的真正身份还有下落。

translations.english: Oh, and when you're done with Virane, kill him.
translations.chinese: 等和维拉尼谈完以后，就杀了他。

translations.english: And this Anton Virane knows the Gourmet's true identity?
translations.chinese: 这个安东·维拉尼知道“美食家”的真实身份？

translations.chinese: 我在调查的时候发现了这个。美食家著作，而且不是复制品，上面有签名。你看！

translations.english: So you don't even know who the Gourmet is? Wonderful.
translations.chinese: 你连谁是美食家都不知道？好极了。

translations.english: Never! I don't know what led you here, but nothing will betray my trust. I'll take the secret of the Gourmet's identity to my grave.
translations.chinese: 不！我不知道你为什么来这里，但我不能背叛别人对我的信任。我死也不会告诉你美食家的身份。

translations.english: The... the Gourmet?
translations.chinese: 美……食家？

translations.english: The Gourmet. Who is he? Where is he?
translations.chinese: 美食家是谁？他在哪儿？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068514]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Never! I don't know what led you here, but nothing will betray my trust. I'll take the secret of the Gourmet's identity to my grave. | ZH: 不！我不知道你为什么来这里，但我不能背叛别人对我的信任。我死也不会告诉你美食家的身份。 | SID: 00B794
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The... the Gourmet? | ZH: 美……食家？ | SID: 00B795
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Gourmet. Who is he? Where is he? | ZH: 美食家是谁？他在哪儿？ | SID: 008A9B

translations.english: Now... now wait a minute. Let's not get hasty. I mean, surely my friend wouldn't want me to endanger my own life. Right?
translations.chinese: 等……等一下。没必要这么着急。那个，我的朋友肯定不想我拿自己的生命冒险，对吧？

translations.english: Look, his name is Balagog gro-Nolob. He's an Orc! The Gourmet's an Orc! He's staying at the Nightgate Inn. That's all I know!
translations.chinese: 那个，他叫巴拉果戈·格洛-诺洛波。是个兽人！美食家是个兽人！住在夜扉旅馆。我就知道这么多！

translations.english: The Dark Brotherhood?
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会？

translations.english: Now... now you'll let me go. Right?
translations.chinese: 现在……你能放我走了。对吧？

translations.english: For the Dark Brotherhood, that can be easily arranged. (Intimidate)
translations.chinese: 对于黑暗兄弟会来说，那再容易不过了。（恐吓）

translations.chinese: 我在你地图上标出来。

translations.english: A sword? I remember a legend that Tiber Septim had attacked one of the enemy camps before he came to Old Hroldan. It could be there.
translations.chinese: 剑？我记得有个传说，说泰伯·塞普汀在抵达古霍尔丹前曾经攻打过敌人的一个营地，它可能在那儿。

translations.chinese: 有……有鬼。在我的旅店里转来转去，就跟是这里的主人一样。

translations.english: Yes. I've heard stories that Old Hroldan was haunted, but no ones seen a ghost here since the Great War.
translations.chinese: 没错。我听说过古霍尔丹闹鬼的故事，但自从浩大战争以来就没人见过。

translations.english: He's from the battle, I just know it. He's one of Tiber Septim's soldiers... back from the dead.
translations.chinese: 他应该是来自战场的，我知道。他是泰伯·塞普汀的士兵……死而复生了。

translations.chinese: 你说你见鬼了？

translations.english: It's been an honor to serve you, brother.
translations.chinese: 为你效劳是我的荣幸，兄弟。

translations.chinese: 那个。我把契约给了你，而你勉勉强强完成了。你实在令人难以忍受，而我……还是我。

translations.english: Ah, good to see you, brother. Gearing up to kill the Emperor? Exciting times. Exciting times, indeed.
translations.chinese: 哦，很高兴见到你，兄弟。准备好刺杀皇帝了吗？真是激动人心的时刻啊。

translations.english: So, the prodigal murderer returns. And the Gourmet?
translations.chinese: 啊，浪荡刺客回来了。美食家怎么样了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B70]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, the prodigal murderer returns. And the Gourmet? | ZH: 啊，浪荡刺客回来了。美食家怎么样了？ | SID: 00B73E

translations.english: Ah, you're back. Ready to try again, are we? Let's start from the top. You were sent to kill the Gourmet. And he is...
translations.chinese: 啊，回来了。准备好再试一次了吗？我们从头开始吧。你是被派去杀美食家的。他是……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B71]

translations.english: Remember, the Markarth Keep. That's where you'll find Anton Virane. Probably cooking up all of the Gourmet's recipes, passing them off as his own.
translations.chinese: 记住，在马卡斯要塞。去那里找安东·维拉尼。他可能正在照着美食家的食谱做菜，然后冒充成自己的成果。

translations.english: All you've got to do is find and kill one lousy chef. The clock is ticking...
translations.chinese: 你要做的就是找到并杀掉一个差劲的厨师。时间不等人哦……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: All I've ever wanted to do is serve this Sanctuary.
translations.chinese: 我一直以来只为这个圣所服务。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B75]
Translations:

translations.english: Yes, well. Perhaps someone else in the village can assist you? Please, you're starting to... frighten me.
translations.chinese: 呃，嗯。也许村里有人能帮你。拜托，你有点……吓到我了。

translations.english: (Remain silent)

translations.english: You performed your duties to the letter.
translations.chinese: 你完全履行了职责。

translations.english: You've got the Writ of Passage too, I see. Splendid, splendid...
translations.chinese: 我看你还拿到了通行证。甚好，甚好。

translations.english: So I gathered. It seems a certain Orc has disappeared. Which means you not only killed the Gourmet, but disposed of the body as well.
translations.chinese: 根据我得到的消息。有个兽人好像失踪了。也就是说你不仅杀了美食家，还把尸体处理好了。

translations.english: Ah, and word has come in from Markarth that the keep's cook has met an untimely demise.
translations.chinese: 啊，还有来自马卡斯的消息，城堡里的厨师不幸离世。

translations.english: Dead.
translations.chinese: 死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B77]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: You performed your duties to the letter. | ZH: 你完全履行了职责。 | SID: 00565D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: You've got the Writ of Passage too, I see. Splendid, splendid... | ZH: 我看你还拿到了通行证。甚好，甚好。 | SID: 00591D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: So I gathered. It seems a certain Orc has disappeared. Which means you not only killed the Gourmet, but disposed of the body as well. | ZH: 根据我得到的消息。有个兽人好像失踪了。也就是说你不仅杀了美食家，还把尸体处理好了。 | SID: 00AE04
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Ah, and word has come in from Markarth that the keep's cook has met an untimely demise. | ZH: 啊，还有来自马卡斯的消息，城堡里的厨师不幸离世。 | SID: 00DF73
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Dead. | ZH: 死了。 | SID: 00304D

translations.english: Right, which we had already established. And you managed to hide the body as well? Good.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我们已经确认了。你还把尸体藏起来了吧？干得好。

translations.english: Well, looks like you completed the contract as directed. Finally. A little sloppy, but, well... done is done.
translations.chinese: 好吧，看来你按要求完成了契约。就是有点草率，不过……过去的就过去吧。

translations.english: Here's your gold, with a little extra for hiding the body. Now go see Astrid. The final stage of the contract has come. The Emperor must fall.
translations.chinese: 这是你的金子，藏好尸体还有额外报酬。现在去找阿斯垂德吧。契约已经到了最后一步。皇帝必死无疑。

translations.english: You've got the Writ of Passage too, I see. So there's that. And Anton Virane has suffered an untimely fate, as well. Good.
translations.chinese: 我看你还拿到了通行证。安东·维拉尼也惨遭不幸。好。

translations.english: Dead.
translations.chinese: 死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B78]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Well, looks like you completed the contract as directed. Finally. A little sloppy, but, well... done is done. | ZH: 好吧，看来你按要求完成了契约。就是有点草率，不过……过去的就过去吧。 | SID: 0051C2
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Here's your gold, with a little extra for hiding the body. Now go see Astrid. The final stage of the contract has come. The Emperor must fall. | ZH: 这是你的金子，藏好尸体还有额外报酬。现在去找阿斯垂德吧。契约已经到了最后一步。皇帝必死无疑。 | SID: 00B75A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: You've got the Writ of Passage too, I see. So there's that. And Anton Virane has suffered an untimely fate, as well. Good. | ZH: 我看你还拿到了通行证。安东·维拉尼也惨遭不幸。好。 | SID: 00B75C
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Dead. | ZH: 死了。 | SID: 0064EB

translations.english: Oh wait, let me guess - you don't have them.
translations.chinese: 哦，等等，让我猜猜，你没拿到吧。

translations.english: Good. And his Writ of Passage?
translations.chinese: 好。他的通行证呢？

translations.english: Fool! Amateur! Without those papers you'll never be able to present yourself as the Gourmet! Off with you! Back to the body to retrieve them!
translations.chinese: 笨蛋！外行！没有那些文件你怎么把自己伪装成美食家！赶紧去尸体上拿回来！

translations.english: Dead.
translations.chinese: 死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Oh wait, let me guess - you don't have them. | ZH: 哦，等等，让我猜猜，你没拿到吧。 | SID: 008C7C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Good. And his Writ of Passage? | ZH: 好。他的通行证呢？ | SID: 00B757
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Fool! Amateur! Without those papers you'll never be able to present yourself as the Gourmet! Off with you! Back to the body to retrieve them! | ZH: 笨蛋！外行！没有那些文件你怎么把自己伪装成美食家！赶紧去尸体上拿回来！ | SID: 00CA37
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Dead. | ZH: 死了。 | SID: 00B751

translations.english: But why? Why, pray tell, have I received word that Anton Virane is still walking around Markarth, hale and healthy as the day he was born?
translations.chinese: 但是为什么？请问我为什么得到消息说安东·维拉尼还在马卡斯活蹦乱跳，就和他刚出生时一样健康？

translations.english: Back to Markarth with you! Virane must be silenced! He's a potential witness, you witless dagger jabber!
translations.chinese: 回马卡斯！维拉尼必须闭嘴！他是潜在的目击证人，你个呆子！

translations.english: Good, good. And you've got the Writ of Passage too, I see, so that's done.
translations.chinese: 好，好。我看见你拿到通行证了。那就算办成了。

translations.english: Dead.
translations.chinese: 死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068B7A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But why? Why, pray tell, have I received word that Anton Virane is still walking around Markarth, hale and healthy as the day he was born? | ZH: 但是为什么？请问我为什么得到消息说安东·维拉尼还在马卡斯活蹦乱跳，就和他刚出生时一样健康？ | SID: 0000F4

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Dead. | ZH: 死了。 | SID: 008666

translations.english: But unfortunately, that inn is abuzz with the news of somebody killing one of their guests! What, hiding the body was too much for you to handle?
translations.chinese: 但不幸的是，旅馆里正充斥着客人被杀的消息！怎么，把尸体藏起来有这么难吗？

translations.english: Good, good. And you've got the Writ of Passage, too, I see. So there's that.
translations.chinese: 很好。我看你拿到通行证了。那事情就算办成了。

translations.english: I've also received word from Markarth. It would seem Anton Virane has suffered an untimely fate, as well. Good.
translations.chinese: 我也收到马卡斯传来的消息，看来安东·维拉尼也身遭不测了。很好。

translations.english: Bah! Useless. Here's your gold. Now go see Astrid. The time to move against the Emperor has finally come. Sithis help us all.
translations.chinese: 呸！真没用。这是你的金币。现在去找阿斯垂德。对抗皇帝的时刻到来了。西帝斯庇佑我们所有人。

translations.english: Dead.
translations.chinese: 死了。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Dead. | ZH: 死了。 | SID: 00B747

translations.english: Speak with Ulfric, he's expecting word from Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 去跟乌弗瑞克谈谈。他在等白漫城的消息。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068BC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Speak with Ulfric, he's expecting word from Whiterun. | ZH: 去跟乌弗瑞克谈谈。他在等白漫城的消息。 | SID: 009527

translations.english: Got one all saddled and ready to go. What are you willing to pay?
translations.chinese: 马鞍备好了，随时准备出发。你愿意出多少钱？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Got one all saddled and ready to go. What are you willing to pay? | ZH: 马鞍备好了，随时准备出发。你愿意出多少钱？ | SID: 00A9D7

translations.english: Not today. Sold my last one. Pretty sure I sold it to you.
translations.chinese: 今天不行了。我最后一匹已经卖出去了。而且还是卖给你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not today. Sold my last one. Pretty sure I sold it to you. | ZH: 今天不行了。我最后一匹已经卖出去了。而且还是卖给你。 | SID: 0062CF

translations.english: Yeah, I got one for sale.
translations.chinese: 可以，我这里有一匹可以买。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah, I got one for sale. | ZH: 可以，我这里有一匹可以买。 | SID: 00A17D

translations.english: You could if I had one. Sold my last available horse to someone that looked an awful lot like you.
translations.chinese: 如果我还有的话，倒是能买。但最后一匹我卖给了一个跟你长得特别像的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You could if I had one. Sold my last available horse to someone that looked an awful lot like you. | ZH: 如果我还有的话，倒是能买。但最后一匹我卖给了一个跟你长得特别像的人。 | SID: 002964

translations.english: Suit yourself.
translations.chinese: 随你便。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Suit yourself. | ZH: 随你便。 | SID: 00336E

translations.english: Off with ya then. I've got work to do.
translations.chinese: 那就去吧。我还有工作。

agentText:

EDID: [00068CEE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Off with ya then. I've got work to do. | ZH: 那就去吧。我还有工作。 | SID: 00D7C8

translations.english: You've got a deal. It's the one with the saddle.
translations.chinese: 成交。带马鞍的那个归你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CF1]
Translations:
