translations.english: Then come back when you've got that much.
translations.chinese: 等你有更多钱再来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068CF2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then come back when you've got that much. | ZH: 等你有更多钱再来吧。 | SID: 009B2B

translations.english: That'll do. She's all saddled up for you.
translations.chinese: 成交了。她已经准备好归你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 是啊，我也没说不是。

translations.english: That's a terrible story.
translations.chinese: 真是个糟糕的故事。

translations.english: I'll see about getting this order filled right away. Here, a few septims for you.
translations.chinese: 我去看看能不能马上出货。给，这些塞普汀是给你的。

translations.english: Oh dear. Darkwater Crossing needs medicines for its miners?
translations.chinese: 哦天。暗水岔口的矿工需要药品？

translations.english: Here, let me teach you a thing or two about Alteration magic. It's the least I can do.
translations.chinese: 来，我教你一两手变化系魔法。这也是我应该做的。

translations.english: Well, well, you actually did what you said you were going to do. I'm impressed.
translations.chinese: 好吧，好吧，你真的说到做到了。令人印象深刻。

translations.english: He'll be fine, I just hate worrying about his worrying.
translations.chinese: 他会没事的。我只是不想每天为他的担心而担心。

translations.english: My clan's shield. So Lenne really did stumble into that cave and was eaten by monsters.
translations.chinese: 我家族的盾牌。所以伦内真的是跌跌撞撞闯进山洞被怪物吃了。

translations.english: In honor of his memory, let me show you a few shield techniques. And tell me if you're leaving town. Be good to travel again.
translations.chinese: 为了纪念他，我给你展示些防御技巧吧。如果你要离开镇子，可以告诉我一声。我很乐意再次出去旅行。

translations.english: I found your shield.
translations.chinese: 我找到你的盾牌了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068F32]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I found your shield. | ZH: 我找到你的盾牌了。 | SID: 006A09

translations.english: Owes me a lot of coin for drinks. I keep telling him not to worry about it, but he's got the stubborn Nord blood.
translations.chinese: 他欠了我一大笔酒钱。我一直告诉他别在意，但他这个诺德人太顽固了。

translations.english: He's been in Kynesgrove forever. Great storyteller. Keeps everyone's spirits up.
translations.chinese: 他一直待在凯娜之林。不错的说书人。每个人都能振作起来。

translations.english: Damn fool doesn't have the coin to pay me back, so he just beats himself up over it, and then he gets thirsty, and it cycles all over again.
translations.chinese: 这傻蛋没钱还我，就打自己一顿，然后口渴了又来，就这样循环往复了。

translations.english: Who's Roggi?
translations.chinese: 罗吉是谁？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068F33]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: He's been in Kynesgrove forever. Great storyteller. Keeps everyone's spirits up. | ZH: 他一直待在凯娜之林。不错的说书人。每个人都能振作起来。 | SID: 009A15

translations.english: It's not any of your bother, so I don't see what you're apologizing for.
translations.chinese: 本来也不关你的事，不必道歉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068F39]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's not any of your bother, so I don't see what you're apologizing for. | ZH: 本来也不关你的事，不必道歉。 | SID: 0013BF

translations.english: If you want to go to the trouble, feel free. I suppose I could offer you a bit of free Alteration training when you get back.
translations.chinese: 如果你想自找麻烦，那就请便吧。你回来的时候我可以免费给你进行些变化系魔法的训练。

agentText:

translations.english: Poor Roggi. If you're feeling charitable, buy the Nord a mead. He's good for it.
translations.chinese: 可怜的罗吉。如果你够慷慨，请那个诺德人喝杯蜜酒吧。他挺喜欢喝酒的。

translations.english: Up for a little hunting? My husband is being a sad stick, so I can't go myself.
translations.chinese: 想来次小小狩猎吗？我丈夫总是有些顽固，不让我一个人去。

translations.english: That's right. Used to explore all over. I'm the one who originally found the mine Darkwater Crossing was built around.
translations.chinese: 没错。我曾经四处探险。是我最先发现了暗水岔口附近有矿。

translations.english: I was actually scouting a bit the other day, old times sake. Spied a brigand heading back to his camp.
translations.chinese: 我前几天还出去侦察了呢，老毛病了。我看到有个强盗正在往营地走。

translations.english: You were an adventurer?
translations.chinese: 你是冒险家？

agentText:

translations.english: By Azura, it gets hot in there. I use Frost Salts for a potion to keep the heat bearable, but I'm out.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉在上，那里面太热了。我要用霜盐来制作药水缓解高温，但我现在没有了。

translations.english: Nosy one, huh? I was a mage back in Morrowind. I lend my talents to the mines here, helping them keep the tunnels safe.
translations.chinese: 很爱问闲事吗？我在晨风的时候也是个法师。我把自己的能力用在这里的矿场上，帮他们维持矿道的安全。

translations.chinese: 我明白你的意思。告诉艾德拉，对钱那么执着是我不对。

translations.english: You ready to listen to reason now?
translations.chinese: 准备好听我解释了吗？

translations.english: It'll be good to not have to hear him whining about his debts.
translations.chinese: 不用再听他抱怨自己的债务真好。

translations.english: Roggi pawned a few of his things back when he still had things to pawn. Take them.
translations.chinese: 罗吉当掉了一些他当时还能当的东西。你拿上吧。

translations.english: Roggi won't be complaining anymore.
translations.chinese: 罗吉不会再抱怨了。

translations.chinese: 真正的诺德会自己解决问题，但至少这样艾德拉能拿到自己的钱。谢谢！告诉她我会没事的。

translations.english: What if I pay it? (<BribeCost> gold)
translations.chinese: 如果我来付钱呢？(<BribeCost>金币)

translations.chinese: 这不是我要付给艾德拉的钱，我会用我自己的钱还给她。

translations.english: This brings back memories. Come back when you're done and maybe I'll be up to showing you a few tricks.
translations.chinese: 这真是勾起我的回忆了。等你办完再来，也许我能为你展示一些技巧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00068F61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This brings back memories. Come back when you're done and maybe I'll be up to showing you a few tricks. | ZH: 这真是勾起我的回忆了。等你办完再来，也许我能为你展示一些技巧。 | SID: 00442E

translations.english: I guess if you're telling me to stop worrying about it, maybe I should just let it go. Thank you, friend.
translations.chinese: 如果你让我别再担心，那我是该放下了。谢谢你了，朋友。

translations.english: Iddra wants you to forget about all that coin you owe.
translations.chinese: 艾德拉希望你忘掉自己欠的钱。

agentText:

translations.english: What do you think I am, a beggar? My family has always paid back every single coin we owed, going back to Tiber Septim's time.
translations.chinese: 你以为我是什么人，乞丐吗？自从泰伯·塞普汀时代起，我的家族就从来不会欠一分钱。

translations.english: Iddra wants you to forget about all that coin you owe.
translations.chinese: 艾德拉希望你忘掉自己欠的钱。

translations.english: Hey, if you find it, I could show you some of the clan's favorite fighting moves. They're all shield techniques.
translations.chinese: 嘿，如果你找到了，我可以给你展示展示我们氏族最喜欢的战斗动作，都是很好的格挡技术。

translations.english: According to my grandfather at least. He swore that version of the legend was true, even found the cave old Lenne stumbled into.
translations.chinese: 至少我祖父是这么认为的。他发誓说那个传说是真的，甚至还发现了老伦内偶然走进的山洞。

translations.english: Your ancestral shield is lost in a cave?
translations.chinese: 你祖先的盾牌丢在山洞里了？

translations.chinese: 有道理。

translations.english: I don't have time right now.
translations.chinese: 我现在没时间。

translations.chinese: 好吧。你说话像个玛拉祭司似的，但我明白你的意思。告诉他把账忘了吧。

translations.english: He's an old man. Let it go. (Persuade)

translations.chinese: 不得不承认，你很会打拳。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Think, please, just for a moment, about what he would do if he knew its true value. | ZH: 想想吧，如果他知道它的真正价值，会怎么做。 | SID: 00CF49
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Have you lost your mind? | ZH: 你疯了吧？ | SID: 00FDF5

translations.english: It... It's very valuable. Critical to my work, and one-of-a-kind. That's all I care to say for now.
translations.chinese: 它……非常珍贵。对我的工作至关重要，而且独一无二。我只能这么说了。

agentText:

translations.english: Well, yes. I mean, no. That is, it might, but I'm not completely sure. I'm no tonal architect, I've only read their writings. Scraps, really.
translations.chinese: 嗯，没错。我是说，没有。但也有可能，我不完全确定。我不是音调工程师，我只是读过他们作品。还只有残卷。

translations.english: I attempted to build my own, based on designs and using parts you helped to provide. My very own Dwarven Convector.
translations.chinese: 我正在尝试基于设计和你提供的零件自己建造一台。我自己的矮人环流器。

translations.english: It worked, but not fully. And the uhh... The device was destroyed in the process.
translations.chinese: 它已经运作了，但还不够。而且……装置在实验过程中毁坏了。

translations.english: The soul gem by itself isn't enough, you see. It needs to be altered, purified. The dwarves had machines for this sort of thing.
translations.chinese: 灵魂石本身是不够的。需要改变和净化。矮人有处理这种情况的仪器。

translations.english: And perhaps... well, I don't wish to speculate, but... What if we could contact the dwarves? What if they're still out there? Imagine!
translations.chinese: 也许……哎，我也不愿意猜测，但……如果我们能联系上矮人呢？如果他们还在外面呢？想想吧！

translations.english: Well, I... Don't you see?
translations.chinese: 啊，你……你不明白吗？

translations.english: Unlocking this mystery... The story alone is worth more riches than you can even imagine.
translations.chinese: 解开谜题……解开这个故事本身的价值就超乎你的想象。

translations.english: I had retained Enthir's services in, uhh, acquiring something specific.
translations.chinese: 我说过帮恩希尔办事，来，来获取一些特定的东西。

translations.english: But now he's refusing to deliver. Could you perhaps speak with him, and see if we can come to some sort of arrangement?
translations.chinese: 但他现在拒绝交付。你能不能跟他谈谈，看看能不能达成什么协议？

translations.english: Nothing, nothing at all! Arniel already overpaid for... whatever it is.
translations.chinese: 没有，没有！不管那是什么……阿内尔都已经付过钱了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A03F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nothing, nothing at all! Arniel already overpaid for... whatever it is. | ZH: 没有，没有！不管那是什么……阿内尔都已经付过钱了。 | SID: 007326

translations.english: I don't know. He never told me.
translations.chinese: 不知道。他没告诉我。

translations.english: He made most of the arrangements himself, he just needed it transported from Morrowind. That's what I agreed to help with.
translations.chinese: 大部分都是他自己安排的，只是想要从晨风运过来。这也是我答应帮忙的原因。

translations.english: If I'd known it was so important to him, I'd have charged him more.
translations.chinese: 如果我知道这对他这么重要，我就该多收点钱。

translations.english: No, no. Goodness, no!
translations.chinese: 不，不。真的没有！

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.english: At least, I don't think so. No, it's just... It's just something I'd prefer to keep to myself.
translations.chinese: 至少，我认为没有。不是，我只是……只是不想让其他人知道这件事。

translations.english: Did I ask you to? Did you hear me say that?
translations.chinese: 我让你去了吗？你没听到我说的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A042]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did I ask you to? Did you hear me say that? | ZH: 我让你去了吗？你没听到我说的吗？ | SID: 004A08

translations.english: He's so afraid to talk to me he's sending you to do it? I should've expected as much.
translations.chinese: 他不敢跟我说话所以就让你来了？我早该预料到的。

translations.english: I'm afraid you've been a little mis-informed. I have something of mine, that I was going to sell to Arniel.
translations.chinese: 恐怕你被误导了。我确实有一样他想买的东西。

translations.english: Oh dear.
translations.chinese: 天啊。

agentText:

translations.english: Though... Perhaps there's another option. I, umm, I may require further assistance from you.
translations.chinese: 尽管……也许还有其他选择。我，嗯，我可能需要你进一步帮助。

translations.english: Hmm? No, no. No! I'm too close now. Can't take the time.
translations.chinese: 嗯？不，不，不！我已经十分接近了。没时间了。

translations.english: Enthir is once again holding out on me. He refuses to deliver yet another item absolutely essential to my work!
translations.chinese: 恩希尔又在瞒着我。他又一次拒送一件对我研究至关重要的东西！

translations.english: I am close, so close! You must force him to see reason!
translations.chinese: 明明快了，明明快了！你得赶紧让他明白这个道理！

translations.english: No, and at this rate, I never shall!
translations.chinese: 不，照这速度，永远不会了！

translations.english: Thank you for this. I have a great deal of work ahead of me.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。我还有很多工作要做。

translations.english: Do you?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

translations.english: Wonderful. I was afraid I'd have to give up, and when I'm so close...
translations.chinese: 太好了。我都快要放弃了，明明就快成功了。

translations.chinese: 别小看我！

EDID: [0006A048]

translations.english: I set up the whole deal. A courier was supposed to be bringing it from Morrowind. He never arrived.
translations.chinese: 整个交易是我负责的。信使应该从晨风送过来。但他没有到。

translations.english: You're not listening to me. I don't have it.
translations.chinese: 你没听我说吗。我没有。

translations.english: Okay? The deal was already done, the thing just never showed up. I can't help that!
translations.chinese: 明白了？交易已经达成了，但东西一直没到。我有什么办法！

translations.chinese: 不，不不不。不可能。

translations.english: Ten of them should be enough for me to get a better understanding of how they were crafted. That's all I need, all right?
translations.chinese: 十个应该足够以让我更好理解它们的制作过程了。我就需要这么多，好吗？

translations.english: Just... Just bring me some Dwemer cogs. I need to examine them for the methods used in forging them.
translations.chinese: 只需要……给我拿些锻莫齿轮。我需要检查它们的锻造方法。

translations.english: I've already told him. I don't have it!
translations.chinese: 我已经告诉过他，我没有！

translations.english: Oh, by the Divines, you too?
translations.chinese: 哦，圣灵啊，怎么你也这么说？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: He has some simple-minded courier delivering it?
translations.chinese: 他是找了个傻子来送吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A04D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He has some simple-minded courier delivering it? | ZH: 他是找了个傻子来送吗？ | SID: 00F2A1

translations.english: I suspect it may be due to the nature of the soul gem versus the crystals this was intended for. Destroys the equipment in the process.
translations.chinese: 我怀疑这可能是由于灵魂石类似水晶的性质。这个过程会破坏装置。

translations.english: Just place the soul gem inside, and heat the Convector. At least three seconds. You'll almost certainly need to find multiple Convectors.
translations.chinese: 只需要把灵魂石放进去，加热环流器至少三秒。你肯定能找到很多个环流器。

translations.english: But, ahh... It's effective. Three times, and the crystal should be ready for the next step. Isn't this exciting?
translations.chinese: 但是，啊……肯定有效。三次，加热三次水晶就可以进入下一步了。很兴奋吧？

translations.english: Now this spell is not for defending yourself, but it's just right for heating the Convector. At least three seconds' burn is necessary.
translations.chinese: 这个法术不是用来自卫的，但正好可以加热环流器。至少要加热三秒钟。

translations.english: Wonderful, just wonderful! I knew I could count on you!
translations.chinese: 好，太好了！我就知道你靠得住！

translations.english: After years and years of work, I'm closing in on a way to investigate what happened through experimentation.
translations.chinese: 多年努力研究之下，我终于找到了通过一种实验来调查当年的方法。

translations.english: Only now... Well, it's simply a disaster.
translations.chinese: 只是现在……哎，简直惨不忍睹。

translations.english: Instant, unexplainable. The stories have fascinated me... Ever since I was young, I wanted to know what really happened.
translations.chinese: 一瞬间失踪，难以解释。这些故事让我十分着迷。我从小就想知道到底发生了什么。

translations.english: Their disappearance, of course!
translations.chinese: 当然是他们为何失踪！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A04F]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Their disappearance, of course! | ZH: 当然是他们为何失踪！ | SID: 00B644

translations.english: I heard one of them was just arrested trying to sneak into the city. If he's locked up in the jail, perhaps you can get it out of him.
translations.chinese: 我听说他们中的一个刚刚因为企图偷入城镇被捕了。如果他还被关在监狱里，也许你能从他嘴里套出来。

translations.english: Please, I know I'm asking you to do something difficult, maybe even dangerous. I just don't know who else I can trust.
translations.chinese: 拜托，我知道是在为难你，甚至很危险。我只是不知道该相信谁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A050]

translations.english: You've seen them? Then waste no time, head there at once!
translations.chinese: 你见过他们了？那就别浪费时间了，赶紧去！

translations.english: The longer they're around, the more danger I'm in! Please, kill Kematu and end this nightmare for me!
translations.chinese: 他们在我身边待得越久，我就越危险！求求你了，杀了凯马图，结束我的噩梦！

translations.english: I've run across these Alik'r before. I know where they're hiding.
translations.chinese: 我之前见过这些阿里克'尔。我知道他们藏在哪里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A051]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You've seen them? Then waste no time, head there at once! | ZH: 你见过他们了？那就别浪费时间了，赶紧去！ | SID: 00676A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The longer they're around, the more danger I'm in! Please, kill Kematu and end this nightmare for me! | ZH: 他们在我身边待得越久，我就越危险！求求你了，杀了凯马图，结束我的噩梦！ | SID: 00C2D0
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've run across these Alik'r before. I know where they're hiding. | ZH: 我之前见过这些阿里克'尔。我知道他们藏在哪里。 | SID: 00B060

translations.english: Last I heard he intended to pass through Eastmarch on his way here.
translations.chinese: 我上次听说他打算经过东陲。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A052]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Last I heard he intended to pass through Eastmarch on his way here. | ZH: 我上次听说他打算经过东陲。 | SID: 00AC42

translations.english: Last I'd heard, he was crossing the border from Morrowind into The Rift.
translations.chinese: 我上次听说他打算从晨风穿越边境到裂痕。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A053]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Last I'd heard, he was crossing the border from Morrowind into The Rift. | ZH: 我上次听说他打算从晨风穿越边境到裂痕。 | SID: 002B4F

translations.english: Without it, I cannot finish my work. All these years, so much time, so much energy...
translations.chinese: 没了它，我就无法完成研究。这么多年，多少时间，多少精力……

translations.english: It can't be lost. It just can't! It's irreplaceable, do you understand?
translations.chinese: 不能丢失。绝不能！不可替代啊，明白吗？

translations.english: You must find it! It cannot end this way! Not after I've worked so hard!
translations.chinese: 你一定要找到！不能就这么结束！不能让我的努力付之东流！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It can't be lost. It just can't! It's irreplaceable, do you understand? | ZH: 不能丢失。绝不能！不可替代啊，明白吗？ | SID: 0089D5
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You must find it! It cannot end this way! Not after I've worked so hard! | ZH: 你一定要找到！不能就这么结束！不能让我的努力付之东流！ | SID: 00D184

translations.english: What?
translations.chinese: 什么？

translations.english: I... I don't understand. Where is it?
translations.chinese: 我……不明白。它在哪儿？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A055]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? | ZH: 什么？ | SID: 00B679
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I... I don't understand. Where is it? | ZH: 我……不明白。它在哪儿？ | SID: 00DDBF

translations.english: Well, let's not get ahead of ourselves. It's too early to be getting excited. Still, this is most encouraging.
translations.chinese: 好吧，不想太多了，现在激动为时过早。不过，这足以鼓舞人心了。

translations.english: Thank you again. If I require anything else, I shall be sure and let you know.
translations.chinese: 再次向你致谢。如果还有需要的话，我会告知你的。

translations.english: Ah, that's excellent news. This will be most helpful in furthering my research.
translations.chinese: 啊，真是个好消息，对我进一步的研究很有帮助。

translations.english: I'm afraid I can't offer you much right now, but please take this. And perhaps, if this is all successful...
translations.chinese: 恐怕我现在提供不了更多了，但还是请你收下这个。也许，这一切能成功的话……

translations.english: I've got the cogs you asked for.
translations.chinese: 我拿到你需要的齿轮了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A056]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Thank you again. If I require anything else, I shall be sure and let you know. | ZH: 再次向你致谢。如果还有需要的话，我会告知你的。 | SID: 002898

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I'm afraid I can't offer you much right now, but please take this. And perhaps, if this is all successful... | ZH: 恐怕我现在提供不了更多了，但还是请你收下这个。也许，这一切能成功的话…… | SID: 00B626
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've got the cogs you asked for. | ZH: 我拿到你需要的齿轮了。 | SID: 00B625

translations.english: I simply need more pieces of Dwemer equipment to study. It's nothing dangerous... At least, not necessarily.
translations.chinese: 我还需要更多锻莫设备进行研究。没什么危险的……至少，不一定有危险。

translations.english: And please, let's just... Let's keep this between us.
translations.chinese: 拜托，只是……要保密。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A057]

translations.english: The problem is that it'll be a little difficult to acquire, seeing as how it's in the hands of someone who isn't exactly friendly.
translations.chinese: 问题是，想要拿到有点困难，因为现在是个不太友好的人拿着它。

translations.english: I have a... friend, let's say, who's interested in a staff. A particular one.
translations.chinese: 打个比方吧，我有一个……朋友，对一个特别的法杖特别感兴趣。

translations.english: So, you bring that staff back here, and I'll consider it payment for the item Arniel was after.
translations.chinese: 你把那东西带回来，权当是交换阿内尔想要的东西了。

translations.english: It's nothing dangerous, so don't worry. I'm not even sure why he wants it, but then that's not really my concern. He's willing to pay for it.
translations.chinese: 没有什么危险，所以不用担心。我都不知道他为什么那么想要，也与我无关。总之他愿意付钱就是了。

translations.english: You mean the official sort of business? Hmm, well... no. No, not really.
translations.chinese: 你说公事吗？嗯，嗯……没有，确实没有。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A059]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You mean the official sort of business? Hmm, well... no. No, not really. | ZH: 你说公事吗？嗯，嗯……没有，确实没有。 | SID: 005CCA

translations.english: As a matter of fact, there is something you can do for me.
translations.chinese: 事实上，你可以帮我办件事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A05A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As a matter of fact, there is something you can do for me. | ZH: 事实上，你可以帮我办件事。 | SID: 001E89

translations.english: What? Oh, no. No, no. I need more time to research the dwarven machinery. Thank you for offering, though.
translations.chinese: 什么？哦不不不。我需要更多时间来研究矮人的机械。不过还是多谢你的美意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A05B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Oh, no. No, no. I need more time to research the dwarven machinery. Thank you for offering, though. | ZH: 什么？哦不不不。我需要更多时间来研究矮人的机械。不过还是多谢你的美意。 | SID: 00B62A

translations.english: I don't know. Are you not listening at all?
translations.chinese: 不知道。你没听么？

translations.english: It was a simple task, so I didn't keep close tabs on it like I do with the dangerous stuff.
translations.chinese: 这是个简单的任务，所以我没像处理危险品那样密切关注。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A07C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't know. Are you not listening at all? | ZH: 不知道。你没听么？ | SID: 00B071
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It was a simple task, so I didn't keep close tabs on it like I do with the dangerous stuff. | ZH: 这是个简单的任务，所以我没像处理危险品那样密切关注。 | SID: 00B696

translations.english: Lacking the heart of a dead god myself, I was attempting to substitute a rather specific soul gem. The ahh, the one you helped me acquire.
translations.chinese: 我没有已死神灵的心脏，只能用一颗特殊的灵魂石来代替，就是你帮我弄到的那颗。

translations.english: The dwarves were very clever, tapping into and drawing power from the Heart of Lorkhan itself.
translations.chinese: 矮人聪慧异常，能够从洛克汗之心中汲取能量。

translations.english: Without boring you with the, ahh, details, I am attempting to re-create the circumstances of the event.
translations.chinese: 我不想让你为细节烦恼，我正在尝试重现当时的情形。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The dwarves were very clever, tapping into and drawing power from the Heart of Lorkhan itself. | ZH: 矮人聪慧异常，能够从洛克汗之心中汲取能量。 | SID: 002507

translations.english: It may not be "official", but there is a, uhh, project I've been working on.
translations.chinese: 但如果不是什么“公事”的话，确实有一个，呃，我一直在做的项目。

translations.english: But... I can't help but notice that you're doing quite well for yourself, rising through the ranks and all.
translations.chinese: 但是……我不禁注意到你做得很好，步步高升。

translations.english: I wonder if perhaps you could assist with it.
translations.chinese: 不知可否请你帮忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A082]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It may not be "official", but there is a, uhh, project I've been working on. | ZH: 但如果不是什么“公事”的话，确实有一个，呃，我一直在做的项目。 | SID: 000F58
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: But... I can't help but notice that you're doing quite well for yourself, rising through the ranks and all. | ZH: 但是……我不禁注意到你做得很好，步步高升。 | SID: 006D7E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I wonder if perhaps you could assist with it. | ZH: 不知可否请你帮忙。 | SID: 00D551

translations.english: What could be worth studying about a long-lost civilization?
translations.chinese: 一个遗失已久的文明难道不值得研究吗？

translations.english: Precisely!
translations.chinese: 没错！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A084]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: What could be worth studying about a long-lost civilization? | ZH: 一个遗失已久的文明难道不值得研究吗？ | SID: 00B64A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Precisely! | ZH: 没错！ | SID: 00BFED

translations.english: All right, you delivered on your end, so I'll deliver on mine. Here's the gem Arniel was after.
translations.chinese: 好，你我各取所需。这是阿内尔要找的灵魂石。

translations.english: Well, well.
translations.chinese: 好，好。

translations.english: Can't imagine what he expects to do with that... it's warped beyond any ability to capture a soul.
translations.chinese: 真不知道他要拿那玩意儿干什么……明明已经被扭曲得不能捕捉灵魂了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A085]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: All right, you delivered on your end, so I'll deliver on mine. Here's the gem Arniel was after. | ZH: 好，你我各取所需。这是阿内尔要找的灵魂石。 | SID: 00187D

translations.english: Now? I announce to all of Markarth that I have returned. Don't worry about your name. They'll know who to blame and fear after today.
translations.chinese: 现在？我要向全马卡斯宣告我回来了。不用担心你的名声。自今天起他们知道该责怪谁，该惧怕谁了。

translations.english: It'll take years, but I'll organize the Forsworn again. We'll reclaim our land, and then, when power is ours, we'll have peace. A kingdom.
translations.chinese: 虽然会花几年，但我会重组弃誓者。我们要夺回自己的土地，当我们拥有了权力，我们也会拥有和平。还有一个王国。

translations.english: Until then, let me offer you a warning. Beware the Forsworn. No place in the Reach is safe from us now.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，给你个忠告。小心弃誓者。瑞驰没有任何地方能躲避我们。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A170]

translations.english: Here you go. Your continued assistance to the cause is appreciated.
translations.chinese: 给你。感谢你对我们的事业持续帮助。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A26D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Here you go. Your continued assistance to the cause is appreciated. | ZH: 给你。感谢你对我们的事业持续帮助。 | SID: 00B5FB

translations.english: I wish more had the dedication and strength of character that you demonstrate. I'll be sure this gets put to good use.
translations.chinese: 真希望更多人能拥有你这样的献身精神和坚强品格。我会好好利用这笔钱的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A26E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I wish more had the dedication and strength of character that you demonstrate. I'll be sure this gets put to good use. | ZH: 真希望更多人能拥有你这样的献身精神和坚强品格。我会好好利用这笔钱的。 | SID: 002A97

translations.english: I surrender! Give me a few hours to gather my household, and I'll depart. You have my word.
translations.chinese: 我投降！给我几个小时去召集家人，然后我就走。我保证。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A26F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I surrender! Give me a few hours to gather my household, and I'll depart. You have my word. | ZH: 我投降！给我几个小时去召集家人，然后我就走。我保证。 | SID: 005A1A

translations.english: I assume you saw the Gildergreen? Big tree, all burnt up, in the middle of the Wind District.
translations.chinese: 我猜你已经看到过镀绿树了？就是风区中央被烧毁的那棵大树。

translations.english: It's part of the Temple of Kynareth. People want Danica to do something about it, but I don't know what they expect.
translations.chinese: 它是凯娜瑞丝神殿的一部分。人们想让丹尼卡做点什么，但我不知道他们在期待些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I assume you saw the Gildergreen? Big tree, all burnt up, in the middle of the Wind District. | ZH: 我猜你已经看到过镀绿树了？就是风区中央被烧毁的那棵大树。 | SID: 000E10
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's part of the Temple of Kynareth. People want Danica to do something about it, but I don't know what they expect. | ZH: 它是凯娜瑞丝神殿的一部分。人们想让丹尼卡做点什么，但我不知道他们在期待些什么。 | SID: 009CFA

translations.english: Don't forget the ranting and raving. About the Night Mother, how she was the true leader of the Dark Brotherhood, and Astrid was just a "pretender."
translations.chinese: 别忘了，他胡言乱语大吼大叫，说夜母才是黑暗兄弟会真正的领袖，而阿斯垂德只是“冒牌货”。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A3DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't forget the ranting and raving. About the Night Mother, how she was the true leader of the Dark Brotherhood, and Astrid was just a "pretender." | ZH: 别忘了，他胡言乱语大吼大叫，说夜母才是黑暗兄弟会真正的领袖，而阿斯垂德只是“冒牌货”。 | SID: 00ECFD

translations.english: This is not the time to keep Astrid waiting.
translations.chinese: 不要让阿斯垂德干等着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A3DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is not the time to keep Astrid waiting. | ZH: 不要让阿斯垂德干等着。 | SID: 00EEBD

translations.english: It's true, I'm afraid. Cicero was a little whirlwind, slashing this way and that. It would have been funny, if he weren't trying to murder us all.
translations.chinese: 恐怕是真的。西塞罗像阵小旋风一样到处乱砍。要不是他想把我们全杀了，还挺有意思的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A3DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's true, I'm afraid. Cicero was a little whirlwind, slashing this way and that. It would have been funny, if he weren't trying to murder us all. | ZH: 恐怕是真的。西塞罗像阵小旋风一样到处乱砍。要不是他想把我们全杀了，还挺有意思的。 | SID: 00356C

translations.english: Gone? Every one of them? Why, that's incredible.
translations.chinese: 没了？每一个？为什么，不敢相信。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006A6FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Gone? Every one of them? Why, that's incredible. | ZH: 没了？每一个？为什么，不敢相信。 | SID: 00A88E

translations.english: No one's been hurt yet, and they seem to be staying in the mine, but who knows how long that will last?
translations.chinese: 目前还没人受伤，它们似乎要待在矿场里，但谁知道能维持多久？

translations.english: Moved right in and made themselves at home. Did it overnight. I'm not even sure exactly where they came from.
translations.chinese: 它们直接搬了进去，一夜之间就筑起了巢。我甚至不确定它们是从哪儿来的。

translations.english: If we can't get back into the mine, our town is sunk.
translations.chinese: 如果我们回不了矿井，那我们的镇子就完了。

agentText:

translations.english: You want to work on something that's not officially allowed? Don't tell anyone you're doing it.
translations.chinese: 想做些官方不允许的事吗？不要告诉任何人就行。

translations.english: Let me give you a bit of advice.
translations.chinese: 我得给你些建议。

translations.english: You tell anyone that I told you, and I'll fry you from the inside out. Got it? Good.
translations.chinese: 要是你把我给供出去，那我就把你从里到外烤了。明白了？好。

translations.chinese: 欢迎，独孤城的大家！我们吟游诗人学院很高兴在这里庆祝火烧奥拉夫王。

translations.english: Good luck. Lucan and I will be waiting for you back in the shop.
translations.chinese: 祝你好运，我和卢坎在店里等你。

translations.english: Two hundred years ago, I would have lain down my life for the Unholy Matron. But that is an age long since passed. Astrid is my matron now.
translations.chinese: 两百年前，我愿意为不洁主母献出生命。但那是很久前的事了。现在阿斯垂德才是我的主母。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Two hundred years ago, I would have lain down my life for the Unholy Matron. But that is an age long since passed. Astrid is my matron now. | ZH: 两百年前，我愿意为不洁主母献出生命。但那是很久前的事了。现在阿斯垂德才是我的主母。 | SID: 003A43

translations.english: Though I admit, I find her Keeper a bit too exuberant for my liking.
translations.chinese: 但我得说，她的守护者实在太闹腾了。

translations.english: Without the Night Mother, there is no Dark Brotherhood. The Matron deserves our unwavering support and respect.
translations.chinese: 没有夜母就没有黑暗兄弟会。主母值得我们坚定不移的支持与尊重。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3D7]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Without the Night Mother, there is no Dark Brotherhood. The Matron deserves our unwavering support and respect. | ZH: 没有夜母就没有黑暗兄弟会。主母值得我们坚定不移的支持与尊重。 | SID: 00B536

translations.english: The witless fool and his pet corpse? Take a guess.
translations.chinese: 傻子小丑和他的宠物干尸？猜猜吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The witless fool and his pet corpse? Take a guess. | ZH: 傻子小丑和他的宠物干尸？猜猜吧。 | SID: 0074BC

translations.english: Scrounging for contracts, abandoning the Tenets. The Dark Brotherhood has been reduced to a group of common cutthroats. Frankly, it's embarrassing.
translations.chinese: 四处寻找契约，抛弃信条。黑暗兄弟会已经沦为一群寻常杀手了。说白了，令人尴尬。

translations.english: Their arrival is the best thing that's happened to this Sanctuary in years. Astrid is an effective leader, but we've been rudderless for too long.
translations.chinese: 这个圣所近年来最好的事莫过于他们到来了。阿斯垂德是个得力的领导，但我们已经失去指引太久了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Scrounging for contracts, abandoning the Tenets. The Dark Brotherhood has been reduced to a group of common cutthroats. Frankly, it's embarrassing. | ZH: 四处寻找契约，抛弃信条。黑暗兄弟会已经沦为一群寻常杀手了。说白了，令人尴尬。 | SID: 004E41
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Their arrival is the best thing that's happened to this Sanctuary in years. Astrid is an effective leader, but we've been rudderless for too long. | ZH: 这个圣所近年来最好的事莫过于他们到来了。阿斯垂德是个得力的领导，但我们已经失去指引太久了。 | SID: 00DD4A

translations.english: Truthfully? I'm not entirely sure. It's not that I don't have the utmost respect for Sithis, and the Night Mother, and the ancient ways. I do.
translations.chinese: 说真话吗？我不太确定。并不是我对西塞罗、夜母还有传统法则不抱尊重。当然还是尊重的。

translations.english: But I've never been much for religion. I kill because it's what I've been trained to do. It's all I know. So long as Astrid is happy, I'm happy.
translations.chinese: 但我从来不信仰宗教。杀人只是因为我被训练成了这样。我只知道做这些。阿斯垂德高兴，我就高兴。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Truthfully? I'm not entirely sure. It's not that I don't have the utmost respect for Sithis, and the Night Mother, and the ancient ways. I do. | ZH: 说真话吗？我不太确定。并不是我对西塞罗、夜母还有传统法则不抱尊重。当然还是尊重的。 | SID: 003E1F

translations.english: I don't like mimes, minstrels, thespians, acrobats, jugglers, troubadours or tumblers. Flutists give me a headache. I particularly hate jesters.
translations.chinese: 我不喜欢模仿士、卖唱的、演员、杂耍艺人、变戏法的、吟游诗人、耍杂技的。吹笛子的更让我头疼。最讨厌的就是小丑。

translations.english: As a rule, I'm also not crazy about the corpses of old women. For the Night Mother, I'll make an exception. But Astrid is the only mistress I serve.
translations.chinese: 一般来说，我对老娘们的尸体没兴趣。但夜母是个例外。不过阿斯垂德是我侍奉的唯一女主人。

agentText:

translations.english: My wife trusts you, and I trust her judgment. So you can't be all bad.
translations.chinese: 我妻子信任你，我相信她的判断。看来你也不是一无是处。

translations.english: Here's all you need to know: I'm a werewolf. I like killing things. I love Astrid. I hate annoying people. And the color blue gives me a headache.
translations.chinese: 你只需要知道，我是个狼人。我喜欢杀戮、爱阿斯垂德、讨厌烦人的家伙。蓝色让我头疼。

translations.english: Look. If you're trying to get to know me - don't. I don't like you, and I never will. It's nothing personal. But...
translations.chinese: 听着，如果你想了解我，还是算了。我不喜欢你，永远不会。不是针对你。但……

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: My wife trusts you, and I trust her judgment. So you can't be all bad. | ZH: 我妻子信任你，我相信她的判断。看来你也不是一无是处。 | SID: 003D4E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here's all you need to know: I'm a werewolf. I like killing things. I love Astrid. I hate annoying people. And the color blue gives me a headache. | ZH: 你只需要知道，我是个狼人。我喜欢杀戮、爱阿斯垂德、讨厌烦人的家伙。蓝色让我头疼。 | SID: 00F6A1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Look. If you're trying to get to know me - don't. I don't like you, and I never will. It's nothing personal. But... | ZH: 听着，如果你想了解我，还是算了。我不喜欢你，永远不会。不是针对你。但…… | SID: 00F88E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What can you tell me about yourself? | ZH: 能跟我说说你自己吗？ | SID: 006C05

translations.english: Oh yes, I was once brother to the Companions. Let's just say they found my methods "unsettling." The Dark Brotherhood, obviously, feels differently.
translations.chinese: 对，没错。我曾经也是战友团的弟兄。这么说吧，他们觉得我的方法“令人不安”。很显然，黑暗兄弟会不这么想。

translations.english: So you're a Companion, then? I can't imagine you got your gift anywhere else. I hope you have better luck with them than I did.
translations.chinese: 所以你肯定是战友团的，对吧？我也想不出你还能从别的地方获得这种天赋。希望你和他们相处得比我好。

translations.english: I might ask the same of you. For you are more than mortal. You are moon-born. You are wolf.
translations.chinese: 我也想问同样的问题。因为看得出你不是凡人。你是个月之后裔，一头狼。

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: In fact, I once took a seaside stroll, on a moonlit night, and discovered a unicorn... which I proceeded to stab in the throat with a crochet needle.
translations.chinese: 事实上，有一次我在月夜中散步在沙滩上，遇到了独角兽……然后我用一根钩针刺进了它的喉咙。

translations.english: What a curious question. Well, I enjoy moonlit nights, taking long walks on the beach, knitting and unicorns.
translations.chinese: 奇怪的问题。我喜欢月夜、喜欢在沙滩散步、喜欢针织和独角兽。

translations.english: I'm a woman of refined, yet simple tastes.
translations.chinese: 我就是这么一个品位高雅却又简单的女人。

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

translations.english: I'm just a little girl! The Dark Brotherhood killed my mama and papa, and then they took me captive! Please, please help me!
translations.chinese: 我只是个小女孩！黑暗兄弟会杀了我爸爸妈妈，把我抓到了这里！求求你，求求你帮帮我！

translations.english: Rather convincing, don't you think?
translations.chinese: 很有说服力吧？

translations.english: In truth, I'm no more a little girl than you are. I was once, of course. Three hundred years ago. Vampirism tends to keep one remarkably... fresh.
translations.chinese: 事实上，我可不是什么小女孩了。当然，三百年前曾经是。吸血鬼往往使人看着……新鲜。

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'm just a little girl! The Dark Brotherhood killed my mama and papa, and then they took me captive! Please, please help me! | ZH: 我只是个小女孩！黑暗兄弟会杀了我爸爸妈妈，把我抓到了这里！求求你，求求你帮帮我！ | SID: 0003E0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Rather convincing, don't you think? | ZH: 很有说服力吧？ | SID: 0072EC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: In truth, I'm no more a little girl than you are. I was once, of course. Three hundred years ago. Vampirism tends to keep one remarkably... fresh. | ZH: 事实上，我可不是什么小女孩了。当然，三百年前曾经是。吸血鬼往往使人看着……新鲜。 | SID: 008E14
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What can you tell me about yourself? | ZH: 能跟我说说你自己吗？ | SID: 00B528

translations.english: I went on to teach at the College - left after two years. Too simple. Too safe. None of them truly understood the glory of the Destruction school...
translations.chinese: 我曾经在学院里教书，两年就离开了。太过简单、太过安全了。他们没人真正明白毁灭学派的荣耀……

translations.english: When I was thirteen I accidentally burned down the family home. A bit of lightning gone awry. Ah, but soon after I mastered my gifts. Completely.
translations.chinese: 十三岁时不小心把自家房子烧了。闪电术出了点岔子。但很快，我就完完全全掌握了天赋。

translations.english: But I was a prodigy! Casting simple spells by one, completing complex incantations by three. Resurrecting corpses by seven! Ha!
translations.chinese: 但我是天才！一岁可以施放简单的魔法，三岁可以使用复杂的魔咒。七岁就会复活尸体！哈！

translations.english: Hmph. I like to say I was born with a wand in my hand. Well, not literally - you can see how painful that would have been for mother.
translations.chinese: 嗯。我是攥着法杖出生的。当然不是字面意思了，那非把我妈疼死。

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I went on to teach at the College - left after two years. Too simple. Too safe. None of them truly understood the glory of the Destruction school... | ZH: 我曾经在学院里教书，两年就离开了。太过简单、太过安全了。他们没人真正明白毁灭学派的荣耀…… | SID: 00B522
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: When I was thirteen I accidentally burned down the family home. A bit of lightning gone awry. Ah, but soon after I mastered my gifts. Completely. | ZH: 十三岁时不小心把自家房子烧了。闪电术出了点岔子。但很快，我就完完全全掌握了天赋。 | SID: 00B524
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: But I was a prodigy! Casting simple spells by one, completing complex incantations by three. Resurrecting corpses by seven! Ha! | ZH: 但我是天才！一岁可以施放简单的魔法，三岁可以使用复杂的魔咒。七岁就会复活尸体！哈！ | SID: 00C04D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Hmph. I like to say I was born with a wand in my hand. Well, not literally - you can see how painful that would have been for mother. | ZH: 嗯。我是攥着法杖出生的。当然不是字面意思了，那非把我妈疼死。 | SID: 00FDD9
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What can you tell me about yourself? | ZH: 能跟我说说你自己吗？ | SID: 005DB5

translations.english: Once, I was a Shadowscale. An assassin in service to the King of Black Marsh. Trained by the Dark Brotherhood since the day of my hatching.
translations.chinese: 我曾经是影鳞。为黑沼泽国王效力的刺客。从孵化起就接受黑暗兄弟会的训练。

translations.english: I am a trained killer, and once again have been given purpose. Life is good.
translations.chinese: 我是被训练出来的杀手。能够再次被赋予使命，生活就很美好了。

translations.english: Ah, but that was a lifetime ago. Today, I am the last of my kind. My order is extinct. Now, I happily serve Astrid, and this Sanctuary.
translations.chinese: 啊，但那是很久以前的事了。我现在是最后一个影鳞了。我的教团已经灭绝了。现在，我很乐意为阿斯垂德还有这个圣所服务。

translations.english: What can you tell me about yourself?
translations.chinese: 能跟我说说你自己吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Once, I was a Shadowscale. An assassin in service to the King of Black Marsh. Trained by the Dark Brotherhood since the day of my hatching. | ZH: 我曾经是影鳞。为黑沼泽国王效力的刺客。从孵化起就接受黑暗兄弟会的训练。 | SID: 0044DB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I am a trained killer, and once again have been given purpose. Life is good. | ZH: 我是被训练出来的杀手。能够再次被赋予使命，生活就很美好了。 | SID: 00B51F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ah, but that was a lifetime ago. Today, I am the last of my kind. My order is extinct. Now, I happily serve Astrid, and this Sanctuary. | ZH: 啊，但那是很久以前的事了。我现在是最后一个影鳞了。我的教团已经灭绝了。现在，我很乐意为阿斯垂德还有这个圣所服务。 | SID: 00B520
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What can you tell me about yourself? | ZH: 能跟我说说你自己吗？ | SID: 007C6A

translations.english: This Sanctuary has been my entire life since I was a young woman. That's when I first discovered my, shall we call it "aptitude," for elimination.
translations.chinese: 自我年轻时起，这个圣所就是我生命的全部。那时，我第一次发现了我关于消除某人的“天赋”。

translations.english: I had an uncle, you see. He made certain... unwanted advances. So I killed him. And liked it. Then I killed again. And liked it even more. And so on.
translations.chinese: 我有个叔叔。他确实……不长进。所以我杀了他，乐在其中。再次杀人，越发热衷。如此等等。

translations.english: I was recruited by the Dark Brotherhood, and have been here ever since. I met my husband Arnbjorn, rose to leadership. And now here we are.
translations.chinese: 我被黑暗兄弟会招募了，在那之后，就一直待在这里。我遇到了我的丈夫艾恩乔恩，升任首领。就是我们现在的所在。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I was recruited by the Dark Brotherhood, and have been here ever since. I met my husband Arnbjorn, rose to leadership. And now here we are. | ZH: 我被黑暗兄弟会招募了，在那之后，就一直待在这里。我遇到了我的丈夫艾恩乔恩，升任首领。就是我们现在的所在。 | SID: 00B51A

translations.english: My past is long and storied, and not altogether proud. But the Dark Brotherhood saved me from myself. And I have never looked back.
translations.chinese: 我的过去漫长曲折，并不全是值得骄傲的事。但黑暗兄弟会给我了自我救赎的机会，我也从此没再回头。

translations.english: Ah, well, I'm Redguard, as I'm sure you've noticed. Though not like most of my kind you'll find in Skyrim, that's for damned sure.
translations.chinese: 啊，你肯定注意到了，我是个红卫人。虽然和你在天际看到的其他同族人不太一样，但还是毫无疑问的。

translations.english: I am a child of Hammerfell, born of the sands of the mighty Alik'r. In that great desert, blood is a shade of crimson I can scarce describe.
translations.chinese: 我是生于大阿里克'尔沙漠的落锤娃娃。在那片大沙漠，鲜血都是我难以形容的殷红。

agentText:

translations.english: But I am not the Listener. Oh no. There is no Listener. Not yet! But some day, some day, some day I pray, that one will come to hear her say...
translations.chinese: 但我不是聆听者。哦，不对。这里根本没有聆听者。还没有！但总有一天，总有一天，我祈祷有一天，会有人听到她说……

translations.english: Me? Oh, Cicero is just the Keeper! I... keep! I look after our matron, you see. The Night Mother. I keep her clean, and protected, and happy...
translations.chinese: 我？哦，西塞罗只是个守护者！我……在守护！我照顾咱们的主母。夜母。让她保持洁净、安全、心情愉快。

translations.english: The words.
translations.chinese: 那句话。

agentText:

EDID: [0006C3E7]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The words. | ZH: 那句话。 | SID: 00E737

translations.english: But I am not the Listener. Oh no. You are the Listener! You heard the words! And everything will soon be put right.
translations.chinese: 但我不是聆听者。哦，不是。你才是聆听者！你听到了那句话！一切很快就会恢复正常了！

translations.english: Me? Oh, Cicero is just the Keeper! I... keep! I look after our matron, you see. The Night Mother. I keep her clean, and protected, and happy...
translations.chinese: 我？哦，西塞罗只是个守护者！我……在守护！我照顾咱们的主母。夜母。让她保持洁净、安全、心情愉快。

translations.english: Yeah. Follow my wife's orders, and don't do anything stupid.
translations.chinese: 嗯。听我老婆的话，别犯傻就行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah. Follow my wife's orders, and don't do anything stupid. | ZH: 嗯。听我老婆的话，别犯傻就行。 | SID: 00B50B

translations.english: You must speak to that Muiri woman, correct? I have heard rumors in Windhelm. She was recently implicated in a thievery, along with her lover.
translations.chinese: 你要和暮蕊那女人交谈对吧？我听说了风舵城的传言，她和她的情人最近一起卷进了一起盗窃案。

translations.english: The lover will likely be your target. If memory serves me correctly, he leads a group of bandits. So this may be rather interesting for you.
translations.chinese: 那个情人可能就是你的目标。我没记错的话，他好像领导着一群强盗。对你来说应该挺有意思的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3EA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You must speak to that Muiri woman, correct? I have heard rumors in Windhelm. She was recently implicated in a thievery, along with her lover. | ZH: 你要和暮蕊那女人交谈对吧？我听说了风舵城的传言，她和她的情人最近一起卷进了一起盗窃案。 | SID: 00C24E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The lover will likely be your target. If memory serves me correctly, he leads a group of bandits. So this may be rather interesting for you. | ZH: 那个情人可能就是你的目标。我没记错的话，他好像领导着一群强盗。对你来说应该挺有意思的。 | SID: 00E2FE

translations.english: The jobs Astrid gives you will be more important, and usually more complex. Just keep your wits about you. And for Sithis' sake, don't get killed.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德给你的契约更加重要，通常也更复杂。你需要保持头脑清醒。看在西帝斯的份儿上，别被杀了。

translations.english: The contracts I dole out are fairly simple - go to a location, and kill the target. But this is different.
translations.chinese: 我发你的契约都相当简单，到地方，把人杀了。但这回不同。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The jobs Astrid gives you will be more important, and usually more complex. Just keep your wits about you. And for Sithis' sake, don't get killed. | ZH: 阿斯垂德给你的契约更加重要，通常也更复杂。你需要保持头脑清醒。看在西帝斯的份儿上，别被杀了。 | SID: 001357
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The contracts I dole out are fairly simple - go to a location, and kill the target. But this is different. | ZH: 我发你的契约都相当简单，到地方，把人杀了。但这回不同。 | SID: 009AAD

translations.english: You're only young once. Trust me, I know.
translations.chinese: 人无再少年。相信我，没错的。

translations.english: You're headed to The Hag's Cure, right? It's a good shop. You should examine their wares. Never pass up the chance to buy a good potion... or poison.
translations.chinese: 你要去鬼婆妙方吧？很不错的店。可以看看他家的货，别错过买好药水……或者毒药的机会。

translations.english: And one more thing. Have fun. You'll be committing a dark deed, but there's no reason you shouldn't enjoy yourself.
translations.chinese: 还有。玩得开心点。你要犯下一件恶行，但没有理由不好好享受。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You're only young once. Trust me, I know. | ZH: 人无再少年。相信我，没错的。 | SID: 0057CC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You're headed to The Hag's Cure, right? It's a good shop. You should examine their wares. Never pass up the chance to buy a good potion... or poison. | ZH: 你要去鬼婆妙方吧？很不错的店。可以看看他家的货，别错过买好药水……或者毒药的机会。 | SID: 00D0DE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And one more thing. Have fun. You'll be committing a dark deed, but there's no reason you shouldn't enjoy yourself. | ZH: 还有。玩得开心点。你要犯下一件恶行，但没有理由不好好享受。 | SID: 00F406

translations.english: Yes. Just because you're now a professional assassin, don't think you have to skulk around in the dark like a skeever and stab people.
translations.chinese: 嗯。就因为你现在是职业杀手了，不能总想着像个恶鼠一样在黑暗中偷偷摸摸地捅人。

translations.english: Do what I do. Walk up to your target, introduce yourself, melt their skin off, and then run like the wind. Works every time.
translations.chinese: 学学我。走到目标面前，做个自我介绍，把他们灰飞烟灭，然后转进如风。百试不爽。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes. Just because you're now a professional assassin, don't think you have to skulk around in the dark like a skeever and stab people. | ZH: 嗯。就因为你现在是职业杀手了，不能总想着像个恶鼠一样在黑暗中偷偷摸摸地捅人。 | SID: 00A9BD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do what I do. Walk up to your target, introduce yourself, melt their skin off, and then run like the wind. Works every time. | ZH: 学学我。走到目标面前，做个自我介绍，把他们灰飞烟灭，然后转进如风。百试不爽。 | SID: 00B500

translations.english: I can only assume she wants to test the full breadth of your abilities. So. Be polite, and professional, and represent us well.
translations.chinese: 我只能假设她是在测试你的全部能力了。所以，记住，要礼貌、专业些，别堕了我们的脸面。

translations.english: You're being sent to meet with the contact directly, is that correct? What a most unusual occurrence. Astrid usually performs this duty herself.
translations.chinese: 你被派去直接和契约人见面了？很不寻常啊。阿斯垂德一般都是自己去联络的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I can only assume she wants to test the full breadth of your abilities. So. Be polite, and professional, and represent us well. | ZH: 我只能假设她是在测试你的全部能力了。所以，记住，要礼貌、专业些，别堕了我们的脸面。 | SID: 00B704
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You're being sent to meet with the contact directly, is that correct? What a most unusual occurrence. Astrid usually performs this duty herself. | ZH: 你被派去直接和契约人见面了？很不寻常啊。阿斯垂德一般都是自己去联络的。 | SID: 00C6AC

translations.english: She said that? If I find anyone working against my wife, or this Sanctuary, I'll beat them to death with their own severed head.
translations.chinese: 她说的？如果我发现有人反对我妻子，或者这个圣所，我会用他们的脑袋把他们敲死。

translations.english: But you know what I mean!
translations.chinese: 懂我的意思就行！

translations.english: Of course, they'd probably already be dead...
translations.chinese: 当然了，他们可能已经死了……

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: She said that? If I find anyone working against my wife, or this Sanctuary, I'll beat them to death with their own severed head. | ZH: 她说的？如果我发现有人反对我妻子，或者这个圣所，我会用他们的脑袋把他们敲死。 | SID: 00857E
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But you know what I mean! | ZH: 懂我的意思就行！ | SID: 00B4FA

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero. | ZH: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。 | SID: 0034F1

translations.english: You're joking. While I can understand if some family members wish to honor the Old Ways once more, surely no one would oppose Astrid's rule.
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑吧。虽然我能理解一些家人希望再次恢复古道的荣耀，但肯定没人会反对阿斯垂德的统治。

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're joking. While I can understand if some family members wish to honor the Old Ways once more, surely no one would oppose Astrid's rule. | ZH: 你在开玩笑吧。虽然我能理解一些家人希望再次恢复古道的荣耀，但肯定没人会反对阿斯垂德的统治。 | SID: 00B4F8
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero. | ZH: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。 | SID: 005F9A

translations.english: Does she? Listen, brother... Astrid is my mistress, and I worship the ground she walks on. But this Cicero business has her a bit... paranoid.
translations.chinese: 是吗？听着，兄弟……阿斯垂德是我的主人，我很崇敬她。但西塞罗的事是她有点……偏激了。

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

translations.english: Oh! Well, I hope she doesn't suspect me. I mean, I've spoken with Cicero a bit, and he's quite charming. But I'd never go against Astrid. Never.
translations.chinese: 哦！希望她不会怀疑我。我和西塞罗聊过天，他挺有魅力的。但我绝不会和阿斯垂德作对。永不。

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh! Well, I hope she doesn't suspect me. I mean, I've spoken with Cicero a bit, and he's quite charming. But I'd never go against Astrid. Never. | ZH: 哦！希望她不会怀疑我。我和西塞罗聊过天，他挺有魅力的。但我绝不会和阿斯垂德作对。永不。 | SID: 00B4F5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero. | ZH: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。 | SID: 007290

translations.english: Ha! And would that surprise anyone? This Sanctuary's a mess. Wouldn't surprise me if somebody's talking to the fool on the sly. Making deals.
translations.chinese: 哈！这有什么可惊讶的？这个圣所一团糟。就算有人暗中和那个傻瓜密谋些什么，我也不会惊讶。

translations.english: And no, before you ask, it's not me. I know which side my bread is buttered on.
translations.chinese: 另外，在你问我前，我告诉你，不是我。我知道自己该怎么做。

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

translations.english: To what end? Usurping Astrid's authority as leader of the Sanctuary? Hmmm... Yes, I can see her concern. Thank you for bringing this to my attention.
translations.chinese: 这样做有什么意义？篡夺阿斯垂德作为圣所首领的权力？嗯……也是，我能理解她的担忧。谢谢你告诉我这件事。

translations.english: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Astrid thinks a Family member may be conspiring with Cicero. | ZH: 阿斯垂德认为某个家庭成员可能正与西塞罗密谋。 | SID: 00B99E

translations.english: Oho! The Listener wants my counsel! I thought you were above the opinions of mere mortals, now that you commune with dead old women.
translations.chinese: 哦豁！聆听者需要我的建议！我还以为自打你和那个死老太婆交流过，就已经不需要凡人的意见了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oho! The Listener wants my counsel! I thought you were above the opinions of mere mortals, now that you commune with dead old women. | ZH: 哦豁！聆听者需要我的建议！我还以为自打你和那个死老太婆交流过，就已经不需要凡人的意见了。 | SID: 00B4EC

translations.english: Just remember Astrid's commitment to her Sanctuary, to her Family. A Family that now counts you as one of its own. Honor Astrid above all others.
translations.chinese: 只需记住阿斯垂德对圣所还有这个把你当做自己人的家庭作出的贡献。给予阿斯垂德最大的尊重。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just remember Astrid's commitment to her Sanctuary, to her Family. A Family that now counts you as one of its own. Honor Astrid above all others. | ZH: 只需记住阿斯垂德对圣所还有这个把你当做自己人的家庭作出的贡献。给予阿斯垂德最大的尊重。 | SID: 00B4EB

translations.english: You may be the Listener, or you may just be a lunatic who's started hearing voices. Either way, Astrid is still your mistress. Not the Night Mother.
translations.chinese: 你或许是聆听者，也可能是个幻听的疯子。但不管怎样，你的主母还是阿斯垂德，不是夜母。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3F8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You may be the Listener, or you may just be a lunatic who's started hearing voices. Either way, Astrid is still your mistress. Not the Night Mother. | ZH: 你或许是聆听者，也可能是个幻听的疯子。但不管怎样，你的主母还是阿斯垂德，不是夜母。 | SID: 002353

translations.english: The man you need to speak with, his name is Motierre? That's a very old and powerful Breton family, firmly established in Cyrodiil. Most curious...
translations.chinese: 你要找的人叫莫提雷？那可是个古老强大的布莱顿家族，在希罗帝尔的地位很牢固。真好奇……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The man you need to speak with, his name is Motierre? That's a very old and powerful Breton family, firmly established in Cyrodiil. Most curious... | ZH: 你要找的人叫莫提雷？那可是个古老强大的布莱顿家族，在希罗帝尔的地位很牢固。真好奇…… | SID: 00B4E9

translations.english: So you're the Listener, hmm? Well that hardly seems fair. You just got here. The Night Mother should have spoken to me. Any idiot could see that.
translations.chinese: 所以你是聆听者了？有些不公平啊。你才刚到这儿。连白痴都看得出来，夜母最应该和我说话才对。

translations.english: But, I will serve gladly, as that's my lot in life. Now let's see. Ah yes, Volunruud. It's an old crypt, infested with Draugr. So plan accordingly.
translations.chinese: 但我很乐意效劳，这是我的使命。来看看吧。啊对，沃伦鲁德。古老的墓穴，到处都是尸鬼。所以计划要周详些。

translations.english: If the Night Mother truly spoke to you, if you really are the Listener... your destiny was written in the Void. Astrid is right to fear your power.
translations.chinese: 如果夜母真的和你说话了，而你真的是聆听者……那你的命运就已经被书写在虚空中了。阿斯垂德会惧怕你的力量也是理所当然。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If the Night Mother truly spoke to you, if you really are the Listener... your destiny was written in the Void. Astrid is right to fear your power. | ZH: 如果夜母真的和你说话了，而你真的是聆听者……那你的命运就已经被书写在虚空中了。阿斯垂德会惧怕你的力量也是理所当然。 | SID: 006EC9

translations.english: You've got to kill a soft little woman on her wedding day. What's next? Murdering a crippled orphan in his sleep?
translations.chinese: 你要在一场婚礼上杀一个弱女子。接下来呢？杀死沉睡中的残废孤儿？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3FC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've got to kill a soft little woman on her wedding day. What's next? Murdering a crippled orphan in his sleep? | ZH: 你要在一场婚礼上杀一个弱女子。接下来呢？杀死沉睡中的残废孤儿？ | SID: 00B4E5

translations.english: Your contract sounds simple, which means it certainly will not be. Getting into that reception will be easy, but have you thought about getting out?
translations.chinese: 你的契约没有听起来那么简单。招待宴会是很容易混进去，但你想过怎么出来吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your contract sounds simple, which means it certainly will not be. Getting into that reception will be easy, but have you thought about getting out? | ZH: 你的契约没有听起来那么简单。招待宴会是很容易混进去，但你想过怎么出来吗？ | SID: 00904A

translations.english: Slaughtering the Emperor's cousin? At her wedding? Those guards will be out for blood. Wouldn't surprise me if the crowd jumped in too.
translations.chinese: 在婚礼现场刺杀皇帝的表妹？那些护卫会倾巢而动的。就是群众都卷进来也不稀奇。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3FE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Slaughtering the Emperor's cousin? At her wedding? Those guards will be out for blood. Wouldn't surprise me if the crowd jumped in too. | ZH: 在婚礼现场刺杀皇帝的表妹？那些护卫会倾巢而动的。就是群众都卷进来也不稀奇。 | SID: 00B4E3

translations.english: If so, the bride will probably address the crowd from the balcony. It overlooks the courtyard.
translations.chinese: 如果是这样，新娘可能会在俯瞰庭院的阳台上朝人群讲话。

translations.english: But listen, I think I can help you. The wedding reception is outside the Temple of the Divines, right? In Solitude?
translations.chinese: 但听好，我想我能帮上你。婚宴是在独孤城圣灵神殿外举行对吧？

translations.english: It's no fair. I love weddings. Astrid should have given this contract to me. Instead, she's got me visiting cities, assessing security. How boring.
translations.chinese: 不公平。我喜欢婚礼。阿斯垂德应该把契约交给我。结果她反而让我去各城市侦察，评估安全状况。真无聊。

translations.english: Well, there's an old statue there. I've seen it. Hanging right over where she'll be standing. Old means weak. Weak means it could fall. Hmmm?
translations.chinese: 我看到那里有座老旧的雕像，就挂在她会站的位置上方。老旧意味着脆弱，脆弱就意味着会掉下来。嗯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C3FF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: If so, the bride will probably address the crowd from the balcony. It overlooks the courtyard. | ZH: 如果是这样，新娘可能会在俯瞰庭院的阳台上朝人群讲话。 | SID: 0003DC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: But listen, I think I can help you. The wedding reception is outside the Temple of the Divines, right? In Solitude? | ZH: 但听好，我想我能帮上你。婚宴是在独孤城圣灵神殿外举行对吧？ | SID: 0038EC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: It's no fair. I love weddings. Astrid should have given this contract to me. Instead, she's got me visiting cities, assessing security. How boring. | ZH: 不公平。我喜欢婚礼。阿斯垂德应该把契约交给我。结果她反而让我去各城市侦察，评估安全状况。真无聊。 | SID: 008E10
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Well, there's an old statue there. I've seen it. Hanging right over where she'll be standing. Old means weak. Weak means it could fall. Hmmm? | ZH: 我看到那里有座老旧的雕像，就挂在她会站的位置上方。老旧意味着脆弱，脆弱就意味着会掉下来。嗯？ | SID: 00B4E0

translations.english: It was our honeymoon. Tepid, I said! The bathwater should be tepid! Lukewarm is not tepid! Close, maybe, but there's is a difference! Stupid cow.
translations.chinese: 那是我们的蜜月。温热的！洗澡水应该是温热的！微热的不是温热的！也许差不多，但有区别！蠢牛！

translations.english: Ah, killing her will be easy. She'll be so happy, she'll never see it coming. I should know, I killed a bride once.
translations.chinese: 啊，杀她是很容易。她高高兴兴，神不知鬼不觉地死去。我是知道的，我以前就杀过新娘。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C400]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It was our honeymoon. Tepid, I said! The bathwater should be tepid! Lukewarm is not tepid! Close, maybe, but there's is a difference! Stupid cow. | ZH: 那是我们的蜜月。温热的！洗澡水应该是温热的！微热的不是温热的！也许差不多，但有区别！蠢牛！ | SID: 006BE6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, killing her will be easy. She'll be so happy, she'll never see it coming. I should know, I killed a bride once. | ZH: 啊，杀她是很容易。她高高兴兴，神不知鬼不觉地死去。我是知道的，我以前就杀过新娘。 | SID: 00B4DF

translations.english: I hope you don't mind, but I took the liberty of surveying the site of the reception.
translations.chinese: 希望你不介意我冒昧地勘察了一下招待宴会的场地。

translations.english: I left something there for you. If you're inclined to take that approach.
translations.chinese: 我在那给你留了些东西。如果你想用这种方法的话，或许用得上。

translations.english: There's a small parapet, just opposite the balcony, that would prove an excellent spot for a long-range kill.
translations.chinese: 露台对面有个小矮墙，是远距离狙杀的绝佳地点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You've got to track a man, kill him, and then frame him for a crime. This contract's perfect... for me. Clearly, my lovely wife made a mistake.
translations.chinese: 你得追踪一个人，杀了他。然后诬陷他。这个契约如果给我就完美了。我可爱的妻子很明显犯了个错误。

translations.english: What's the matter, Listener? Night Mother not feeling very chatty these days? You need help from your flesh and blood lessers?
translations.chinese: 怎么了，聆听者？夜母这些天不太健谈了吗？需要骨肉家人的帮助了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C402]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You've got to track a man, kill him, and then frame him for a crime. This contract's perfect... for me. Clearly, my lovely wife made a mistake. | ZH: 你得追踪一个人，杀了他。然后诬陷他。这个契约如果给我就完美了。我可爱的妻子很明显犯了个错误。 | SID: 001F56
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What's the matter, Listener? Night Mother not feeling very chatty these days? You need help from your flesh and blood lessers? | ZH: 怎么了，聆听者？夜母这些天不太健谈了吗？需要骨肉家人的帮助了？ | SID: 00B4DA

translations.english: Astrid had me investigate the Penitus Oculatus. Their members are highly trained, effective warriors. Be on your guard, brother.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德让我去调查了洞察眼。这些成员都是训练有素的战士。当心点兄弟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C403]

translations.english: Killing him secretly will certainly make things easier on you, but if there are witnesses, so be it.
translations.chinese: 秘密做掉他会让你轻松些，但如果有目击者的话，就自谋多福吧。

translations.english: Killing Gaius Maro in a city will be challenging because of all the guards, but fights, even murder, are fairly common.
translations.chinese: 要在城里杀死加留斯·马洛是个挑战，因为一旦发生战斗或谋杀，全城卫兵都会闻风而动。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Killing Gaius Maro in a city will be challenging because of all the guards, but fights, even murder, are fairly common. | ZH: 要在城里杀死加留斯·马洛是个挑战，因为一旦发生战斗或谋杀，全城卫兵都会闻风而动。 | SID: 0040AA

translations.english: Normally I talk to a victim before I end his life, but I wouldn't recommend it this time. Maro will be alert to danger. Talking may spook him.
translations.chinese: 我一般会在结束受害人性命前和他交谈一番，但这次我不建议你这么干。马洛对危险警惕性很高，与他说话可能会警醒他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C406]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Normally I talk to a victim before I end his life, but I wouldn't recommend it this time. Maro will be alert to danger. Talking may spook him. | ZH: 我一般会在结束受害人性命前和他交谈一番，但这次我不建议你这么干。马洛对危险警惕性很高，与他说话可能会警醒他。 | SID: 0100D6

translations.english: Remember, your target is Gaius Maro, the son. Not Commander Maro, the father! We need him alive. But the son... Ha! Scorch his face off!
translations.chinese: 记住，你的目标是加留斯·马洛，那个儿子。不是身为父亲的马洛指挥官！我们得让他活着。至于他儿子……哈！把他脸皮烫掉！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C407]

translations.english: Yes, do not underestimate Cicero. A man like that, small and foolish, is easy to mock. To underestimate. Don't make the same mistake I did.
translations.chinese: 对了，不要低估西塞罗。他看着矮小傻气，滑稽可笑。但别小瞧了他。别和我犯同样的错误。

translations.english: Any thoughts on the current situation?
translations.chinese: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C409]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, do not underestimate Cicero. A man like that, small and foolish, is easy to mock. To underestimate. Don't make the same mistake I did. | ZH: 对了，不要低估西塞罗。他看着矮小傻气，滑稽可笑。但别小瞧了他。别和我犯同样的错误。 | SID: 0018F0
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any thoughts on the current situation? | ZH: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？ | SID: 01077A

translations.english: Going after Cicero now would be a fool's errand. That little jester is currently being digested in Arnbjorn's stomach, mark my words.
translations.chinese: 现在去追西塞罗也是徒劳。要我说，那个小丑现在应该正在艾恩乔恩的胃里被消化着呢。

translations.english: Any thoughts on the current situation?
translations.chinese: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any thoughts on the current situation? | ZH: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？ | SID: 01061F

translations.english: Cicero destroyed any sympathy I may have had for him when he wounded Veezara. Kill the fool and be done with it.
translations.chinese: 西塞罗伤了维萨拉，毁掉了我对他所有的同情。杀了那个小丑，了结这件事吧。

translations.english: Any thoughts on the current situation?
translations.chinese: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C40B]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any thoughts on the current situation? | ZH: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？ | SID: 010819

translations.english: All right, so maybe I was wrong. Maybe Cicero coming here wasn't the best thing that could have happened. But even I didn't anticipate this.
translations.chinese: 好吧，也许我想错了。西塞罗的到来也许不是什么好事。但即使是我也没预料到。

translations.english: Well, you know the old saying. When life gives you lemons...
translations.chinese: 有没有听过那句古话，假如生活给你酸柠檬……

translations.english: ...go murder a clown.
translations.chinese: ……去杀个小丑。

translations.english: Any thoughts on the current situation?
translations.chinese: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？

translations.english: Our actions were shameful. Surely, the Night Mother weeps this day.
translations.chinese: 我们的行为很可耻。夜母今日必然哭泣。

translations.english: I feel only pity for Cicero. He must die, of course, but can any of us truly blame him for his actions? We mocked him, disrespected the Old Ways.
translations.chinese: 我只是有些同情西塞罗。当然，他必须死，但我们当中有人能责备他吗？我们嘲笑他，还蔑视了传统的道路。

translations.english: Any thoughts on the current situation?
translations.chinese: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Any thoughts on the current situation? | ZH: 你对现在的形势有什么看法？ | SID: 0105A4

translations.english: The last thing you need is my help. Listener or not, you've proven yourself time and again. To Astrid, to the Family... and to me.
translations.chinese: 你最不需要的就是我的帮助了。不管你是不是聆听者，你已经一次次证明了自己。对阿斯垂德，对这个家……还有我。

agentText:

translations.english: Hmm... Well, assuming this Gourmet is just a cook, it will probably be an easy kill. Just be discreet - alerting others will be the real threat.
translations.chinese: 嗯……好吧，如果美食家是个厨师，那杀他应该不难。只是要谨慎，惊动其他人才是真正的威胁。

agentText:

translations.english: That said... If your attack on Virane is witnessed, those Markarth guards are going to be none too happy...
translations.chinese: 也就是说……如果你攻击维拉尼时被目击到，马卡斯的卫兵可是会生气的……

translations.english: Hmph. I wouldn't worry too much about this Virane giving you the information you need. Give him a good scare, and he'll squawk like a Hagraven.
translations.chinese: 嗯。我不担心维拉尼会不给你需要的情报。去好好吓吓他，让他像个乌鸦鬼婆一样尖叫。

translations.english: Oh, I know you have to, but it makes me sad all the same. I love the Gourmet's recipes. The world will soon be a blander, less flavorful place.
translations.chinese: 哦，我知道你必须杀他，但我还是很伤心。我挺喜欢他的食谱的。这个世界马上就要变得平淡无味了。

translations.english: Yes - don't kill the Gourmet!
translations.chinese: 嗯，别杀了美食家！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You've been directed to dispose of the Gourmet's body, is that correct? I often find water to be a suitable hiding place. A lake, a pool... the sea.
translations.chinese: 你得把美食家的尸体处理了吧？我发现水是藏尸的好地方。湖里，池塘里……海里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C412]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've been directed to dispose of the Gourmet's body, is that correct? I often find water to be a suitable hiding place. A lake, a pool... the sea. | ZH: 你得把美食家的尸体处理了吧？我发现水是藏尸的好地方。湖里，池塘里……海里。 | SID: 00B369

translations.english: Yes. You're killing the Emperor himself. The Dark Brotherhood will get one shot at this, and you've been given the honors. So don't screw up.
translations.chinese: 对。你要去杀皇帝本人了。黑暗兄弟会只此一次机会，而你获得了这项荣誉。所以别搞砸了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You get to kill the Emperor. The bloody Emperor. You'd better enjoy this one. You owe us all that much. So make it bloody, painful, and spectacular.
translations.chinese: 你要去杀皇帝了。该死的皇帝。好好享受吧。你欠大家的太多了。所以，把场面搞得血腥、痛苦、壮观些吧。

agentText:

translations.english: Then leave.
translations.chinese: 那就躲开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C80B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then leave. | ZH: 那就躲开。 | SID: 007900

translations.english: We will see.
translations.chinese: 那就拭目以待。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C80D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We will see. | ZH: 那就拭目以待。 | SID: 00097A

translations.english: But I can't turn away a potential ally in these times. Let's see if you're better than a common mercenary.
translations.chinese: 但我不能在这种时候拒绝潜在的盟友。那就让我们看看你比普通佣兵强在哪儿吧。

translations.english: Are you a sellsword? I don't like your kind. No honor. No loyalty. Unreliable.
translations.chinese: 你是佣兵？我不喜欢你们这种人。毫无荣誉感，不忠不义。一点都不可靠。

translations.english: My scouts have tracked down one of the Forsworn leaders, hiding out in their blood-soaked camps. Deal with them.
translations.chinese: 我的斥候找到了一个弃誓者首领，就躲在他们血腥的营地里。解决他们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C80E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But I can't turn away a potential ally in these times. Let's see if you're better than a common mercenary. | ZH: 但我不能在这种时候拒绝潜在的盟友。那就让我们看看你比普通佣兵强在哪儿吧。 | SID: 005025

translations.english: Until then, I alone have the right to have wives and children. It ensures our strength.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，只有我享有配偶与子嗣的权力。这保证了我们的力量。

translations.english: Yes. I earned the right by slaying my father in single combat.
translations.chinese: 没错。我在单挑中杀死了我父亲，赢得了这项权力。

translations.english: One day, I will have a son who will challenge me when I become too old to lead, and the stronghold will have a new chief.
translations.chinese: 总有一天，等我老得不能再领导部族，我儿子也会来挑战我，到时候要塞就会迎来一位新的酋长。

translations.english: For your help, I'm sending word to the Orc strongholds that you're to be trusted. You should be welcome there now.
translations.chinese: 为了报答你，我已经给各兽人要塞传信可以信任你了。你会在那些地方受到欢迎的。

agentText:

translations.english: A hundred septims says I can take ya, bare-handed.
translations.chinese: 一百塞普汀，赌我能赤手空拳干掉你。

translations.english: I'm drunk, and it's been a while since I had a good fight.
translations.chinese: 我刚喝完，有段时间没好好打一架了。

translations.english: You say something about a bet?
translations.chinese: 你说要打赌？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: For an outsider like you to be accepted, an Orc would have to make you Blood-Kin, and send word to the chiefs.
translations.chinese: 像你这样的外族人想要被接纳，就得有兽人将你视为血亲，然后再给酋长们捎个话。

translations.english: The strongholds keep to themselves. Skyrim hasn't always been kind to the Orcs.
translations.chinese: 这些要塞保持自治自理。天际并不总是善待兽人。

translations.english: That's the spirit! Let's go.
translations.chinese: 很有精神！来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006C813]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's the spirit! Let's go. | ZH: 很有精神！来吧。 | SID: 006F82

translations.english: Hey, I may have had a few, but I can still count. You don't have a hundred septims on you.
translations.chinese: 虽然我喝了点，但还能数清数。你身上可没一百塞普汀。

translations.chinese: 真厉害啊。弃誓者通常很快就能干掉雇佣兵，但你反过来把他们干掉了。这是你的赏金。

Translations:

translations.english: You need steel? Speak to my forge-wife, Gharol.
translations.chinese: 需要武器吗？去找我的锻妻加洛尔。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Need a poison for your hunting? My mother, Murbul, knows several.
translations.chinese: 需要打猎用的毒药？我母亲莫布尔知道几种。

translations.english: This stronghold respects strength, and strength alone.
translations.chinese: 这个要塞尊重力量，也只有力量。

Translations:

translations.english: Yeah, well, don't expect many more stories like that in my future. I'm getting old. Being that amazing takes too much damn effort.

translations.chinese: 有时候，我只是需要提醒大家为什么我才是老大。

translations.english: I guess I got tired of handing out contracts to everyone else, while I stayed home playing den mother. It was good to get out, and have some fun.
translations.chinese: 我想我是厌倦了把契约交给别人，然后自己待在家里当训话员。出去走走，找点乐子，感觉不错。

translations.chinese: 如果我说玩得不开心，那是撒谎。但最重要的是，我帮圣所赚了些急需的资金。这才是最要紧的。

translations.chinese: 我只是做了该做的事。仅此而已。我只是很高兴能说着讲述故事。

translations.english: Well... While it's true I prefer sorcery's more destructive nuances, we mustn't forget the many spells with simpler, more practical applications.
translations.chinese: 嗯……虽然我确实喜欢魔法那具有破坏性的细微差别，但不能忘记那些更简单实用的方法。

translations.english: Sure, you poison the Emperor, but what then? Why not summon an Atronach to cause some chaos? Or turn invisible and slip away. Use your imagination!
translations.chinese: 没错，你是要给皇帝下毒，那接下来呢？何不召唤一只侍灵来制造混乱？或者干脆隐身悄悄溜走。好好运用一下想象力吧。

translations.english: I am so very happy for you. If not a bit... envious.
translations.chinese: 我真为你高兴。但也不能说一点不……嫉妒。

translations.english: What an honor, the assassination of an Emperor. And all because you are the Listener, favored by the Night Mother, anointed by Sithis.
translations.chinese: 能去刺杀皇帝是多么荣幸啊。而这一切都是因为你是受夜母青睐、受西帝斯选定的聆听者。

translations.english: Astrid has arranged for your escape, no? Then you have nothing to worry about. Get in, kill the Emperor, and get out. Then, we celebrate.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德已经为你安排好了逃跑吧？那就没什么好担心的了。进去把皇帝杀了，然后出来。回来我们好好庆祝。

translations.english: It took all the favors, bribes, and blackmails I could muster, but I've secured your exit out of the keep.
translations.chinese: 我使出了浑身解数，贿赂、勒索，把你逃出城堡的路线搞到了。

translations.english: Just follow my instructions, and the Dark Brotherhood will be back on top. All thanks to you... Listener.
translations.chinese: 只要按我说的做，黑暗兄弟会就能重回巅峰。多亏了你……聆听者。

translations.english: Anything else before I set off?
translations.chinese: 在我出发前还有什么需要注意吗？

translations.chinese: 我说了，当你的吼声足以打开前往他身边的道路时，你就算准备好了。

translations.english: There is no difference in the dragon tongue between debating and fighting. Shouting comes as naturally to a dragon as breathing, or speaking.
translations.chinese: 龙的争论与战斗时都是用喉舌进行的。使用吼声对龙而言如呼吸、说话一样自然。

translations.english: For most people, long years of training are required to learn even the simplest Shout.
translations.chinese: 对大多数人而言，即使最简单的龙吼也需要数年的训练。

translations.english: In mythic times, when mortalkind was in great need, the goddess Kynareth granted us the ability to speak as dragons do.
translations.chinese: 在神话时代，凯娜瑞丝女神在凡人最需要的时候赐予了龙吼能力。

translations.english: But for you, the dragon speech is in your blood, and you learn it almost without effort.
translations.chinese: 但你不同。龙讲话的方法流淌在你的血液中，你可以毫不费力的学习它。

translations.english: Dragons have always been able to Shout. Language is intrinsic to their very being.
translations.chinese: 龙族拥有龙吼的能力。语言是他们存在的本质。

translations.chinese: 五个。我们的领袖帕图纳克斯独自生活在世界之喉的山顶。

translations.english: When your Voice can open the path, you will know you are ready to speak to him.

translations.english: If we want to stay on top in Skyrim, the Guild needs that paragon back.

translations.english: Now I'm here to study Conjuration. That's what's important.
translations.chinese: 我现在在这里学习魔法。这对我很重要。

translations.english: No, I suppose we haven't. Brelyna Maryon, of House Telvanni. First of my family to leave Morrowind in a long time.
translations.chinese: 哦，我想还没有呢。泰瓦尼家族，布莱丽娜·玛约。这么长时间以来，我是第一个从家族中离开晨风的。

translations.english: You must first prove your worth, and then I shall lead you across.
translations.chinese: 你必须先证明自己的价值，然后我会带你过去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006DE17]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You must first prove your worth, and then I shall lead you across. | ZH: 你必须先证明自己的价值，然后我会带你过去。 | SID: 00FC1C

translations.english: That is to say, it's been suggested that resources used for my study of Restoration could be put to better use. Any other use, in fact.
translations.chinese: 也就是说，有人建议我研究恢复系魔法所用的资源可以被更好利用。就是其他用途了。

translations.english: Not to mention the benefit of wards! How can they continually overlook wards! It's baffling!
translations.chinese: 更不消说结界魔法的好处了！他们怎么总是视而不见？费解啊。

translations.english: It's not just healing cuts and bruises, you know. The undead are a very real, very dangerous threat and Restoration magics can keep them at bay.
translations.chinese: 不仅是治愈伤口和瘀伤，恢复系魔法还能有效地阻止亡灵这种非常实在、非常危险的威胁。

translations.english: It's quite simple really. There are some who shall not be dignified by being named, who have implied that it is not.
translations.chinese: 很简单。有些人，不提名字了，他们暗示它不是。

translations.english: Forgive me, I didn't mean to assume.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我不是故意的。

translations.english: I've just been asked enough questions. I'm here to learn, not to explain myself over and over.
translations.chinese: 我只是被问过太多次了。我是来此学习，不是一遍遍解释自己。

translations.english: You risk death by doing so, and you shall not gain entry.
translations.chinese: 你这是自取死路，禁止进入。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006DE33]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You risk death by doing so, and you shall not gain entry. | ZH: 你这是自取死路，禁止进入。 | SID: 00A639

translations.english: Well, I'm glad we've established this early, rather than me hearing about it years or decades later when the whispers behind my back are loud enough.
translations.chinese: 好吧，很高兴我们这么早就建立关系了，不是几年或几十年后才听到你在我背后窃窃私语。

translations.english: I... I see.
translations.chinese: 我……知道了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006DE34]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, I'm glad we've established this early, rather than me hearing about it years or decades later when the whispers behind my back are loud enough. | ZH: 好吧，很高兴我们这么早就建立关系了，不是几年或几十年后才听到你在我背后窃窃私语。 | SID: 009480
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I... I see. | ZH: 我……知道了。 | SID: 00B31D

translations.english: Before you even ask, yes I have an ancestry steeped in magic, and no I don't want to talk about it.
translations.chinese: 在你开口前，我想说，没错，我确实拥有精通魔法的血统，但我不想谈论这个。

translations.english: Does that cover everything?
translations.chinese: 包括所有内容了吗？

translations.english: Yes, I know Winterhold used to be full of my kind, and no I don't care that they're all gone now.
translations.chinese: 没错，冬堡学院以前到处都是我的同族，不过我也不在乎他们现在都离开了。

translations.chinese: 不要擅自过桥！

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006DE3B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do not cross the bridge unaided! | ZH: 不要擅自过桥！ | SID: 004AB9

translations.english: By Sheor, no. Those archaic policies died out with the Mages Guild, and were never enforced here.
translations.chinese: 舒奥尔在上，不会的。这些古老的政策已经随着法师公会的消亡而消失了，而这里也从未执行过。

translations.english: Of course, non-mages may not see it that way, so we don't go around flaunting it.
translations.chinese: 当然，非法师人员可能不会这么看，所以我们也不能招摇过市。

translations.english: Necromancy, as any other type of magic, is a tool to be used.
translations.chinese: 死灵法术，和其他类型的魔法一样，都是可以利用的工具罢了。

translations.english: Not that I require validation, of course. There are just some - and I shan't name names - who would disagree.
translations.chinese: 当然，我并不需要别人认可。只是有些人，就不指名道姓了，不同意这种说法。

translations.english: Good, good.
translations.chinese: 好，好。

translations.english: It can make life difficult when one's colleagues fail to recognize the research one engages in.
translations.chinese: 当一个人的同事都不能意识到她研究的价值时，生活就很困难了。

agentText:

translations.english: Just be careful. Casting wards requires constant concentration, and you can easily find yourself drained of your magicka reserves.
translations.chinese: 只要小心就好。施放结界需要持续专注，你的魔能储备很容易被耗尽。

translations.english: The key to wards is that they take time to charge.
translations.chinese: 结界的关键在于他们需要时间生效。

translations.english: Not long, but you can't start casting with a fireball coming at you.
translations.chinese: 不算太长，但你不能等火球贴脸的时候才准备开始施法。

translations.english: Also, if your ward isn't negated by an incoming spell, it will recharge itself after a moment or two.
translations.chinese: 另外，即便你的结界没有被法术给打破，那一两分钟之后也需要重新充能。

translations.english: If you would, please also contain your summons to the College grounds. The locals do not need to be agitated further by Atronachs roaming their town.
translations.chinese: 如果你想进行召唤的话，请尽量在学院范围内。不要让当地人因为侍灵四处游荡在城镇中而徒增不安。

translations.english: If you require assistance with summoning techniques, please let me know.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要召唤系魔法上的帮助，请告诉我。

translations.english: The summoning of undead is even less advisable outside of the College.
translations.chinese: 在学院外召唤亡灵就更不智了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We've been keeping this collection since the Second Era. Books have come and gone during that time, but it's mostly intact.
translations.chinese: 我们自第二纪元就开始收藏书籍了。这段时间里书籍来来去去，但大多完好无损。

translations.english: A mage is only as good as what he knows. I try and make sure as much knowledge is available as possible.
translations.chinese: 法师的能力大小取决于他的知识多寡。我的职责就是努力确保尽可能更多的知识能被利用。
