translations.chinese: 好了，你需要帮助吗？

translations.english: Disrupt my Arcanaeum, and I will have you torn apart by angry Atronachs.
translations.chinese: 胆敢破坏我的秘藏馆，我会让愤怒的侍灵把你撕碎。

translations.english: You are now in the Arcanaeum, of which I am in charge. It might as well be my own little plane of Oblivion.
translations.chinese: 你现在所在的地方是我负责的秘藏馆，如同我的微型湮灭位面。

translations.english: Didn't you know?
translations.chinese: 你不知道吗？

translations.english: Winterhold itself died in the years between then and now. What's left out there is a husk. Only the College really remains.
translations.chinese: 冬堡也在其后几年衰落了。只剩下外面一层躯壳。只有学院真正被保留下来了。

translations.english: Before the Oblivion Crisis, many elves called Winterhold their home. More visited the College from Morrowind every year.
translations.chinese: 在湮灭危机之前，很多精灵都以冬堡为家。每年还有很多从晨风赶来到学院参观。

translations.english: After, growing distrust of magic made life difficult for many. Some left rather than endure the growing hatred from the local Nords.
translations.chinese: 在那之后，人们对魔法越发不信任，使得他们很多生活艰难。有些受不了当地诺德人日益增长的仇恨，选择了离开。

translations.english: Others returned home after the Red Year, when Vvardenfell erupted and caused much destruction.
translations.chinese: 其他人则选择在红色之年后返回故乡，那时瓦登费尔火山爆发，造成了极大的破坏。

translations.english: Welcome, my brother. Welcome to our Sanctuary. You have made the right choice, joining us, I assure you.
translations.chinese: 欢迎，兄弟。欢迎来到我们的圣所。我向你保证，你选择加入我们是正确的决定。

translations.english: So what are you doing here? Lorkhan's eyes, you can't let the Thalmor get to him first! Get back to Riften!
translations.chinese: 那你在这里干嘛？洛克汗的眼啊，不能让梭默接近他！快回裂谷城！

translations.english: I found Esbern. He's hiding out somewhere in the Ratway.
translations.chinese: 我找到了伊思本。他躲在鼠道里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006EBD6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So what are you doing here? Lorkhan's eyes, you can't let the Thalmor get to him first! Get back to Riften! | ZH: 那你在这里干嘛？洛克汗的眼啊，不能让梭默接近他！快回裂谷城！ | SID: 0012BF
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I found Esbern. He's hiding out somewhere in the Ratway. | ZH: 我找到了伊思本。他躲在鼠道里。 | SID: 00B8D0

translations.english: Lorkhan's eyes, do I have to do everything myself? Get back to Riften before the Thalmor find him!
translations.chinese: 洛克汗的眼啊，所有事难不成都得要我去办吗？在梭默找到他前快回裂谷城。

translations.english: Did you tell him you were Dragonborn? I didn't think so.
translations.chinese: 我看你没告诉他你是龙裔吧？

translations.english: I found Esbern, but he won't talk to me.
translations.chinese: 我找到伊思本了，但他不理我。

translations.english: I don't suppose they want the world to end any more than we do. Or at least, they'd prefer to end it on their terms.
translations.chinese: 我不认为他们会比我们更希望世界终结，或者说，至少是更希望按照他们方式结束。

translations.english: But if you mean me, now, in particular... maybe they've started to get an inkling of what the return of the dragons means.
translations.chinese: 但如果是指他们现在要找我……或许是他们已经对龙族回归的意义有些了解了。

translations.english: Well. They've been hunting down Blades since the Great War, on general principle.
translations.chinese: 嗯。他们自浩大战争开始就一直在追捕刀锋会成员。

translations.chinese: 真的？他安全了吗？他在哪里？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006EBD9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Really? He's safe? Where is he? | ZH: 真的？他安全了吗？他在哪里？ | SID: 00B2B1

translations.english: Haven't you been paying attention to anything I've said? Only you can finally defeat Alduin and avert the end of the world!
translations.chinese: 你没听我说的话吗？只有你可以最终击败奥杜因，避免世界的终结！

translations.english: If we can just find out what this Dragonrend Shout is, you may have a chance.
translations.chinese: 如果我们找到龙魂撕裂龙吼的方法，你就有机会了。

translations.english: Or not. There's no guarantee with prophecy. Merely hope.
translations.chinese: 当然也可能没有。预言是没保证的。只是希望而已。

translations.english: But... I don't yet know how you can stop him. The prophecy doesn't say. But Alduin's Wall does. I hope.
translations.chinese: 但……我还不知道你如何才能阻止他。预言里没提到。我希望奥杜因之墙有线索。

translations.english: It's the prophecy, don't you see? Only a Dragonborn can stop Alduin and avert the end of the world!
translations.chinese: 你没看到这预言吗？只有龙裔能够阻止奥杜因，避免世界被终结。

translations.english: Not yet, not yet. When we get to Riverwood... with Delphine... I'll tell you both then, when I've collected my thoughts.
translations.chinese: 不到时候，不到时候。等我们到了河木镇……跟戴尔芬会合……我会告诉你们俩。先让我整理一下思路。

translations.english: I still need some time to get used to the idea that there might be hope for us after all.
translations.chinese: 我还需要些时间来接受我们还有希望这个念头。

translations.english: I never expected... well, suddenly here you are and now I'm too muddled to explain myself.
translations.chinese: 我从没期望过……你就这么出现了，搞得我有些语无伦次了。

translations.english: Now we're just fellow fugitives from the Thalmor. I didn't know she was still alive, but I'm not surprised. She was a survivor.
translations.chinese: 现在我们只是逃避梭默追捕的亡命人。我不知道她还活着，但她能幸存下来也很正常。

translations.english: Hasn't she told you? We were both Blades, back when that still meant something.
translations.chinese: 她没告诉你？我们过去都是刀锋会成员，那时候这身份还是有些分量的。

translations.english: What? You left him on his own? With the Thalmor after him? Go make sure he's safe and bring him here!
translations.chinese: 什么？你把他一个人扔下了？梭默在抓他啊。确保他的安全，把他带回来！

agentText:

translations.english: Mara's mercy, then he's safe! Come on, we have a lot to discuss.
translations.chinese: 玛拉保佑，那他安全了！来，我们还有很多事要讨论。

translations.english: He's here in Riverwood. Right outside.
translations.chinese: 他来河木镇了。就在外面。

translations.english: Some fear our new resident wizard. As they grow to know him, they will accept him.
translations.chinese: 有人害怕我们的新常驻巫师。等他们逐渐了解他，他们就会接受的。

translations.english: That which is unknown can create unease, even fear. It is to be expected.
translations.chinese: 未知的东西会造成不安乃至恐惧。这是情理之中。

translations.english: Time will prove me right.
translations.chinese: 时间会证明我是对的。

translations.chinese: 拜托，放我下来！

agentText:

Translations:

translations.english: I'm too weak right now. Between the spiders and the coven, I'd be dead before escaping the cave.
translations.chinese: 我现在太虚弱了。夹在蜘蛛和巫师团之间，我还没等逃出去就会死的。

translations.english: How are you holding up?
translations.chinese: 你还好吧？

agentText:

translations.english: They're good company if you want to study necromancy in peace, though.
translations.chinese: 不过，如果你想安静地学习死灵法术，他们确实是很好的伙伴。

translations.english: These are no dainty college mages. Bashnag has the skill of a magister and the mind of a warlord. This is a dangerous bunch.
translations.chinese: 他们不是什么优雅的学院派法师。巴什纳格拥有统治者的技巧和军阀的思维。这是一群危险的人。

translations.english: Tell me more about the Coven.
translations.chinese: 跟我再多说说巫师团的事。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Tell me more about the Coven. | ZH: 跟我再多说说巫师团的事。 | SID: 00D3E5

translations.english: You! Please, help me!
translations.chinese: 你！求你帮我！

translations.english: Hurry, cut me down!

translations.english: Last week a scholar came to us. He said he knew where we could find another fragment of Wuuthrad.
translations.chinese: 上周有位学者找到我们。他说他知道在哪儿能找到巫斯拉德的另一块碎片。

translations.english: That's a load off my mind. Here's your pay.
translations.chinese: 我心里轻松多了。这是你的报酬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F6D6]

translations.chinese: 好吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F6E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Already have. | ZH: 好吧。 | SID: 006F35

translations.english: Well, for that much, I don't think Malacath would turn his scowl on me. All right, outlander. My axe is yours.
translations.chinese: 既然如此，我觉得玛拉凯斯不会对我怒目相向了。好吧，外来者，我的斧头就是你的了。

translations.english: My honor isn't so cheap, outlander.
translations.chinese: 我的荣耀可不便宜，外来者。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My honor isn't so cheap, outlander. | ZH: 我的荣耀可不便宜，外来者。 | SID: 00AD99

translations.english: Suit yourself.
translations.chinese: 随你便。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7B7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Suit yourself. | ZH: 随你便。 | SID: 007F14

translations.english: Life's hard enough with all these men propositioning me. But that bard is the worst.
translations.chinese: 那么多男的找我求婚，搞得我生活一团糟。尤其那个吟游诗人最恶劣。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Life's hard enough with all these men propositioning me. But that bard is the worst. | ZH: 那么多男的找我求婚，搞得我生活一团糟。尤其那个吟游诗人最恶劣。 | SID: 00B9EF

translations.english: You're right. Malacath teaches us to meet our fate. Perhaps this is mine.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。玛拉凯斯教会我们直面命运。也许这就是我的命。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7D2]

translations.english: What do you know about my people, outlander?
translations.chinese: 你对我的族人有多了解，外来者？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7DC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What do you know about my people, outlander? | ZH: 你对我的族人有多了解，外来者？ | SID: 00B159

translations.english: You've done a fine thing for me. You know, I used to be quite a warrior in my day. Let me show you a thing or two.
translations.chinese: 你为我做了件好事。你知道吗，我以前是个很厉害的战士呢。我来教你两手。

translations.english: Irnskar's agreed to forgive your debt.
translations.chinese: 艾恩斯卡同意免除你的债务了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7DD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've done a fine thing for me. You know, I used to be quite a warrior in my day. Let me show you a thing or two. | ZH: 你为我做了件好事。你知道吗，我以前是个很厉害的战士呢。我来教你两手。 | SID: 006F48
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Irnskar's agreed to forgive your debt. | ZH: 艾恩斯卡同意免除你的债务了。 | SID: 006F47

translations.english: It's quite romantic, if you're an alchemist. Frost took the old fool a few seasons back, while he was looking for the Ring of Pure Mixtures.
translations.chinese: 如果你是炼金术士，就知道这有多浪漫了。几年前严寒把那个老傻瓜带走了，当时他正在寻找提纯戒指。

translations.english: My husband. We used to go out in the wilds and collect ingredients together. He used to call me his "pretty Juniper."
translations.chinese: 因为我丈夫。我们曾经一起去野外收集食材，他管我叫“美丽的刺柏”。

translations.english: I found the ring's resting place after he died, but I'm far too old to go exploring some cave, now.
translations.chinese: 他死后我找到了戒指的下落，但我年纪大了，不能再去洞穴探险了。

translations.english: How'd you pick up the herb trade?
translations.chinese: 你是怎么开始草药生意的？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Good. I'll have a sack of coin waiting for you when you get back.
translations.chinese: 好。等你回来时，我给你准备一袋金币。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. I'll have a sack of coin waiting for you when you get back. | ZH: 好。等你回来时，我给你准备一袋金币。 | SID: 00348D

translations.english: You're right. Look at me, talking in circles like some old wise woman. Very well, outlander. You have my axe when you need it.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。看看我，就跟智妪一样说话兜圈子了。很好，外来者。需要的时候，我的斧子就是你的了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Yes, but I am honor-bound to stay here.
translations.chinese: 没错，但我有义务留在这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, but I am honor-bound to stay here. | ZH: 没错，但我有义务留在这儿。 | SID: 0041CA

translations.english: If you want to try, go right ahead. I don't think anything will get through that thick skull of his, though.
translations.chinese: 如果你想试试那就去吧。不过，我觉得他那个笨脑壳是怎么也穿不透了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you want to try, go right ahead. I don't think anything will get through that thick skull of his, though. | ZH: 如果你想试试那就去吧。不过，我觉得他那个笨脑壳是怎么也穿不透了。 | SID: 00293F

translations.english: Yes, but I must stay here and wait for the day when I'll be married and sent to another stronghold.
translations.chinese: 是的，但我必须待在这里，等待结婚并前往另一个要塞的那一天。

translations.english: It is our way, and I am proud to follow my people's traditions, but I can't help but feel chained.
translations.chinese: 这就是我们的习俗，我很自豪能够遵循我们族人的传统，但我还是感受到了束缚感。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7F2]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, but I must stay here and wait for the day when I'll be married and sent to another stronghold. | ZH: 是的，但我必须待在这里，等待结婚并前往另一个要塞的那一天。 | SID: 001174

translations.english: I couldn't. It would shame my chief and my mother and foremothers.
translations.chinese: 不能。那会让我的酋长、母亲和女性先人蒙羞。

translations.english: Why don't you come with me?
translations.chinese: 你为什么不和我一起走呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7F6]
Translations:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why don't you come with me? | ZH: 你为什么不和我一起走呢？ | SID: 00B156

translations.english: I told everyone he died during questioning, and I need you to track him down and make sure he doesn't show up to disprove that.
translations.chinese: 我跟其他人说他在审讯时死了，我需要你找到他确保他再也不能出来反驳这点。

translations.english: I may have accidentally let a prisoner escape. The leader of one of those bandit groups.
translations.chinese: 我可能不小心放走了一个囚犯。是个强盗集团的头子。

translations.english: What's this problem you have?
translations.chinese: 你有什么麻烦？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F7F9]

- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's this problem you have? | ZH: 你有什么麻烦？ | SID: 008A89

translations.english: I used to look forward to the day when I was of age, to see new places and people, but now it feels like a cage.
translations.chinese: 当我长大后，我曾期待有一天能看到新的地方和新的人，但现在仿佛置身牢笼。

translations.english: No. A chief's daughter marries who her chief wishes. It ensures the stronghold receives a fair trade in goods for my absence.
translations.chinese: 不知道。酋长的女儿会遵循酋长的意愿出嫁。这样我离开的时候要塞就能得到公平的货物交易。

agentText:

translations.english: I do. There is a freedom the roads give you that the stronghold does not.
translations.chinese: 没错。冒险带来的自由是要塞给予不了的。

translations.english: But I have a place here, and I wouldn't want to dishonor my clan by leaving again like some young pup.
translations.chinese: 但我在这里有一席之地，不想像个小狗崽子一样再次离开了，这会让我的氏族蒙羞。

translations.english: I couldn't. It would dishonor the place the chief has made for me.
translations.chinese: 不能。这会让酋长为我安排的位置蒙羞。

translations.english: Why don't you travel with me?
translations.chinese: 你为什么不跟我一起旅行呢？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Why don't you travel with me? | ZH: 你为什么不跟我一起旅行呢？ | SID: 0069EA

translations.english: You wouldn't be a sellsword, would you? I have a little problem you could solve.
translations.chinese: 你不会是佣兵吧？我有个小问题让你解决。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F805]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You wouldn't be a sellsword, would you? I have a little problem you could solve. | ZH: 你不会是佣兵吧？我有个小问题让你解决。 | SID: 00B240

translations.english: I am Larak's daughter. Soon, I'll be of age and will be sent to marry an Orc chief in some distant stronghold.
translations.chinese: 我是拉拉克的女儿。很快，我就会成年了，会被派去某个遥远的要塞嫁给一位兽人酋长。

translations.english: Until then, I train. My new home will need strength, and my new sisters must know I am not weak when I arrive.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，我需要训练。我的新家需要力量，在我到那里的时候，我的新姐妹必须知道我并不虚弱。

agentText:

translations.english: I am an Orc and a warrior, but I have no desire to become chief.
translations.chinese: 我是兽人，也是战士。但我不想当酋长。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F807]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am an Orc and a warrior, but I have no desire to become chief. | ZH: 我是兽人，也是战士。但我不想当酋长。 | SID: 002D1E

translations.english: Are you looking to work? The mines are nearby. You bring me ore, I'll give you coin.
translations.chinese: 在找工作吗？矿场就在附近。你给我矿石，我给你金币。

translations.english: I did. I was known as Ghorbash gro-Dushnikh in those days, in honor of my homeland.
translations.chinese: 是的。那段日子，我被叫做“格巴什·格洛-杜什尼克”，以此来纪念我的家乡。

translations.english: Many Orcs leave the stronghold to join the Legion. They welcome our skill in battle and smithing, and we welcome a chance to see the world.
translations.chinese: 许多兽人离开要塞加入军团。他们欢迎我们的战斗技巧和锻造技术，而我们也喜欢有机会见见世面。

translations.english: Thank you for asking.
translations.chinese: 承你问我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F80C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you for asking. | ZH: 承你问我了。 | SID: 006480

translations.english: As you wish.
translations.chinese: 如你所愿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0006F812]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As you wish. | ZH: 如你所愿。 | SID: 00B14A

translations.english: Thank you. Here, let an old alchemist pass on some of her secrets to you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。来，让我这个老炼金术士教你一些秘诀吧。

translations.english: I have your ring.
translations.chinese: 我拿到你的戒指了。

translations.english: Too many drinking games, too many bets, and I'm too old to ever raise the coin on my own.
translations.chinese: 我划拳赌博次数太多了，而且这么大岁数，也没法自己筹钱。

translations.english: You're in debt to Irnskar?
translations.chinese: 你欠艾恩斯卡钱？

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're in debt to Irnskar? | ZH: 你欠艾恩斯卡钱？ | SID: 001B8F

translations.english: By then, Burguk had already become chief, and he welcomed me home as family, not a rival as is tradition.
translations.chinese: 那时候，博古克已经当上酋长了，他欢迎我回家，把我当成家人，而不是传统中的对手。

translations.english: Me? I'm Burguk's brother. I came back after serving many years in the Legion.
translations.chinese: 我？我是博古克的兄弟。我在军团服役很多年之后回来了。

translations.english: You bested me, an Orc chief. Impressive.
translations.chinese: 你比我这个兽人酋长要强。不可思议。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 一群异邦来的麻烦制造者。四处游荡捣乱，恐吓公民。

translations.chinese: 吟游诗人学院可怜的吉劳德·格玛尼都等我最新的作品《奥拉夫与龙》等了好几周了。但现在路上实在太乱了。

translations.english: What kind of writing do you do?

translations.english: Lost my helmet in one of the old caves. My pretty, pretty helmet. Life just got worse after that. Kept losing things. So many things....

translations.english: I was the finest scout in the Legion, once. Tracked down all the places in the wilds that were causing people trouble.
translations.chinese: 我曾经是军团最好的侦察兵。在荒野中能找到一切会给军队带来麻烦的地方。

translations.english: What's your story, old man?
translations.chinese: 讲讲你的故事吧，老人家。

translations.english: Look at it. That's real Nord craftsmanship, that is! Let me show you an old trick I learned as a scout. Makes it harder for the enemy to notice you.

translations.english: I found your helmet.
translations.chinese: 我找到你的头盔了。

translations.chinese: 如果你是领主的手下，你就能拿到木材。安佳木材厂有债必还。

translations.chinese: 看看你能在烧毁的房子那里找到什么。

translations.english: Can't prove it. But I could use your help, being unbiased and all.
translations.chinese: 没法证明。但我需要你的帮助，不偏不倚的帮助。

translations.english: I'll pay you to figure it, whether or not he's guilty.
translations.chinese: 我会付钱给你，查清楚他到底有没有罪。

translations.english: So why haven't you arrested him?
translations.chinese: 那你为什么不逮捕他？

translations.chinese: 如果你相信赫鲁加的话，那就是炉火把熊油点着了。

translations.english: I do, but some folk here think he set the fire himself.
translations.chinese: 但我知道，有人觉得是他自己放的火。

translations.english: What does Hroggar say happened?
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加说是怎么回事？

translations.english: Best tell the Jarl.
translations.chinese: 最好告诉领主。

translations.chinese: 这里的精魂世界很强大。

translations.english: Look to the graveyard. That is where you'll find her.
translations.chinese: 去墓地看看吧。你可能在那里找到她。

translations.english: Helgi's ghost asked me to find her.
translations.chinese: 海尔吉的鬼魂让我去找她。

translations.chinese: 他们都觉得他是为了摆脱妻子和阿尔瓦在一起才这么干的。

translations.english: He moved in with her the day after the fire. Even I find that suspicious.
translations.chinese: 火灾第二天他就搬过去和她住了。连我都觉得可疑。

translations.english: The townsfolk won't go near it. Superstitious lot.
translations.chinese: 镇上的人都不敢靠近。太迷信了。

translations.english: Hroggar's house? He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加家？他在大火中失去了妻女。

translations.english: What happened to that burned down house?
translations.chinese: 那所被烧毁的房子是怎么回事？

translations.chinese: 谁在那儿？是你吗，爸爸？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00070E7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who's there? Is that you, father? | ZH: 谁在那儿？是你吗，爸爸？ | SID: 000154

translations.english: You mean... there's still a chance? But how? Our plan has gone to ruin, everyone is dead, the Family...
translations.chinese: 你是说……还有机会？但能怎么办？我们的计划泡汤了，所有人都死了，整个家都……

translations.english: The contract is still on. The true Emperor must be assassinated.
translations.chinese: 契约还在继续。必须杀了真皇帝。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 啊，对了。我就知道你想报复。我最后一次收到的消息说，他在独孤城码头，负责皇帝离开时的指挥工作。

translations.english: Commander Maro. Where is he?
translations.chinese: 马洛指挥官。他在哪？

translations.chinese: 你找到了？我找这把剑好几个月了。你一个人对付了那么多强盗？

translations.english: Thank you. Here, my father had a favorite sword and shield technique. Let me teach it to you, in honor of his memory.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。来，这是我父亲最喜欢的剑盾技巧。为了纪念他，我来教教你。

translations.english: I have your sword.
translations.chinese: 我找到你的剑了。

translations.english: Next time you speak to him, tell him to clean up his own messes. I'm not about to jeopardize this position for a bunch of low-life thugs.
translations.chinese: 下次你跟他说话的时候，让他自己收拾烂摊子。我可不想因为一群低贱的混混搞丢了自己的位子。

translations.chinese: 啊，对，没错。我想以后有的是时间四处逛逛，还是看看前面有什么吧。

translations.english: He came from the ancient homeland and killed all the elves.
translations.chinese: 他自古老的故土而来，杀了所有精灵。

translations.english: Ysgramor was the hero who started the Companions. Wuuthrad was his weapon.
translations.chinese: 伊斯格拉默是创建了战友团的英雄，而巫斯拉德就是他的武器。

translations.english: But not all of them, because some of them are still here.
translations.chinese: 但也不是全杀光了，因为还有些残存在这里。

translations.chinese: 所以他们也不喜欢我们。

translations.english: Bad people who don't like werewolves.
translations.chinese: 不喜欢狼人的坏家伙。

translations.chinese: 如果你高尚且强壮，那我会称你为兄弟。

translations.english: I watch you to make sure you are honorable.
translations.chinese: 我会观察你，以确保你确实心怀荣耀。

translations.english: Many battles have been fought here over the centuries. Graves were dug and monuments built, and the town grew around these.
translations.chinese: 千百年来这里发生过很多战争。人们挖了坟，立了碑，城镇就在这里兴起了。

translations.english: Falkreath's reputation has faded somewhat, but the graves remain, reminding us of the one inevitable truth of life.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的名声已经有些褪色了，但这些坟墓仍在，提醒我们生命中一个不可避免的真理。

translations.english: In time, Falkreath came to be known as the heroes' graveyard. Many noble Jarls and renowned warriors asked to be buried here.
translations.chinese: 随着时间推移，佛克瑞斯也因为英雄的坟墓而闻名。很多贵族领主和著名的战士都要求埋葬在此。

translations.english: It was Dengeir who made me a steward, long ago when he was young.
translations.chinese: 是丹格尔任命我的，很久以前的事了，那时候他还年轻。

translations.english: When Dengeir's health began to fail, young Sidgeir was appointed Jarl in his stead. It was simpler just to keep me as steward.
translations.chinese: 随着丹格尔身体状况恶化，年轻的西德盖尔被任命为领主。让我继续当总管更简单了。

translations.english: Sidgeir has no interest in running his hold, and so leaves such matters to me. As for my part, I do my best to see that folk are treated fairly.
translations.chinese: 西德盖尔不想治理他的领地，所以事情都交给我了。就我而言，我会尽我所能确保人们得到公平的对待。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: When Dengeir's health began to fail, young Sidgeir was appointed Jarl in his stead. It was simpler just to keep me as steward. | ZH: 随着丹格尔身体状况恶化，年轻的西德盖尔被任命为领主。让我继续当总管更简单了。 | SID: 00AD19

translations.english: Difficult? I am a Jarl. I eat the most succulent meat, drink the finest ale and hunt with the best hounds in the hold.
translations.chinese: 困扰？我是领主啊。我吃着最鲜美的肉，喝着最上等的酒，带着领地里最好的猎犬打猎。

translations.english: Being a Jarl could hardly be simpler. You should try it sometime.
translations.chinese: 当领主再简单不过了。你要是能有机会也可以试试。

translations.english: Meanwhile, my very capable steward sees to the needs of the smallfolk and ensures that my hold runs smoothly.
translations.chinese: 同时，我那个非常能干的总管负责照顾小民的需要，保证我的领地运行平稳。

translations.english: My uncle Dengeir was Jarl until a short time ago. His old age and failing health caught up with him, and he stepped down.
translations.chinese: 我叔叔丹格尔前不久还是领主。但他年纪大了，身体不好，所以辞职了。

translations.english: He now serves us honorably as Thane, and to the great benefit of the hold, I now serve as Jarl.
translations.chinese: 他现在光荣地担任武卫为我们服务。而对我们领地大有好处的是，我成了领主。

translations.chinese: 这件事就这么过去吧。让其他人先淡忘我的所作所为。

translations.english: Yes, you certainly do.
